## Aave

*1 queries*

### gnosis_aave_borrows_1hop_v

**Query ID:** 5131984 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      aave_borrows AS (
        SELECT 
          block_time   AS borrow_time,
          evt_index    AS borrow_evt_index,
          COALESCE(on_behalf_of, borrower) AS borrower,
          token_address,
          symbol,
          amount        AS borrow_amount,
          amount_usd    AS borrow_amount_usd,
          tx_hash  AS borrow_tx_hash
        FROM aave_gnosis.borrow
        WHERE transaction_type = 'borrow'
      ),
    
     first_hop AS (
        SELECT
          ab.borrow_time,
          ab.borrow_evt_index,
          ab.borrower,
          ab.borrow_amount,
          ab.borrow_amount_usd,
          ab.symbol,
          ab.token_address,
          t1."to"        AS hop1_to,
          t1.block_time  AS hop1_time,
          t1.evt_index   AS hop1_evt_index,
          t1.amount      AS hop1_amount,
          t1.amount_usd  AS hop1_amount_usd,
          t1.tx_hash AS hop1_tx_hash,
          ab.borrow_tx_hash,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY ab.borrower, ab.borrow_time, ab.borrow_evt_index
            ORDER BY t1.block_time, t1.evt_index
          ) AS rn
        FROM aave_borrows ab
        JOIN tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
          ON t1."from" = ab.borrower
          AND t1.contract_address = ab.token_address
         AND (t1.block_time > ab.borrow_time
           OR (t1.block_time = ab.borrow_time AND t1.evt_index > ab.borrow_evt_index))
      )
    
    
    SELECT
      t1.borrow_time,
      t1.borrow_evt_index,
      t1.hop1_time,
      t1.hop1_evt_index,
      t1.borrower,
      t1.symbol,
      t1.borrow_amount,
      t1.borrow_amount_usd,
      t1.hop1_amount,
      t1.hop1_amount_usd,
      COALESCE(t2.label, CAST(t1.hop1_to AS VARCHAR)) AS hop1_name,
      t1.hop1_to,
      t1.hop1_tx_hash,
      t1.borrow_tx_hash
    FROM first_hop t1
    LEFT JOIN
        dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_address_labels_v t2 --query_5132156 t2 --gnosis_address_labels_v
        ON t2.address = t1.hop1_to 
    WHERE t1.rn = 1
    ```

## Address

*4 queries*

### gnosis_address_labels_history_v

**Query ID:** 5923274 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    pay_wallets_base AS (
      SELECT pay_wallet AS address, creation_time, activation_time
      FROM query_3707804
    ),
    safe_wallets_base AS (
      SELECT address, creation_time
      FROM safe_gnosis.safes
      WHERE address NOT IN (SELECT address FROM pay_wallets_base)
    ),
    
    extra_labels_base AS (
      SELECT address, name AS label
      FROM query_2418768
    ),
    
    tokens_base AS (
      SELECT
          e.contract_address AS address,
          CASE
            WHEN e.contract_address = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
              THEN 'NullAddress'
            ELSE CONCAT(e.symbol, '_', CAST(e.contract_address AS VARCHAR))
          END AS label
      FROM tokens.erc20 e
      WHERE e.blockchain = 'gnosis'
        AND e.contract_address NOT IN (SELECT address FROM extra_labels_base)
    ),
    
    gpay_labeled AS (
      SELECT
          address,
          'gpay' AS label,
          introduced_at,
          activation_at,
          'gpay' AS source
      FROM (
        SELECT
          p.address,
          MIN(p.creation_time) OVER (PARTITION BY p.address) AS introduced_at,
          MIN(p.activation_time) OVER (PARTITION BY p.address) AS activation_at,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.address ORDER BY p.creation_time) AS rn
        FROM pay_wallets_base p
      ) q
      WHERE rn = 1
    ),
    
    safe_labeled AS (
      SELECT
          address,
          'safe' AS label,
          introduced_at,
          CAST(NULL AS timestamp) AS activation_at,
          'safe' AS source
      FROM (
        SELECT
          s.address,
          MIN(s.creation_time) OVER (PARTITION BY s.address) AS introduced_at,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.address ORDER BY s.creation_time) AS rn
        FROM safe_wallets_base s
      ) q
      WHERE rn = 1
    ),
    
    eoa_labeled AS (
      SELECT address, 'eoa' AS label, introduced_at, CAST(NULL AS timestamp) AS activation_at, 'eoa' AS source
      FROM (
        SELECT
          t."from" AS address,
          t.block_time AS introduced_at,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t."from" ORDER BY t.block_time) AS rn
        FROM gnosis.transactions t
      ) x WHERE rn = 1
    ),
    
    contracts_labeled AS (
      SELECT
          c.address,
          c.name AS label,
          CAST(c.created_at AS timestamp) AS introduced_at,
          CAST(NULL AS timestamp) AS activation_at,
          'labels.contracts' AS source
      FROM labels.contracts c
      WHERE c.blockchain = 'gnosis'
        AND c.address NOT IN (SELECT address FROM pay_wallets_base)
        AND c.address NOT IN (SELECT address FROM safe_wallets_base)
        AND c.address NOT IN (SELECT address FROM extra_labels_base)
        AND c.address NOT IN (SELECT address FROM tokens_base)
    ),
    
    extra_labels_labeled AS (
      SELECT
          e.address,
          e.label,
          CAST('1970-01-01 00:00:00' AS timestamp) AS introduced_at,
          CAST(NULL AS timestamp) AS activation_at,
          'custom' AS source
      FROM extra_labels_base e
    ),
    
    tokens_labeled AS (
      SELECT b.address, b.label, t.introduced_at, CAST(NULL AS timestamp) AS activation_at, 'erc20' AS source
      FROM tokens_base b
      LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT contract_address, introduced_at
        FROM (
          SELECT
            t.contract_address,
            t.block_time AS introduced_at,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.contract_address ORDER BY t.block_time) AS rn
          FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers t
        ) y WHERE rn = 1
      ) t ON t.contract_address = b.address
    ),
    
    all_labels AS (
      SELECT * FROM gpay_labeled
      UNION ALL SELECT * FROM safe_labeled
      UNION ALL SELECT * FROM eoa_labeled
      UNION ALL SELECT * FROM contracts_labeled
      UNION ALL SELECT * FROM extra_labels_labeled
      UNION ALL SELECT * FROM tokens_labeled
    ),
    
    scored AS (
      SELECT
        address,
        label,
        introduced_at,
        activation_at,
        source,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
          PARTITION BY address
          ORDER BY
            CASE
              WHEN source = 'custom'            THEN 1
              WHEN source = 'labels.contracts'  THEN 2
              WHEN source = 'erc20'             THEN 3
              WHEN source IN ('gpay','safe')    THEN 4
              WHEN source = 'eoa'               THEN 5
              ELSE 9
            END ASC,
            COALESCE(introduced_at, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 00:00:00') DESC,
            label ASC
        ) AS rn
      FROM all_labels
    )
    
    SELECT address, label, introduced_at, COALESCE(activation_at, introduced_at) AS activation_at, source
    FROM scored
    WHERE rn = 1
    ORDER BY introduced_at, source, address;
    ```

### gnosis_address_labels_latest_v

    ```sql
    FROM query_5923274
    WHERE DATE(activation_at) = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1' DAY
    ```

### gnosis_address_labels_range_v

**Query ID:** 5923308 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `end_dt` (datetime): `2025-10-07 00:00:00`
- `start_dt` (datetime): `2025-10-01 00:00:00`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH params AS (
      SELECT
        CAST('{{start_dt}}' AS timestamp) AS start_ts,
        CAST('{{end_dt}}'   AS timestamp) AS end_ts
    )
    SELECT address, label, introduced_at, source
    FROM query_5923274 
    WHERE DATE(introduced_at) >= (SELECT start_ts FROM params)
      AND DATE(introduced_at) <= (SELECT end_ts  FROM params)
    ORDER BY introduced_at, address;
    ```

### gnosis_address_labels_v

**Query ID:** 5132156 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    pay_wallets AS (
        SELECT pay_wallet AS address FROM query_3707804 --gnosis_gp_balance_diff_daily_v
    ),
    
    safe_wallets AS (
        SELECT
            address 
        FROM safe_gnosis.safes
        WHERE address NOT IN (SELECT address FROM pay_wallets)
    ),
    
    eoa_wallets AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT "from" AS address FROM gnosis.transactions
    
    ),
    
    extra_labels AS (
        SELECT address, name AS label FROM query_2418768 --Gnosis Project Labels
    ),
    
    tokens AS (
      SELECT 
          contract_address AS address,
          IF(
            contract_address = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000,
            'NullAddress',
            CONCAT(
              symbol, '_',
              SUBSTR(CAST(contract_address AS VARCHAR), 1, 6),  
              '…',
              SUBSTR(CAST(contract_address AS VARCHAR), 39)      
            )
          ) AS label
      FROM tokens.erc20
      WHERE blockchain='gnosis'
        AND contract_address NOT IN (SELECT address FROM extra_labels)
    ),
    
    contracts AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT address, name AS label FROM labels.contracts
        WHERE blockchain='gnosis' 
        and address NOT IN (SELECT address FROM pay_wallets)
        and address NOT IN (SELECT address FROM safe_wallets)
        and address NOT IN (SELECT address FROM extra_labels)
        and address NOT IN (SELECT address FROM tokens)
    )
    
    SELECT address, 'gpay' AS label FROM pay_wallets
    UNION ALL
    SELECT address, 'safe' AS label FROM safe_wallets
    UNION ALL
    SELECT address, 'eoa' AS label FROM eoa_wallets
    UNION ALL
    SELECT address, label FROM contracts
    UNION ALL
    SELECT address, label FROM extra_labels
    UNION ALL
    SELECT address, label FROM tokens
    ```

## Age

*1 queries*

### gnosis_age_cohorts_bluechips_token_balances_weekly_v

**Query ID:** 4432533 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    users_bluechips_token_balances_diff AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week',block_date) AS block_date,
            token_address,
            symbol,
            wallet,
            SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            query_4432380 --gnosis_users_bluechips_token_balances_diff_daily_v
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            token_address
            ,wallet
            ,block_date
            ,DATE_DIFF('day', min_block_date, block_date) As wallet_age
        FROM (
            SELECT
                token_address
                ,wallet
                ,MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
                users_bluechips_token_balances_diff
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), DATE_TRUNC('week',CURRENT_DATE), INTERVAL '7' DAY)) s(block_date)
    ),
    
    
    user_daily_bluechips_balance_dense AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,token_address
            ,wallet
            ,wallet_age
            ,SUM(amount_raw) OVER (PARTITION BY wallet, token_address ORDER BY block_date) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_date
                ,t1.token_address
                ,t1.wallet
                ,t1.wallet_age
                ,COALESCE(t2.amount_raw,0) AS amount_raw
            FROM 
                calendar t1
            LEFT JOIN
                users_bluechips_token_balances_diff t2
                ON t2.token_address = t1.token_address
                AND t2.block_date = t1.block_date
                AND t2.wallet = t1.wallet
        )
    ),
    
    price_end_week AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_date) AS block_date
            ,token_address
            ,symbol
            ,decimals
            ,ARRAY_AGG(price ORDER BY block_date DESC)[1] AS price
        FROM
             dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v t3 --query_5172975 t3 --gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    ),
    
    user_daily_bluechips_balance_usd AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,CASE
                WHEN t1.wallet_age < 30 THEN '<1 month'
                WHEN t1.wallet_age < 90 THEN '1-3 month'
                WHEN t1.wallet_age < 180 THEN '3-6 month'
                WHEN t1.wallet_age < 365 THEN '6-12 month'
                WHEN t1.wallet_age < 730 THEN '1-2 years'
                ELSE '>=2 years'
            END AS cohort
            ,t3.symbol
            ,SUM(t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t3.decimals)) AS amount
            ,SUM(t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price) AS amount_usd
        FROM 
            user_daily_bluechips_balance_dense t1
        LEFT JOIN
            price_end_week t3 
            ON t3.block_date = t1.block_date
            AND
            (
            t3.token_address = t1.token_address
             OR  -- EURe versions
            (t3.token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e AND t1.token_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430)
            OR -- GBPe versions
            (t3.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 AND t1.token_address = 0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053)
            )
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
        user_daily_bluechips_balance_usd
    WHERE symbol IS NOT NULL
    ```

## Agents

*1 queries*

### gnosis_agents_performance_PMA_LastMonth_v

**Query ID:** 5620557 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omen_gnosis_trades AS (
          SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.trades
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets_status AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3601593
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3668567 
    ),
    
    ai_agents_makers AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3584116
        WHERE
            label = 'Replicator'
    ),
    
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.address
            ,t1.label
            ,t2.date_cutoff
        FROM 
            query_3582994 t1
        INNER JOIN
             query_3644289 t2
             ON t2.label = t1.label
        WHERE
            t2.ranking = 'PMA'
            AND
            t2.range = 'Last Month'
    ),
    
    relevant_markets AS (
        SELECT
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,label
            ,ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT bet_outcome ) AS bet_outcome
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT 
                t2.label
                ,fixedproductmarketmaker
                ,outcomeIndex AS bet_outcome
            FROM omen_gnosis_trades t1
            INNER JOIN
                ai_agents_traders AS t2
                ON t2.address = t1.tx_from OR  t2.address = t1.tx_to
            WHERE
                action = 'Buy'
           --     AND
            --    t1.block_time >= t2.date_cutoff
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    
    ),
    
    markets_outcome AS (
    SELECT 
            t2.label
            ,t1.conditionid
            ,t1.questionid
            ,t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,t1.creation_time AS start_time
            ,t1.opening_time
            ,t1.timeout
            ,t3.Status AS market_status
            ,FILTER(
              TRANSFORM(
                t3.payoutNumerators,
                x -> CASE WHEN x <> 0 THEN ARRAY_POSITION(t3.payoutNumerators, x) - 1 ELSE NULL END
              )
              , x -> x IS NOT NULL) AS payout_outcome
            ,t2.bet_outcome
            ,t3.resolution_time
            ,t3.is_valid
        FROM 
            omen_gnosis_markets t1
        INNER JOIN
            relevant_markets t2
           ON t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        LEFT JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets_status t3
            ON t3.conditionId = t1.conditionid
            AND t3.questionId = t1.questionid
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_makers AS t4
            ON t4.address = t1.creator 
        WHERE
            t3.resolution_time >= (SELECT date_cutoff FROM ai_agents_traders LIMIT 1)
       --     t3.is_valid = True
    ),
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            *
            ,array_union(payout_outcome,bet_outcome) = payout_outcome AS correct_bet
        FROM markets_outcome
    ),
    
    accuracy_sparse AS (
        SELECT 
            label AS agent
            ,resolution_time
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' THEN 1 END) OVER w AS cnt_resolved
            ,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN correct_bet AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) OVER w AS REAL) 
                /  NULLIF((COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) OVER w),0)  AS pct_correct
        FROM
            final
        WHERE 
            market_status = 'Resolved'
        WINDOW w AS (
            PARTITION BY 
                label
            ORDER BY 
                resolution_time
        )
    ),
    
    start_times AS (
        SELECT
            agent
            ,MIN(resolution_time) AS resolution_time_min
        FROM
            accuracy_sparse
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            t2.agent
            ,DATE_TRUNC('day',t1.time) AS day
        FROM
            gnosis.blocks t1
        CROSS JOIN
            start_times t2
        WHERE
            t1.time >= t2.resolution_time_min
        GROUP BY 
            1,2
    ),
    
    accuracy_sparse_hour AS (
        SELECT
            agent
            ,DATE_TRUNC('day', resolution_time) AS day
             ,ARRAY_AGG(cnt_resolved ORDER BY resolution_time DESC)[1] AS cnt_resolved
            ,ARRAY_AGG(pct_correct ORDER BY resolution_time DESC)[1] AS pct_correct
        FROM
            accuracy_sparse 
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        agent
        ,day
        ,LAST_VALUE(cnt_resolved) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY agent ORDER BY day) AS cnt_resolved
        ,LAST_VALUE(pct_correct) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY agent ORDER BY day) AS pct_correct
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.agent
            ,t2.day
            ,t1.cnt_resolved
            ,t1.pct_correct
        FROM
            accuracy_sparse_hour t1
        RIGHT JOIN
            calendar t2
            ON t2.agent = t1.agent
            AND t2.day = t1.day
    )
    ORDER BY 2
    ```

## Ai

*1 queries*

### gnosis_ai_agents_balance_diff_v

**Query ID:** 3870527 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omen_gnosis_ai_agents AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994 --omen_gnosis_ai_agents_traders
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM query_3584116 --omen_gnosis_ai_agents_makers
    ),
    
    balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_time
            ,t1.evt_index
            ,t1.tx_hash
            ,t1."from" AS address
            ,t2.label
            ,t1.token_standard
            ,t1.contract_address AS token_address
            ,t1.symbol
            ,-CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
            ,-t1.amount AS amount
            ,IF(t1.symbol = 'xDAI', -t1.amount, -t1.amount_usd) AS amount_usd
            FROM
               tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                omen_gnosis_ai_agents t2
                ON 
                t2.address = t1."from"
            
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT
            t1.block_time
            ,t1.evt_index
            ,t1.tx_hash
            ,t1.to AS address
            ,t2.label
            ,t1.token_standard
            ,t1.contract_address AS token_address
            ,t1.symbol
            ,CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
            ,t1.amount
            ,IF(t1.symbol = 'xDAI', t1.amount, t1.amount_usd) AS amount_usd
            FROM
               tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                omen_gnosis_ai_agents t2
                ON 
                t2.address = t1.to
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM balance_diff
    ```

## Atokens

*3 queries*

### gnosis_atokens_balance_daily_v

**Query ID:** 6511028 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    const AS (
      SELECT CAST('1000000000000000000000000000' AS UINT256) AS RAY  -- 1e27
    ),
    
    bluechips AS (
       SELECT * FROM query_6513938
    ),
    /* ------------------------------------------------------------
       7) Daily liquidity index per reserve (end-of-day)
          Take the last ReserveDataUpdated in that day by evt_index.
    ------------------------------------------------------------ */
    daily_index AS (
      SELECT
        date_trunc('day', r.evt_block_time) AS block_date,
        r.reserve,
        max_by(r.liquidityIndex, r.evt_index) AS liquidity_index_eod
      FROM aave_v3_gnosis.pool_evt_reservedataupdated r
      INNER JOIN
          bluechips t
          ON t.reserve = r.reserve
      GROUP BY 1,2
    ),
    
    abalance_diffs AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date,
            user,
            atoken,
            reserve,
            diff_scaled
        FROM query_6510802
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            user,
            atoken,
            reserve,
            block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                user,
                atoken,
                reserve,
                MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
                abalance_diffs
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) AS s(block_date)
    ),
    
    /* ------------------------------------------------------------
       8) Compute running scaled balance per (user, atoken)
          and convert to actual aToken balance at EOD index:
            actual = floor(scaled * index / RAY)
    ------------------------------------------------------------ */
    daily_balances AS (
      SELECT
        t.block_date,
        t.user,
        t.atoken,
        t.reserve,
        SUM(COALESCE(d.diff_scaled,CAST(0 AS INT256))) OVER (
          PARTITION BY t.user, t.atoken
          ORDER BY t.block_date
          ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS scaled_balance
      FROM
          calendar t
      INNER JOIN 
          abalance_diffs d
          ON
          d.user = t.user
          AND d.atoken = t.atoken
          AND d.block_date = t.block_date
    ),
    
    abalances_daily_dense AS (
        SELECT
          b.block_date,
          b.user AS address,
          b.atoken AS atoken_address,
          b.reserve AS reserve_address,
          b.scaled_balance,
        
          -- actual aToken balance (end-of-day), clamped at 0 if your window starts mid-history
          CASE
            WHEN b.scaled_balance <= CAST(0 AS INT256) THEN CAST(0 AS UINT256)
            ELSE
              (
                CAST(b.scaled_balance AS UINT256) * i.liquidity_index_eod
              ) / (SELECT RAY FROM const)
          END AS atoken_balance_eod,
        
          -- for aTokens, the underlying claim is numerically the same as the aToken balance (same decimals)
          CASE
            WHEN b.scaled_balance <= CAST(0 AS INT256) THEN CAST(0 AS UINT256)
            ELSE
              (
                CAST(b.scaled_balance AS UINT256) * i.liquidity_index_eod
              ) / (SELECT RAY FROM const)
          END AS underlying_amount_eod,
        
          i.liquidity_index_eod
        FROM daily_balances b
        JOIN daily_index i
          ON i.block_date = b.block_date
         AND i.reserve = b.reserve
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.block_date,
        t1.address,
        t1.atoken_address,
        t1.reserve_address,
        t2.symbol AS reserve_symbol,
        --t1.scaled_balance,
        --t1.atoken_balance_eod,
        --t1.underlying_amount_eod,
        --t1.liquidity_index_eod,
        t1.underlying_amount_eod/POWER(10,t3.decimals)  AS balance,
        t1.underlying_amount_eod/POWER(10,t3.decimals) * t3.price AS balance_usd
    FROM 
        abalances_daily_dense t1
    INNER JOIN
        bluechips t2
        ON t2.reserve = t1.reserve_address 
    INNER JOIN
        dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v t3
        ON 
        t3.symbol = t2.symbol
        AND
        t3.block_date = t1.block_date
    ```

### gnosis_atokens_balances_diff_daily_v

**Query ID:** 6510802 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    const AS (
      SELECT CAST('1000000000000000000000000000' AS UINT256) AS RAY  -- 1e27
    ),
    
    bluechips AS (
       SELECT * FROM query_6513938
    ),
    
    /* ------------------------------------------------------------
       1) reserve -> aToken mapping (adjust column/table names if needed)
    ------------------------------------------------------------ */
    reserve_map AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            t1.underlyingAsset  AS reserve,  
            t1.contract_address AS atoken
        FROM aave_v3_gnosis.atoken_evt_initialized t1
        INNER JOIN  
            bluechips t2
            ON t2.atoken = t1.contract_address
        
    ),
    
    /* ------------------------------------------------------------
       2) ReserveDataUpdated ordered per tx+reserve
          We use this to pick the right liquidityIndex for each pool event
    ------------------------------------------------------------ */
    market_ordered AS (
      SELECT
        t1.evt_block_time  AS block_time,
        t1.evt_block_number AS block_number,
        t1.evt_tx_hash     AS tx_hash,
        t1.reserve         AS reserve,
        t1.liquidityIndex  AS liquidity_index,
        t1.evt_index,
        row_number() OVER (
          PARTITION BY t1.evt_block_time, t1.evt_tx_hash, t1.reserve
          ORDER BY t1.evt_index
        ) AS event_order
      FROM aave_v3_gnosis.pool_evt_reservedataupdated t1
      INNER JOIN
          reserve_map t2
          ON t2.reserve = t1.reserve
    ),
    
    /* ------------------------------------------------------------
       3) Pool events (principal flows) in underlying units, ordered per tx+reserve
          NOTE: all amounts here are UINT256 exact.
    ------------------------------------------------------------ */
    pool_actions AS (
      -- Supply: +amount to onBehalfOf
      SELECT
        s.evt_block_time   AS block_time,
        s.evt_block_number AS block_number,
        s.evt_tx_hash      AS tx_hash,
        s.evt_index        AS evt_index,
        s.reserve          AS reserve,
        s.onBehalfOf       AS user,
        s.amount           AS amount_underlying,
        'supply'           AS action
      FROM aave_v3_gnosis.pool_evt_supply s
      INNER JOIN
          reserve_map t
          ON t.reserve = s.reserve
    
      UNION ALL
    
      -- Withdraw: -amount from user (the aToken holder)
      SELECT
        w.evt_block_time,
        w.evt_block_number,
        w.evt_tx_hash,
        w.evt_index,
        w.reserve,
        w.user             AS user,
        w.amount           AS amount_underlying,
        'withdraw'         AS action
      FROM aave_v3_gnosis.pool_evt_withdraw w
      INNER JOIN
          reserve_map t
          ON t.reserve = w.reserve
    
      UNION ALL
    
      -- Repay using aTokens: burns aTokens from the payer (repayer)
      -- If you don't have this table, remove this UNION ALL block.
      SELECT
        r.evt_block_time,
        r.evt_block_number,
        r.evt_tx_hash,
        r.evt_index,
        r.reserve,
        r.repayer          AS user,
        r.amount           AS amount_underlying,
        'repay_with_atokens' AS action
      FROM aave_v3_gnosis.pool_evt_repay r
      INNER JOIN
          reserve_map t
          ON t.reserve = r.reserve
      WHERE r.useATokens
    ),
    
    pool_actions_ordered AS (
      SELECT
        block_time,
        block_number,
        tx_hash,
        evt_index,
        reserve,
        user,
        amount_underlying,
        action,
        row_number() OVER (
          PARTITION BY block_time, tx_hash, reserve
          ORDER BY evt_index
        ) AS event_order
      FROM pool_actions
    ),
    
    /* ------------------------------------------------------------
       4) Convert pool actions to SCALED deltas (exact integer math)
          - Supply: rayDivFloor(amount, index) = floor(amount*RAY/index)
          - Withdraw/Repay: rayDivCeil(amount, index) = floor((amount*RAY + index - 1)/index)
    ------------------------------------------------------------ */
    pool_scaled_deltas AS (
      SELECT
        date_trunc('day', a.block_time) AS block_date,
        a.user,
        rm.atoken AS atoken,
        rm.reserve AS reserve,
        CASE
          WHEN a.action = 'supply' THEN
            CAST( (a.amount_underlying * (SELECT RAY FROM const)) / m.liquidity_index AS INT256 )
          ELSE
            -CAST(
              ((a.amount_underlying * (SELECT RAY FROM const)) + m.liquidity_index - CAST(1 AS UINT256))
              / m.liquidity_index
              AS INT256
            )
        END AS scaled_delta
      FROM pool_actions_ordered a
      JOIN market_ordered m
        ON a.block_time   = m.block_time
       AND a.block_number = m.block_number
       AND a.tx_hash      = m.tx_hash
       AND a.reserve      = m.reserve
       AND a.event_order  = m.event_order
      JOIN reserve_map rm
        ON rm.reserve = a.reserve
    ),
    
    /* ------------------------------------------------------------
       5) aToken BalanceTransfer deltas (already scaled)
          Covers: user-to-user transfers, liquidation transfers, etc.
    ------------------------------------------------------------ */
    transfer_scaled_deltas AS (
      SELECT
        date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS block_date,
        "from" AS user,
        contract_address AS atoken,
        CAST(NULL AS varbinary) AS reserve,
        -CAST(value AS INT256) AS scaled_delta
      FROM aave_v3_gnosis.atoken_evt_balancetransfer
      WHERE "from" <> 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        AND "to"   <> 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
    
      UNION ALL
    
      SELECT
        date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS block_date,
        "to" AS user,
        contract_address AS atoken,
        CAST(NULL AS varbinary) AS reserve,
        CAST(value AS INT256) AS scaled_delta
      FROM aave_v3_gnosis.atoken_evt_balancetransfer
      WHERE "from" <> 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        AND "to"   <> 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
    ),
    
    -- attach reserve to transfer rows via mapping
    transfer_scaled_deltas_mapped AS (
      SELECT
        t.block_date,
        t.user,
        t.atoken,
        rm.reserve,
        t.scaled_delta
      FROM transfer_scaled_deltas t
      JOIN reserve_map rm
        ON rm.atoken = t.atoken
    ),
    
    /* ------------------------------------------------------------
       6) Daily scaled diffs (pool + transfers)
    ------------------------------------------------------------ */
    daily_scaled_diff AS (
      SELECT
        block_date,
        user,
        atoken,
        reserve,
        SUM(scaled_delta) AS diff_scaled
      FROM (
        SELECT * FROM pool_scaled_deltas
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM transfer_scaled_deltas_mapped
      )
      GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
    ),
    
    gnosis_wallets_creation AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4396197 t2 --gnosis_wallets_creation_v
    )
    
    SELECT t1.* FROM daily_scaled_diff t1
    INNER JOIN gnosis_wallets_creation t2
    ON t2.address = t1.user
    ```

## Backedfi

*2 queries*

### gnosis_backedfi_balances_daily_v

**Query ID:** 4736448 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
     rwa_holders_balance_diff AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS block_day
            ,token
            ,name
            ,symbol
            ,address
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            query_4609451 --gnosis_backedfi_balances_diff_v
        WHERE 
            address != 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 , 4, 5
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            token
            ,name
            ,symbol
            ,address
            ,block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                token
                ,name
                ,symbol
                ,address
                ,MIN(block_day) AS min_block_day
            FROM rwa_holders_balance_diff
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_day AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    )
    
    
    SELECT
         t1.token
        ,t1.name
        ,t1.symbol
        ,t1.address
        ,t1.block_day
        ,(SUM(COALESCE(t2.amount_raw,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.token, t1.address ORDER BY t1.block_day))/POWER(10,18) AS balance
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        rwa_holders_balance_diff t2
        ON t2.token = t1.token
        AND t2.block_day = t1.block_day
        AND t2.address = t1.address
    ```

### gnosis_backedfi_balances_diff_v

**Query ID:** 4609451 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    backed_tokens AS (
        SELECT 
            newToken AS token
            ,name
            ,symbol
            ,evt_block_number AS creation_block_number 
        FROM backed_gnosis.BackedFactory_evt_NewToken
    
        UNION ALL
    
        SELECT 
            newToken AS token
            ,name
            ,symbol
            ,evt_block_number AS creation_block_number 
        FROM backed_gnosis.backedfactoryold_evt_newtoken
        
    ),
    
    transfers AS (
        SELECT
            t1.tx_hash
            ,t1.block_time
            ,t2.token
            ,t2.name
            ,t2.symbol
            ,t1."from"
            ,t1."to"
            ,t1.amount_raw
        FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            backed_tokens t2
            ON
            t2.token = t1.contract_address
        WHERE
            t1.block_number >= t2.creation_block_number
    ),
    
    accounts AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            address
        FROM (
            SELECT "from" AS address FROM transfers
            UNION ALL
            SELECT "to" AS address FROM transfers
        )
    ),
    
    balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
             block_time
            ,token
            ,name
            ,symbol
            ,address
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t1.block_time
                ,t1.token
                ,t1.name
                ,t1.symbol
                ,t2.address
                ,CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                accounts t2
                ON
                t2.address = t1."to"
        
            UNION ALL
        
            SELECT
                t1.block_time
                ,t1.token
                ,t1.name
                ,t1.symbol
                ,t2.address
                ,CAST(-t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                accounts t2
                ON
                t2.address = t1."from"
        )
        GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM balance_diff
    ```

## Balance

*1 queries*

### gnosis_balance_diff_bluechips_monthly_v

**Query ID:** 4360980 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    
    blueships AS (
       SELECT * FROM query_4361013 --gnosis_bluechip_tokens_v
    ),
    
    transfers AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_number,
            t1.block_time,
            t1.contract_address AS token_address,
            t2.symbol,
            t1."from",
            t1.to,
            t1.amount_raw
        FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            blueships t2
            ON t2.token_address = t1.contract_address
        WHERE
            t1.block_date < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL
    ),
    
    balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_number,
            t1.block_time,
            t1.token_address,
            t1.symbol,
            t1."from" AS wallet,
            -CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM transfers t1
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT
            t1.block_number,
            t1.block_time,
            t1.token_address,
            t1.symbol,
            t1."to" AS wallet,
            CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM transfers t1
    )
    
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', block_time) AS block_date,
        token_address,
        symbol,
        wallet,
        SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
    FROM 
        balance_diff
    GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
    ```

## Balancer

*1 queries*

### gnosis_balancer_circles_pools_v

**Query ID:** 5154790 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    crc20_tokens AS (
        SELECT 
            erc20Wrapper AS token_address
            ,IF(circlesType=0, 'CRC', 's-CRC') AS symbol
            ,18 AS decimals
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20lift_evt_erc20wrapperdeployed
    ),
    
    pool_creation AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.poolAddress AS pool
            ,t1.poolId
            ,token
            ,index
        FROM balancer_v2_gnosis.vault_evt_poolregistered t1
        INNER JOIN
            balancer_v2_gnosis.vault_evt_tokensregistered t2
            ON t2.poolId = t1.poolId
        CROSS JOIN
            UNNEST(t2.tokens) WITH ORDINALITY as s(token, index)
        CROSS JOIN crc20_tokens
        WHERE
            any_match(t2.tokens, element -> element IN (token_address))
        
    ),
    
    
    distinct_pools AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT pool, poolId FROM pool_creation
    ),
    
    liquidity AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.day 
            ,t1.pool_id
            ,t1.pool_address
            ,t1.version
            ,t1.pool_type
            ,t1.token_address
            ,IF(t3.token_address = t1.token_address, t3.symbol, t1.token_symbol) AS token_symbol
            ,IF(t3.token_address = t1.token_address, t1.token_balance_raw/POWER(10,18),  t1.token_balance) AS token_balance
            ,t1.pool_liquidity_usd
        FROM balancer.liquidity t1--balancer_v2_gnosis.liquidity t1 
        INNER JOIN
            distinct_pools t2
            ON t2.poolId = t1.pool_id
        LEFT JOIN
            crc20_tokens t3
            ON t3.token_address = t1.token_address
        WHERE t1.blockchain = 'gnosis'
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM liquidity
    ```

## Balancerv2

*1 queries*

### gnosis_balancerv2_lbp_pools_weights_v

**Query ID:** 4739304 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    lbp_weights AS (
        SELECT 
            block_time
            ,contract_address AS pool
            ,tx_hash
            ,varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_substring(data, 1, 32)) AS start_time
            ,varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_substring(data, 1 + 32, 32)) AS end_time
            ,varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_substring(data, 1 + 5*32, 32)) AS weight0_start
            ,varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_substring(data, 1 + 6*32, 32)) AS weight1_start
            ,varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_substring(data, 1 + 8*32, 32)) AS weight0_end
            ,varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_substring(data, 1 + 9*32, 32)) AS weight1_end
        FROM gnosis.logs
        WHERE
            block_time >= DATE '2023-04-13'
            AND
            topic0 = 0x0f3631f9dab08169d1db21c6dc5f32536fb2b0a6b9bb5330d71c52132f968be0
    )
    
    SELECT 
        pool
        ,start_time
        ,end_time
        ,weight0_start
        ,weight1_start
        ,weight0_end
        ,weight1_end
        ,(CAST(weight0_end AS DOUBLE) - CAST(weight0_start AS DOUBLE))/NULLIF(CAST(end_time AS DOUBLE) - CAST(start_time AS DOUBLE),0) AS rate0
        ,(CAST(weight1_end AS DOUBLE) - CAST(weight1_start AS DOUBLE))/NULLIF(CAST(end_time AS DOUBLE) - CAST(start_time AS DOUBLE),0) AS rate1
    FROM lbp_weights
    ```

## Balances

*1 queries*

### gnosis_balances_per_address_per_token_v

**Query ID:** 3800659 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `address` (text): `default value`
- `from_date` (datetime): `2024-01-01 00:00:00`
- `to_date` (datetime): `2024-06-07 00:00:00`
- `token_address` (text): `default value`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    wallet_balance_diff AS (
        SELECT 
            block_day AS block_date
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS balance_diff
        FROM test_schema.git_dunesql_0f2979a_transfers_gnosis_erc20_agg_day
        WHERE
            token_address = CAST({{token_address}} AS varbinary)
            AND
            wallet_address = CAST({{address}} AS varbinary)
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    dates AS (
        SELECT 
            MIN(block_date) AS block_date
        FROM wallet_balance_diff
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            day
        FROM
            dates
            ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(day)
    ),
    
    balance_dense AS (
        SELECT
            day
            ,balance_diff
           ,LAST_VALUE(value) IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY day) AS value
        FROM (
            SELECT
               t2.day
               ,COALESCE(t1.balance_diff, 0) AS balance_diff
               ,SUM(t1.balance_diff) OVER (ORDER BY t2.day) AS value
            FROM 
                wallet_balance_diff t1
            RIGHT JOIN
                calendar t2
                ON
                t2.day = t1.block_date
         ) 
    )
    
    SELECT 
        day
        ,balance_diff/POWER(10,COALESCE(decimals,18)) AS balance_diff
        ,value/POWER(10,COALESCE(decimals,18)) AS value
        ,AVG(value/POWER(10,COALESCE(decimals,18))) OVER () AS avg_value
    FROM 
        balance_dense t1
    LEFT JOIN
        tokens.erc20 t2
        ON 
        t2.contract_address = CAST({{token_address}} AS varbinary)
    WHERE
        day >=  CAST('{{from_date}}' AS TIMESTAMP)
        AND
        day <=  CAST('{{to_date}}' AS TIMESTAMP)
    ```

### gnosis_bluechip_tokens_v

**Query ID:** 4361013 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        token_address,
        decimals,
        symbol,
        date_start,
        date_end
    FROM (
        VALUES
            (0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee, 18, 'xDAI', DATE '2018-10-08', NULL),
            (0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e, 18, 'EURe', DATE '2022-11-01', DATE '2024-08-25'),
            (0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430, 18, 'EURe', DATE '2024-08-25', NULL),
            (0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108, 18, 'GBPe', DATE '2022-11-01', DATE '2024-08-25'),
            (0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053, 18, 'GBPe', DATE '2024-08-25', NULL),
            (0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb, 18, 'GNO', DATE '2020-08-23', NULL),
            (0xA4eF9Da5BA71Cc0D2e5E877a910A37eC43420445, 18, 'sGNO', DATE '2022-03-24', NULL),
            (0x5671b0B8aC13DC7813D36B99C21c53F6cd376a14, 18, 'spGNO', DATE '2023-10-06', NULL),
            (0xA1Fa064A85266E2Ca82DEe5C5CcEC84DF445760e, 18, 'aGnoGNO', DATE '2023-11-07', NULL),
            (0xe91D153E0b41518A2Ce8Dd3D7944Fa863463a97d, 18, 'WxDAI', DATE '2020-07-27', NULL),
    ```
