## Bluechips

*4 queries*

### gnosis_bluechips_balance_wallet_dense_weekly_v

**Query ID:** 5134221 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_wallets_creation AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4396197 t2 --gnosis_wallets_creation_v
    ),
    
    users_bluechips_token_balances_diff AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week',block_date) AS block_date,
            token_address,
            symbol,
            wallet,
            SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            query_4432380 --gnosis_users_bluechips_token_balances_diff_daily_v
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            token_address
            ,wallet
            ,block_date
            ,DATE_DIFF('day', DATE_TRUNC('week',creation_time), block_date) As wallet_age
        FROM (
            SELECT
                token_address
                ,wallet
                ,MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
                users_bluechips_token_balances_diff
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        )
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(
            SEQUENCE(
                IF(token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e 
                    OR token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108, 
                    least(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE),DATE '2024-08-12'),
                    CAST(min_block_date AS DATE)),
                DATE_TRUNC('week',
                    IF(token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e 
                    OR token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108, 
                    DATE '2024-08-12',
                    CURRENT_DATE)), --'2024-08-12' because we want the weeks not to overlap
                INTERVAL '7' DAY
                )
            ) s(block_date)
        
        LEFT JOIN
            gnosis_wallets_creation t2
            ON t2.address = wallet
    ),
    
    
    user_daily_bluechips_balance_dense AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,token_address
            ,wallet
            ,wallet_age
            ,SUM(amount_raw) OVER (PARTITION BY wallet, token_address ORDER BY block_date) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_date
                ,t1.token_address
                ,t1.wallet
                ,t1.wallet_age
                ,COALESCE(t2.amount_raw,0) AS amount_raw
            FROM 
                calendar t1
            LEFT JOIN
                users_bluechips_token_balances_diff t2
                ON t2.token_address = t1.token_address
                AND t2.block_date = t1.block_date
                AND t2.wallet = t1.wallet
        )
    ),
    
    price_end_week AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_date) AS block_date
            ,token_address
            ,symbol
            ,decimals
            ,ARRAY_AGG(price ORDER BY block_date DESC)[1] AS price
        FROM
             query_5172975 --gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v --query_4338954 --gnosis_daily_token_prices_v
        WHERE
            token_address NOT IN (0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e, 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108)
            OR (
                token_address IN (0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e, 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108)
                AND DATE_TRUNC('week', block_date) <= DATE '2024-08-12'
            )
            
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    ),
    
    user_daily_bluechips_balance_usd AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.wallet
            ,t1.wallet_age
            ,t1.token_address
            ,t3.symbol
            ,t1.amount_raw
            ,t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t3.decimals) AS amount
            ,t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price AS amount_usd
        FROM 
            user_daily_bluechips_balance_dense t1
        LEFT JOIN
            price_end_week t3 
            ON t3.block_date = t1.block_date
            AND
            (
            t3.token_address = t1.token_address
         --    OR  -- EURe versions
         --   (t3.token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e AND t1.token_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430)
         --   OR -- GBPe versions
         --   (t3.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 AND t1.token_address = 0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053)
            )
    )
    
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
        user_daily_bluechips_balance_usd
    WHERE --symbol IS NOT NULL AND 
    amount_raw != 0
    ```

### gnosis_bluechips_daily_supply_sparse_v

**Query ID:** 4375647 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    bluechips AS (
       SELECT 
           token_address,
           decimals,
           symbol,
           date_start,
           date_end
       FROM query_4361013 --gnosis_blueship_tokens_v
    ),
    
    supply_sparse AS (
        SELECT
            block_date,
            token_address,
            (SUM(amount_raw) OVER (PARTITION BY token_address ORDER BY block_date)) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT
                block_date,
                token_address,
                SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
            FROM (
                SELECT 
                    t1.block_date,
                    IF(
                        t1.token_standard = 'native',
                        0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee,
                        t1.contract_address
                    ) AS token_address,
                    SUM(t1.amount_raw) AS amount_raw
                FROM 
                    tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
                INNER JOIN
                    bluechips t2
                    ON t2.token_address = COALESCE(
                           NULLIF(t1.contract_address, 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000),
                           0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee
                       )
                WHERE
                    (
                        (token_standard = 'native' AND "from" IS NULL) 
                        OR
                        (token_standard = 'erc20' AND "from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000) 
                    )
                    AND (t1.block_date < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL)
                GROUP BY 1, 2
                    
                UNION ALL
                
                SELECT 
                    t1.block_date,
                    IF(
                        t1.token_standard = 'native',
                        0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee,
                        t1.contract_address
                    ) AS token_address,
                    -SUM(t1.amount_raw) AS amount_raw
                FROM 
                    tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
                INNER JOIN
                    bluechips t2
                    ON t2.token_address = COALESCE(
                           NULLIF(t1.contract_address, 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000),
                           0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee
                       )
                WHERE
                    (
                        (token_standard = 'native'
                         AND ("to" IS NULL
                              OR "to" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000)
                        ) 
                        OR
                        (token_standard = 'erc20'
                         AND "to" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000)
                    )
                    AND (t1.block_date < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL)
                GROUP BY 1, 2
            )
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        ) 
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.block_date,
        t1.token_address,
        t2.symbol,
        t1.amount_raw / POWER(10, t2.decimals) AS amount
    FROM supply_sparse t1
    INNER JOIN bluechips t2
        ON t2.token_address = t1.token_address
    ```

### gnosis_bluechips_supply_daily_v

**Query ID:** 5144639 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    daily_supply_sparse AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4375647 --gnosis_bluechips_daily_supply_sparse_v
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            token_address
            ,symbol
            ,block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                token_address
                ,symbol
                ,MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
                ,MAX(block_date) AS max_block_date
            FROM
                daily_supply_sparse
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), 
        IF(token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e 
            OR token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108, DATE '2024-08-25', CURRENT_DATE), 
        INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,symbol
            ,amount
            ,amount_usd
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t1.block_date
                ,t1.symbol
                ,LAST_VALUE(t2.amount) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY t1.symbol ORDER BY t1.block_date) AS amount
                ,(LAST_VALUE(t2.amount) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY t1.symbol ORDER BY t1.block_date)) * t3.price AS amount_usd
            FROM
                calendar t1
            LEFT JOIN
                daily_supply_sparse t2
                ON t2.symbol = t1.symbol
                AND t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            LEFT JOIN
                    query_5172975 t3 --gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v --query_4338954 t3 --gnosis_daily_token_prices_v 
                    ON t3.block_date = t1.block_date
                    AND t3.token_address = t1.token_address
        )
    )
    
    SELECT * FROm final
    ```

### gnosis_bluechips_wallet_volume_weekly_v

**Query ID:** 5138652 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_wallets_creation AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4396197 t2 --gnosis_wallets_creation_v
    ),
    
    gnosis_users_bluechips_token_volume_daily_v AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week',block_date) AS block_date,
            token_address,
            symbol,
            wallet,
            SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            query_5138197 --gnosis_users_bluechips_token_volume_daily_v
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    ),
    
    price_end_week AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_date) AS block_date
            ,token_address
            ,symbol
            ,decimals
            ,ARRAY_AGG(price ORDER BY block_date DESC)[1] AS price
        FROM
              query_5172975 --gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v --query_4338954 t3 --gnosis_daily_token_prices_v
        WHERE
            token_address NOT IN (0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e, 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108)
            OR (
                token_address IN (0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e, 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108)
                AND DATE_TRUNC('week', block_date) <= DATE '2024-08-12'
            )
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    ),
    
    gnosis_users_bluechips_token_volume_usd AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.wallet
            ,DATE_DIFF('day', DATE_TRUNC('week',t2.creation_time), t1.block_date) As wallet_age 
            ,t3.symbol
            ,t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t3.decimals) AS amount
            ,t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price AS amount_usd
        FROM 
            gnosis_users_bluechips_token_volume_daily_v t1
        LEFT JOIN
            gnosis_wallets_creation t2
            ON t2.address = t1.wallet
        LEFT JOIN
            price_end_week t3 
            ON t3.block_date = t1.block_date
            AND
            (
            t3.token_address = t1.token_address
     --        OR  -- EURe versions
      --      (t3.token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e AND t1.token_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430)
      --      OR -- GBPe versions
      --      (t3.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 AND t1.token_address = 0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053)
            )
    )
    
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
        gnosis_users_bluechips_token_volume_usd
    WHERE symbol IS NOT NULL AND amount != 0
    ```

## Blueships

*1 queries*

### gnosis_blueships_balances_monthly_v

**Query ID:** 4361100 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    blueship_calendar AS (
        SELECT
            token_address
            ,wallet
            ,block_date
        FROM
            query_4361030 --gnosis_blueship_calendar_daily_v
    ),
    
    blueship_balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
            block_date,
            token_address,
            symbol,
            wallet,
            amount_raw
        FROM
            query_4360980
    )
    
    prices_monthly AS (
        SELECT
             t1.token_address
            ,t1.symbol
            ,t1.decimals
            ,DATE_TRUNC('month', t1.block_date) AS block_date
            ,ARRAY_AGG(t1.price ORDER BY t1.block_date DESC)[1] AS price
        FROM
             query_4338954 t1 --gnosis_daily_token_prices_v
        INNER JOIN
            query_4361013 t2 --gnosis_blueship_tokens_v
            ON t2.token_address = t1.token_address
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date,
        token_address,
        wallet,
        balance_raw,
        balance_raw/
    FROM (
        SELECT
            block_date,
            token_address,
            wallet,
            SUM(amount_raw) OVER (PARTITION BY wallet, token_address ORDER BY block_date) AS balance_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t2.block_date,
                t2.token_address,
                t2.wallet,
                COALESCE(t1.amount_raw, 0) AS amount_raw
            FROM 
                blueship_calendar t2
            INNER JOIN
                blueship_balance_diff t1
                ON t1.token_address = t2.token_address
                AND t1.wallet = t2.wallet
                AND t1.block_date = t2.block_date
        )
    )
    LEFT JOIN
        prices_monthly t2
        ON t2.token_address = t1.token_address
        AND t2.block_date = t1.block_date
    ```

## Brla

*2 queries*

### gnosis_brla_burners_lasthop_v

**Query ID:** 5469793 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      all_transfers AS (
        SELECT
          evt_block_date,
          'BRLA'                   AS token,
          'V1.1'                   AS version,
          'gnosis'                 AS chain,
          contract_address,
          evt_tx_hash,
          evt_tx_from,
          evt_tx_to,
          evt_tx_index,
          evt_index,
          evt_block_time,
          evt_block_number,
          "from",
          "to",
          value
        FROM brla_gnosis.brlav1_1_evt_transfer
      ),
    
      burn_raw AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          contract_address,
          "from"            AS burner_address,
          evt_block_time    AS burn_time,
          evt_block_number  AS burn_block,
          evt_index         AS burn_log_index,
          evt_tx_hash,
          version
        FROM all_transfers
        WHERE "to" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
      ),
    
      dedup_burns AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          contract_address,
          burner_address,
          burn_time,
          burn_block,
          burn_log_index,
          evt_tx_hash
        FROM (
          SELECT
            *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY evt_tx_hash
              ORDER BY burn_block, burn_log_index
            ) AS rn
          FROM burn_raw
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      candidates AS (
        SELECT
          db.token,
          db.burner_address,
          db.evt_tx_hash     AS burn_tx_hash,
          db.burn_block,
          db.burn_log_index,
          db.burn_time,
          at.evt_block_time  AS prev_time,
          at.evt_block_number AS prev_block,
          at.evt_index       AS prev_log_index,
          at."from"          AS prev_from
        FROM dedup_burns db
        JOIN all_transfers at
          ON at."to"             = db.burner_address
         AND at.contract_address = db.contract_address
         AND (
              at.evt_block_number < db.burn_block
           OR (at.evt_block_number = db.burn_block
               AND at.evt_index < db.burn_log_index)
         )
      ),
    
      last_hop AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          burner_address,
          burn_tx_hash,
          burn_time,
          prev_from        AS last_hop_from,
          prev_time        AS last_hop_time,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY burn_tx_hash
            ORDER BY prev_block DESC, prev_log_index DESC
          ) AS rn
        FROM candidates
      )
    
    SELECT
      token,
      burner_address,
      burn_tx_hash,
      burn_time,
      last_hop_from,
      last_hop_time
    FROM last_hop
    WHERE rn = 1
    ORDER BY burn_time;
    ```

### gnosis_brla_minters_firstmove_v

**Query ID:** 5469278 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      all_transfers AS (
        SELECT
          evt_block_date,
          'BRLA'                   AS token,
          'V1.1'                   AS version,
          'gnosis'                 AS chain,
          contract_address,
          evt_tx_hash,
          evt_tx_from,
          evt_tx_to,
          evt_tx_index,
          evt_index,
          evt_block_time,
          evt_block_number,
          "from",
          "to",
          value
        FROM brla_gnosis.brlav1_1_evt_transfer
      ),
    
      mint_raw AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          contract_address,
          "to"                AS minter_address,
          evt_block_time      AS mint_time,
          evt_block_number    AS mint_block,
          evt_index           AS mint_evt_index,
          evt_tx_hash,
          version
        FROM all_transfers
        WHERE "from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
      ),
    
      dedup_mints AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          contract_address,
          minter_address,
          mint_time,
          mint_block,
          mint_evt_index,
          evt_tx_hash
        FROM (
          SELECT
            *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY evt_tx_hash
              ORDER BY mint_block, mint_evt_index
            ) AS rn
          FROM mint_raw
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      candidate_moves AS (
        SELECT
          dm.token,
          dm.contract_address,
          dm.minter_address,
          dm.evt_tx_hash      AS mint_tx_hash,
          dm.mint_evt_index,
          dm.mint_time,
          at."to"             AS move_to,
          at.evt_block_time   AS move_time,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY dm.evt_tx_hash
            ORDER BY at.evt_block_number, at.evt_index
          ) AS rn
        FROM all_transfers AS at
        JOIN dedup_mints AS dm
          ON at."from"            = dm.minter_address
         AND at.contract_address  = dm.contract_address
         AND (
              at.evt_block_number > dm.mint_block
           OR (at.evt_block_number = dm.mint_block
               AND at.evt_index     > dm.mint_evt_index)
         )
         AND at."to" <> 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
      ),
    
      first_moves AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          contract_address,
          minter_address,
          mint_tx_hash,
          mint_evt_index,
          mint_time,
          move_to,
          move_time
        FROM candidate_moves
        WHERE rn = 1
      )
    
    SELECT
      token,
      contract_address,
      minter_address,
      mint_tx_hash,
      mint_evt_index,
      mint_time,
      move_to,
      move_time
    FROM first_moves
    ORDER BY mint_time;
    ```

## Buenbit

*4 queries*

### gnosis_buenbit_burners_lasthop_v

**Query ID:** 5787816 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    offramps AS (
      SELECT
        contract_address,
        symbol,
        "from"          AS burner_address,   -- the user off-ramping
        tx_hash         AS burn_tx_hash,
        block_time      AS burn_time,
        amount_native   AS burn_amount_native,
        amount_usd      AS burn_amount_usd
      FROM query_5786984
      WHERE direction = 'offramp'
    ),
    
    tx_meta AS (
      SELECT
        tx_hash,
        MIN(block_number) AS block_number,
        MIN(block_time)   AS block_time
      FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers
      GROUP BY tx_hash
    ),
    
    burns_enriched AS (
      SELECT
        o.contract_address,
        o.symbol,
        o.burner_address,
        o.burn_tx_hash,
        o.burn_time,
        o.burn_amount_native,
        o.burn_amount_usd,
        tm.block_number AS burn_block_number
      FROM offramps o
      JOIN tx_meta tm
        ON tm.tx_hash = o.burn_tx_hash
    ),
    
    candidates AS (
      SELECT
        be.contract_address,
        be.symbol,
        be.burner_address,
        be.burn_tx_hash,
        be.burn_time,
        be.burn_amount_native,
        be.burn_amount_usd,
        be.burn_block_number,
    
        t."from"        AS prev_from,
        t.block_time    AS prev_time,
        t.block_number  AS prev_block_number,
        t.evt_index     AS prev_evt_index,
        t.tx_hash       AS prev_tx_hash,
        t.amount        AS prev_amount_native,
        t.amount_usd    AS prev_amount_usd,
    
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
          PARTITION BY be.burn_tx_hash, be.burner_address, be.contract_address
          ORDER BY t.block_number DESC, t.block_time DESC, t.evt_index DESC
        ) AS rn
      FROM burns_enriched be
      JOIN tokens_gnosis.transfers t
        ON t."to"              = be.burner_address         -- inbound to the user
       AND t.contract_address  = be.contract_address       -- same token
       AND (
             t.block_number < be.burn_block_number         -- strictly before the off-ramp
             OR (t.block_number = be.burn_block_number AND t.block_time < be.burn_time)
           )
       AND t."from" <> 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000  -- exclude mints
    ),
    
    last_hop AS (
      SELECT
        contract_address,
        symbol,
        burner_address,
        burn_tx_hash,
        burn_time,
        burn_amount_native,
        burn_amount_usd,
        prev_from        AS last_hop_from,
        prev_time        AS last_hop_time,
        prev_tx_hash,
        prev_amount_native,
        prev_amount_usd
      FROM candidates
      WHERE rn = 1
    )
    
    SELECT
      symbol                           AS token,
      contract_address,
      burner_address,
      burn_tx_hash,
      burn_time,
      burn_amount_native,
      burn_amount_usd,
      last_hop_from,
      last_hop_time,
      prev_tx_hash                     AS last_hop_tx_hash,
      prev_amount_native               AS last_hop_amount_native,
      prev_amount_usd                  AS last_hop_amount_usd
    FROM last_hop
    ORDER BY burn_time;
    ```

### gnosis_buenbit_minters_firstmove_v

**Query ID:** 5787730 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    mints AS (
      SELECT
        contract_address,
        symbol,
        "to"            AS minter_address,
        tx_hash         AS mint_tx_hash,
        block_time      AS mint_time,
        amount_native   AS mint_amount_native,
        amount_usd      AS mint_amount_usd
      FROM query_5786984
      WHERE direction = 'onramp'
    ),
    
    tx_meta AS (
      SELECT
        tx_hash,
        MIN(block_number) AS block_number,   
        MIN(block_time)   AS block_time
      FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers
      GROUP BY tx_hash
    ),
    
    mints_enriched AS (
      SELECT
        m.contract_address,
        m.symbol,
        m.minter_address,
        m.mint_tx_hash,
        m.mint_time,
        m.mint_amount_native,
        m.mint_amount_usd,
        tm.block_number      AS mint_block_number
      FROM mints m
      JOIN tx_meta tm
        ON tm.tx_hash = m.mint_tx_hash
    ),
    
    candidate_moves AS (
      SELECT
        me.contract_address,
        me.symbol,
        me.minter_address,
        me.mint_tx_hash,
        me.mint_time,
        me.mint_amount_native,
        me.mint_amount_usd,
        me.mint_block_number,
    
        t."to"              AS move_to,
        t.block_time        AS move_time,
        t.block_number      AS move_block_number,
        t.evt_index         AS move_evt_index,
        t.tx_hash           AS move_tx_hash,
        t.amount            AS move_amount_native,
        t.amount_usd        AS move_amount_usd,
    
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
          PARTITION BY me.mint_tx_hash, me.minter_address, me.contract_address
          ORDER BY t.block_number, t.block_time, t.evt_index
        ) AS rn
      FROM mints_enriched me
      JOIN tokens_gnosis.transfers t
        ON t."from"           = me.minter_address
       AND t.contract_address = me.contract_address            -- same token (xDAI/wxDAI/DAI/USDC/USDT)
       AND (
             t.block_number > me.mint_block_number             -- strictly after the mint’s block
             OR (t.block_number = me.mint_block_number AND t.block_time > me.mint_time)
           )
       AND t."to" <> 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 -- exclude burns
    )
    
    , first_moves AS (
      SELECT
        contract_address,
        symbol,
        minter_address,
        mint_tx_hash,
        mint_time,
        mint_amount_native,
        mint_amount_usd,
        move_to,
        move_time,
        move_amount_native,
        move_amount_usd,
        move_tx_hash
      FROM candidate_moves
      WHERE rn = 1
    )
    
    SELECT
      symbol                               AS token,
      contract_address,
      minter_address,
      mint_tx_hash,
      mint_time,
      mint_amount_native,
      mint_amount_usd,
      move_to,
      move_time,
      move_amount_native,
      move_amount_usd,
      move_tx_hash
    FROM first_moves
    ORDER BY mint_time;
    ```

### gnosis_buenbit_ramp_ledger_clean_v

**Query ID:** 5786984 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH 
    base AS (
      SELECT *
      FROM query_5786028
    ),
    stable_allowlist AS (
      SELECT *
      FROM (VALUES
        (0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000, 'xDAI'), 
        (0xe91D153E0b41518A2Ce8Dd3D7944Fa863463a97d, 'wxDAI'),
        (0x44fA8E6f47987339850636F88629646662444217, 'DAI'),
        (0xDDAfbb505ad214D7b80b1f830fcCc89B60fb7A83, 'USDC'),
        (0x4ECaBa5870353805a9F068101A40E0f32ed605C6, 'USDT')
      ) AS t(contract_address, token_hint)
    ),
    clean AS (
      SELECT b.*
      FROM base b
      JOIN stable_allowlist s
        ON b.contract_address = s.contract_address
      WHERE b.amount_native > 0
        -- extra hygiene against spam names even for allowlisted contracts
        AND (b.symbol IS NULL OR length(b.symbol) <= 20)
    )
    SELECT *
    FROM clean
    ORDER BY block_time DESC;
    ```

### gnosis_buenbit_ramp_ledger_v

**Query ID:** 5786028 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    -- Buenbit Gnosis Ledger (provider-centric)
    -- Save this, then reuse as query_XXXXXX in other charts
    
    WITH params AS (
      -- Buenbit wallet on Gnosis
      SELECT 0x2eee847BF1b899ef47222F933Eb98085D0A2113b AS provider
    )
    
    SELECT
      block_time,
      CAST(date_trunc('day',  block_time) AS date) AS day,
      CAST(date_trunc('week', block_time) AS date) AS week,
      block_date,
      tx_hash,
      evt_index,
      contract_address,
      symbol,
      "from",
      "to",
    
      -- direction relative to provider
      CASE
        WHEN "from" = (SELECT provider FROM params) THEN 'onramp'   -- provider -> user
        WHEN "to"   = (SELECT provider FROM params) THEN 'offramp'  -- user -> provider
      END AS direction,
    
      -- already decimals-adjusted & priced by Dune
      amount       AS amount_native,
      amount_usd   AS amount_usd,
    
      -- signed amounts (positive = onramp/outgoing from provider)
      CASE
        WHEN "from" = (SELECT provider FROM params) THEN  amount
        WHEN "to"   = (SELECT provider FROM params) THEN -amount
      END AS signed_amount_native,
    
      CASE
        WHEN "from" = (SELECT provider FROM params) THEN  amount_usd
        WHEN "to"   = (SELECT provider FROM params) THEN -amount_usd
      END AS signed_amount_usd
    
    FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers, params
    WHERE
      -- only transfers involving provider
      ( "from" = (SELECT provider FROM params) OR "to" = (SELECT provider FROM params) )
      -- exclude mints/burns
      AND "from" <> 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
      AND "to"   <> 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
    ;
    ```

## Canonical

*1 queries*

### gnosis_canonical_bridges_flows_week_v

**Query ID:** 5095806 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    xdai_bridge_flows AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS week
            ,'xDAI-Bridge' AS bridge
            ,'xDAI' AS token
            ,SUM(outflow_raw) AS outflow_raw
            ,SUM(inflow_raw) AS inflow_raw
            ,SUM(outflow_raw)/POWER(10,18) AS outflow_usd --take xDAI 1-to-1 to USD (avoid price table)
            ,SUM(inflow_raw)/POWER(10,18) AS inflow_usd
        FROM 
            query_4706815 --gnosis_xDAI_bridge_flows_v
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    amb_bridge_flows AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('week', t1.block_day) AS week
            ,'AMB' AS bridge
            ,t1.symbol AS token
            ,SUM(t1.outflow_raw) AS outflow_raw
            ,SUM(t1.inflow_raw) AS inflow_raw
            ,SUM(t1.outflow_usd) AS outflow_usd
            ,SUM(t1.inflow_usd) AS inflow_usd
        FROM
            query_4708620 t1 --gnosis_omni_bridge_daily_flows_v
        INNER JOIN
            query_4361013 t2 --gnosis_bluechip_tokens_v
            ON t2.token_address = t1.token_address
            AND t1.block_day >= t2.date_start
            AND (t1.block_day < t2.date_end OR  t2.date_end IS NULL)
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM xdai_bridge_flows
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM amb_bridge_flows
    ```

## Circles

*66 queries*

### gnosis_circlesV1status_v

**Query ID:** 4612602 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    frozen_accounts AS (
        SELECT 
            wallet_address
        FROM 
            query_3827079 --gnosis_circles_frozen_users_v
        WHERE
            block_day + INTERVAL '90' DAY < TIMESTAMP '2024-11-16'
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.wallet_address As avatar
        ,CASE
            WHEN t1.wallet_address = t2.avatar THEN 'Human V2'
            WHEN t1.wallet_address = t3."group" THEN 'Group V2'
            WHEN t1.wallet_address = t4.organization THEN 'Org V2'
            ELSE 'Stopped'
        END AS label
    FROM
        frozen_accounts t1
    LEFT JOIN
        circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterHuman t2
    ON t1.wallet_address = t2.avatar
    LEFT JOIN
        circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterGroup t3
    ON t1.wallet_address = t3."group"
    LEFT JOIN
        circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterOrganization t4
    ON t1.wallet_address = t4.organization
    ```

### gnosis_circlesV2_streams_v

**Query ID:** 6708128 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    avatars_v2 AS (
        SELECT "group" AS avatar, 'Group' AS avatar_type FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registergroup
        UNION ALL
        SELECT organization AS avatar, 'Org' AS avatar_type FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registerorganization
        UNION ALL
        SELECT avatar, 'Human' AS avatar_type FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registerhuman 
    
    ),
    
    invitation_bots AS (
        SELECT createdBot AS avatar, 'Invitation Bot' AS label 
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.invitationfarm_evt_botcreated
    ),
    
    blacklisted AS (
        SELECT
            address  AS avatar
            ,'Blacklisted' AS label
        FROM (
            SELECT
                json_extract_scalar(item, '$.address') AS address,
                json_extract_scalar(item, '$.reason') AS reason
            FROM (
                SELECT 
                    CAST(
                        json_parse(
                            json_query(
                                http_get('https://squid-app-3gxnl.ondigitalocean.app/aboutcircles-advanced-analytics2/bot-analytics/blacklist?include_reason=true&v2_only=true&limit=10000'),
                                    'lax $.addresses'
                                    ) 
                                ) 
                            AS array(json)
                        ) AS addresses
            )
            ,UNNEST(addresses) t(item)
        )
        WHERE reason != 'Low Riskscore'
    ),
    
    avatars_v2_labeled AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.avatar
            ,t1.avatar_type
            ,CASE
                WHEN t2.avatar = t1.avatar THEN t2.label
                WHEN t3.avatar = CAST(t1.avatar AS VARCHAR) THEN t3.label
                ELSE NULL
            END AS label
        FROM avatars_v2 t1
        LEFT JOIN
            invitation_bots t2
            ON t2.avatar = t1.avatar
        LEFT JOIN
            blacklisted t3
            ON t3.avatar = CAST(t1.avatar AS VARCHAR)
    ),
    
    steram_completed AS (
        SELECT 
            evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,"from" AS sender
            ,"to" AS receiver
            ,SUM(amount)/POWER(10,18) AS amount
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_streamcompleted
        ,UNNEST(amounts) s(amount)
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    )
    
    SELECT
        block_time
        ,sender
        ,t2.avatar_type AS sender_type
        ,t2.label AS sender_label
        ,receiver
        ,t3.avatar_type AS receiver_type
        ,t3.label AS receiver_label
        ,amount
    FROM
        steram_completed t1
    LEFT JOIN
        avatars_v2_labeled t2
        ON t2.avatar = t1.sender
    LEFT JOIN
        avatars_v2_labeled t3
        ON t3.avatar = t1.receiver
    ```

### gnosis_circles_balance_diff_tc_v

**Query ID:** 3870468 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    balances_diff AS (
            SELECT
                block_time
                ,wallet_address
                ,amount_raw
            FROM
                query_3870087 --gnosis_circles_balance_diff_v
            WHERE
                wallet_address != 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
    ),
    
    parameters AS (
      SELECT
        TIMESTAMP '2020-10-15 00:00:00 UTC' as circlesInceptionDate,
        365.25 as oneCirclesYearInDays,
        86400 * 1000 as oneDayInMilliSeconds,
        365.25 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 AS oneCirclesYearInMilliSeconds,
        8 as initialDailyCrcPayout,
        1.07 as yearlyInflationRate
    ), 
    
    time_calculations AS (
      SELECT
        block_time,
        wallet_address,
        amount_raw,
       (to_unixtime(block_time) - to_unixtime(circlesInceptionDate)) * 1000 as millisecondsSinceInception,
        ((to_unixtime(block_time) - to_unixtime(circlesInceptionDate)) * 1000 / oneDayInMilliSeconds) as daysSinceCirclesInception,
        ((to_unixtime(block_time) - to_unixtime(circlesInceptionDate)) * 1000 / oneCirclesYearInMilliSeconds) as circlesYearsSince,
        MOD(CAST((to_unixtime(block_time) - to_unixtime(circlesInceptionDate)) * 1000 / oneDayInMilliSeconds AS DOUBLE), oneCirclesYearInDays) as daysInCurrentCirclesYear
      FROM
        balances_diff,
        parameters
    ),
    
    payouts AS (
      SELECT
        block_time,
        wallet_address,
        amount_raw,
        initialDailyCrcPayout * POWER(yearlyInflationRate, FLOOR(circlesYearsSince)+1) as currentYearPayout,
        initialDailyCrcPayout * POWER(yearlyInflationRate, FLOOR(circlesYearsSince)) as previousYearPayout,
        daysInCurrentCirclesYear
      FROM
        time_calculations,
        parameters
    ),
    
    tc_balances_diff AS (
    SELECT
      block_time,
      wallet_address,
      amount_raw,
      amount_raw / (previousYearPayout * (1 - daysInCurrentCirclesYear / oneCirclesYearInDays) + currentYearPayout * (daysInCurrentCirclesYear / oneCirclesYearInDays)) * 24 as TC_value_raw
    FROM
      payouts,
      parameters
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM tc_balances_diff
    ```

### gnosis_circles_balance_diff_v

**Query ID:** 3870087 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    crc_user_info AS (
        SELECT 
            user
            ,token
        FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Signup
    ),
        
    balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
            block_time
            ,wallet_address
            ,token_address
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t1.block_time
                ,t1."from" AS wallet_address
                ,t1.contract_address As token_address
                ,-SUM(CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM 
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                crc_user_info t2
                ON
                --t2.user = t1."from"
                --AND
                t2.token = t1.contract_address
            GROUP BY
                1, 2, 3
                
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT
                t1.block_time
                ,t1."to" AS wallet_address
                ,t1.contract_address As token_address
                ,SUM(CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM 
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                crc_user_info t2
                ON
               -- t2.user = t1."to"
               -- AND
                t2.token = t1.contract_address
            GROUP BY
                1, 2, 3
        )
        GROUP BY
                1, 2, 3
    )
          
    
    SELECT * FROM balance_diff
    ```

### gnosis_circles_circulating_and_demurrage

**Query ID:** 3870104 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    tc_balances_diff AS (
        SELECT
         * 
         FROM
          query_3870468 --gnosis_circles_balance_diff_tc_v
    ),
    
    tc_balances_diff_day AS (
        SELECT
            CAST(block_time AS DATE) AS block_day
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
            ,SUM(TC_value_raw) AS TC_value_raw
        FROM
            tc_balances_diff
        GROUP BY
            1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                MIN(block_day) AS block_day_min
            FROM
                tc_balances_diff_day
        )
        ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(block_day_min,CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    ),
    
    tc_balances_diff_dense AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.block_day
            ,COALESCE(t1.amount_raw,0) AS amount_raw
            ,COALESCE(t1.TC_value_raw,0) AS TC_value_raw
        FROM
            tc_balances_diff_day t1
        RIGHT JOIN
            calendar t2
            ON
            t2.block_day = t1.block_day
    ),
    
    balances AS (
        SELECT
            block_day
            ,SUM(amount_raw) OVER (ORDER BY block_day) AS amount_raw
            ,SUM(TC_value_raw) OVER (ORDER BY block_day) AS TC_value_raw
        FROM 
            tc_balances_diff_dense 
    )
    
    SELECT 
        block_day
        ,amount_raw/POWER(10,18) AS "CRC"
        ,TC_value_raw/POWER(10,18) AS "Time CRC"
    FROM balances
    ```

### gnosis_circles_frozen_users_v

**Query ID:** 3827079 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    crc_user_info AS (
        SELECT 
            user
            ,token
        FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Signup
    ),
    
    crc_user_mints AS (
        SELECT 
            wallet_address
            ,block_day
            ,COALESCE(block_day_lead, CURRENT_DATE) AS block_day_lead
            ,DATE_DIFF('day', block_day, COALESCE(block_day_lead, CURRENT_DATE)) AS days_between_mints
            ,CASE
                WHEN block_day_lead IS NULL THEN 'Waiting'
                ELSE 'Minted'
            END AS mint_status
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                wallet_address
                ,block_date AS block_day
                ,LEAD(block_date) OVER (PARTITION BY wallet_address ORDER BY block_date) AS block_day_lead
            FROM 
                query_3869915 --gnosis_circles_transfers_agg_day_v
            WHERE
                counterparty = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        )
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        *
    FROM crc_user_mints
    WHERE 
        mint_status = 'Waiting'
        AND
        days_between_mints >= 90
    ```

### gnosis_circles_frozen_users_vizualization

**Query ID:** 3826778 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    crc_new_users AS (
        SELECT 
            evt_block_date AS block_day
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Signup
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                MIN(block_day) AS block_day_min
            FROM 
                crc_new_users
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(block_day_min,CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) AS s(block_day)
        
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        t2.block_day
        ,COALESCE(t1.cnt,0) AS frozen_cnt
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t1.cnt,0)) OVER (ORDER BY t2.block_day) AS total_frozen
        ,COALESCE(t3.cnt,0) AS new_cnt
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t3.cnt,0)) OVER (ORDER BY t2.block_day) AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            block_day + INTERVAL '90' DAY AS frozen_date
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM 
            query_3827079 --gnosis_circles_frozen_users_v
        GROUP BY 1
    ) t1
    RIGHT JOIN 
        calendar t2
        ON
        t2.block_day = t1.frozen_date
    LEFT JOIN
        crc_new_users t3
        ON
        t3.block_day = t2.block_day
    ```

### gnosis_circles_invitation_links_v

**Query ID:** 6764604 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    invitation_bot AS (
        SELECT createdBot AS bot FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.invitationfarm_evt_botcreated
    )
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cnt
        ,SUM(cnt) OVER (ORDER BY block_date) AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            evt_block_date AS block_date
            ,COUNT() AS cnt
        FROM 
            circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_trust
        WHERE truster IN (SELECT bot FROM invitation_bot)
        AND trustee NOT IN (SELECT bot FROM invitation_bot)
        GROUP BY 1
    )
    ```

### gnosis_circles_mint_vs_circulating_daily

**Query ID:** 3870052 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,(SUM(amount_raw) OVER (ORDER BY block_date))/POWER(10,18) AS total
        ,amount_raw/POWER(10,18) AS mint
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM 
            query_3869915 --gnosis_circles_transfers_agg_day_v
        WHERE
            counterparty = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        GROUP BY 1
    )
    ```

### gnosis_circles_transfers_agg_day_v

**Query ID:** 3869915 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    crc_user_info AS (
        SELECT 
            user
            ,token
        FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Signup
    ),
        
    agg_transfers AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,wallet_address
            ,counterparty
            ,token_address
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t1.block_date
                ,t1."from" AS wallet_address
                ,t1."to" AS counterparty
                ,t1.contract_address AS token_address
                ,-SUM(CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM 
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                crc_user_info t2
                ON
              --  t2.user = t1."from"
              --  AND
                t2.token = t1.contract_address
            GROUP BY
                1, 2, 3, 4
                
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT
                t1.block_date
                ,t1."to" AS wallet_address
                ,t1."from" AS counterparty
                ,t1.contract_address AS token_address
                ,SUM(CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM 
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                crc_user_info t2
                ON
               -- t2.user = t1."to"
              --  AND
                t2.token = t1.contract_address
            GROUP BY
                1, 2, 3, 4
        )
        GROUP BY
                1, 2, 3, 4
    )
          
    
    SELECT * FROM agg_transfers
    ```

### gnosis_circles_users_mints

**Query ID:** 3870408 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    users_mints AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            block_date
            ,wallet_address
        FROM 
            query_3869915 --gnosis_circles_transfers_agg_day_v
        WHERE
            counterparty = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
    ),
    
    daily_users AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM
            users_mints
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    weekly_users AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_date) AS block_date
            ,COUNT(DISTINCT wallet_address) AS cnt
        FROM
            users_mints
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    monthly_users AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('month', block_date) AS block_date
            ,COUNT(DISTINCT wallet_address) AS cnt
        FROM
            users_mints
        GROUP BY 1
    )
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,daily_users_mint AS daily
        ,LAST_VALUE(weekly_users_mint) IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY block_date) AS weekly
        ,LAST_VALUE(monthly_users_mint) IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY block_date) AS monthly
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.cnt AS daily_users_mint
            ,t2.cnt AS weekly_users_mint
            ,t3.cnt AS monthly_users_mint
        FROM 
            daily_users t1
        LEFT JOIN 
            weekly_users t2
            ON
            t2.block_date = t1.block_date
        LEFT JOIN 
            monthly_users t3
             ON
            t3.block_date = t1.block_date
    )
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv1_current_balances_v

**Query ID:** 4616027 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    v1_tokens AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.user
            ,t1.token
            ,CASE
                WHEN t1.user = t2.avatar THEN 'Human V2'
                WHEN t1.user = t3."group" THEN 'Group V2'
                WHEN t1.user = t4.organization THEN 'Org V2'
                ELSE 'V1'
            END AS label
        FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Signup t1
        LEFT JOIN
            circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterHuman t2
        ON t1.user = t2.avatar
        LEFT JOIN
            circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterGroup t3
        ON t1.user = t3."group"
        LEFT JOIN
            circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterOrganization t4
        ON t1.user = t4.organization
        
    ),
    
    current_balances_v1 AS (
        SELECT
            user
            ,user_status
            ,token
            ,token_status
            ,SUM(amount_raw)/POWER(10,18) AS amount
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t3.user
                ,t3.label AS user_status
                ,t2.token
                ,t2.label AS token_status
                ,SUM(CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                v1_tokens t2
                ON t2.token = t1.contract_address
            INNER JOIN
                v1_tokens t3
                ON t3.user = t1."to"
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
        
            UNION ALL
        
            SELECT
                t3.user
                ,t3.label AS user_status
                ,t2.token
                ,t2.label AS token_status
                ,-SUM(CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                v1_tokens t2
                ON t2.token = t1.contract_address
            INNER JOIN
                v1_tokens t3
                ON t3.user = t1."from"
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
        
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM current_balances_v1
    WHERE amount > 0
    ```

    ```sql
        FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Signup t1
        INNER JOIN

        ON t2.avatar = t1.user
        
    ),
    
    current_balances_v1 AS (
        SELECT

            ,token

            ,SUM(amount_raw)/POWER(10,18) AS amount
        FROM (

                t3.user
                ,t3.status AS user_status
                ,t2.token
                ,t2.status AS token_status
                ,SUM(CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                v1_tokens t2
                ON t2.token = t1.contract_address
            INNER JOIN
                v1_tokens t3
                ON t3.user = t1."to"
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
        
            UNION ALL
        
            SELECT
                t3.user
                ,t3.status AS user_status
                ,t2.token
                ,t2.status AS token_status
                ,-SUM(CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                v1_tokens t2
                ON t2.token = t1.contract_address
            INNER JOIN
                v1_tokens t3
                ON t3.user = t1."from"
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
        
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM current_balances_v1
    WHERE amount > 0
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv1_migration

**Query ID:** 4615587 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT 
        t1."from" AS avatar
        ,t1.contract_address AS token
        ,CASE
            WHEN t1."from" = t2.avatar THEN 'Human'
            WHEN t1."from" = t3."group" THEN 'Group'
            WHEN t1."from" = t4.organization THEN 'Org'
            ELSE 'stopped'
        END AS label
        ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
    FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
    LEFT JOIN
        circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterHuman t2
    ON t1."from" = t2.avatar
    LEFT JOIN
        circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterGroup t3
    ON t1."from" = t3."group"
    LEFT JOIN
        circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterOrganization t4
    ON t1."from" = t4.organization
    WHERE 
        t1."to"  = 0xd44b8dcfbadfc78ea64c55b705bfc68199b56376
     --   AND 
     --   t1.block_date < DATE '2024-11-16'
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv1_orgs_balances_v

**Query ID:** 4605866 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    v1_tokens AS (
        SELECT 
            user
            ,token
        FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Signup
    ),
    
    v1_orgs AS (
        SELECT organization FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_OrganizationSignup 
    ),
    
    current_balances_v1 AS (
        SELECT
            organization
            ,token
            ,SUM(amount_raw)/POWER(10,18) AS amount
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t3.organization
                ,t2.token
                ,SUM(CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                v1_tokens t2
                on t2.token = t1.contract_address
            INNER JOIN
                v1_orgs t3
                ON t3.organization = t1.to
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        
            UNION ALL
        
            SELECT
                t3.organization
                ,t2.token
                ,SUM(CAST(-amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                v1_tokens t2
                on t2.token = t1.contract_address
            INNER JOIN
                v1_orgs t3
                ON t3.organization = t1."from"
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM current_balances_v1
    WHERE amount > 0
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_arbot_trades_v

**Query ID:** 5168393 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    bot_addresses AS (
        SELECT 
            address
            ,name
        FROM
            query_5167266
    ),
    
    crc_tokens AS (
         SELECT 
           erc20Wrapper AS crc20_token
           ,IF(circlesType = 0, 'CRC', 's-CRC') AS symbol
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20lift_evt_erc20wrapperdeployed 
    
    )
    
    SELECT 
        CONCAT(t1.project,'-v',t1.version) AS dex
        ,t2.name
        ,t1.project_contract_address
        ,t1.block_time
        ,t1.block_number
        ,t1.evt_index
        ,t1.token_bought_address
        ,IF(t3.crc20_token = t1.token_bought_address, t3.symbol, t1.token_bought_symbol) AS token_bought_symbol
        ,t1.token_sold_address
        ,IF(t4.crc20_token = t1.token_sold_address, t4.symbol, t1.token_sold_symbol) AS token_sold_symbol
        ,IF(t3.crc20_token = t1.token_bought_address, t1.token_bought_amount_raw/POWER(10,18), t1.token_bought_amount) AS token_bought_amount
        ,IF(t4.crc20_token = t1.token_sold_address, t1.token_sold_amount_raw/POWER(10,18), t1.token_sold_amount) AS token_sold_amount
        ,t1.token_bought_amount_raw
        ,t1.token_sold_amount_raw
        ,IF(t4.crc20_token = t1.token_sold_address,t1.token_bought_amount * t5.price, t1.token_sold_amount * t6.price) AS trade_value_usd
    FROM 
        dex.trades t1
    INNER JOIN
        bot_addresses t2
        ON t2.address = t1.taker
    LEFT JOIN
        crc_tokens t3
        ON t3.crc20_token = t1.token_bought_address
    LEFT JOIN
        crc_tokens t4
        ON t4.crc20_token = t1.token_sold_address
    LEFT JOIN
        query_4338954 t5 --gnosis_daily_token_prices_v
        ON t5.token_address = t1.token_bought_address
        AND t5.block_date = DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.block_time)
    LEFT JOIN
        query_4338954 t6 --gnosis_daily_token_prices_v
        ON t6.token_address = t1.token_sold_address
        AND t6.block_date = DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.block_time)
    WHERE 
        blockchain = 'gnosis'
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_avatars_migration_v

**Query ID:** 4612132 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    migrate AS (
        SELECT 
            t.*
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                _avatars
                ,_amounts
            FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Migration_call_migrate
            WHERE call_block_time < TIMESTAMP '2024-11-16'
        )
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(
            ZIP_WITH(_avatars, _amounts, (x, y) -> ROW(x, y))
        ) AS t(avatar, amount)
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.avatar
        ,t1.amount
        ,CASE
            WHEN t1.avatar = t2.avatar THEN 'Human'
            WHEN t1.avatar = t3."group" THEN 'Group'
            WHEN t1.avatar = t4.organization THEN 'Org'
            ELSE 'stopped'
        END AS label
    FROM
        migrate t1
    LEFT JOIN
        circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterHuman t2
    ON t1.avatar = t2.avatar
    LEFT JOIN
        circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterGroup t3
    ON t1.avatar = t3."group"
    LEFT JOIN
        circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterOrganization t4
    ON t1.avatar = t4.organization
    ```

    ```sql
            FROM

               ,"to" AS avatar
               ,token_id
               ,CAST(amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
            FROM

        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM balance_diff_hour
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_bot_balance_day_v

**Query ID:** 4800935 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    bot_addresses AS (
        SELECT 
            address
            ,name
        FROM
            query_5167266
    ),
    
    balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
             DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS block_day
            ,address
            ,name
            ,contract_address 
            ,symbol
            ,SUM(diff_raw) AS diff_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_time
                ,t2.address
                ,t2.name
                ,COALESCE(t1.contract_address, 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee) AS contract_address 
                ,IF(t3.erc20Wrapper = t1.contract_address,'CRC-20',t1.symbol) AS symbol
                ,-CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS diff_raw
            FROM 
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                bot_addresses t2
                ON t2.address = t1."from"
            LEFT JOIN 
                circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20lift_evt_erc20wrapperdeployed t3
                ON t3.erc20Wrapper = t1.contract_address
            
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT 
                t1.block_time
                ,t2.address
                ,t2.name
                ,COALESCE(t1.contract_address, 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee) AS contract_address 
                ,IF(t3.erc20Wrapper = t1.contract_address,'CRC-20',t1.symbol) AS symbol
                ,CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS diff_raw
            FROM 
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                bot_addresses t2
                ON t2.address = t1."to"
            LEFT JOIN 
                circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20lift_evt_erc20wrapperdeployed t3
                ON t3.erc20Wrapper = t1.contract_address
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            address
            ,name
            ,contract_address 
            ,symbol
            ,block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                address
                ,name
                ,contract_address 
                ,symbol
                ,MIN(block_day) AS min_block_day
            FROM balance_diff
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_day AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.address
        ,t1.name
        ,t1.contract_address 
        ,t1.symbol
        ,t1.block_day 
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.diff_raw,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.address, t1.contract_address  ORDER BY t1.block_day) AS balance_raw
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        balance_diff t2
        ON t2.block_day = t1.block_day
        AND t2.address = t1.address
        AND t2.contract_address = t1.contract_address
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_cashback_balance

**Query ID:** 6567702 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        week
        ,(SUM(amount_raw_diff) OVER (ORDER BY week))/POWER(10,18) AS balance
    FROM (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS week
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw_diff
        FROM
            query_6567638 --gnosis_circlesv2_crc20_balance_diff_v
        WHERE
            token_address = 0x548c20e6c24E4876E20daDbEAb75362e2F5A4bC1
            AND 
            address = 0x7aBE74B71F2958B624Cb2bE0596678784c0Caf6A
        GROUP BY 1
    )
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_cashback_payments

**Query ID:** 6567682 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS week
        ,SUM(-amount_raw)/POWER(10,18) AS sent
    FROM
        query_6567638 --gnosis_circlesv2_crc20_balance_diff_v
    WHERE
        token_address = 0x548c20e6c24E4876E20daDbEAb75362e2F5A4bC1
        AND 
        address = 0x7aBE74B71F2958B624Cb2bE0596678784c0Caf6A
        AND
        amount_raw < 0
        AND 
        block_time >= DATE '2025-12-05'
    GROUP BY 1
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_crc20_balance_diff_v

**Query ID:** 6567638 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    crc20 AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT output_0 AS address FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_call_wrap
    ),
    
    crc20_transfers AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.* 
        FROM 
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN crc20 t2
            ON t1.contract_address = t2.address
    ),
    
    crc20_balance_diff AS (
            SELECT
                block_time
                ,contract_address AS token_address
                ,"from" AS address
                ,-SUM(CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                crc20_transfers 
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
            
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT
                block_time
                ,contract_address AS token_address
                ,"to" AS address
                ,SUM(CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                crc20_transfers 
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    )
    
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
        crc20_balance_diff
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_crc20_prices_v

**Query ID:** 4734380 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    crc20_tokens AS (
        SELECT 
            avatar
            ,erc20Wrapper AS token_address
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20lift_evt_erc20wrapperdeployed
    ),
    
    trades_price AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.project
            ,t1.version
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t2.token_address = t1.token_bought_address  THEN token_bought_address
                ELSE t1.token_sold_address
            END AS crc20_token
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t2.token_address = t1.token_bought_address  THEN token_sold_address
                ELSE t1.token_bought_address
            END AS backing_token
            ,project_contract_address AS pool
            ,DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS block_day
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t2.token_address = t1.token_bought_address  
                    THEN t1.token_sold_amount/NULLIF(t1.token_bought_amount_raw/POWER(10,18),0)
                ELSE t1.token_bought_amount/NULLIF(t1.token_sold_amount_raw/POWER(10,18),0)
            END AS price_crc_backing
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t2.token_address = t1.token_bought_address  
                    THEN t1.token_bought_amount_raw/POWER(10,18)
                ELSE 0
            END AS crc_bought_volume
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t2.token_address = t1.token_bought_address 
                    THEN 0
                ELSE t1.token_sold_amount_raw/POWER(10,18)
            END AS crc_sold_volume
        FROM dex.trades t1
        INNER JOIN 
            crc20_tokens t2
            ON t2.token_address = t1.token_bought_address
            OR t2.token_address = t1.token_sold_address
        WHERE t1.blockchain='gnosis'
        --AND token_bought_address = 0x159e6881e6ec370b46f2fe9fe75cbdfd8f7877b4 
        --OR token_sold_address = 0x159e6881e6ec370b46f2fe9fe75cbdfd8f7877b4
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.project
        ,t1.version
        ,t1.crc20_token
        ,t1.backing_token
        ,t1.pool
        ,t1.block_day
        ,AVG(t1.price_crc_backing) AS price_crc_backing_avg
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(t1.price_crc_backing, 0.5) AS price_crc_backing_median
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(t1.price_crc_backing, 0.9) AS price_crc_backing_pct9
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(t1.price_crc_backing, 0.1) AS price_crc_backing_pct01
        ,SUM(t1.crc_bought_volume) AS crc_bought_volume
        ,SUM(t1.crc_sold_volume) AS crc_sold_volume
        ,SUM(IF(t1.crc_bought_volume>0,1,0)) AS crc_bought_trades
        ,SUM(IF(t1.crc_sold_volume>0,1,0)) AS crc_sold_trades
        
        ,AVG(t1.price_crc_backing * t2.price) AS price_crc_backing_avg_usd
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(t1.price_crc_backing * t2.price, 0.5) AS price_crc_backing_median_usd
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(t1.price_crc_backing * t2.price, 0.9) AS price_crc_backing_pct9_usd
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(t1.price_crc_backing * t2.price, 0.1) AS price_crc_backing_pct01_usd
    FROM 
        trades_price t1
    LEFT JOIN
        query_4338954 t2
        ON t2.token_address = t1.backing_token
        AND t2.block_date = t1.block_day
    WHERE
        t1.crc_bought_volume + t1.crc_sold_volume > 1e-4 --remove outliers
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_crc20_weighted_prices_daily_v

**Query ID:** 4734504 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    prices AS (
        SELECT 
            crc20_token
            ,block_day
            ,SUM(crc_bought_volume) AS crc_bought_volume
            ,SUM(-crc_sold_volume) AS crc_sold_volume
            ,SUM(price_crc_backing_avg_usd * (crc_bought_volume + crc_sold_volume))/SUM((crc_bought_volume + crc_sold_volume)) AS price_crc_backing_w_usd
        FROM query_4734380 --gnosis_circlesv2_crc20_prices_v
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            crc20_token
            ,block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                crc20_token
                ,MIN(block_day) AS min_block_day
            FROM
                prices
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_day AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.crc20_token
        ,t1.block_day
        ,LAST_VALUE(t2.price_crc_backing_w_usd) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY t1.crc20_token ORDER BY t1.block_day) AS "Weighted Price"
        ,COALESCE(crc_bought_volume,0) AS "Bought"
        ,COALESCE(crc_sold_volume,0) AS "Sold"
    FROM
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        prices t2
        ON t2.crc20_token = t1.crc20_token
        AND t2.block_day = t1.block_day
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_crc_balance_address_token_v

**Query ID:** 6574062 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    balance_diff_tokens AS (
        SELECT
            week
            ,address
            ,token_id
            ,DATE_DIFF('day',last_day_move, LEAST(CURRENT_DATE,date_add('day', 7, week))) AS day_cnt
            ,amount_raw_inflow
            ,amount_raw_diff
        FROM (
            SELECT
                DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS week
                ,address
                ,token_id
                ,MAX(DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time)) AS last_day_move
                ,SUM(IF(amount_raw>0,amount_raw,0)) AS amount_raw_inflow
                ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw_diff
            FROM
                query_6574020 --gnosis_circlesv2_crc_balance_diff_v
            WHERE
                address IN (
                    0x97FD8f7829A019946329f6D2E763A72741047518
                    ,0x0aFd8899bca011Bb95611409f09c8EFbf6b169cF
                    ,0x7ADd2C8D1f7CE98cA9a6A7c0122916787988071F
                    ,0x9CbD1B318AE1B4585c84C5896548B89f84bb42dd
                    ,0x808da12fdd0a56413551449053c2ff918822e7d6
                    ,0x1A3221e5A1Daf12B39bFff0ef8a066029e50E6fE
                    ,0xAeeE89E27203B1837D89dA3ffc748b5853ff0AeD
                )
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
        )
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.week
        ,t1.address
        ,t1.token_id
        ,t1.day_cnt
        ,t1.amount_raw_inflow
        ,(SUM(t1.amount_raw_diff) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.address, t1.token_id ORDER BY week))/POWER(10,18) AS balance
        ,(SUM(t1.amount_raw_diff) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.address, t1.token_id ORDER BY week))*t2.factor/POWER(10,18) AS balance_demurrage
    FROM balance_diff_tokens t1
    INNER JOIN 
        query_6370923 t2 --gnosis_circlesv2_inflationary_to_demurrage_v
        ON t2.day_cnt = t1.day_cnt
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_crc_balance_diff_v

**Query ID:** 6574020 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    
    crc_transfers AS (
        SELECT 
            * 
        FROM 
           query_4714366 --gnosis_circlesv2_erc1155_transfers_v 
    ),
    
    crc_balance_diff AS (
            SELECT
                block_time
                ,token_id
                ,"from" AS address
                ,-SUM(CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                crc_transfers 
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
            
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT
                block_time
                ,token_id
                ,"to" AS address
                ,SUM(CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                crc_transfers 
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    )
    
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
        crc_balance_diff
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_crc_in_DAO_v

**Query ID:** 6574407 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    relevant_addrs AS (
     SELECT
            address,
            label
        FROM (
            VALUES
                (0x1A3221e5A1Daf12B39bFff0ef8a066029e50E6fE, 'DAO CRC Holding'),
                (0xAeeE89E27203B1837D89dA3ffc748b5853ff0AeD, 'DAO CRC Ops')
        ) AS v(address, label)
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.week
        ,t2.label
        ,SUM(t1.balance) AS balance
        ,SUM(t1.balance_demurrage) AS balance_demurrage
    FROM
        query_6574062 t1--gnosis_circlesv2_crc_balance_address_token_v
    INNER JOIN
            relevant_addrs t2
            ON t2.address = t1.address
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_current_balances_v

**Query ID:** 4615890 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    avatars_v2 AS (
        SELECT avatar, 'Human' AS label  FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterHuman 
        UNION ALL
        SELECT "group" As avatar, 'Group' AS label  FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterGroup 
        UNION ALL
        SELECT organization As avatar, 'Org' AS label  FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_RegisterOrganization 
    ),
    
    current_balances_v2 AS (
        SELECT
            avatar
            ,label
            ,tokenId
            ,SUM(amount_raw)/POWER(10,18) AS amount
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t2.avatar
                ,t2.label
                ,t1.id AS tokenId
                ,SUM(CAST(t1.value AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_TransferSingle t1
            INNER JOIN
                avatars_v2 t2
                ON t2.avatar = t1."to"
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
        
            UNION ALL
        
            SELECT
                t2.avatar
                ,t2.label
                ,t1.id AS tokenId
                ,-SUM(CAST(t1.value AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_TransferSingle t1
            INNER JOIN
                avatars_v2 t2
                ON t2.avatar = t1."from"
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
        
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM current_balances_v2
    WHERE amount > 0
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_erc1155_transfers_v

**Query ID:** 4714366 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    batch_transfer AS (
        SELECT
            evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,evt_tx_hash
            ,evt_tx_from
            ,evt_tx_to
            ,operator
            ,"from"
            ,"to"
            ,token_id
            ,amount_raw
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_transferbatch
        ,unnest(zip(ids, "values")) AS u(token_id, amount_raw)
    ),
    
    single_transfer AS (
        SELECT
            evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,evt_tx_hash
            ,evt_tx_from
            ,evt_tx_to
            ,operator
            ,"from"
            ,"to"
            ,id AS token_id
            ,value AS amount_raw
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_transfersingle
    )
    
    SELECT
        block_time
        ,evt_tx_hash
        ,evt_tx_from
        ,evt_tx_to
        ,operator
        ,"from"
        ,"to"
        ,token_id
        ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM batch_transfer
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM single_transfer
    )
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_gno_in_DAO_v

**Query ID:** 6574391 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    relevant_addrs AS (
     SELECT
            address,
            label
        FROM (
            VALUES
                (0x1A3221e5A1Daf12B39bFff0ef8a066029e50E6fE, 'DAO CRC Holding'),
                (0xAeeE89E27203B1837D89dA3ffc748b5853ff0AeD, 'DAO CRC Ops')
        ) AS v(address, label)
    )
    
    SELECT
        week
        ,label
        ,(SUM(diff) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY week))/POWER(10,18) AS balance
    FROM (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week',t1.block_time) AS week,
            t2.label,
            SUM(t1.amount_raw) AS diff
        FROM 
            query_6574290 t1 --gnosis_circlesv2_gno_balance_diff_v
        INNER JOIN
            relevant_addrs t2
            ON t2.address = t1.address
        WHERE t1.token_address = 0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_gno_in_GEL_v

**Query ID:** 6574320 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    relevant_addrs AS (
     SELECT
            address,
            label
        FROM (
            VALUES
                (0xb190cDd219c1E0FCA3D0Cb8b4D38B82Fd476fa93, 'Holding'),
                (0x7aBE74B71F2958B624Cb2bE0596678784c0Caf6A, 'Cashback'),
                (0x448aEA3CEac06591a650490500dDE93e8240fF8c, 'Offer Ops'),
                (0x9CbD1B318AE1B4585c84C5896548B89f84bb42dd, 'GNO Offer')
        ) AS v(address, label)
    )
    
    SELECT
        week
        ,label
        ,(SUM(diff) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY week))/POWER(10,18) AS balance
    FROM (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week',t1.block_time) AS week,
            t2.label,
            SUM(t1.amount_raw) AS diff
        FROM 
            query_6574290 t1 --gnosis_circlesv2_gno_balance_diff_v
        INNER JOIN
            relevant_addrs t2
            ON t2.address = t1.address
        WHERE t1.token_address = 0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    ```
