### gnosis_circlesv2_gno_invested_offers_v

**Query ID:** 6575331 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    
    balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
            evt_block_time AS block_time,
            CAST(value AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM erc20_gnosis.evt_transfer
        WHERE contract_address = 0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb --GNO
        AND "from" = 0x9CbD1B318AE1B4585c84C5896548B89f84bb42dd AND "to" = 0x68e2C29fEED2A4D0F22Cc6d271e2b25124D99892
    
        UNION ALL
    
        SELECT
            evt_block_time AS block_time,
            -CAST(value AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM erc20_gnosis.evt_transfer
        WHERE contract_address = 0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb --GNO
        AND "to" = 0x9CbD1B318AE1B4585c84C5896548B89f84bb42dd AND "from" = 0x68e2C29fEED2A4D0F22Cc6d271e2b25124D99892
        
    )
    
    SELECT
        week
        ,SUM(netflow) OVER (ORDER BY week) AS cummulative_netflow
    FROM (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS week
            ,SUM(amount_raw)/POWER(10,18) AS netflow 
        FROM balance_diff
        GROUP BY 1
    )
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_group_trusts_hour_v

**Query ID:** 4733501 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    groups_trusts AS (
        SELECT
            "group"
            ,block_time
            ,expiry_timestamp
            ,avatar
            ,label
            ,avatar_type
        FROM
            query_4731014 --gnosis_circlesv2_group_trusts_v
    ),
    
    groups_trusts_diff AS (
        SELECT 
            "group"
            ,block_time
            ,label
            ,avatar_type
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM groups_trusts
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
        
        UNION ALL 
        
        SELECT 
            "group"
            ,expiry_timestamp AS block_time
            ,label
            ,avatar_type
            ,-COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM groups_trusts
        WHERE expiry_timestamp < DATE '2286-11-20'
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    ),
    
    groups_trusts_diff_hour AS ( 
        SELECT
            "group"
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour', block_time) AS block_hour
            ,label
            ,avatar_type
            ,SUM(cnt) AS cnt
        FROM
            groups_trusts_diff
         GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    ),
    
    calandar AS (
        SELECT 
            "group"
            ,label
            ,avatar_type
            ,block_hour
        FROM (
            SELECT
                "group"
                ,label
                ,avatar_type
                ,MIN(block_hour) AS min_block_hour
            FROM 
                groups_trusts_diff_hour
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_hour AS TIMESTAMP), CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP), INTERVAL '1' HOUR)) s(block_hour)
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1."group"
        ,t1.label
        ,t1.avatar_type
        ,t1.block_hour
        ,COALESCE(t2.cnt,0) AS change
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY  t1."group", t1.label, t1.avatar_type ORDER BY t1.block_hour) AS total
    FROM 
        calandar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        groups_trusts_diff_hour t2
        ON t2."group" = t1."group"
        AND t2.label = t1.label
        AND t2.avatar_type = t1.avatar_type
        AND t2.block_hour = t1.block_hour
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_group_trusts_v

**Query ID:** 4731014 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    
    groups_addr AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4712923 --gnosis_circlesv2_TokenIds_v
        WHERE token_type = 'Group'
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.avatar AS "group"
            ,t1.evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,t1.expiryTime
            ,IF(t1.expiryTime < 1e10, 
                CAST(FROM_UNIXTIME(TRY_CAST(t1.expiryTime AS DECIMAL)) AS TIMESTAMP), 
                CAST(FROM_UNIXTIME(9999999999) AS TIMESTAMP)
            ) AS expiry_timestamp
            ,t1.trustee AS avatar
            ,'Trusts In' As label
            ,COALESCE(t3.token_type,'Not Registered') AS avatar_type
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_trust t1
        INNER JOIN
            groups_addr t2
            ON t2.avatar = t1.truster 
        LEFT JOIN
            query_4712923 t3 --gnosis_circlesv2_TokenIds_v
            On t3.avatar = t1.trustee
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT 
            t2.avatar AS "group"
            ,t1.evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,t1.expiryTime
            ,IF(t1.expiryTime < 1e10, 
                CAST(FROM_UNIXTIME(TRY_CAST(t1.expiryTime AS DECIMAL)) AS TIMESTAMP), 
                CAST(FROM_UNIXTIME(9999999999) AS TIMESTAMP)
            ) AS expiry_timestamp
            ,t1.truster AS avatar
            ,'Trusted By' AS label
            ,COALESCE(t3.token_type,'Not Registered') AS avatar_type
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_trust t1
        INNER JOIN
            groups_addr t2
            ON t2.avatar = t1.trustee 
        LEFT JOIN
            query_4712923 t3
            On t3.avatar = t1.truster
    )
    
    SELECT
        "group"
        ,ARRAY_AGG(block_time ORDER BY block_time DESC)[1] AS block_time
        ,ARRAY_AGG(expiryTime ORDER BY block_time DESC)[1] AS expiryTime
        ,ARRAY_AGG(expiry_timestamp ORDER BY block_time DESC)[1] AS expiry_timestamp
        ,avatar
        ,label
        ,ARRAY_AGG(avatar_type ORDER BY block_time DESC)[1] AS avatar_type
    FROM
        final
    GROUP BY 1, 5, 6
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_groups_collateral_balances_hour_v

**Query ID:** 4718467 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    collateral_diff AS (
        SELECT 
            avatar
            ,token_id
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour', block_time) AS block_hour
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            query_4718391 --gnosis_circlesv2_groups_collateral_v
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    callendar AS (
        SELECT
            avatar
            ,token_id
            ,block_hour
        FROM (
            SELECT
                avatar
                ,token_id
                ,MIN(block_hour) AS min_block_hour
            FROM collateral_diff
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_hour AS TIMESTAMP), CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP), INTERVAL '1' HOUR)) s(block_hour)
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
             t1.avatar
            ,t1.token_id
            ,t1.block_hour
            ,(SUM(COALESCE(t2.amount_raw,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.avatar, t1.token_id ORDER BY t1.block_hour))/POWER(10,18) AS balance
        FROM 
            callendar t1
        LEFT JOIN
            collateral_diff t2
            ON t2.avatar = t1.avatar
            AND t2.token_id = t1.token_id
            AND t2.block_hour = t1.block_hour
    )
    WHERE balance > 0
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_groups_collateral_v

**Query ID:** 4718391 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    mint AS (
        SELECT 
            evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,"group" AS avatar
            ,token_id
            ,amount_raw
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_groupmint
        ,unnest(zip(collateral, amounts)) AS u(token_id, amount_raw)
    )
    
    SELECT 
        block_time
        ,avatar
        ,token_id
        ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
    FROM mint
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_groups_potential_daily_v

**Query ID:** 6560502 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    tokensid AS (
        SELECT 
         avatar
        ,token_id
        FROM query_4712923 --gnosis_circlesv2_TokenIds_v
    ),
    
    group_trusts AS (
        SELECT 
            "group"
            ,block_time
            ,expiry_timestamp
            ,avatar
        FROM 
            query_4731014 --gnosis_circlesv2_group_trusts_v
        WHERE 
            label = 'Trusts In'
    ),
    
    
    crc_supply AS (
        SELECT 
             token_id
            ,block_date
            ,supply
        FROM query_6560476 t1 --gnosis_circlesv2_supply_daily_v
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t3."group"
        ,t1.block_date
        ,t1.token_id
        ,t2.avatar
        ,t1.supply AS potential_amount
    FROM 
        crc_supply t1
    LEFT JOIN
        tokensid t2
        ON t2.token_id = t1.token_id
    CROSS JOIN
        group_trusts t3
    WHERE
        t3.avatar = t2.avatar AND t1.block_date>=t3.block_time AND t1.block_date<t3.expiry_timestamp
    ```

    ```sql
    WITH
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_invites_daily_v

**Query ID:** 4746274 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    invites_daily_sparse AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', trust_block_time) AS block_day
            ,inviter
            ,'Invite Sent' AS status
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM query_4745363 --gnosis_circlesv2_invites_v
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', join_block_time) AS block_day
            ,inviter
            ,status
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM query_4745363 --gnosis_circlesv2_invites_v
        WHERE
            status = 'Invite Declined' OR status = 'Invite Accepted'
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            inviter
            ,status
            ,block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT
                inviter
                ,status
                ,MIN(block_day) AS min_block_day
            FROM
                invites_daily_sparse
            GROUP BY 1, 2 
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_day AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.inviter
        ,t1.status
        ,t1.block_day
        ,COALESCE(t2.cnt,0) AS cnt
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.inviter, t1.status ORDER BY t1.block_day) AS total
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        invites_daily_sparse t2
        ON t2.inviter = t1.inviter
        AND t2.status = t1.status
        AND t2.block_day = t1.block_day
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_invites_v

**Query ID:** 4745363 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    avatars_v1 AS (
        SELECT evt_block_time AS join_block_time, user AS avatar FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.hub_evt_signup
        UNION ALL
        SELECT evt_block_time AS join_block_time, organization AS avatar FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.hub_evt_organizationsignup
    ),
    
    avatars_v2 AS (
        SELECT evt_block_time AS join_block_time, avatar FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registerhuman
        UNION ALL
        SELECT evt_block_time AS join_block_time, "group" AS avatar FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registergroup
        UNION ALL
        SELECT evt_block_time AS join_block_time, organization AS avatar FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registerorganization
    ),
    
    unique_inviters AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT inviter FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registerhuman
    ),
    
    trusts AS (
        SELECT
            ARRAY_AGG(trust_block_time ORDER BY trust_block_time DESC)[1] AS trust_block_time
            ,join_block_time
            ,truster
            ,trustee
            ,ARRAY_AGG(status ORDER BY trust_block_time DESC)[1] AS status
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t1.evt_block_time AS trust_block_time
                ,t2.join_block_time 
                ,t1.truster
                ,t1.trustee 
                ,CASE
                    WHEN t2.avatar = t1.trustee AND t1.evt_block_time > t2.join_block_time THEN 'Already Avatar'
                    WHEN t2.avatar = t1.trustee AND t3.inviter = t1.truster THEN 'Invite Accepted'
                    WHEN t2.avatar = t1.trustee THEN 'Invite Declined'
                    ELSE 'Invite Pending'
                END AS status
            FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_trust t1
            LEFT JOIN
                avatars_v2 t2
                ON t2.avatar = t1.trustee
            LEFT JOIN 
                unique_inviters t3
                ON t3.inviter = t1.truster
            WHERE
                t1.trustee NOT IN (SELECT avatar FROM avatars_v1)
                AND
                t1.trustee != t1.truster
        )
        GROUP BY 2, 3, 4
            
    )
    
    SELECT 
        trust_block_time
        ,join_block_time
        ,date_diff('second', trust_block_time, COALESCE(join_block_time,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)) AS acceptance_delay
        ,truster AS inviter
        ,trustee AS account
        ,status
    FROM trusts
    WHERE
        status != 'Already Avatar'
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_marketplace_montly_spent_v

**Query ID:** 6764416 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_group AS (
        SELECT
            block_time
            ,expiry_timestamp
            ,avatar
        FROM query_4731014
        WHERE "group" = 0xc19bc204eb1c1d5b3fe500e5e5dfabab625f286c
        AND label  =  'Trusts In'
    ),
    
    gnosis_group_trusts_sparse AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            DATE_TRUNC('day',timestamp) AS block_date
            ,SUM(change) OVER (ORDER BY timestamp) AS cnt
        FROM
            query_5160085 --gnosis_circlesv2_trusts_cnt_per_avatar_v
        WHERE truster = 0xc19bc204eb1c1d5b3fe500e5e5dfabab625f286c
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                min(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM 
                gnosis_group_trusts_sparse
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    ),
    
    gnosis_group_trusts AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,LAST_VALUE(t2.cnt) IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY t1.block_date) AS cnt
        FROM calendar t1
        LEFT JOIN 
            gnosis_group_trusts_sparse t2
        ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            
    ),
    
    gnosis_group_trusts_month AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('month', block_date) AS month
            ,ARRAY_AGG(cnt ORDER BY block_date DESC)[1] AS cnt
        FROM
            gnosis_group_trusts
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    marketplace_buys AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.evt_block_date AS block_date
            ,t1.payer
            ,t1.amount/POWER(10,18) AS amount
            ,t1.amount/POWER(10,18) * t3.price_demurrage AS amount_usd_demurrage
        FROM 
            query_6679414 t1 --gnosis_app_marketplace_payments_v
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_group t2
            ON t2.avatar = t1.payer
            AND t2.expiry_timestamp > t1.evt_block_date
        LEFT JOIN
            query_6370556 t3 --gnosis_circlesv2_prices_v
            ON t3.block_day = t1.evt_block_date
        WHERE
            name IN (SELECT marketplace_offer FROM query_6707158) --gnosis_app_marketplace_offers_v
            AND t3.avatar = 0xc19bc204eb1c1d5b3fe500e5e5dfabab625f286c
    ),
    
    tokenoffer_buys AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.account AS payer
            ,t1.spent/POWER(10,18) AS amount
            ,t1.spent/POWER(10,18) * t3.price_demurrage AS amount_usd_demurrage
        FROM query_6679334 t1 --gnosis_app_tokenoffer_v
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_group t2
            ON t2.avatar = t1.account
            AND t2.expiry_timestamp > t1.block_date
        LEFT JOIN
            query_6370556 t3 --gnosis_circlesv2_prices_v
            ON t3.block_day = t1.block_date
            AND t3.avatar = t1.account
    
    ),
    
    final_makerplace_offers_buys AS (
        SELECT * FROM marketplace_buys
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM tokenoffer_buys
    ),
    
    final_market_place AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('month', block_date) AS month
            ,t2.cnt AS gnosis_group_members
            ,COUNT(DISTINCT payer) AS gnosis_group_users
            ,SUM(amount_usd_demurrage) AS amount_usd_demurrage
        FROM final_makerplace_offers_buys t1
        LEFT JOIN
            gnosis_group_trusts_month t2
        ON t2.month = DATE_TRUNC('month', block_date)
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    
    SELECT 
        month
        ,gnosis_group_members
        ,gnosis_group_users
        ,amount_usd_demurrage
        ,amount_usd_demurrage/gnosis_group_users AS avg_per_user
        ,gnosis_group_users*1.0/gnosis_group_members * 100 AS group_members_pct
    FROM final_market_place
    ORDER BY 1
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_mint_activity_v

**Query ID:** 6317871 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    avatar_daily_mints AS (
        SELECT 
            evt_block_date AS date
            ,human AS avatar
            ,SUM(amount)/POWER(10,18) AS amount --336
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_personalmint
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            avatar
            ,date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                avatar
                ,MIN(date) AS min_date
            FROM 
                avatar_daily_mints
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(date)
    ),
    
    avatar_daily_mints_dense AS (
        SELECT
            t1.avatar
            ,t1.date
            ,COALESCE(amount,0) AS mint_amount
        FROM
            calendar t1
        LEFT JOIN 
            avatar_daily_mints t2
            ON t2.date = t1.date
            AND t1.avatar = t2.avatar
    )
    
    
    
    SELECT 
        avatar
        ,date
        ,mint_amount
        ,SUM(mint_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY avatar ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS mint_14dw 
        ,COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY avatar ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS mint_days_14dw
    FROM avatar_daily_mints_dense
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_ownbalance_change_label_v

**Query ID:** 5199221 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    balance_diff AS (
        SELECT 
             block_time
            ,evt_tx_hash
            ,operator
            ,avatar
            ,token_id
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                 block_time
                ,evt_tx_hash
                ,operator
                ,"from" AS avatar
                ,token_id
                ,-amount_raw AS amount_raw
            FROM query_4714366
            
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT 
                 block_time
                ,evt_tx_hash
                ,operator
                ,"to" AS avatar
                ,token_id
                ,amount_raw
            FROM query_4714366
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
    ),
    
    final As (
        SELECT
            t1.block_time
            ,t1.evt_tx_hash
            ,t1.operator
            ,t1.avatar
            ,CASE
                WHEN t1.operator=t1.avatar THEN 'Self'
                WHEN t1.operator=0xd44b8dcfbadfc78ea64c55b705bfc68199b56376 THEN 'Migration'
                ELSE COALESCE(t2.label,'Others')
            END AS operator_label
            ,t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18) AS amount
        FROM balance_diff t1
        LEFT JOIN
            query_5194612 t2 --gnosis_circlesv2_avatar_label_v
            ON t2.avatar = t1.operator
        INNER JOIN
            query_4712923 t3 --gnosis_circlesv2_TokenIds_v
            ON t3.token_id = t1.token_id
            AND t3.avatar = t1.avatar
    )
    
    SELECT
        block_time
        ,avatar
        ,operator
        ,operator_label
        ,amount
    FROM 
        final
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_pools_reserves_v

**Query ID:** 5166826 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    
    balancer_liquidity_CRC AS (
        SELECT 
            day AS block_date
            ,pool_address AS pool
            ,CONCAT('Balancer v',version,'-',pool_type) AS label
            ,token_address
            ,token_symbol
            ,token_balance
        FROM query_5154790 --gnosis_balancer_circles_pools_v
        WHERE
            token_symbol IN ('CRC', 's-CRC')
    ),
    
    balancer_liquidity_backing AS (
        SELECT 
            day AS block_date
            ,pool_address AS pool
            ,CONCAT('Balancer-v',version,'-',pool_type) AS label
            ,token_address
            ,token_symbol
            ,token_balance
            ,pool_liquidity_usd
        FROM query_5154790 t1 --gnosis_balancer_circles_pools_v
        WHERE
            token_symbol NOT IN ('CRC', 's-CRC')
    ),
    
    balancer_liquidity AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.pool
            ,t1.label
            ,t1.token_address AS CRC_address
            ,t1.token_symbol AS CRC_symbol
            ,t1.token_balance AS CRC_balance
            ,t2.token_address AS backing_address
            ,t2.token_symbol AS backing_symbol
            ,t2.token_balance AS backing_balance
            ,t2.pool_liquidity_usd
        FROM
            balancer_liquidity_CRC t1
        INNER JOIN
            balancer_liquidity_backing t2
            ON t1.pool = t2.pool
            AND t1.block_date = t2.block_date
    ),
    
    uniswap_liquidity AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.pool
            ,'Uniswap-v3' AS label
            ,IF(t1.backing_asset = t1.token0, t1.token1, t1.token0) AS CRC_address
            ,IF(t1.backing_asset = t1.token0, t1.symbol1, t1.symbol0) AS CRC_symbol
            ,IF(t1.backing_asset = t1.token0, t1.amount1, t1.amount0) AS CRC_balance
            ,IF(t1.backing_asset = t1.token0, t1.token0, t1.token1) AS backing_address
            ,IF(t1.backing_asset = t1.token0, t1.symbol0, t1.symbol1) AS backing_symbol
            ,IF(t1.backing_asset = t1.token0, t1.amount0, t1.amount1) AS backing_balance
            ,t1.pool_liquidity_usd 
        FROM query_5154512 t1 --gnosis_uniswap_v3_circles_pools_v
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM balancer_liquidity
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM uniswap_liquidity
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_prices_v

**Query ID:** 6370556 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    crc20_tokens AS (
        SELECT 
            avatar
            ,circlesType
            ,erc20Wrapper AS token_address
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20lift_evt_erc20wrapperdeployed
    ),
    
    trades_price AS (
        SELECT 
            --t1.project
            --,t1.version
            DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS block_day
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t2.token_address = t1.token_bought_address THEN token_bought_address
                ELSE t1.token_sold_address
            END AS crc20_token
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t3.token_address = t1.token_sold_address THEN t1.token_bought_address 
                ELSE t1.token_sold_address
            END AS backing_token
            --,project_contract_address AS pool
           -- ,DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS block_day
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t2.token_address = t1.token_bought_address  
                    THEN t1.token_sold_amount/NULLIF(t1.token_bought_amount_raw/POWER(10,18),0)
                ELSE t1.token_bought_amount/NULLIF(t1.token_sold_amount_raw/POWER(10,18),0)
            END AS price_crc_backing
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t2.token_address = t1.token_bought_address  
                    THEN t1.token_bought_amount_raw/POWER(10,18)
                ELSE 0
            END AS crc_bought_volume
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t2.token_address = t1.token_bought_address 
                    THEN 0
                ELSE t1.token_sold_amount_raw/POWER(10,18)
            END AS crc_sold_volume
        FROM dex.trades t1
        LEFT JOIN 
            crc20_tokens t2
            ON t2.token_address = t1.token_bought_address
        LEFT JOIN 
            crc20_tokens t3
            ON t3.token_address = t1.token_sold_address
        WHERE t1.blockchain='gnosis' AND (t2.token_address IS NOT NULL OR t3.token_address IS NOT NULL)
    ),
    
    cow_trades_price AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date AS block_day
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t2.token_address = t1.buy_token_address THEN buy_token_address
                ELSE t1.sell_token_address
            END AS crc20_token
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t3.token_address = t1.sell_token_address THEN t1.buy_token_address 
                ELSE t1.sell_token_address
            END AS backing_token
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t2.token_address = t1.buy_token_address  
                    THEN t1.units_sold/NULLIF(t1.units_bought,0)
                ELSE t1.units_bought/NULLIF(t1.units_sold,0)
            END AS price_crc_backing
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t2.token_address = t1.buy_token_address  
                    THEN t1.units_bought
                ELSE 0
            END AS crc_bought_volume
            ,CASE 
                WHEN t2.token_address = t1.buy_token_address 
                    THEN 0
                ELSE t1.units_sold
            END AS crc_sold_volume
        FROM cow_protocol_gnosis.trades t1
        LEFT JOIN 
            crc20_tokens t2
            ON t2.token_address = t1.buy_token_address
        LEFT JOIN 
            crc20_tokens t3
            ON t3.token_address = t1.sell_token_address
        WHERE t2.token_address IS NOT NULL OR t3.token_address IS NOT NULL
    ),
    
    prices_sparse AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.crc20_token
            ,t1.block_day
            ,AVG(t1.price_crc_backing * t2.price) AS price_crc_backing_avg_usd
        FROM (
                SELECT * FROM trades_price
                UNION ALL
                SELECT * FROM cow_trades_price
            ) t1
        LEFT JOIN
            query_4338954 t2
            ON t2.token_address = t1.backing_token
            AND t2.block_date = t1.block_day
        WHERE
            t1.crc_bought_volume + t1.crc_sold_volume > 1 --remove outliers
            AND
            t2.price IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            crc20_token
            ,block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                crc20_token
                ,MIN(block_day) AS min_block_day
            FROM
                prices_sparse
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_day AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    )
    
    SELECT
        crc20_token
        ,avatar
        ,circlesType
        ,block_day
        ,price
        ,IF(circlesType=1, price/factor, price) AS price_demurrage
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            t1.crc20_token
            ,t3.avatar
            ,t3.circlesType
            ,t1.block_day
            ,LAST_VALUE(t2.price_crc_backing_avg_usd) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY t1.crc20_token ORDER BY t1.block_day) AS price
        FROM calendar t1
        LEFT JOIN
            prices_sparse t2
            ON  t2.crc20_token = t1.crc20_token
            AND t2.block_day = t1.block_day
        INNER JOIN
            crc20_tokens t3
            ON t3.token_address = t1.crc20_token
    ) t1
    LEFT JOIN
        query_6370923 t2--gnosis_circlesv2_inflationary_to_demurrage_v
        ON t2.day = t1.block_day
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_sdai_in_DAO_v

**Query ID:** 6574395 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    relevant_addrs AS (
     SELECT
            address,
            label
        FROM (
            VALUES
                (0x1A3221e5A1Daf12B39bFff0ef8a066029e50E6fE, 'DAO CRC Holding'),
                (0xAeeE89E27203B1837D89dA3ffc748b5853ff0AeD, 'DAO CRC Ops')
        ) AS v(address, label)
    )
    
    SELECT
        week
        ,label
        ,(SUM(diff) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY week))/POWER(10,18) AS balance
    FROM (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week',t1.block_time) AS week,
            t2.label,
            SUM(t1.amount_raw) AS diff
        FROM 
            query_6574290 t1 --gnosis_circlesv2_gno_balance_diff_v
        INNER JOIN
            relevant_addrs t2
            ON t2.address = t1.address
        WHERE t1.token_address = 0xaf204776c7245bf4147c2612bf6e5972ee483701
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_standardtreasury_collateral_balance_daily_v

**Query ID:** 6560560 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    standardtreasury_collateral_hour AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS block_date
            ,"group" 
            ,token_id
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS diff
        FROM query_4730007 --gnosis_circlesv2_standardtreasury_collateral_v
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            "group" 
            ,token_id
            ,block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                "group" 
                ,token_id
                ,MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
                standardtreasury_collateral_hour
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1."group" 
        ,t1.token_id
        ,t1.block_date
        ,(SUM(COALESCE(t2.diff,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1."group", t1.token_id ORDER BY t1.block_date))/POWER(10,18) AS balance
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        standardtreasury_collateral_hour t2
        ON t2."group" = t1."group"
        AND t2.token_id = t1.token_id
        AND t2.block_date = t1.block_date
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_standardtreasury_collateral_balance_v

**Query ID:** 4730071 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    standardtreasury_collateral_hour AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('hour', block_time) AS block_hour
            ,"group" 
            ,token_id
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS diff
        FROM query_4730007 --gnosis_circlesv2_standardtreasury_collateral_v
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            "group" 
            ,token_id
            ,block_hour
        FROM (
            SELECT
                "group" 
                ,token_id
                ,MIN(block_hour) AS min_block_hour
            FROM
                standardtreasury_collateral_hour
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_hour AS TIMESTAMP), CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP), INTERVAL '1' HOUR)) s(block_hour)
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1."group" 
        ,t1.token_id
        ,t1.block_hour
        ,(SUM(COALESCE(t2.diff,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1."group", t1.token_id ORDER BY t1.block_hour))/POWER(10,18) AS balance
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        standardtreasury_collateral_hour t2
        ON t2."group" = t1."group"
        AND t2.token_id = t1.token_id
        AND t2.block_hour = t1.block_hour
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_standardtreasury_collateral_v

**Query ID:** 4730007 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    batch_collateral_locked AS (
        SELECT
            evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,"group"
            ,token_id
            ,amount_raw
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.standardtreasury_evt_collaterallockedbatch
        ,unnest(zip(ids, "values")) AS u(token_id, amount_raw)
    ),
    
    single_collateral_locked AS (
        SELECT
            evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,"group"
            ,id AS token_id
            ,value AS amount_raw
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.standardtreasury_evt_collaterallockedsingle
    ),
    
    collateral_locked AS (
        SELECT
            block_time
            ,"group"
            ,token_id
            ,SUM(CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM batch_collateral_locked
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM single_collateral_locked
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    collateral_redeemed AS (
        SELECT
            evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,"group"
            ,token_id
            ,-CAST(amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.standardtreasury_evt_groupredeemcollateralreturn
        ,unnest(zip(ids, "values")) AS u(token_id, amount_raw)
    )
    
    SELECT 
        block_time
        ,"group"
        ,token_id
        ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM collateral_locked
        UNION ALL 
        SELECT * FROM collateral_redeemed
    )
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_supply_daily_v

**Query ID:** 6560476 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    supply_sparse AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('day', block_hour) AS block_date
            ,token_id
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM query_4714423 --gnosis_circlesv2_balance_diff_hour_v
        WHERE avatar = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            token_id
            ,block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                token_id
                ,MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
                supply_sparse
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        t1.token_id
        ,t1.block_date
        ,(SUM(COALESCE(-t2.amount_raw,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.token_id ORDER BY t1.block_date))/POWER(10,18) AS supply
        ,COALESCE(-t2.amount_raw,0)/POWER(10,18) AS change
    FROM calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        supply_sparse t2
        ON t2.token_id = t1.token_id
        AND t2.block_date = t1.block_date
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_supply_hour_v

**Query ID:** 4717272 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    supply_sparse AS (
        SELECT 
            block_hour
            ,token_id
            ,amount_raw
        FROM query_4714423 --gnosis_circlesv2_balance_diff_hour_v
        WHERE avatar = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            token_id
            ,block_hour
        FROM (
            SELECT
                token_id
                ,MIN(block_hour) AS min_block_hour
            FROM
                supply_sparse
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_hour AS TIMESTAMP), CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP), INTERVAL '1' HOUR)) s(block_hour)
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        t1.token_id
        ,t1.block_hour
        ,(SUM(COALESCE(-t2.amount_raw,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.token_id ORDER BY t1.block_hour))/POWER(10,18) AS supply
        ,COALESCE(-t2.amount_raw,0)/POWER(10,18) AS change
    FROM calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        supply_sparse t2
        ON t2.token_id = t1.token_id
        AND t2.block_hour = t1.block_hour
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_tokenoffer_spent_v

**Query ID:** 6377769 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    offer_claimed AS (
        SELECT * FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20tokenoffercycle_evt_offerclaimed
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20tokenoffercyclev2_evt_offerclaimed
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20tokenoffercyclev3_evt_offerclaimed
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        t1.evt_block_date AS block_date
        ,t1.account
        ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        ,SUM(t1.spent)/POWER(10,18) AS spent
        ,SUM(t1.spent * t2.price_demurrage)/POWER(10,18)  AS spent_usd
    FROM offer_claimed t1
    INNER JOIN
        query_6370556 t2 --gnosis_circlesv2_prices_v
        ON t2.block_day = t1.evt_block_date
        AND t2.avatar = t1.account
    WHERE t2.circlesType = 1
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_tokens_balance_diff_v

**Query ID:** 6574290 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    relevant_addrs AS (
     SELECT
            address,
            label
        FROM (
            VALUES
                (0xb190cDd219c1E0FCA3D0Cb8b4D38B82Fd476fa93, 'Holding'),
                (0x7aBE74B71F2958B624Cb2bE0596678784c0Caf6A, 'Cashback'),
                (0x448aEA3CEac06591a650490500dDE93e8240fF8c, 'Offer Ops'),
                (0x9CbD1B318AE1B4585c84C5896548B89f84bb42dd, 'GNO Offer'),
                (0x1A3221e5A1Daf12B39bFff0ef8a066029e50E6fE, 'DAO CRC Holding'),
                (0xAeeE89E27203B1837D89dA3ffc748b5853ff0AeD, 'DAO CRC Ops'),
                (0x582f85e3fdd6efe0ccf71d1fa6b1b87d8e64ce7d, 'UniV3-gCRC/sDAI'),
                (0xe2935A6D63Ef7B73a469E733b124487a1b9eaaf4, 'UniV3-gCRC/EURe'),
                (0xbA1333333333a1BA1108E8412f11850A5C319bA9, 'Balancer')
        ) AS v(address, label)
    ),
    
    transfers AS (
        SELECT
            evt_block_time AS block_time,
            contract_address AS token_address,
            "from",
            to,
            value AS amount_raw
        FROM erc20_gnosis.evt_transfer
        WHERE contract_address IN (
            0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb, --GNO
            0xaf204776c7245bf4147c2612bf6e5972ee483701, --sDAI
            0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430, --EURe
            0xeeF7B1f06B092625228C835Dd5D5B14641D1e54A --gCRC
            )
        AND (
        "from" IN (SELECT address FROM relevant_addrs)
            OR
        "to" IN (SELECT address FROM relevant_addrs)
        )
    ),
    
    balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
            block_time,
            token_address,
            "from" AS address,
            -CAST(amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM transfers
        WHERE "from" IN (SELECT address FROM relevant_addrs)
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT
            block_time,
            token_address,
            "to" AS address,
            CAST(amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM transfers
        WHERE "to" IN (SELECT address FROM relevant_addrs)
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM balance_diff
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_trusts_cnt_per_avatar_v

**Query ID:** 5160085 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    trusts AS (
        SELECT
            evt_block_time 
            ,evt_index
            ,truster
            ,trustee
            ,expiryTime
            ,LEAD(evt_block_time) OVER (PARTITION BY truster, trustee ORDER BY evt_block_time, evt_index) AS next_ts
        FROM 
            circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_Trust
        WHERE truster != trustee
    ),
    
    trust_intervals AS (
    	SELECT 
    		truster,
    		evt_block_time AS start_ts,
    		CASE 
    			WHEN expiryTime < 10000000000 THEN from_unixtime(expiryTime)
    			WHEN next_ts IS NOT NULL THEN next_ts
    			ELSE NULL -- Still valid
    		END AS end_ts
    	FROM trusts
    ),
    
    trusts_changes AS (
    	SELECT 
    		start_ts AS "timestamp",
    		truster,
    		1 AS cnt
    	FROM trust_intervals
    
    	UNION ALL
    
    	SELECT 
    		end_ts AS "timestamp",
    		truster,
    		-1 AS cnt
    	FROM trust_intervals
    	WHERE end_ts IS NOT NULL
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        timestamp
        ,truster
        ,SUM(cnt) AS change
    FROM trusts_changes
    WHERE timestamp <= CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_univ3_gCRC_EURe_v

**Query ID:** 6574478 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    relevant_addrs AS (
     SELECT
            address,
            label
        FROM (
            VALUES
                (0xe2935A6D63Ef7B73a469E733b124487a1b9eaaf4, 'UniV3-gCRC/URe')
        ) AS v(address, label)
    ),
    
    reserves AS (
        SELECT
            week
            ,token_address
            ,(SUM(diff) OVER (PARTITION BY token_address ORDER BY week))/POWER(10,18) AS balance
        FROM (
            SELECT
                DATE_TRUNC('week',t1.block_time) AS week,
                t1.token_address,
                SUM(t1.amount_raw) AS diff
            FROM 
                query_6574290 t1 --gnosis_circlesv2_gno_balance_diff_v
            INNER JOIN
                relevant_addrs t2
                ON t2.address = t1.address
            WHERE t1.token_address IN (0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430,0xeeF7B1f06B092625228C835Dd5D5B14641D1e54A)
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        )
    ),
    
    reserve1 AS (
        SELECT week, balance  FROM reserves
        WHERE token_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430
    ),
    
    reserve2 AS (
        SELECT week, balance  FROM reserves
        WHERE token_address = 0xeeF7B1f06B092625228C835Dd5D5B14641D1e54A
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.week
        ,t1.balance AS "EURe"
        ,t2.balance AS "gCRC"
    FROM
        reserve1 t1
    INNER JOIN 
        reserve2 t2
        ON t2.week = t1.week
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_user_crc_balance_v

**Query ID:** 6567254 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `at_time` (datetime): `2026-01-20 00:00:00`
- `avatar` (enum): `0x42cedde51198d1773590311e2a340dc06b24cb37`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    final_balance AS (
        SELECT
             avatar
            ,token_id
            ,avatar_token
            ,DATE_DIFF('day',latest_move, CURRENT_DATE) AS day_cnt
            ,amount
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t1.avatar
                ,t1.token_id
                ,t2.avatar AS avatar_token
                ,MAX(DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.block_hour)) AS latest_move
                ,SUM(t1.amount_raw)/POWER(10,18) AS amount
            FROM
                query_4714423 t1 --gnosis_circlesv2_balance_diff_hour_v
            LEFT JOIN
                query_4712923 t2 --gnosis_circlesv2_TokenIds_v
                ON t2.token_id = t1.token_id
            WHERE
                t1.block_hour <= CAST('{{at_time}}' AS TIMESTAMP) AND t1.avatar = {{avatar}}
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
        )
    )
    
    SELECT 
       -- t1.avatar
        t1.token_id
        ,t1.avatar_token
        ,t1.amount
        ,t1.amount*t2.factor AS amount_demurrage
    FROM 
        final_balance t1
    INNER JOIN 
        query_6370923 t2 --gnosis_circlesv2_inflationary_to_demurrage_v
        ON t2.day_cnt = t1.day_cnt
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_user_persona_activity_v

**Query ID:** 5152554 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    user_persona AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', profile_creation_time) AS block_date
            ,*
        FROM
            query_5149409 --gnosis_circlesv2_user_persona_v
    ),
    
    
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
                user_persona
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    ),
    
    user_persnona_dense AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,t2.avatar
            ,CASE
                WHEN t2.backing_time IS NOT NULL AND t1.block_date >= DATE_TRUNC('day', t2.backing_time) THEN 'Backed'
                WHEN t2.three_trusts_time IS NOT NULL AND t1.block_date >= DATE_TRUNC('day', t2.three_trusts_time) THEN 'Has 3+ trusts'
                WHEN t2.human_regiter_time IS NOT NULL AND t1.block_date >= DATE_TRUNC('day', t2.human_regiter_time) THEN 'Registered'
                ELSE 'Others'
            END AS persona_type
        FROM
            calendar t1
        CROSS JOIN 
            user_persona t2
        WHERE 
            t1.block_date >= DATE_TRUNC('day', t2.human_regiter_time)
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,avatar
            ,persona_type
            ,SUM(has_minted) OVER (PARTITION BY avatar ORDER BY block_date ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS mints
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_date
                ,t1.avatar
                ,t1.persona_type
                ,SUM(IF(t2.amount IS NOT NULL,1,0)) AS has_minted
            FROM user_persnona_dense t1
            LEFT JOIN circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_personalmint t2
            ON t2.human = avatar
            AND t2.evt_block_date = t1.block_date
            WHERE
                t1.persona_type != 'Others'
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
        )
    )
    
    SELECT
         block_date
        ,avatar
        ,persona_type
        ,IF(mints>0, 'Active', 'Inactive') AS status
    FROM
        final
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_user_persona_v

**Query ID:** 5149409 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    avatars_v1 AS (
        SELECT  user AS avatar FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.hub_evt_signup
        UNION ALL
        SELECT organization AS avatar FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.hub_evt_organizationsignup
    ),
    
    not_humans AS (
        SELECT "group" AS avatar FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registergroup
        UNION ALL
        SELECT organization AS avatar FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registerorganization
        UNION ALL
        SELECT organization AS avatar FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.hub_evt_organizationsignup
    ),
    
    avatar_profile_creation AS (
        SELECT
            avatar
            ,MIN(profile_creation_time) AS profile_creation_time
            ,MIN(circles_version) AS circles_version
        FROM (
            SELECT MIN(evt_block_time) AS profile_creation_time, avatar, 2 AS circles_version FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.nameregistry_evt_updatemetadatadigest
            WHERE avatar NOT IN (SELECT avatar FROM not_humans) AND avatar NOT IN (SELECT avatar FROM avatars_v1)
            GROUP BY 2
            
            UNION ALL
        
            SELECT MIN(evt_block_time) AS profile_creation_time, avatar, 1 AS circles_version  FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.nameregistryv1_evt_updatemetadatadigest
            WHERE avatar NOT IN (SELECT avatar FROM not_humans)
            GROUP BY 2
    
            UNION ALL --catch v1 users that had no v1 registry entry
            SELECT evt_block_time AS profile_creation_time, user AS avatar, 1 AS circles_version  FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.hub_evt_signup
        )
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    human_avatar_registration AS (
        SELECT 
            evt_block_time AS human_regiter_time
            , avatar
            , inviter
            , IF(inviter=0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000, 1, 2) AS circles_version 
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registerhuman 
        WHERE avatar NOT IN (SELECT createdBot FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.invitationfarm_evt_botcreated)
    ),
    
    avatar_trusts AS (
        SELECT
            *
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                *
                ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY trustee ORDER BY evt_block_time, evt_index ) AS n_trusts
            FROM 
                circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_trust
            WHERE
                trustee != truster 
               -- AND trustee NOT IN (SELECT avatar FROM avatars_v1)
                AND trustee NOT IN (SELECT avatar FROM not_humans)
        )
        WHERE n_trusts <= 3
    ),
    
    avatars AS (
        SELECT 
            avatar
            ,MIN(circles_version) AS circles_version
        FROM (
            SELECT avatar, circles_version FROM avatar_profile_creation
            UNION ALL
            SELECT avatar, circles_version FROM human_avatar_registration
        )
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    circles_backing AS (
        SELECT * FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.circlesbackingfactory_evt_circlesbackingcompleted
        WHERE 
            --backer NOT IN (SELECT avatar FROM avatars_v1)
            --AND 
            --backer NOT IN (SELECT avatar FROM not_humans)
            backer IN (SELECT trustee FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_trust WHERE truster = 0x1aca75e38263c79d9d4f10df0635cc6fcfe6f026)
            
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t0.avatar
        ,t0.circles_version
        ,t1.profile_creation_time
        ,t2.evt_block_time AS invite_time
        ,t3.human_regiter_time 
        ,t4.evt_block_time AS three_trusts_time
        ,t5.evt_block_time AS backing_time
        --,t2.truster
        ,t3.inviter
        ,t5.lbp
    FROM 
        avatars t0
    LEFT JOIN
        avatar_profile_creation t1
        ON t1.avatar = t0.avatar
    LEFT JOIN
        avatar_trusts t2
        ON t0.avatar = t2.trustee
        AND t2.n_trusts=1
    LEFT JOIN
        human_avatar_registration t3
        ON t0.avatar = t3.avatar
    LEFT JOIN
        avatar_trusts t4
        ON t0.avatar = t4.trustee
        AND t4.n_trusts=3
    LEFT JOIN
        circles_backing t5
        ON t0.avatar = t5.backer
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_wrapped_balance_daily_v

**Query ID:** 4740340 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    supply_sparse_daily AS (
        SELECT 
             DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS block_day
            ,erc20Wrapper
            ,address
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            query_4740019--gnosis_circlesv2_wrapped_balance_diff_v
        WHERE
            address != 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            erc20Wrapper
            ,address
            ,block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                erc20Wrapper
                ,address
                ,MIN(block_day) AS min_block_day
            FROM
                supply_sparse_daily 
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_day AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    )
    
    SELECT
        *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t1.erc20Wrapper
            ,t1.address
            ,t1.block_day
            ,(SUM(COALESCE(amount_raw,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.erc20Wrapper, t1.address ORDER BY t1.block_day))/POWER(10,18) AS balance
        FROM
            calendar t1
        LEFT JOIN
            supply_sparse_daily t2
            ON t2.erc20Wrapper = t1.erc20Wrapper
            AND t2.address = t1.address
            AND t2.block_day = t1.block_day
    )
    WHERE balance > 0
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_wrapped_balance_diff_v

**Query ID:** 4740019 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    wrapper_deployed AS (
        SELECT 
            evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,avatar
            ,erc20Wrapper
            ,circlesType
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20lift_evt_erc20wrapperdeployed
    ),
    
    wrapped_balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_time
            ,t2.erc20Wrapper
            ,t1."from" AS address
            ,-CAST(amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            wrapper_deployed t2
            ON t2.erc20Wrapper = t1.contract_address
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            t1.block_time
            ,t2.erc20Wrapper
            ,t1."to" AS address
            ,CAST(amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            wrapper_deployed t2
            ON t2.erc20Wrapper = t1.contract_address
            
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM wrapped_balance_diff
    ```

### gnosis_circlesv2_wrapped_supply_daily_v

**Query ID:** 4740065 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    supply_sparse_daily AS (
        SELECT 
             DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS block_day
            ,erc20Wrapper
            ,SUM(IF(-amount_raw>=0,-amount_raw,0)) AS mint_raw
             ,SUM(IF(-amount_raw<0,-amount_raw,0)) AS burn_raw
        FROM
            query_4740019--gnosis_circlesv2_wrapped_balance_diff_v
        WHERE
            address = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        GROUP BY 1, 2 
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            erc20Wrapper
            ,block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                erc20Wrapper
                ,MIN(block_day) AS min_block_day
            FROM
                supply_sparse_daily 
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_day AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.erc20Wrapper
        ,t1.block_day
        ,COALESCE(mint_raw,0)/POWER(10,18) AS mint
        ,COALESCE(burn_raw,0)/POWER(10,18) AS burn
        ,(SUM(COALESCE(mint_raw,0) + COALESCE(burn_raw,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.erc20Wrapper ORDER BY t1.block_day))/POWER(10,18) AS supply
    FROM
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        supply_sparse_daily t2
        ON t2.erc20Wrapper = t1.erc20Wrapper
        AND t2.block_day = t1.block_day
    ```
