### gnosis_gnosispay_daily_wallet_balance_v

**Query ID:** 4105361 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    balances_diff AS (
        SELECT 
            block_day
             ,CASE
                WHEN token_address IS NULL THEN 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee
                ELSE token_address
            END AS token_address
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM 
            query_3814057 -- gnosis_gp_balance_diff_daily_v
        WHERE
            label = 'Wallet'
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            token_address
            ,block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t1.token_address
                ,MIN(t1.block_day) AS block_day_min
            FROM
                balances_diff t1
            GROUP BY 1
        )
        ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(block_day_min AS DATE),CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    ),
    
    balances_diff_dense AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.block_day
            ,t2.token_address
            ,COALESCE(t1.amount_raw,0) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            balances_diff t1
        RIGHT JOIN
            calendar t2
            ON
            t2.block_day = t1.block_day
            AND 
            t2.token_address = t1.token_address
    ),
    
    monerium_versions AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4339524
    ),
    
    balances_entities AS (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_day
                ,SUM(t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals)*t2.price) AS amount
            FROM (
                SELECT
                 t1.block_day
                ,t1.token_address
                ,SUM(t1.amount_raw) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.token_address ORDER BY t1.block_day) AS amount_raw
                FROM
                    balances_diff_dense  t1
                LEFT JOIN
                    monerium_versions t2
                    ON t2.token_address = t1.token_address
                WHERE
                    t2.token_address IS NULL
                    OR
                    (t2.token_address = t1.token_address AND (t1.block_day < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL))
            ) t1
            LEFT JOIN
                query_4338954 t2 --gnosis_daily_token_prices_v
                ON t2.block_date = t1.block_day
                AND
                (
                t2.token_address = t1.token_address
                 OR  -- EURe versions
                (t2.token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e AND t1.token_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430)
                OR -- GBPe versions
                (t2.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 AND t1.token_address = 0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053)
                )
            GROUP BY 1
    )
    
    SELECT
        block_day
        ,amount
    FROM balances_entities
    WHERE
        block_day >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1' YEAR
        AND
        block_day < CURRENT_DATE
    ORDER BY
        block_day DESC
    ```

### gnosis_gnosispay_gno_balances_v

**Query ID:** 4117561 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    balances_diff AS (
        SELECT 
            block_day
            ,entity_id
            ,amount_raw
        FROM query_3814057 -- gnosis_gp_balance_diff_daily_v
        WHERE
            token_address = 0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb --GNO
            AND 
            label = 'Wallet'
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                MIN(t1.block_day) AS block_day_min
            FROM
                balances_diff t1
        )
        ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(block_day_min AS DATE),CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    ),
    
    balances_diff_dense AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.block_day
            ,COALESCE(t1.amount_raw,0) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            balances_diff t1
        RIGHT JOIN
            calendar t2
            ON
            t2.block_day = t1.block_day
    )
    
    SELECT 
        block_day
        ,SUM(amount_raw/POWER(10,18)) OVER(ORDER BY block_day) AS amount
    FROM balances_diff_dense
    ```

### gnosis_gnosispay_last_7D_payments&users_per_token_v

**Query ID:** 4105253 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_gp_users AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3707804
    ),
    
    monerium_versions AS (
        SELECT
            token_address,
            symbol,
            date_end
        FROM (
            VALUES
                (0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e, 'EURe', DATE '2024-08-25'),
                (0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430, 'EURe', NULL),
                (0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108, 'GBPe', DATE '2024-08-25'),
                (0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053, 'GBPe', NULL)
        ) AS v(token_address, symbol, date_end)
    )
    
    SELECT
        COALESCE(t1.symbol,t3.symbol) AS symbol
        ,COUNT(*) AS payments
        ,COUNT(DISTINCT t1."from") AS users
    FROM
       tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
    INNER JOIN
        gnosis_gp_users t2
        ON
        t2.pay_wallet = t1."from"
    LEFT JOIN
        monerium_versions t3
        ON
        t3.token_address = t1.contract_address
    WHERE
        t1.to = 0x4822521E6135CD2599199c83Ea35179229A172EE -- Gnosis Pay aggregator
        AND
        t1.block_month >= DATE_TRUNC('month',CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7' DAY)
        AND
        DATE_TRUNC('day',t1.block_time) >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7' DAY
        AND
        (
            t3.token_address IS NULL
            OR
            (t3.token_address = t1.contract_address AND (t1.block_date < t3.date_end OR t3.date_end IS NULL))
        )
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY
        symbol ASC
    ```

### gnosis_gnosispay_last_7D_volume_per_token_v

**Query ID:** 4105190 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_gp_users AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3707804
    ),
    
    wallet_volume AS (
        SELECT
           DATE_TRUNC('hour', t1.block_time) AS block_hour
            ,CASE
                WHEN t1.contract_address IS NULL THEN 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee
                ELSE t1.contract_address
            END AS token_address
            ,t1.symbol
            ,SUM(CAST(t1.amount_raw AS DOUBLE)) AS amount_raw
            FROM
               tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                gnosis_gp_users t2
                ON
                t2.pay_wallet = t1."from"
            WHERE
                t1.to = 0x4822521E6135CD2599199c83Ea35179229A172EE -- Gnosis Pay aggregator
                AND
                t1.block_month >= DATE_TRUNC('month',CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7' DAY)
                AND
                DATE_TRUNC('day',t1.block_time) >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7' DAY
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    monerium_versions AS (
        SELECT
            token_address,
            symbol,
            date_end
        FROM (
            VALUES
                (0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e, 'EURe', DATE '2024-08-25'),
                (0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430, 'EURe', NULL),
                (0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108, 'GBPe', DATE '2024-08-25'),
                (0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053, 'GBPe', NULL)
        ) AS v(token_address, symbol, date_end)
    ),
    
    volume AS (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_hour
                ,CASE
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee THEN 'xDAI'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 THEN 'GBPe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053 THEN 'GBPe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430 THEN 'EURe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e THEN 'EURe'
                    ELSE t2.symbol
                END AS symbol
                ,CASE
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 
                            OR t1.token_address = 0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053
                        THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*1.25
                    ELSE  t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals)*t2.price
                END AS amount_usd
                ,CASE
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 
                            OR t1.token_address = 0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053
                        THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)
                    ELSE  t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals)
                END AS amount
            FROM wallet_volume t1
            LEFT JOIN
                monerium_versions t3
                ON t3.token_address = t1.token_address
            LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd t2
                ON t2.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t2.minute = t1.block_hour
                AND
                (
                t2.contract_address = t1.token_address
                OR 
                (t2.contract_address = 0xe91D153E0b41518A2Ce8Dd3D7944Fa863463a97d 
                    AND 
                t1.token_address = 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee)
                 OR  -- EURe versions
                (t2.contract_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e 
                    AND 
                t1.token_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430)
                )
            WHERE
                t3.token_address IS NULL
                OR
                (t3.token_address = t1.token_address AND (DATE_TRUNC('day',t1.block_hour) < t3.date_end OR t3.date_end IS NULL))
    )
    
    SELECT
        symbol
        ,volume
        ,volume_usd
        ,SUM(volume_usd) OVER () AS total_volume_usd
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            symbol
            ,SUM(amount_usd) AS volume_usd
            ,SUM(amount) AS volume
        FROM volume
        WHERE symbol IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY
            1
    )
    ORDER BY
        symbol ASC
    ```

### gnosis_gnosispay_monthly_users_v

**Query ID:** 4105355 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_gp_users AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3707804
    )
    
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('month', t1.block_date) AS month
        ,COUNT(DISTINCT t2.pay_wallet) AS users
        FROM
           tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_gp_users t2
            ON
            t2.pay_wallet = t1."from"
        WHERE
            t1.to = 0x4822521E6135CD2599199c83Ea35179229A172EE -- Gnosis Pay aggregator
    GROUP BY 1
    ```

### gnosis_gnosispay_top50_spenders_monthly_v

**Query ID:** 4362242 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    spenders_volume AS (
        SELECT
             block_date
            ,pay_wallet
            ,symbol
            ,volume
            ,volume_usd
            ,payments
            ,SUM(volume_usd) OVER (PARTITION BY pay_wallet ORDER BY block_date) AS cumsum_volume_usd
        FROM (
            SELECT
                 DATE_TRUNC('month', block_date) AS block_date
                ,pay_wallet
                ,symbol
                ,SUM(volume) AS volume
                ,SUM(volume_usd) AS volume_usd
                ,SUM(payments) AS payments
            FROM
                query_4362229 --gnosis_gnosispay_daily_payments_wallet_per_token_sparse_v
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
        )
    ),
    
    user_rank AS (
        SELECT
            pay_wallet
            ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_volume_usd DESC) AS rank
        FROM (
            SELECT
                pay_wallet
                ,SUM(volume_usd) AS total_volume_usd
            FROM
                spenders_volume
            GROUP BY 1
        )
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.block_date
        ,t1.pay_wallet
        ,t1.symbol
        ,t1.volume
        ,t1.volume_usd
        ,t1.payments
        ,t1.cumsum_volume_usd
        ,t2.rank
    FROM spenders_volume t1
    INNER JOIN
        user_rank t2
        ON t2.pay_wallet = t1.pay_wallet
        AND t2.rank <= 50
    WHERE t1.block_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
    ```

### gnosis_gnosispay_users_month_cohorts_v

**Query ID:** 4112351 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_gp_users AS (
        SELECT 
        *
        ,DATE_TRUNC('month', activation_time) AS activation_month
        FROM query_3707804
    ),
    
    monerium_versions AS (
        SELECT
            token_address,
            symbol,
            date_end
        FROM (
            VALUES
                (0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e, 'EURe', DATE '2024-08-25'),
                (0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430, 'EURe', NULL),
                (0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108, 'GBPe', DATE '2024-08-25'),
                (0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053, 'GBPe', NULL)
        ) AS v(token_address, symbol, date_end)
    ),
    
    pay_users AS (
        SELECT
           DATE_TRUNC('month', t1.block_time) AS month
           ,DATE_FORMAT(t2.activation_month, '%Y-%m') AS activation_month
            ,COUNT(DISTINCT t2.pay_wallet) AS users
            ,SUM(CASE
                    WHEN t1.contract_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 
                            OR t1.contract_address = 0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053
                        THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*1.25
                    ELSE  t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t4.decimals)*t4.price
                END
                )AS amount_usd
           
            FROM
               tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                gnosis_gp_users t2
                ON
                t2.pay_wallet = t1."from"
            LEFT JOIN
                monerium_versions t3
                ON t3.token_address = t1.contract_address
            LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd t4
                ON t4.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t4.minute = t1.block_time
                AND
                (
                t4.contract_address = t1.contract_address
                 OR  -- EURe versions
                (t4.contract_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e 
                    AND 
                t1.contract_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430)
                )
            WHERE
                t1.to = 0x4822521E6135CD2599199c83Ea35179229A172EE -- Gnosis Pay aggregator
                AND
                (
                t3.token_address IS NULL
                OR
                (t3.token_address = t1.contract_address AND (DATE_TRUNC('day',t1.block_time) < t3.date_end OR t3.date_end IS NULL))
                )
            GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        *
    FROM pay_users
    ```

### gnosis_gnosispay_weekly_payments_per_token_v

**Query ID:** 4105280 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        week
        ,symbol
        ,volume
        ,volume_usd
        ,payments
        ,SUM(volume) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY week) AS total_volume
        ,SUM(volume_usd) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY week) AS total_volume_usd
        ,SUM(payments) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY week) AS total_payments
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_date) AS week
            ,symbol
            ,SUM(volume) AS volume
            ,SUM(volume_usd) AS volume_usd
            ,SUM(payments) AS payments
        FROM 
            query_4105811 --gnosis_gnosispay_daily_payments_per_token_v
        WHERE symbol IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    ```

## Gnosissafe

*2 queries*

### gnosis_GnosisSafe_AddedOwner_v

**Query ID:** 3663783 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH 
    
    GnosisSafe_v1_1_1_evt_AddedOwner AS (
        SELECT
            *
            ,'v1.1.1' AS version
        FROM
            gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafe_v1_1_1_evt_AddedOwner
    ),
    
    GnosisSafe_v1_1_1_circles_evt_AddedOwner AS (
        SELECT
            *
            ,'v1.1.1_circles' AS version
        FROM
            gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafe_v1_1_1_circles_evt_AddedOwner
    ),
    
    
    GnosisSafe_v1_2_0_evt_AddedOwner AS (
        SELECT
            *
            ,'v1.2.0' AS version
        FROM
            gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafe_v1_2_0_evt_AddedOwner
    ),
    
    
    GnosisSafeL2_v1_3_0_evt_AddedOwner AS (
        SELECT
            *
            ,'v1.3.0_L2' AS version
        FROM
            gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_v1_3_0_evt_AddedOwner
    ),
    
    GnosisSafe_v1_3_0_evt_AddedOwner AS (
        SELECT
            *
            ,'v1.3.0' AS version
        FROM
            gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafe_v1_3_0_evt_AddedOwner
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT * FROM GnosisSafe_v1_1_1_evt_AddedOwner
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM GnosisSafe_v1_1_1_circles_evt_AddedOwner
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM GnosisSafe_v1_2_0_evt_AddedOwner
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM GnosisSafeL2_v1_3_0_evt_AddedOwner
    ),
    
    P256SignerFactory_NewSignerCreated AS (
      SELECT
        signer
      FROM cometh_gnosis.P256SignerFactory_evt_NewSignerCreated  
      WHERE
        evt_block_time >= TRY_CAST('2024-01-01' AS timestamp)
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.*
        ,IF(t2.signer IS NULL, 0, 1) AS is_p256_signer
    FROM final t1
    LEFT JOIN
        P256SignerFactory_NewSignerCreated t2
        ON
        t2.signer = t1.owner
    ```

## Gw

*3 queries*

### gnosis_gw_comethImport_v

**Query ID:** 3674224 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    GnosisSafe_AddedOwner AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3984345 --gnosis_safes_AddedOwner_p256signer_v --query_3663783 
    ),
    
    gnosis_SafeSetup AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3629703
    ),
    
    gnosis_SafeMultiSigTransaction AS (
        SELECT * FROM gnosis_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_evt_SafeMultiSigTransaction --gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_v1_3_0_evt_SafeMultiSigTransaction
    ),
    
    gnosis_LogUseGelato1BalanceV2 AS (
        SELECT * FROM gnosis.logs
        WHERE contract_address = 0xf9d64d54d32ee2bdceaabfa60c4c438e224427d0
        AND
        topic0 = 0x8e4f8b7f1299a63a6b46587ec357933d2006e5697cd46d99297e670cee1dbeb1
        --gelato_gnosis.GelatoRelay_evt_LogUseGelato1BalanceV2
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        t1.contract_address AS safe_wallet
        ,t1.evt_block_time AS created_at
        ,t2.evt_block_time AS imported_at
        ,t2.evt_tx_hash AS tx_hash_added
        ,t1.owners
        ,t2.owner AS new_owner_added
        ,'Imported' AS method
        ,t2.evt_tx_from
        ,t2.evt_tx_to
    FROM
        gnosis_SafeSetup t1
    INNER JOIN
        GnosisSafe_AddedOwner t2
        ON
        t2.contract_address = t1.contract_address
    INNER JOIN
        gnosis_SafeMultiSigTransaction t3
        ON
        t3.evt_tx_hash = t2.evt_tx_hash
    INNER JOIN
        gnosis_LogUseGelato1BalanceV2 t4
        ON
        t4.tx_hash = t2.evt_tx_hash
    ```

### gnosis_gw_signupPerson_v

**Query ID:** 3663810 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH 
    /*
    P256SignerFactory_NewSignerCreated AS (
      SELECT
        VARBINARY_SUBSTRING(data, 13, 20) AS signer
      FROM gnosis.logs
      WHERE
        contract_address = CAST('73dA77F0f2daaa88b908413495d3D0e37458212e' AS varbinary)
        AND block_time >= TRY_CAST('2024-01-01' AS timestamp)
    ),
    */
    P256SignerFactory_NewSignerCreated AS (
      SELECT
        signer
      FROM cometh_gnosis.P256SignerFactory_evt_NewSignerCreated  
      WHERE
        evt_block_time >= TRY_CAST('2024-01-01' AS timestamp)
    ),
    
    
    wallet_Safev1_4_1_evt_SafeSetup AS (
      SELECT
        t1.*
        ,IF(t2.signer IS NULL, 0, 1) AS has_p256_signer
      FROM query_3629703 t1
      LEFT JOIN
        P256SignerFactory_NewSignerCreated t2
        ON
        t2.signer = t1.owners[1]
      WHERE
        CARDINALITY(t1.owners) = 1 AND t1.threshold = CAST(1 AS uint256)
    ), 
    
    Hub_evt_Signup AS (
      SELECT
        *
      FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Signup
    )
    
    
    SELECT
      t1.contract_address AS safe_wallet
      ,t1.evt_block_time AS created_at
      ,t1.owners
      ,t1.has_p256_signer
      ,'Created' AS method
      ,t1.evt_tx_from
      ,t1.evt_tx_to
      ,t1.evt_tx_hash AS tx_hash_created
    FROM 
        wallet_Safev1_4_1_evt_SafeSetup t1
    INNER JOIN UNNEST(t1.owners) WITH ORDINALITY AS o(address, idx)
        ON TRUE
    INNER JOIN 
        Hub_evt_Signup t2
        ON t2.evt_tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash 
        AND t2.user = t1.contract_address
    ```

### gnosis_gw_user_transfers_v

**Query ID:** 3706069 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_gw_signupPerson AS (
        SELECT * FROM dune.hdser.query_3663810
      --  WHERE created_at >= DATE '2023-05-01'
    ),
    
    user_transfers_inflow AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.evt_block_time) AS block_day
            ,t1.contract_address AS token_address
            ,t2.safe_wallet
            ,t1."from" AS counterparty
            ,CAST(SUM(t1.value) AS DOUBLE) AS value
        FROM
            erc20_gnosis.evt_transfer t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_gw_signupPerson t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1.to
        WHERE
            t1.evt_block_time >= t2.created_at
        GROUP BY 1,2, 3,4
    ),
    
    user_transfers_outflow AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.evt_block_time) AS block_day
            ,t1.contract_address AS token_address
            ,t2.safe_wallet
            ,t1.to AS counterparty
            ,CAST(-SUM(t1.value) AS DOUBLE) AS value
        FROM
            erc20_gnosis.evt_transfer t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_gw_signupPerson t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1."from"
        WHERE
            t1.evt_block_time >= t2.created_at
        GROUP BY 1,2, 3,4
    ),
    
    users_transfers_netflow AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_day
            ,t1.token_address
            ,t1.safe_wallet
            ,t1.counterparty
            ,CASE
                WHEN t2.safe_wallet IS NOT NULL THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END AS counterparty_is_user
            ,SUM(t1.value) AS value
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM user_transfers_inflow
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM user_transfers_outflow
        ) t1
        LEFT JOIN 
            gnosis_gw_signupPerson t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1.counterparty
        GROUP BY 1,2,3,4, 5
    ),
    
    circle_metadata AS (
        SELECT 
            token AS token_address
            ,CONCAT('CRC_',CAST(user AS VARCHAR)) AS symbol
            ,18 AS decimals
        FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Signup
    ),
    
    tokens_metadata AS (
        SELECT 
            contract_address AS token_address
            ,symbol
            ,decimals
        FROM tokens.erc20
        WHERE  blockchain = 'gnosis' AND symbol != 'CRC'
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT * FROM circle_metadata
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.block_day
        ,t1.token_address
        ,t1.safe_wallet
        ,t1.counterparty
        ,t1.counterparty_is_user
        ,t1.value AS value_raw
        ,t1.value/POWER(10,t2.decimals) AS value
        ,t1.value/POWER(10,t2.decimals) * t3.price AS value_USD
        ,t2.symbol
    FROM users_transfers_netflow t1
    LEFT JOIN
        tokens_metadata t2
        ON
        t2.token_address = t1.token_address
    LEFT JOIN
        prices.usd t3
        ON t3.contract_address = t2.token_address
        AND t3.blockchain = 'gnosis'
        AND t3.minute = t1.block_day
    ```

## Hop

*1 queries*

### gnosis_hop_flows_v

**Query ID:** 5194053 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      hop_bridge_map AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_5193977
      ),
    
      gnosis_out AS (
        SELECT
          s.evt_block_time        AS block_time,
          'gnosis'                AS source_chain,
          e_dest.blockchain       AS dest_chain,
          m_src.contract_address_canonical_token AS source_token,
          m_dest.contract_address_canonical_token AS target_token,
          s.amount                AS source_amount,
          s.amount                AS target_amount,
          s.evt_tx_from           AS source_sender,
          s.recipient             AS target_receiver
        FROM hop_protocol_gnosis.l2_xdaibridge_evt_transfersent AS s
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_src
          ON s.contract_address = m_src.contract_address_bridge
         AND m_src.chain = 'gnosis'
        JOIN evms.info AS e_dest
          ON e_dest.chain_id = s.chainId
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_dest
          ON m_dest.token = m_src.token
         AND m_dest.chain = LOWER(e_dest.blockchain)
        WHERE s.chainId != 100
      ),
    
      arb_in AS (
        SELECT
          s.evt_block_time        AS block_time,
          m_src.chain             AS source_chain,
          'gnosis'                AS dest_chain,
          m_src.contract_address_canonical_token AS source_token,
          m_dest.contract_address_canonical_token AS target_token,
          s.amount                AS source_amount,
          s.amount                AS target_amount,
          s.evt_tx_from           AS source_sender,
          s.recipient             AS target_receiver
        FROM hop_protocol_arbitrum.l2_arbitrumbridge_evt_transfersent AS s
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_src
          ON s.contract_address = m_src.contract_address_bridge
         AND m_src.chain = 'arbitrum'
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_dest
          ON m_dest.token = m_src.token
         AND m_dest.chain = 'gnosis'
        WHERE s.chainId = 100
      ),
    
      opt_in AS (
        SELECT
          s.evt_block_time        AS block_time,
          m_src.chain             AS source_chain,
          'gnosis'                AS dest_chain,
          m_src.contract_address_canonical_token AS source_token,
          m_dest.contract_address_canonical_token AS target_token,
          s.amount                AS source_amount,
          s.amount                AS target_amount,
          s.evt_tx_from           AS source_sender,
          s.recipient             AS target_receiver
        FROM hop_protocol_optimism.l2_optimismbridge_evt_transfersent AS s
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_src
          ON s.contract_address = m_src.contract_address_bridge
         AND m_src.chain = 'optimism'
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_dest
          ON m_dest.token = m_src.token
         AND m_dest.chain = 'gnosis'
        WHERE s.chainId = 100
      ),
    
      poly_in AS (
        SELECT
          s.evt_block_time        AS block_time,
          m_src.chain             AS source_chain,
          'gnosis'                AS dest_chain,
          m_src.contract_address_canonical_token AS source_token,
          m_dest.contract_address_canonical_token AS target_token,
          s.amount                AS source_amount,
          s.amount                AS target_amount,
          s.evt_tx_from           AS source_sender,
          s.recipient             AS target_receiver
        FROM hop_protocol_polygon.l2_polygonbridge_evt_transfersent AS s
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_src
          ON s.contract_address = m_src.contract_address_bridge
         AND m_src.chain = 'polygon'
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_dest
          ON m_dest.token = m_src.token
         AND m_dest.chain = 'gnosis'
        WHERE s.chainId = 100
      ),
    
      base_in AS (
        SELECT
          s.evt_block_time        AS block_time,
          m_src.chain             AS source_chain,
          'gnosis'                AS dest_chain,
          m_src.contract_address_canonical_token AS source_token,
          m_dest.contract_address_canonical_token AS target_token,
          s.amount                AS source_amount,
          s.amount                AS target_amount,
          s.evt_tx_from           AS source_sender,
          s.recipient             AS target_receiver
        FROM hop_protocol_base.l2_basebridge_evt_transfersent AS s
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_src
          ON s.contract_address = m_src.contract_address_bridge
         AND m_src.chain = 'base'
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_dest
          ON m_dest.token = m_src.token
         AND m_dest.chain = 'gnosis'
        WHERE s.chainId = 100
      ),
    
      nova_in AS (
        SELECT
          s.evt_block_time        AS block_time,
          m_src.chain             AS source_chain,
          'gnosis'                AS dest_chain,
          m_src.contract_address_canonical_token AS source_token,
          m_dest.contract_address_canonical_token AS target_token,
          s.amount                AS source_amount,
          s.amount                AS target_amount,
          s.evt_tx_from           AS source_sender,
          s.recipient             AS target_receiver
        FROM hop_protocol_nova.l2_arbitrumbridge_evt_transfersent AS s
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_src
          ON s.contract_address = m_src.contract_address_bridge
         AND m_src.chain = 'nova'
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_dest
          ON m_dest.token = m_src.token
         AND m_dest.chain = 'gnosis'
        WHERE s.chainId = 100
      ),
    
      linea_in AS (
        SELECT
          s.evt_block_time        AS block_time,
          m_src.chain             AS source_chain,
          'gnosis'                AS dest_chain,
          m_src.contract_address_canonical_token AS source_token,
          m_dest.contract_address_canonical_token AS target_token,
          s.amount                AS source_amount,
          s.amount                AS target_amount,
          s.evt_tx_from           AS source_sender,
          s.recipient             AS target_receiver
        FROM hop_protocol_linea.l2_lineabridge_evt_transfersent AS s
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_src
          ON s.contract_address = m_src.contract_address_bridge
         AND m_src.chain = 'linea'
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_dest
          ON m_dest.token = m_src.token
         AND m_dest.chain = 'gnosis'
        WHERE s.chainId = 100
      ),
    
      zkevm_in AS (
        SELECT
          s.evt_block_time        AS block_time,
          m_src.chain             AS source_chain,
          'gnosis'                AS dest_chain,
          m_src.contract_address_canonical_token AS source_token,
          m_dest.contract_address_canonical_token AS target_token,
          s.amount                AS source_amount,
          s.amount                AS target_amount,
          s.evt_tx_from           AS source_sender,
          s.recipient             AS target_receiver
        FROM hop_protocol_zkevm.l2_polygonzkbridge_evt_transfersent AS s
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_src
          ON s.contract_address = m_src.contract_address_bridge
         AND m_src.chain = 'polygonzk'
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_dest
          ON m_dest.token = m_src.token
         AND m_dest.chain = 'gnosis'
        WHERE s.chainId = 100
      ),
    
      eth_in AS (
        SELECT
          s.evt_block_time        AS block_time,
          m_src.chain             AS source_chain,
          'gnosis'                AS dest_chain,
          m_src.contract_address_canonical_token AS source_token,
          m_dest.contract_address_canonical_token AS target_token,
          s.amount                AS source_amount,
          s.amount                AS target_amount,
          s.evt_tx_from           AS source_sender,
          s.recipient             AS target_receiver
        FROM hop_protocol_ethereum.l1_eth_bridge_evt_transfersenttol2 AS s
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_src
          ON s.contract_address = m_src.contract_address_bridge
         AND m_src.chain = 'ethereum'
        JOIN hop_bridge_map AS m_dest
          ON m_dest.token = m_src.token
         AND m_dest.chain = 'gnosis'
        WHERE s.chainId = 100
      ),
    
      flows AS (
        SELECT * FROM gnosis_out
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM arb_in
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM opt_in
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM poly_in
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM base_in
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM nova_in
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM linea_in
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM zkevm_in
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM eth_in
      ),
    
      -- Gnosis-side token address for pricing
      gno_side AS (
        SELECT
          f.*,
          CASE WHEN LOWER(source_chain) = 'gnosis' THEN source_token ELSE target_token END AS gnosis_token_addr
        FROM flows f
      )
    
    SELECT
      g.block_time                              AS block_time,
      g.source_chain                            AS sourceChain,
      g.dest_chain                              AS targetChain,
      g.source_sender                           AS sourceSender,
      g.target_receiver                         AS targetReceiver,
      g.source_amount                           AS sourceAmount,
      g.target_amount                           AS targetAmount,
      COALESCE(b.symbol, e.symbol)              AS symbol,
      g.source_token                            AS source_token_address,
      g.target_token                            AS target_token_address,
      (
        (CASE WHEN g.source_chain = 'gnosis' THEN g.source_amount ELSE g.target_amount END)
        / POW(10, COALESCE(b.decimals, e.decimals, e_eth.decimals, 18))
      ) * COALESCE(b.price, p.price, p_eth.price) AS amount_usd,
      CASE
        WHEN b.price     IS NOT NULL THEN 'bluechip'
        WHEN p.price     IS NOT NULL THEN 'usd_daily_gnosis'
        WHEN p_eth.price IS NOT NULL THEN 'usd_daily_ethereum'
        ELSE 'missing'
      END                                       AS usd_price_source
    FROM gno_side g
    LEFT JOIN dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v b
      ON b.token_address = g.gnosis_token_addr
     AND b.block_date    = CAST(g.block_time AS DATE)
    LEFT JOIN prices.usd_daily p
      ON LOWER(p.blockchain) = 'gnosis'
     AND p.contract_address  = g.gnosis_token_addr
     AND p.day               = CAST(g.block_time AS DATE)
    LEFT JOIN tokens.erc20 e
      ON e.blockchain       = 'gnosis'
     AND e.contract_address = g.gnosis_token_addr
    -- Ethereum fallbacks (price + decimals)
    LEFT JOIN prices.usd_daily p_eth
      ON LOWER(p_eth.blockchain) = 'ethereum'
     AND p_eth.contract_address  = g.gnosis_token_addr
     AND p_eth.day               = CAST(g.block_time AS DATE)
    LEFT JOIN tokens.erc20 e_eth
      ON e_eth.blockchain       = 'ethereum'
     AND e_eth.contract_address = g.gnosis_token_addr
    ORDER BY g.block_time DESC;
    ```

## Labels

*1 queries*

### gnosis_labels_short_v

**Query ID:** 5224187 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT  
        address
       ,name AS label
    FROM
        labels.contracts 
    WHERE
        blockchain = 'gnosis' 
        AND name NOT LIKE '%GnosisSafeL2%'
        AND name NOT LIKE '%Gnosis_safe%'
        AND name NOT LIKE '%Gnosis_chain%'
        AND name NOT LIKE '%Unlock%'
        AND name NOT LIKE '%Bridge%'
    ```

    ```sql
            ('Agave',0x89c5a17c381F4eaD9fF8478A3DC84F3eE65e4315),
            ('Agave',0x1784F3277ABbBa95fBcb08a0a39b7C8cecee8769),
            ('Agave',0x6a4cCf5d642c85b6C9FD4Fd7B70d4878CD6b7c10),

            ('Agave',0x85f5825BaB2C3550ae73EE90aCf33dbD8fF7Ae1a),
            ('Agave',0x8dF939094b9906739DAeB3e76d85d2758E76075D),
            ('Agave',0x85b79018C781b499F2878BEe14E4e8B5DB31Ac61),
            ('Agave',0x85b79018C781b499F2878BEe14E4e8B5DB31Ac61),
            ('Agave',0xC7Ecc651EBaA97a4E73b9128104d997064269db4),
            ('Agave',0x0bb31c42D0692369Ba681A925C254fEB605c327b),

            ('Swarm',0xcb2962dc70f469f12f319fd344667cd215efa565),

            ('Swarm',0xaaca1e61693067441070652ed785764736bb9b8c),
            ('Seaport?',0x59ec70bc6450beeb67b4638ddb4dad8ec18fe02b),
            ('?',0x9e690c3991b6520c1faa6d9a61e45850ad5b2d42),
            ('Merkly',0xaD09d78f4c6b9dA2Ae82b1D34107802d380Bb74f),
            ('Merkly',0x11bb2991882a86dc3e38858d922559a385d506ba),
            ('LayerZero',0x9714Ccf1dedeF14BaB5013625DB92746C1358cb4),
            ('Vega Protocol',0x6063a8de125d0982FCd7b41754262d94CaC8FF14), --Pyth oracle updates
            ('CowSwap?',0x29aB49595a6A46dc2B56D03b21001e225F116C5B),
            ('Swarm',0xD9dFE7b0ddc7CcA41304FE9507ed823faD3bdBab),
            ('Layer3 CUBE',0x1195Cf65f83B3A5768F3C496D3A05AD6412c64B7),
            ('HOP Bridge',0x6C928f435d1F3329bABb42d69CCF043e3900EcF1),
            ('LZ Farmer',0x7a457667f29e21666a82238ba48124984517ede6),
            ('Merkly Farmer',0x1e75beD7c96742360651cBb5C949d1029F9ac730),
            ('SushiSwap',0x46B3fDF7b5CDe91Ac049936bF0bDb12c5d22202e), -- RP4
            ('Spam',0x50e961727fadeb1ecac623fad99dc3c59e3de4b1),
            ('Gnosis Pay',0x4822521E6135CD2599199c83Ea35179229A172EE), --aggregator
            ('Gnosis Pay',0x90830Ed558f12D826370DC52E9D87947A7F18De9),
            ('Gnosis Pay',0xcff260bfbc199dc82717494299b1acade25f549b),
            ('Aura',0x6Ff6a738233A3B728d4A67ea92B0e2416e316149),
            ('ERC-4337 Entry Point',0x0000000071727De22E5E9d8BAf0edAc6f37da032), --ERC-4337 Entry Point 0.7.0
            ('JudicialAssetFactory',0x696593B4FFE8EC8233F6d092bAd0EE9Fb3d5f2eC),
            ('USDC Transmuter',0x0392A2F5Ac47388945D8c84212469F545fAE52B2)
            
    ),
    
    safe_wallets AS (
        SELECT
            'safe' AS name
            ,address
        FROM safe_gnosis.safes
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        name
        ,address
    FROM (
        SELECT
          *
          ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY address ORDER BY name) AS r_cnt
        FROM (
            SELECT name, address FROM safe_wallets
            UNION ALL
            SELECT name, address FROM vals
            UNION ALL
            SELECT name, address FROM labels.contracts
            WHERE blockchain = 'gnosis'
        )
    )
    WHERE
      r_cnt = 1
    ```

## Lifi

*2 queries*

### gnosis_lifi_flows_v

**Query ID:** 5173187 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH base AS (
      SELECT
        evt_block_time                                  AS block_time,
        chain                                           AS sourceChain,
        CAST(json_extract_scalar(bridgeData, '$.destinationChainId') AS BIGINT) AS toChainId,
        json_extract_scalar(bridgeData, '$.bridge')     AS bridge,
        evt_tx_from                                     AS counterparty,
        json_extract_scalar(bridgeData, '$.sendingAssetId') AS raw_asset,
        CAST(json_extract_scalar(bridgeData, '$.minAmount') AS DOUBLE) AS amount_raw
      FROM lifi_multichain.lifidiamond_v2_evt_lifitransferstarted
      WHERE
        chain = 'gnosis'
        OR CAST(json_extract_scalar(bridgeData, '$.destinationChainId') AS BIGINT) = 100
    ),
    
    decoded AS (
      SELECT
        block_time,
        sourceChain,
        CASE
          WHEN sourceChain = 'gnosis' THEN COALESCE(dest.blockchain, 'unknown')
          ELSE 'gnosis'
        END AS targetChain,
        bridge,
        counterparty,
        -- decode
        CASE
          WHEN length(raw_asset) > 42
          THEN from_hex(
                 substr(
                   from_utf8(
                     from_hex(substr(raw_asset, 3))
                   ),
                 3)
               )
          ELSE from_hex(substr(raw_asset, 3))
        END AS token,
        amount_raw
      FROM base
      LEFT JOIN evms.info dest
        ON dest.chain_id = toChainId
    ),
    
    enriched AS (
      SELECT
        d.block_time,
        d.sourceChain,
        d.targetChain,
        d.bridge,
        d.counterparty,
        d.token,
        CASE
          WHEN d.token = X'0000000000000000000000000000000000000000'
          THEN src.native_token_symbol
          ELSE t.symbol
        END AS symbol,
        d.amount_raw,
        -- decimals: use 18 for native, otherwise token.decimals
        d.amount_raw / POWER(
          10,
          CASE
            WHEN d.token = X'0000000000000000000000000000000000000000'
            THEN 18
            ELSE t.decimals
          END
        ) AS amount,
        -- USD value using sourceChain
        (d.amount_raw
          / POWER(
              10,
              CASE
                WHEN d.token = X'0000000000000000000000000000000000000000'
                THEN 18
                ELSE t.decimals
              END
            )
        ) * p.price AS amount_usd
      FROM decoded d
      LEFT JOIN evms.info src
        ON src.blockchain = d.sourceChain
      LEFT JOIN tokens.erc20 t
        ON t.blockchain = d.sourceChain
       AND t.contract_address = d.token
      LEFT JOIN prices.usd_daily p
        ON p.blockchain = d.sourceChain
       AND p.contract_address = d.token
       AND p.day = DATE_TRUNC('day', d.block_time)
    )
    
    SELECT
      block_time,
      sourceChain,
      targetChain,
      bridge,
      counterparty,
      token,
      symbol,
      amount_raw,
      amount,
      amount_usd
    FROM enriched
    ORDER BY block_time DESC;
    ```

### gnosis_lifi_pay_users_v

**Query ID:** 5552906 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    lifi_in AS (
        SELECT 
            tx_hash
             ,block_date
            ,contract_address AS token_address_in
            ,amount_raw  AS amount_raw_in
        FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
             query_3707804 t2
             ON t2.pay_wallet = t1."to"
        WHERE t1."from" = 0x1231DEB6f5749EF6cE6943a275A1D3E7486F4EaE
    ),
    
    lifi_out AS (
        SELECT 
            tx_hash
             ,block_date
            ,contract_address AS token_address_out
            ,amount_raw AS amount_raw_out
        FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
             query_3707804 t2
             ON t2.pay_wallet = t1."from"
        WHERE t1."to" = 0x1231DEB6f5749EF6cE6943a275A1D3E7486F4EaE
    )
    
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('week',t1.block_date) AS block_week
       -- ,t1.token_address
        --,t1.amount_raw
        ,t2.symbol
        --,t1.type
        ,SUM(t1.amount_raw / POWER(10,t2.decimals) * t2.price) AS amount_usd
        
    FROM (
        SELECT
           -- t2.tx_hash
            t2.block_date
           -- ,t1.token_address_in
           -- ,t1.amount_raw_in
            ,t2.token_address_out AS token_address
            ,t2.amount_raw_out AS amount_raw
            ,'Swaps' AS type
        FROM
            lifi_in t1
        INNER JOIN
            lifi_out t2
            ON t2.tx_hash = t1.tx_hash
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            --t1.tx_hash
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.token_address_in AS token_address
            ,t1.amount_raw_in AS amount_raw
           -- ,t2.token_address_out
           -- ,t2.amount_raw_out
            ,'Deposit' AS type
        FROM
            lifi_in t1
        LEFT JOIN
            lifi_out t2
            ON t2.tx_hash = t1.tx_hash
        WHERE t2.tx_hash IS NULL
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT
            --t2.tx_hash
            t2.block_date
          --  ,t1.token_address_in
           -- ,t1.amount_raw_in
            ,t2.token_address_out AS token_address
            ,t2.amount_raw_out AS amount_raw
            ,'Withdrawl' AS type
        FROM
            lifi_in t1
        RIGHT JOIN
            lifi_out t2
            ON t2.tx_hash = t1.tx_hash
        WHERE t1.tx_hash IS NULL
    ) t1
    LEFT JOIN
        dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v t2
        ON t2.token_address = t1.token_address
        AND t2.block_date = t1.block_date
    WHERE t2.symbol IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

## Metri

*9 queries*

### gnosis_metri_crc_mints_v

**Query ID:** 3820993 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_metri_wallets AS (
        SELECT
             safe_wallet
            ,method
            ,created_at
            ,MIN(imported_at) AS imported_at
        FROM query_3674206
        WHERE 
            (created_at >= DATE '2024-05-01' AND method = 'Created')
            OR
            (imported_at >= DATE '2024-05-01' AND method = 'Imported')
        GROUP BY
        1,2,3
    ),
    
    metri_crc_mint_evts AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.evt_tx_hash
            ,t1.evt_index
        FROM
            gnosis_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_evt_SafeMultiSigTransaction t1 --gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_v1_3_0_evt_SafeMultiSigTransaction t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_metri_wallets t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1.contract_address
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_evt_ExecutionSuccess t3
            -- gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_v1_3_0_evt_ExecutionSuccess t3
             ON
             t3.evt_tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
             AND
             t3.evt_index = t1.evt_index + 2
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis.logs t4
            ON
            t4.tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
            AND
            t4.index = t1.evt_index + 3
        WHERE
            -- LogUseGelato1BalanceV2
            t4.contract_address = 0xF9D64d54D32EE2BDceAAbFA60C4C438E224427d0
            AND
            t4.topic0 = 0x8e4f8b7f1299a63a6b46587ec357933d2006e5697cd46d99297e670cee1dbeb1
            AND
            t4.block_time >= DATE '2024-05-01' 
            AND
            t1.evt_block_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day',COALESCE(t2.imported_at,t2.created_at))
            AND
            CAST(t1.gasPrice AS REAL) = 0 -- sponsored
            AND
            CAST(t3.payment AS REAL) = 0 -- sponsored
    ),
    
    metri_crc_setup_mint_evts AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.evt_tx_hash
            ,t1.evt_index
        FROM
            gnosis_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_evt_SafeMultiSigTransaction t1
            --gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_v1_3_0_evt_SafeMultiSigTransaction t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_metri_wallets t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1.contract_address
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_evt_ExecutionSuccess t3
            -- gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_v1_3_0_evt_ExecutionSuccess t3
             ON
             t3.evt_tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
             AND
             t3.evt_index = t1.evt_index + 4
        INNER JOIN
            circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Signup t4
            ON
            t4.evt_tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
            AND
            t4.evt_index = t1.evt_index + 3
        INNER JOIN
            circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Trust t5
            ON
            t5.evt_tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
            AND
            t5.evt_index = t1.evt_index + 2
        WHERE
            t1.evt_block_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day',COALESCE(t2.imported_at,t2.created_at))
            AND
            CAST(t1.gasPrice AS REAL) = 0 -- sponsored
            AND
            CAST(t3.payment AS REAL) = 0 -- sponsored
    ),
    
    metri_crc_all_mint_evts AS (
        SELECT * FROM metri_crc_setup_mint_evts
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM metri_crc_mint_evts
    ),
    
    circle_metadata AS (
        SELECT 
            token AS token_address
            ,'CRC' AS symbol
            ,18 AS decimals
        FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Signup
    ),
    
    crc_transfers_gnosis AS (
        SELECT
             t1.tx_hash AS evt_tx_hash
            ,t1.block_time AS evt_block_time
            ,t1.evt_index
            ,t1.to AS wallet_address
            ,t1.contract_address AS token_address
            ,t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18) AS amount
            ,t2.method
         FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_metri_wallets t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1.to
        INNER JOIN
            circle_metadata t3
            ON
            t3.token_address = t1.contract_address
        WHERE 
            t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
            AND
            t1."from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.evt_tx_hash
        ,t1.evt_index
        ,t1.evt_block_time
        ,t1.token_address
        ,t1.wallet_address 
        ,t1.amount
        ,t1.method
    FROM
        crc_transfers_gnosis t1
    INNER JOIN
        metri_crc_all_mint_evts t2
        ON
        t2.evt_tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
        AND
        t2.evt_index = t1.evt_index - 1
    ```

### gnosis_metri_crc_transfers_v

**Query ID:** 3821308 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_metri_wallets AS (
        SELECT
             safe_wallet
            ,method
            ,created_at
            ,MIN(imported_at) AS imported_at
        FROM query_3674206
        WHERE 
            (created_at >= DATE '2024-05-01' AND method = 'Created')
            OR
            (imported_at >= DATE '2024-05-01' AND method = 'Imported')
        GROUP BY
        1,2,3
    ),
    
    metri_crc_transfers_evts AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.evt_tx_hash
            ,t1.evt_index
        FROM
            gnosis_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_evt_SafeMultiSigTransaction t1
            --gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_v1_3_0_evt_SafeMultiSigTransaction t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_metri_wallets t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1.contract_address
        INNER JOIN
            circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_HubTransfer t3
            ON
            t3.evt_tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
        INNER JOIN
             gnosis_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_evt_ExecutionSuccess t4
             --gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_v1_3_0_evt_ExecutionSuccess t4
             ON
             t4.evt_tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
             AND
             t4.evt_index = t3.evt_index + 1
        WHERE
            t1.evt_block_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day',COALESCE(t2.imported_at,t2.created_at))
            AND
            CAST(t1.gasPrice AS REAL) = 0 -- sponsored
            AND
            CAST(t4.payment AS REAL) = 0 -- sponsored
    ),
    
    circle_metadata AS (
        SELECT 
            token AS token_address
            ,'CRC' AS symbol
            ,18 AS decimals
        FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Signup
    ),
    
    crc_transfers_gnosis AS (
    SELECT
        *
    FROM (
        SELECT
             t1.tx_hash AS evt_tx_hash
            ,t1.block_time AS evt_block_time
            ,t1.evt_index
            ,t1.to AS wallet_address
            ,t1."from" AS counterparty
            ,t1.contract_address AS token_address
            ,t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18) AS amount
            ,t2.method
         FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_metri_wallets t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1.to
        INNER JOIN
            circle_metadata t3
            ON
            t3.token_address = t1.contract_address
        WHERE 
            t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
           AND
           t1."from" != 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
           AND
           t1.block_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day',COALESCE(t2.imported_at,t2.created_at))
            
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT
             t1.tx_hash AS evt_tx_hash
            ,t1.block_time AS evt_block_time
            ,t1.evt_index
            ,t1."from" AS wallet_address
            ,t1.to AS counterparty
            ,t1.contract_address AS token_address
            ,-t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18) AS amount
            ,t2.method
         FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_metri_wallets t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1."from"
        INNER JOIN
            circle_metadata t3
            ON
            t3.token_address = t1.contract_address
        WHERE 
            t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
            AND
            t1.to != 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
            AND
           t1.block_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day',COALESCE(t2.imported_at,t2.created_at))
    )
        
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.evt_tx_hash
        ,t1.evt_index
        ,t1.evt_block_time
        ,t1.token_address
        ,t1.wallet_address 
        ,t1.counterparty
        ,t1.amount
        ,t1.method
    FROM
        crc_transfers_gnosis t1
    INNER JOIN
        metri_crc_transfers_evts t2
        ON
        t2.evt_tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
    ```

### gnosis_metri_crc_trust_v

**Query ID:** 3822102 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_metri_wallets AS (
        SELECT
             safe_wallet
            ,method
            ,created_at
            ,MIN(imported_at) AS imported_at
        FROM query_3674206
        WHERE 
            (created_at >= DATE '2024-05-01' AND method = 'Created')
            OR
            (imported_at >= DATE '2024-05-01' AND method = 'Imported')
        GROUP BY
        1,2,3
    ),
    
       
    
    gnosis_metri_trust AS (
        SELECT 
             t1.evt_tx_hash
            ,t4.evt_index
            ,t1.evt_block_time
            ,t2.safe_wallet AS wallet_address 
            ,t2.method
        FROM
            gnosis_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_evt_SafeMultiSigTransaction t1
            --gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_v1_3_0_evt_SafeMultiSigTransaction t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_metri_wallets t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1.contract_address
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_evt_ExecutionSuccess t3
             --gnosis_safe_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_v1_3_0_evt_ExecutionSuccess t3
             ON
             t3.evt_tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
             AND
             t3.evt_index = t1.evt_index + 2
        INNER JOIN
            circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Trust t4
            ON
            t4.evt_tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
            AND
            t4.evt_index = t1.evt_index + 1
            AND
            t4.canSendTo = t2.safe_wallet
        WHERE
            t1.evt_block_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day',COALESCE(t2.imported_at,t2.created_at))
            AND
            CAST(t1.gasPrice AS REAL) = 0 -- sponsored
            AND
            CAST(t3.payment AS REAL) = 0 -- sponsored
            
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM gnosis_metri_trust
    ```

### gnosis_metri_monerium_transfers_v

**Query ID:** 3792681 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_metri_wallets AS (
        SELECT
             safe_wallet
            ,method
            ,created_at
            ,MIN(imported_at) AS imported_at
        FROM query_3674206
        WHERE 
            (created_at >= DATE '2024-05-01' AND method = 'Created')
            OR
            (imported_at >= DATE '2024-05-01' AND method = 'Imported')
        GROUP BY
        1,2,3
    ),
    
    metri_monerium_transfers_evts AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.evt_tx_hash
            ,t1.evt_index
            ,t2.method
        FROM
            gnosis_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_evt_SafeMultiSigTransaction t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_metri_wallets t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1.contract_address
        INNER JOIN --BlacklistValidator_Decision
            gnosis.logs t3
            ON
            t3.tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
            AND
            t3.index = t1.evt_index + 1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_gnosis.GnosisSafeL2_evt_ExecutionSuccess t6
             ON
             t6.evt_tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
             AND
             t6.evt_index = t1.evt_index + 3
        WHERE
            t3.contract_address = 0x3fe4dB892b4572A24B4431ef5742A88EF68FF541
            AND
            t3.topic0 = 0x7421973e31248bda00bf2f04b80b46b34fc9e23ab57848234aed6cc5d437b6a8
            AND
            t3.block_time >= DATE '2024-05-01' 
            AND
            t1.evt_block_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day',COALESCE(t2.imported_at,t2.created_at))
    )
    
    
    
    SELECT
        t1.tx_hash
        ,t1.evt_index
        ,t1.block_time
        ,t1.token_address
        ,t1.symbol
        ,t1."from" AS wallet_address
        ,t1.to AS counterparty
        ,t1.amount
        ,t1.amount_usd
        ,t2.method
    FROM
        query_4331071 t1 --gnosis_monerium_transfers_v
    INNER JOIN
        metri_monerium_transfers_evts t2
        ON
        t2.evt_tx_hash = t1.tx_hash
        AND
        t2.evt_index = t1.evt_index - 2
    ```

### gnosis_metri_transfers_types_v

**Query ID:** 4329478 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_metri_wallets AS (
        SELECT
             safe_wallet
            ,method
            ,created_at
            ,MIN(imported_at) AS imported_at
        FROM query_3674206
        WHERE 
            (created_at >= DATE '2024-05-01' AND method = 'Created')
            OR
            (imported_at >= DATE '2024-05-01' AND method = 'Imported')
        GROUP BY
        1,2,3
    ),
    
    circle_metadata AS (
        SELECT 
            token AS token_address
            ,'CRC' AS symbol
            ,18 AS decimals
        FROM circles_ubi_gnosis.Hub_evt_Signup
    ),
       
    transfers_types AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,CASE
                WHEN t1."from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 AND t3.safe_wallet = t1."to" THEN 'mint'
                WHEN t1."to" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 AND t4.safe_wallet = t1."from" THEN 'burn'
                WHEN t3.safe_wallet = t1."to" AND t4.safe_wallet IS NULL THEN 'external receive'
                WHEN t3.safe_wallet IS NULL AND t4.safe_wallet = t1."from" THEN 'external send'
                WHEN t3.safe_wallet = t1."to" AND t4.safe_wallet = t1."from" THEN 'internal transfer'
            END AS transfer_type
            ,SUM(t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)) AS amount
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            circle_metadata t2
            ON t2.token_address = t1.contract_address
        LEFT JOIN
            gnosis_metri_wallets t3
            ON t3.safe_wallet = t1."to"
            AND
            t1.block_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day',COALESCE(t3.imported_at,t3.created_at))
        LEFT JOIN
            gnosis_metri_wallets t4
            ON t4.safe_wallet = t1."from"
            AND
            t1.block_time >= DATE_TRUNC('day',COALESCE(t4.imported_at,t4.created_at))
        WHERE
            t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
            AND
            (t4.safe_wallet = t1."from" OR t3.safe_wallet = t1."to")
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM transfers_types
    ```

### gnosis_metri_users_balances_daily_v

**Query ID:** 5399473 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    users AS (
        SELECT 
            address
        FROM query_5256155 --gnosis_metri_users_v
    ),
    
    metri_balance_diffs AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.* 
        FROM query_4432380 t1
        INNER JOIN 
            users t2
            ON t2.address = t1.wallet
    ),
    
    calendar As (
        SELECT
            wallet
            ,token_address
            ,symbol
            ,block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                wallet
                ,token_address
                ,symbol
                ,MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
               metri_balance_diffs 
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    ),
    
    metric_balances AS (
        SELECT
            wallet
            ,block_date
            ,token_address
            ,symbol
            ,SUM(amount_raw) OVER (PARTItION BY wallet, token_address ORDER BY block_date) AS balance_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t1.wallet
                ,t1.block_date
                ,t1.token_address
                ,t1.symbol
                ,COALESCE(t2.amount_raw,0) AS amount_raw
            FROM 
                calendar t1
            LEFT JOIN
                metri_balance_diffs t2
                ON t2.wallet = t1.wallet
                AND t2.token_address = t1.token_address
                AND t2.block_date = t1.block_date
        )
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.wallet
        ,t1.block_date
        ,t1.token_address
        ,t1.symbol
        ,t1.balance_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals) AS balance
        ,t1.balance_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals) * t2.price AS balance_usd
    FROM
        metric_balances t1
    LEFT JOIN
        dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v t2
        ON LOWER(t2.symbol) = LOWER(t1.symbol) -- will prices are not fixed
        --ON t2.token_address = t1.token_address
        AND t2.block_date = t1.block_date
    ```

### gnosis_metri_users_v

**Query ID:** 5256155 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    metri_users AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            address
        FROM (
            -- has payed CRC fees to Metri
            SELECT "from" AS address FROM query_4714366 --gnosis_circlesv2_erc1155_transfers_v
            WHERE to = 0x97FD8f7829A019946329f6D2E763A72741047518
        
            UNION ALL
        
            -- Have Registered Human with Cometh
            SELECT avatar AS address FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registerhuman
            WHERE evt_tx_to = 0x0000000071727de22e5e9d8baf0edac6f37da032
            
            UNION ALL
        
            -- Have Invited Sucessefully Human with Cometh
            SELECT inviter AS address FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registerhuman
            WHERE evt_tx_to = 0x0000000071727de22e5e9d8baf0edac6f37da032
        
            UNION ALL
        
            -- Have been Trusted with Cometh
            SELECT trustee AS address FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_trust
            WHERE evt_tx_to = 0x0000000071727de22e5e9d8baf0edac6f37da032
            
            UNION ALL
        
            -- Have Trusted with Cometh
            SELECT truster AS address FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_trust
            WHERE evt_tx_to = 0x0000000071727de22e5e9d8baf0edac6f37da032
    
            UNION ALL
            
            -- Have created v2 profile
            SELECT avatar AS address FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.nameregistry_evt_updatemetadatadigest
            WHERE evt_tx_to = 0x0000000071727de22e5e9d8baf0edac6f37da032
        )
    )
    
    
        SELECT
         t1.address 
         ,t1.creation_version
         ,t1.creation_time
         ,t1.tx_hash
         ,IF(t3.call_tx_hash = t1.tx_hash, 'Cometh', 'Other') AS deployer
        FROM
            safe_gnosis.safes t1
        INNER JOIN
            metri_users t2
            ON t2.address = t1.address
        LEFT JOIN
            erc4337_gnosis.entrypoint_v0_7_call_handleops t3
            ON t3.call_tx_hash = t1.tx_hash
    ```

### gnosis_metri_wallet_actions_daily_cnt_v

**Query ID:** 3821527 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_metri_trust AS (
        SELECT
            CAST(evt_block_time AS DATE) AS block_date
            ,'CRC Trust' AS action
            ,method
            ,COUNT(DISTINCT evt_tx_hash) AS cnts
        FROM 
            query_3822102
        GROUP BY
            1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    gnosis_metri_crc_mints AS (
        SELECT
            CAST(evt_block_time AS DATE) AS block_date
            ,'CRC Mint' AS action
            ,method
            ,COUNT(DISTINCT evt_tx_hash) AS cnts
        FROM 
            query_3820993
        GROUP BY
            1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    gnosis_metri_crc_transfers AS (
        SELECT 
             CAST(evt_block_time AS DATE) AS block_date
            ,'CRC Transfer' AS action
            ,method
            ,COUNT(DISTINCT evt_tx_hash) AS cnts
        FROM 
            query_3821308
        GROUP BY
            1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    gnosis_metri_monerium_transfers AS (
        SELECT
             CAST(evt_block_time AS DATE) AS block_date
            ,CASE
                WHEN token_address = 0xcB444e90D8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12FC56E THEN 'EURe Transfer'
                WHEN token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 THEN 'GBPe Transfer'
            END AS action
            ,method
            ,COUNT(DISTINCT evt_tx_hash) AS cnts
        FROM 
            query_3792681
        GROUP BY 
            1, 2, 3
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM gnosis_metri_trust
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM gnosis_metri_crc_mints
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT * FROM gnosis_metri_crc_transfers
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT * FROM gnosis_metri_monerium_transfers
    ```

## Monerium

*8 queries*

### gnosis_monerium_burners_lasthop_v

**Query ID:** 5375232 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      all_transfers AS (
        SELECT * 
        FROM query_5260204
      ),
    
      burn_raw AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          contract_address,
          "from"            AS burner_address,
          evt_block_time    AS burn_time,
          evt_block_number  AS burn_block,
          evt_index         AS burn_log_index,
          evt_tx_hash,
          version
        FROM all_transfers
        WHERE "to" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
      ),
    
      dedup_burns AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          contract_address,
          burner_address,
          burn_time,
          burn_block,
          burn_log_index,
          evt_tx_hash
        FROM (
          SELECT
            *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY evt_tx_hash
              ORDER BY (version = 'V2') DESC, burn_block, burn_log_index
            ) AS rn
          FROM burn_raw
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      candidates AS (
        SELECT
          db.evt_tx_hash     AS burn_tx_hash,
          db.token,
          db.burner_address,
          db.burn_time,
          at.evt_block_time  AS prev_time,
          at.evt_block_number AS prev_block,
          at.evt_index       AS prev_log_index,
          at."from"          AS prev_from
        FROM dedup_burns db
        LEFT JOIN all_transfers at
          ON  at."to"              = db.burner_address
          AND at.contract_address  = db.contract_address
          AND (
                at.evt_block_number < db.burn_block
             OR (at.evt_block_number = db.burn_block AND at.evt_index < db.burn_log_index)
          )
          AND at."from" <> 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000   
      ),
    
      last_hop AS (
        SELECT
          c.token,
          c.burner_address,
          c.burn_tx_hash,
          c.burn_time,
          c.prev_from       AS last_hop_from,
          c.prev_time       AS last_hop_time,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY c.burn_tx_hash
            ORDER BY c.prev_block DESC, c.prev_log_index DESC
          ) AS rn
        FROM candidates c
      )
    
    SELECT
      token,
      burner_address,
      burn_tx_hash,
      burn_time,
      last_hop_from,
      last_hop_time
    FROM last_hop
    WHERE rn = 1
    ORDER BY burn_time;
    ```

### gnosis_monerium_daily_transfers_v

**Query ID:** 4330588 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    monerium_versions AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4339524
    ),
    
    monerium_transfers AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.contract_address AS token_address
            ,t2.symbol
            ,t1."from"
            ,t1."to"
            ,SUM(t1.amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            monerium_versions t2
            ON
            t2.token_address = t1.contract_address
        WHERE
            t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
            AND
            (t1.block_date < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL)
        GROUP BY
            1, 2, 3, 4, 5
    ),
    
    dex_prices_sparce AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,token_address
            ,IF(price > 10, 1, price) AS price -- removing outliers
            ,1 AS ordering
        FROM (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.hour) AS block_date
            ,t2.token_address
            ,approx_percentile(median_price, 0.5) AS price
        FROM
            dex.prices t1
        INNER JOIN
            monerium_versions t2
            ON t2.token_address = t1.contract_address 
        WHERE
            blockchain = 'gnosis'
        GROUP BY 1, 2
        )
        
    ),
    
    usd_daily_prices AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.day AS block_date
            ,t1.contract_address AS token_address
            ,t1.price_close AS price
            ,0 AS ordering
        FROM 
            prices.usd_daily t1
        INNER JOIN
            monerium_versions t2
            ON t2.token_address = t1.contract_address
        WHERE 
            t1.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND
            (t1.day < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL)
    ),
    
    prices_sparce AS (
        SELECT
            token_address
            ,block_date
            ,ARRAY_AGG(price ORDER BY ordering)[1] AS price
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM dex_prices_sparce
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM usd_daily_prices
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2
        
        
    ),
    
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            token_address
            ,block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                token_address
                ,MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
                prices_sparce
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    ),
    
    daily_prices AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.token_address
            ,LAST_VALUE(t2.price) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY t1.token_address ORDER BY t1.block_date) AS price
        FROM
            calendar t1
        LEFT JOIN
            prices_sparce t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            AND t2.token_address = t1.token_address
            
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.block_date
        ,t1.token_address
        ,t1.symbol
        ,t1."from"
        ,t1."to"
        ,t2.price
        ,t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18) AS amount
        ,t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18) * t2.price AS amount_usd
    FROM 
        monerium_transfers t1
    LEFT JOIN
        daily_prices t2
        ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
        AND 
        (
            t2.token_address = t1.token_address 
            OR 
            (t2.token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e AND t1.token_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430)
            OR
            (t2.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 AND t1.token_address = 0x50D1A74F4b6dcaCddD97fd442C0e22a4c97F2b7f)
        )
    ```

### gnosis_monerium_distinct_minters_burners_gpowners_v

**Query ID:** 5346197 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      monerium_mints AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          "to"   AS address
        FROM query_5260204
        WHERE "from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        GROUP BY token, "to"
      ),
    
      monerium_burns AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          "from" AS address
        FROM query_5260204
        WHERE "to" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        GROUP BY token, "from"
      ),
    
      pay_users AS (
        SELECT pay_wallet AS address FROM query_3707804
        UNION
        SELECT owner      AS address FROM query_3707804
      ),
    
      tagged_mints AS (
        SELECT
          mm.token,
          mm.address,
          CASE WHEN pu.address IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_pay
        FROM monerium_mints mm
        LEFT JOIN pay_users pu
          ON mm.address = pu.address
      ),
    
      tagged_burns AS (
        SELECT
          mb.token,
          mb.address,
          CASE WHEN pu.address IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_pay
        FROM monerium_burns mb
        LEFT JOIN pay_users pu
          ON mb.address = pu.address
      ),
    
      totals_mints AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          COUNT(*)     AS total_minters,
          SUM(is_pay)  AS pay_minters
        FROM tagged_mints
        GROUP BY token
      ),
    
      totals_burns AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          COUNT(*)     AS total_burners,
          SUM(is_pay)  AS pay_burners
        FROM tagged_burns
        GROUP BY token
      ),
    
      overall_mints AS (
        SELECT
          COUNT(*)     AS total_minters,
          SUM(is_pay)  AS pay_minters
        FROM tagged_mints
      ),
    
      overall_burns AS (
        SELECT
          COUNT(*)     AS total_burners,
          SUM(is_pay)  AS pay_burners
        FROM tagged_burns
      )
    
    SELECT
      om.pay_minters        AS overall_pay_minters,
      om.total_minters      AS overall_total_minters,
      (om.pay_minters * 100.0 / om.total_minters)      AS overall_pct_pay_minters,
      ob.pay_burners        AS overall_pay_burners,
      ob.total_burners      AS overall_total_burners,
      (ob.pay_burners * 100.0 / ob.total_burners)      AS overall_pct_pay_burners,
    
      tm.token,
      tm.pay_minters        AS token_pay_minters,
      tm.total_minters      AS token_total_minters,
      (tm.pay_minters * 100.0 / NULLIF(tm.total_minters,0))  AS pct_token_pay_minters,
      tb.pay_burners        AS token_pay_burners,
      tb.total_burners      AS token_total_burners,
      (tb.pay_burners * 100.0 / NULLIF(tb.total_burners,0))  AS pct_token_pay_burners
    
    FROM overall_mints om
    CROSS JOIN overall_burns ob
    CROSS JOIN totals_mints tm
    CROSS JOIN totals_burns tb
    WHERE tm.token = tb.token
    ORDER BY tm.token;
    ```

### gnosis_monerium_distinct_minters_burners_v

**Query ID:** 5346171 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Weeks` (number): `24`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      cutoff AS (
        SELECT date_add('week', -{{Last Weeks}}, now()) AS since_ts
      ),
    
      all_transfers AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM query_5260204, cutoff
        WHERE evt_block_time >= cutoff.since_ts
      ),
    
      monerium_mints AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          "to"                      AS minter_address,
          MIN(evt_block_time)       AS first_mint_time
        FROM all_transfers
        WHERE "from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        GROUP BY token, "to"
      ),
    
      monerium_burns AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          "from"                    AS burner_address,
          MIN(evt_block_time)       AS first_burn_time
        FROM all_transfers
        WHERE "to" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        GROUP BY token, "from"
      )
    
    SELECT
      COUNT(DISTINCT mm.minter_address)                                                   AS total_distinct_minters,
      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mm.token = 'EURe' THEN mm.minter_address END)             AS eure_minters,
      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mm.token = 'GBPe' THEN mm.minter_address END)             AS gbpe_minters,
      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mm.token = 'USDe' THEN mm.minter_address END)             AS usde_minters,
      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mm.token = 'ISKe' THEN mm.minter_address END)             AS iske_minters,
    
      (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT burner_address) FROM monerium_burns)                         AS total_distinct_burners,
      (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN token = 'EURe' THEN burner_address END)
         FROM monerium_burns)                                                            AS eure_burners,
      (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN token = 'GBPe' THEN burner_address END)
         FROM monerium_burns)                                                            AS gbpe_burners,
      (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN token = 'USDe' THEN burner_address END)
         FROM monerium_burns)                                                            AS usde_burners,
      (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN token = 'ISKe' THEN burner_address END)
         FROM monerium_burns)                                                            AS iske_burners
    FROM monerium_mints mm;
    ```

### gnosis_monerium_minters_firstmove_v

**Query ID:** 5346207 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      all_transfers AS (
        SELECT * 
        FROM query_5260204
      ),
    
      mint_raw AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          contract_address,
          "to"            AS minter_address,
          evt_block_time  AS mint_time,
          evt_block_number AS mint_block,
          evt_index       AS mint_evt_index,
          evt_tx_hash,
          version
        FROM all_transfers
        WHERE "from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
      ),
    
      dedup_mints AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          contract_address,
          minter_address,
          mint_time,
          mint_block,
          mint_evt_index,
          evt_tx_hash
        FROM (
          SELECT
            *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY evt_tx_hash
              ORDER BY (version = 'V2') DESC, mint_block, mint_evt_index
            ) AS rn
          FROM mint_raw
        ) WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      candidate_moves AS (
        SELECT
          dm.token,
          dm.contract_address,
          dm.minter_address,
          dm.evt_tx_hash    AS mint_tx_hash,
          dm.mint_evt_index,
          dm.mint_time,
          at."to"           AS move_to,
          at.evt_block_time AS move_time,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY dm.evt_tx_hash
            ORDER BY at.evt_block_number, at.evt_index
          ) AS rn
        FROM all_transfers at
        JOIN dedup_mints dm
          ON at."from"            = dm.minter_address
         AND at.contract_address  = dm.contract_address   -- same token
         AND (
              at.evt_block_number > dm.mint_block
           OR (at.evt_block_number = dm.mint_block
               AND at.evt_index     > dm.mint_evt_index)
         )
         AND at."to" <> 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
      ),
    
      first_moves AS (
        SELECT
          token,
          contract_address,
          minter_address,
          mint_tx_hash,
          mint_evt_index,
          mint_time,
          move_to,
          move_time
        FROM candidate_moves
        WHERE rn = 1
      )
    
    SELECT
      token,
      contract_address,
      minter_address,
      mint_tx_hash,
      mint_evt_index,
      mint_time,
      move_to,
      move_time
    FROM first_moves
    ORDER BY mint_time;
    ```
