### gnosis_monerium_transfers_v

**Query ID:** 4331071 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    monerium_versions AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4339524
    ),
    
    monerium_transfers AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.block_time
            ,t1.contract_address AS token_address
            ,t2.symbol
            ,t1.tx_hash
            ,t1.evt_index
            ,t1.tx_from
            ,t1.tx_to
            ,t1."from"
            ,t1."to"
            ,t1.amount_raw
        FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            monerium_versions t2
            ON
            t2.token_address = t1.contract_address
        WHERE
            t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
            AND
            (t1.block_date < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL)
    ),
    
    dex_prices_sparce AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,token_address
            ,IF(price > 10, 1, price) AS price -- removing outliers
            ,1 AS ordering
        FROM (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.hour) AS block_date
            ,t2.token_address
            ,approx_percentile(median_price, 0.5) AS price
        FROM
            dex.prices t1
        INNER JOIN
            monerium_versions t2
            ON t2.token_address = t1.contract_address 
        WHERE
            blockchain = 'gnosis'
        GROUP BY 1, 2
        )
        
    ),
    
    usd_daily_prices AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.day AS block_date
            ,t1.contract_address AS token_address
            ,t1.price_close AS price
            ,0 AS ordering
        FROM 
            prices.usd_daily t1
        INNER JOIN
            monerium_versions t2
            ON t2.token_address = t1.contract_address
        WHERE 
            t1.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND
            (t1.day < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL)
    ),
    
    prices_sparce AS (
        SELECT
            token_address
            ,block_date
            ,ARRAY_AGG(price ORDER BY ordering)[1] AS price
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM dex_prices_sparce
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM usd_daily_prices
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2
        
        
    ),
    
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            token_address
            ,block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                token_address
                ,MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
                prices_sparce
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    ),
    
    daily_prices AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.token_address
            ,LAST_VALUE(t2.price) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY t1.token_address ORDER BY t1.block_date) AS price
        FROM
            calendar t1
        LEFT JOIN
            prices_sparce t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            AND t2.token_address = t1.token_address
            
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.block_date
        ,t1.block_time
        ,t1.token_address
        ,t1.symbol
        ,t1.tx_hash
        ,t1.evt_index
        ,t1.tx_from
        ,t1.tx_to
        ,t1."from"
        ,t1."to"
        ,t2.price
        ,t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18) AS amount
        ,t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18) * t2.price AS amount_usd
    FROM 
        monerium_transfers t1
    LEFT JOIN
        daily_prices t2
        ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
        AND 
        (
            t2.token_address = t1.token_address 
            OR 
            (t2.token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e AND t1.token_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430)
            OR
            (t2.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 AND t1.token_address = 0x50D1A74F4b6dcaCddD97fd442C0e22a4c97F2b7f)
        )
    ```

### gnosis_nftgame_actions_v

**Query ID:** 4576392 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        evt_block_time AS block_time
        ,evt_index
        ,evt_tx_hash AS tx_hash
        ,tokenId
        ,"from" AS sender
        ,"to" AS receiver
        ,CASE
            WHEN "from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 THEN 'Mint'
            WHEN "to" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 THEN 'Burn'
            WHEN "from" = "to" THEN 'Self-Transfer'
            ELSE 'Transfer'
        END AS actions
    FROM gnosis_ai_gnosis.AgentNFT_evt_Transfer
    ```

### gnosis_nftgame_agents_sparse_xDAI_balance_v

**Query ID:** 4571694 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    nft_agents AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4570956 t2 --gnosis_nftgame_agents_v
    ),
    
    balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('minute',block_time) AS block_time
            ,t2.address
            ,t2.label
            ,SUM(CASE
                WHEN t2.address = t1."from" THEN -CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256)
                WHEN t2.address = t1."to" THEN CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256)
            END) AS amount_raw
        FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers  t1
        INNER JOIN
            nft_agents t2
            ON t2.address = t1."from" OR t2.address = t1."to"
        WHERE
            t1.token_standard = 'native'
        GROUP BY 
            1, 2, 3 
    ),
    
    balance_diff_finalpoint AS (
        SELECT
            block_time
            ,address
            ,label
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT
                *
            FROM
                balance_diff
        
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT
                DATE_TRUNC('minute',CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '15' MINUTE) AS block_time
                ,address
                ,label
                ,CAST(0 AS INT256) AS amount_raw
            FROM
                nft_agents
        )
        GROUP BY 
            1, 2, 3
    )
    
    SELECT 
        address
        ,label
        ,block_time
        ,(SUM(COALESCE(amount_raw,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY address ORDER BY block_time))/POWER(10,18) AS balance
    FROM balance_diff_finalpoint
    ```

    ```sql
      SELECT t.address, t.label
      FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[
        (0x2A537F3403a3F5F463996c36D31e94227c9833CE, 'Agent1'),
        (0x485D096b4c0413dA1B09Ed9261B8e91eCCD7ffb9, 'Agent2'),

        (0xd4fC4305DC1226c38356024c26cdE985817f137F, 'Agent4'),
        (0x1C7AbbBef500620A68ed2F94b816221A61d72F33, 'Agent5'),
        (0x64D94C8621128E1C813F8AdcD62c4ED7F89B1Fd6, 'Agent6 (buyer 1)'),
    ```

### gnosis_nftgame_wallet_xDAI_balance_daily_v

**Query ID:** 4571926 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    wallet AS (
        SELECT 0xd1A54FD7a200C2ca76B6D06437795d660d37FE28 AS address, 'safe' AS label
    ),
    
    balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day',block_time) AS block_day
            ,SUM(CASE
                WHEN t2.address = t1."from" THEN -CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256)
                WHEN t2.address = t1."to" THEN CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256)
            END) AS amount_raw
        FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers  t1
        INNER JOIN
            wallet t2
            ON t2.address = t1."from" OR t2.address = t1."to"
        WHERE
            t1.token_standard = 'native'
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT
                MIN(block_day) AS min_block_day
            FROM
                balance_diff
        )
        ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_day AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.block_day
        ,(SUM(COALESCE(t2.amount_raw,0)) OVER (ORDER BY t1.block_day))/POWER(10,18) AS balance
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        balance_diff t2
        ON t2.block_day = t1.block_day
    ```

## Olas

*1 queries*

### gnosis_OLAS_agents_v

**Query ID:** 4025134 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        multisig AS address
        ,CONCAT('Olas','_',CAST(COUNT(*) OVER (ORDER BY evt_block_number, evt_index) AS VARCHAR)) AS label
    FROM (
        SELECT
            evt.multisig
            ,MIN(evt.evt_block_number) AS evt_block_number
            ,MIN(evt.evt_index) AS evt_index
        FROM 
            autonolas_gnosis.ServiceRegistryL2_evt_CreateMultisigWithAgents AS evt
        JOIN 
            autonolas_gnosis.ServiceRegistryL2_call_registerAgents AS call
        ON 
            evt.serviceId = call.serviceId
        WHERE 
            (call.agentIds[1] = 12 OR call.agentIds[1] = 14)
        GROUP BY 1
    )
    ```

### gnosis_omen_agent_daily_performance_v

**Query ID:** 4028080 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets_status AS (
        SELECT * FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_omen_gnosis_markets_status_mv --query_3601593
    ),
    
    gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse AS (
        SELECT
            t2.label
            ,t1.fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,t1.collateralToken
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour',t1.evt_block_time) AS date_time
            ,ARRAY_AGG(t1.outcomeTokens ORDER BY t1.evt_block_time, t1.evt_index DESC)[1] AS outcomeTokens
        FROM
            dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_omen_outcome_tokens_balance_sparse_v t1 --query_3684914 t1
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders t2
            ON
            t2.address = t1.user
        GROUP BY 
            1,2,3,4
    ),
    
    relevant_markets AS (
        SELECT 
            fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,collateralToken
            ,CAST(MIN(date_time) AS TIMESTAMP) AS date_time_min
            ,CAST(MAX(date_time) AS TIMESTAMP) AS date_time_max
        FROM gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    colateral_invested AS (
        SELECT
            label,
            fixedproductmarketmaker,
            SUM(amount) AS amount
        FROM (
            -- Transfers FROM market TO trader (positive)
            SELECT 
                t3.label,
                rm.fixedproductmarketmaker,
                CAST(t1.amount_raw AS DOUBLE) / POWER(10, COALESCE(t4.decimals, 18)) * COALESCE(t4.price, 0) AS amount
            FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN relevant_markets rm 
                ON t1.contract_address = rm.collateralToken 
                AND t1."from" = rm.fixedproductmarketmaker
            INNER JOIN ai_agents_traders t3 ON t3.address = t1."to"
            LEFT JOIN prices.usd_daily t4 
                ON t4.contract_address = rm.collateralToken 
                AND t4.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t4.day = t1.block_date
            WHERE 
                t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
                AND t1.block_time >= rm.date_time_min
            
            UNION ALL
            
            -- Transfers TO market FROM trader (negative)
            SELECT 
                t3.label,
                rm.fixedproductmarketmaker,
                -1.0 * CAST(t1.amount_raw AS DOUBLE) / POWER(10, COALESCE(t4.decimals, 18)) * COALESCE(t4.price, 0) AS amount
            FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN relevant_markets rm 
                ON t1.contract_address = rm.collateralToken 
                AND t1."to" = rm.fixedproductmarketmaker
            INNER JOIN ai_agents_traders t3 ON t3.address = t1."from"
            LEFT JOIN prices.usd_daily t4 
                ON t4.contract_address = rm.collateralToken 
                AND t4.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t4.day = t1.block_date
            WHERE 
                t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
                AND t1.block_time >= rm.date_time_min
        ) t
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    PayoutRedemption AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.label
            ,t1.conditionId
            ,ARRAY_AGG(t1.evt_block_date ORDER BY t1.evt_block_date) AS block_date
            ,SUM(t1.payout/POWER(10,t3.decimals) * t3.price) AS payout
        FROM 
            omen_gnosis.ConditionalTokens_evt_PayoutRedemption t1
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders t2
            ON
            t2.address = t1.redeemer
        LEFT JOIN
            prices.usd_daily t3
            ON
            t3.contract_address = t1.collateralToken
            AND
            t3.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND
            t3.day = t1.evt_block_date
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            label
            ,block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                label
                ,MIN(block_date[1]) AS min_date
            FROM
                PayoutRedemption
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(min_date, CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        label
        ,block_date 
        ,payout
        ,invested
        ,AVG(ABS(invested)) OVER w AS invested_mean
        ,SUM(return) OVER w AS return_cumsum
        ,AVG(return) OVER w AS return_mean
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(return,0.5) OVER w AS return_median
        ,AVG(COALESCE(return/NULLIF(ABS(invested),0),0)) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_date ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS MeanROI_60DMA
        ,(POWER(
            1 + (APPROX_PERCENTILE(COALESCE(return/NULLIF(ABS(invested),0),0),0.5) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_date ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)),
            356/(SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_date ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW))
        ) - 1) * 100 AS APY_pct
    FROM (
    SELECT
        t4.label
        ,t4.block_date 
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t1.payout,0)) AS payout
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t3.amount,0)) AS invested
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t1.payout + t3.amount,0)) AS return
    FROM
        PayoutRedemption t1
    RIGHT JOIN
        calendar t4
        ON
        t4.block_date = t1.block_date[1]
        AND
        t4.label = t1.label
    LEFT JOIN
        omen_gnosis_markets_status t2
        ON
        t2.conditionId = t1.conditionId
    LEFT JOIN
        colateral_invested t3
        ON
        t3.fixedproductmarketmaker = t2.fixedproductmarketmaker
        AND
        t3.label =  t1.label
    GROUP BY 1, 2
       ) 
     WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_date)
    ```

### gnosis_omen_agent_invest_payout_profit_v

**Query ID:** 4030733 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994
    ),
    
    gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse AS (
        SELECT
            t2.label
            ,t1.fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,t1.collateralToken
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour',t1.evt_block_time) AS date_time
            ,ARRAY_AGG(t1.outcomeTokens ORDER BY t1.evt_block_time, t1.evt_index DESC)[1] AS outcomeTokens
        FROM
            dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_omen_outcome_tokens_balance_sparse_mv t1
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders t2
            ON
            t2.address = t1.user
        GROUP BY 
            1,2,3,4
    ),
    
    relevant_markets AS (
        SELECT 
           -- label
            fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,collateralToken
            ,CAST(MIN(date_time) AS TIMESTAMP) AS date_time_min
            ,CAST(MAX(date_time) AS TIMESTAMP) AS date_time_max
        FROM gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    colateral_invested AS (
    SELECT
        label
        ,fixedproductmarketmaker
        ,SUM(amount) AS amount
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t3.label
            ,t2.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,SUM(-amount_raw/POWER(10,t4.decimals) * t4.price) AS amount
        FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            relevant_markets t2
            ON
            t2.collateralToken = t1.contract_address
            AND
            t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1."from"
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders t3
            ON
            t3.address = t1.to
        LEFT JOIN
            prices.usd t4
            ON t4.contract_address = t2.collateralToken
            AND t4.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND t4.minute = DATE_TRUNC('minute',t1.block_time)
        WHERE
             t1.block_time >= t2.date_time_min
             AND
             t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
        GROUP BY
            1,2
            
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT
            t3.label
            ,t2.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,SUM(amount_raw/POWER(10,t4.decimals) * t4.price) AS amount
        FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            relevant_markets t2
            ON
            t2.collateralToken = t1.contract_address
            AND
            t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.to
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders t3
            ON
            t3.address = t1."from"
        LEFT JOIN
            prices.usd t4
            ON t4.contract_address = t2.collateralToken
            AND t4.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND t4.minute = DATE_TRUNC('minute',t1.block_time)
        WHERE
             t1.block_time >= t2.date_time_min
             AND
             t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
        GROUP BY
            1,2
    )
    GROUP BY 
        1, 2
    ),
    
    markets_status AS (
        SELECT  
        fixedProductMarketMaker
        ,conditionId
        ,status
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_omen_gnosis_markets_status_mv
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_payouts AS (
        SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.ConditionalTokens_evt_PayoutRedemption
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        label
        ,block_time[1] AS block_time
        ,fixedproductmarketmaker
        ,-Invested AS Invested
        ,AVG(Invested) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time) AS MeanInvested
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(Invested,0.5) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time) AS MedianInvested
        ,Payout
        ,Payout-Invested AS Profit
        ,(Payout/Invested -1) * 100 AS ROI
        ,SUM(Payout-Invested) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time) AS CumulativeProfit
        ,AVG(Payout-Invested) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS MeanProfit_30
        ,100 * ( AVG(Payout/Invested - 1) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)) AS MeanROI_30
        ,100 * ( AVG(Payout-Invested) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW))/(SUM(Invested) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)) AS MeanROI_30_w
        ,AVG(Payout-Invested) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time) AS MeanProfit
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(Payout-Invested,0.5) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time) AS MedianProfit
        ,100 * ( AVG(Payout/Invested - 1) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time)) AS MeanROI
        ,100 * ( AVG(Payout-Invested) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time))/(SUM(Invested) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time)) AS MeanROI_w
    FROM (
    --- Asumes the Agents always redeems even if loosing bet, and same collateral need to convert to USD...
    SELECT 
        t1.label
        ,ARRAY_AGG(t4.evt_block_time ORDER BY evt_block_time DESC) AS block_time
        ,t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        ,t1.amount AS Invested
        ,SUM(t4.payout/POWER(10,t5.decimals) * t5.price) AS Payout
    FROM colateral_invested t1
    INNER JOIN
        markets_status t2
        ON
        t2.fixedProductMarketMaker = t1.fixedProductMarketMaker
        AND
        t2.status = 'Resolved'
    LEFT JOIN
            ai_agents_traders t3
            ON
            t3.label = t1.label
    INNER JOIN
        omen_gnosis_payouts t4
        ON
        t4.conditionId = t2.conditionId
        AND
        t4.redeemer = t3.address
        
    LEFT JOIN
        prices.usd t5
        ON t5.contract_address = t4.collateralToken
        AND t5.blockchain = 'gnosis'
        AND t5.minute = DATE_TRUNC('minute',t4.evt_block_time)
                
    --LEFT JOIN
    --        tokens.erc20 t5
    --        ON
    --        t5.contract_address = t4.collateralToken
    --        AND
    --        t5.blockchain = 'gnosis'
    GROUP BY
         1,3, 4
    )
    ```

### gnosis_omen_agents_accuracy_markets_v

**Query ID:** 4027915 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omen_gnosis_trades AS (
          SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.trades
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets_status AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3601593
    ),
    
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994
    ),
    
    relevant_markets AS (
            SELECT  
                t2.label
                ,t1.block_time
                ,fixedproductmarketmaker
                ,outcomeIndex AS bet_outcome
                ,CAST( amount AS DOUBLE) AS amount
            FROM omen_gnosis_trades t1
            INNER JOIN
                ai_agents_traders AS t2
                ON t2.address = t1.tx_from OR t2.address = t1.tx_to
            WHERE
                action = 'Buy'
    ),
    
    markets_outcome AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.label
            ,t1.conditionid
            ,t1.questionid
            ,t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,t1.creation_time AS start_time
            ,t1.opening_time
            ,t1.timeout
            ,t3.Status AS market_status
            ,FILTER(
              TRANSFORM(
                t3.payoutNumerators,
                x -> CASE WHEN x <> 0 THEN ARRAY_POSITION(t3.payoutNumerators, x) - 1 ELSE NULL END
              )
              , x -> x IS NOT NULL) AS payout_outcome
            ,t2.bet_outcome
            ,t2.amount
            ,t3.resolution_time
            ,t2.block_time
            ,t3.is_valid
        FROM 
            omen_gnosis_markets_status t1
        INNER JOIN
            relevant_markets t2
           ON t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        LEFT JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets_status t3
            ON t3.conditionId = t1.conditionid
            AND t3.questionId = t1.questionid
    ),
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            *
            ,contains(payout_outcome, bet_outcome) AS correct_bet
        FROM markets_outcome
    ),
    
    markets_metrics AS (
        SELECT
            block_hour
            ,label
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Open' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_open
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Closed' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_closed
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Under Finalization' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_under_finalization
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Finalized' THEN 1 END)  AS cnt_finalized
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_resolved
            ,-COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' AND is_valid = False THEN 1 END) AS cnt_resolved_fail
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) AS cnt_resolved_valid
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                MAX(DATE_TRUNC('hour',block_time)) AS block_hour
                ,fixedproductmarketmaker
                ,label
                ,market_status
                ,is_valid
            FROM
                final
            GROUP BY
                2, 3, 4, 5
        )
        GROUp BY 1, 2
        
    ),
    
    bets_metrics AS (
        SELECT 
            label
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour',block_time) AS block_hour
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN correct_bet AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) AS cnt_correct
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT correct_bet AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) AS cnt_wrong
            ,COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN correct_bet AND is_valid = True THEN amount END),0)AS vol_correct
            ,COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN NOT correct_bet AND is_valid = True THEN amount END),0) AS vol_wrong
        FROM 
            final
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    metrics_sparse_hour AS (
        SELECT
            t1.label
            ,t1.block_hour
            ,t1.cnt_open
            ,t1.cnt_closed
            ,t1.cnt_under_finalization
            ,t1.cnt_finalized
            ,t1.cnt_resolved
            ,t1.cnt_resolved_fail
            ,t1.cnt_resolved_valid
            ,t2.cnt_correct
            ,t2.cnt_wrong
            ,t2.vol_correct
            ,t2.vol_wrong
        FROM
            markets_metrics t1
        LEFT JOIN
            bets_metrics t2
            ON
            t2.block_hour = t1.block_hour
            AND
            t2.label = t1.label
        
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            label
            ,block_hour
        FROM (
            SELECT
                label
                ,MIN(block_hour) AS block_hour_min
                ,MAX(block_hour) AS block_hour_max
            FROM
                metrics_sparse_hour
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(block_hour_min AS TIMESTAMP), CAST(block_hour_max AS TIMESTAMP), interval '1' hour)) s(block_hour)
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        t1.block_hour
        ,t1.label
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_open,0)) OVER w AS cnt_open
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_closed,0)) OVER w AS cnt_closed
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_under_finalization,0)) OVER w AS cnt_under_finalization
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_finalized,0)) OVER w AS cnt_finalized
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_resolved,0)) OVER w AS cnt_resolved
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_resolved_fail,0)) OVER w AS cnt_resolved_fail
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_resolved_valid,0)) OVER w AS cnt_resolved_valid
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_correct,0)) OVER w AS cnt_correct
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_wrong,0)) OVER w AS cnt_wrong
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.vol_correct,0)) OVER w AS vol_correct
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.vol_wrong,0)) OVER w AS vol_wrong
        ,CAST(SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_correct,0)) OVER w AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_correct,0) + COALESCE(t2.cnt_wrong,0)) OVER w ,0) AS pct_correct
        ,CAST(SUM(COALESCE(t2.vol_correct,0)) OVER w AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(t2.vol_correct,0) + COALESCE(t2.vol_wrong,0)) OVER w,0) AS pct_correct_w
        ,CAST(SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_correct,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.label ORDER BY t1.block_hour ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_correct,0) + COALESCE(t2.cnt_wrong,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.label ORDER BY t1.block_hour ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) ,0) AS pct_correct_30D
        ,CAST(SUM(COALESCE(t2.vol_correct,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.label ORDER BY t1.block_hour ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(t2.vol_correct,0) + COALESCE(t2.vol_wrong,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.label ORDER BY t1.block_hour ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) ,0) AS pct_correct_w_30D
        ,CAST(SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_correct,0)) OVER w AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt_correct,0) + COALESCE(t2.cnt_wrong,0)) OVER w ,0) * 100 AS acc
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        metrics_sparse_hour t2
        ON
        t2.block_hour = t1.block_hour
        AND
        t2.label = t1.label
    WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY t1.label ORDER BY t1.block_hour)
    ```

### gnosis_omen_agents_betting_vs_resolution_v

**Query ID:** 4210338 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    
    omen_agents_prediction_betting AS (
        SELECT 
            *
        FROM 
            query_4241390 --omen_agents_prediction&betting_v
        WHERE 
            bet_action = 'Buy'
            AND
            status = 'Resolved' 
            AND 
            is_valid = TRUE
    ),
    
    betting_odds AS (
        SELECT
            label
            ,(
                odds_before[CAST(bet_outcome AS INTEGER)+1] 
                -
                MOD(odds_before[CAST(bet_outcome AS INTEGER)+1],0.1)
            ) * 100 AS bet_bin
            ,(
                IF(estimatedProbabilityBps>5000,estimatedProbabilityBps/10000.0, 1-estimatedProbabilityBps/10000.0)
                -
                MOD(IF(estimatedProbabilityBps>5000,estimatedProbabilityBps/10000.0, 1-estimatedProbabilityBps/10000.0),0.1)
            ) * 100 AS prediction_bin
            ,bet_outcome
            ,prediction_outcome
            ,payout_outcome[1] AS payout_outcome
        FROM omen_agents_prediction_betting
    ),
    
    betting_vs_resolution AS (
        SELECT 
            label
            ,ROUND(bet_bin/100.0,2) AS prob_bet
            ,ROUND(res_bin_bet/100.0,2) AS prob_res_bet
            ,bet_cnt
            ,payout_outcome
        FROM (
                SELECT 
                    bet_bin
                    ,label
                    ,payout_outcome
                    ,SUM(CASE WHEN bet_outcome = payout_outcome THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bet_cnt
                    ,(
                        AVG(CASE WHEN bet_outcome = payout_outcome THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
                        -
                        MOD(AVG(CASE WHEN bet_outcome = payout_outcome THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0.1) 
                    ) * 100 AS res_bin_bet
                FROM betting_odds 
                GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
        )
    ),
    
    prediction_vs_resolution AS (
        SELECT 
            label
            ,ROUND(prediction_bin/100.0,2) AS prob_prediction
            ,ROUND(res_bin_prediction/100.0,2) AS prob_res_prediction
            ,prediction_cnt
            ,payout_outcome
        FROM (
                SELECT 
                    prediction_bin
                    ,label
                    ,payout_outcome
                    ,SUM(CASE WHEN prediction_outcome = payout_outcome THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS prediction_cnt
                    ,(
                        AVG(CASE WHEN prediction_outcome = payout_outcome THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
                        -
                        MOD(AVG(CASE WHEN prediction_outcome = payout_outcome THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0.1) 
                    ) * 100 AS res_bin_prediction
                FROM betting_odds 
                GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
        )
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        label
        ,prob_bet
        ,prob_res_bet
        ,bet_cnt
        ,NULL AS prob_prediction
        ,NULL AS prob_res_prediction
        ,NULL AS prediction_cnt
        ,payout_outcome
    FROM
        betting_vs_resolution 
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        label
        ,NULL AS prob_bet
        ,NULL AS prob_res_bet
        ,NULL AS bet_cnt
        ,prob_prediction
        ,prob_res_prediction
        ,prediction_cnt
        ,payout_outcome
    FROM
        prediction_vs_resolution
    ```

### gnosis_omen_agents_colateral_invested_v

**Query ID:** 5177407 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994
    ),
    
    
    gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse AS (
        SELECT
            t2.label
            ,t1.fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,t1.collateralToken
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour',t1.evt_block_time) AS date_time
            ,ARRAY_AGG(t1.outcomeTokens ORDER BY t1.evt_block_time, t1.evt_index DESC)[1] AS outcomeTokens
        FROM
            dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_omen_outcome_tokens_balance_sparse_v t1 --query_3684914 t1
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders t2
            ON
            t2.address = t1.user
        GROUP BY 
            1,2,3,4
    ),
    
    relevant_markets AS (
        SELECT 
            fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,collateralToken
            ,CAST(MIN(date_time) AS TIMESTAMP) AS date_time_min
            ,CAST(MAX(date_time) AS TIMESTAMP) AS date_time_max
        FROM gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    colateral_invested AS (
        SELECT
            t3.label
            ,t2.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,SUM(
                CASE 
                    WHEN t1."from" = t2.fixedproductmarketmaker THEN amount_raw/POWER(10,t4.decimals) * t4.price
                    ELSE -amount_raw/POWER(10,t4.decimals) * t4.price 
                END
            ) AS amount
        FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            relevant_markets t2
            ON
            t1.contract_address = t2.collateralToken
        LEFT JOIN
            ai_agents_traders t3
            ON
            t3.address = t1.to
            OR
            t3.address = t1."from"
        LEFT JOIN
            prices.usd_daily t4
            ON
            t4.contract_address = t2.collateralToken
            AND
            t4.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND
            t4.day = t1.block_date
        WHERE
             t1.block_time >= t2.date_time_min
             AND
             t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
            AND
            (
                (
                    t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1."from"
                    AND
                    t3.address = t1.to
                )
                OR 
                (
                    t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.to
                    AND
                    t3.address = t1."from"
                )
            )
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM colateral_invested
    ```

### gnosis_omen_agents_markets_accuracy_v

**Query ID:** 4241723 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omen_agents_prediction_betting AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4241390
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            *
            ,contains(payout_outcome, bet_outcome) AS correct_bet
            ,contains(payout_outcome, prediction_outcome) AS correct_prediction
        FROM omen_agents_prediction_betting
    ),
    
    markets_metrics AS (
        SELECT
            block_hour
            ,label
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Open' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_open
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Closed' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_closed
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Under Finalization' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_under_finalization
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Finalized' THEN 1 END)  AS cnt_finalized
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_resolved
            ,-COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' AND is_valid = False THEN 1 END) AS cnt_resolved_fail
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) AS cnt_resolved_valid
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                MAX(DATE_TRUNC('hour',block_time)) AS block_hour
                ,fixedproductmarketmaker
                ,label
                ,status AS market_status
                ,is_valid
            FROM
                final
            GROUP BY
                2, 3, 4, 5
        )
        GROUp BY 1, 2
        
    ),
    
    bets_metrics AS (
        SELECT 
            label
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour',block_time) AS block_hour
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN correct_bet AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) AS cnt_correct_bet
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT correct_bet AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) AS cnt_wrong_bet
            ,COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN correct_bet AND is_valid = True THEN trade_amount END),0)AS vol_correct_bet
            ,COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN NOT correct_bet AND is_valid = True THEN trade_amount END),0) AS vol_wrong_bet
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN correct_prediction AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) AS cnt_correct_prediction
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT correct_prediction AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) AS cnt_wrong_prediction
        FROM 
            final
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    metrics_sparse_hour AS (
        SELECT
            t1.label
            ,t1.block_hour
            ,t1.cnt_open
            ,t1.cnt_closed
            ,t1.cnt_under_finalization
            ,t1.cnt_finalized
            ,t1.cnt_resolved
            ,t1.cnt_resolved_fail
            ,t1.cnt_resolved_valid
            ,t2.cnt_correct_bet
            ,t2.cnt_wrong_bet
            ,t2.cnt_correct_prediction
            ,t2.cnt_wrong_prediction
            ,t2.vol_correct_bet
            ,t2.vol_wrong_bet
        FROM
            markets_metrics t1
        LEFT JOIN
            bets_metrics t2
            ON
            t2.block_hour = t1.block_hour
            AND
            t2.label = t1.label
        
    )
    
    SELECT 
        block_hour
        ,label
        ,SUM(COALESCE(cnt_open,0)) OVER w AS cnt_open
        ,SUM(COALESCE(cnt_closed,0)) OVER w AS cnt_closed
        ,SUM(COALESCE(cnt_under_finalization,0)) OVER w AS cnt_under_finalization
        ,SUM(COALESCE(cnt_finalized,0)) OVER w AS cnt_finalized
        ,SUM(COALESCE(cnt_resolved,0)) OVER w AS cnt_resolved
        ,SUM(COALESCE(cnt_resolved_fail,0)) OVER w AS cnt_resolved_fail
        ,SUM(COALESCE(cnt_resolved_valid,0)) OVER w AS cnt_resolved_valid
        ,SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_bet,0)) OVER w AS cnt_correct_bet
        ,SUM(COALESCE(cnt_wrong_bet,0)) OVER w AS cnt_wrong_bet
        ,SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_prediction,0)) OVER w AS cnt_correct_prediction
        ,SUM(COALESCE(cnt_wrong_prediction,0)) OVER w AS cnt_wrong_prediction
        ,SUM(COALESCE(vol_correct_bet,0)) OVER w AS vol_correct_bet
        ,SUM(COALESCE(vol_wrong_bet,0)) OVER w AS vol_wrong_bet
        ,CAST(SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_bet,0)) OVER w AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_bet,0) + COALESCE(cnt_wrong_bet,0)) OVER w ,0) AS pct_correct_bet
        ,CAST(SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_prediction,0)) OVER w AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_prediction,0) + COALESCE(cnt_wrong_prediction,0)) OVER w ,0) AS pct_correct_prediction
        ,CAST(SUM(COALESCE(vol_correct_bet,0)) OVER w AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(vol_correct_bet,0) + COALESCE(vol_wrong_bet,0)) OVER w,0) AS pct_correct_bet_w
        ,CAST(SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_bet,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_hour ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_bet,0) + COALESCE(cnt_wrong_bet,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_hour ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) ,0) AS pct_correct_bet_30D
        ,CAST(SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_prediction,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_hour ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_prediction,0) + COALESCE(cnt_wrong_prediction,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_hour ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) ,0) AS pct_correct_prediction_30D
        ,CAST(SUM(COALESCE(vol_correct_bet,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_hour ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(vol_correct_bet,0) + COALESCE(vol_wrong_bet,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_hour ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) ,0) AS pct_correct_bet_w_30D
        ,CAST(SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_bet,0)) OVER w AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_bet,0) + COALESCE(cnt_wrong_bet,0)) OVER w ,0) * 100 AS acc_bet
        ,CAST(SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_prediction,0)) OVER w AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(cnt_correct_prediction,0) + COALESCE(cnt_wrong_prediction,0)) OVER w ,0) * 100 AS acc_prediction
    FROM 
        metrics_sparse_hour 
    WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_hour)
    ```

### gnosis_omen_agents_prediction_vs_resolution_v

**Query ID:** 4209746 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omen_agents_prediction AS (
            SELECT 
                label
                ,bet_outcome
                ,payout_outcome
                ,estimatedProbabilityBps/100 AS estimatedProbability
            FROM query_4172241
            WHERE
                status = 'Resolved'
    ),
    
    betting_odds AS (
        SELECT
            label
            ,estimatedProbability - MOD(estimatedProbability,10) AS bet_bin
            ,payout_outcome[1] AS payout_outcome
        FROM omen_agents_prediction
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        label
        ,ROUND(bet_bin/100.0,2) AS prob_bet
        ,ROUND(res_bin/100.0,2) AS prob_res
        ,cnt
    FROM (
            SELECT 
                bet_bin
                ,label
                ,SUM(1) AS cnt
                ,(
                    AVG(CASE WHEN 0 = payout_outcome THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
                    -
                    MOD(AVG(CASE WHEN 0 = payout_outcome THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0.1) 
                ) * 100 AS res_bin
            FROM betting_odds 
            GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    ```

### gnosis_omen_liquidity_maker_v

**Query ID:** 4009271 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    /* address is set to the actually maker*/
    WITH
    
    gnosis_omen_shares_balance_diff AS (
        SELECT 
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,tx_hash
            ,address
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM 
            query_4008320
        WHERE 
            address != 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        GROUP BY
            1, 2, 3
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.block_time,
        t1.block_day,
        t1.tx_hash,
        t1.evt_index,
        t1.fixedproductmarketmaker,
        t2.address,
        t1.shares,
        t1.collateralremovedfromfeepool,
        t1.outcometokens_amount,
        t1.reserves_delta,
        t1.action
    FROM 
        omen_gnosis.liquidity t1
    INNER JOIN
        gnosis_omen_shares_balance_diff t2
        ON
        t2.tx_hash = t1.tx_hash
        AND
        t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
    WHERE
        t2.amount_raw != 0
    ```

### gnosis_omen_market_labels_v

**Query ID:** 3895267 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omen_gnosis_ai_agents_makers AS (
        SELECT
            address
            ,label
        FROM
            query_3584116
    ),
    
    FixedProductMarketMakerCreation AS (
        SELECT 
            fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,creator
        FROM 
            omen_gnosis.FPMMDeterministicFactory_evt_FixedProductMarketMakerCreation
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        t1.fixedProductMarketMaker 
        ,t2.label AS agent_label
        ,CASE
            WHEN t2.label = 'Replicator' THEN 'Gnosis'
            WHEN t2.label = 'Olas-market-creator' THEN 'Olas'
            ELSE 'Other'
        END AS label
    FROM 
        FixedProductMarketMakerCreation t1
    LEFT JOIN
        omen_gnosis_ai_agents_makers t2
        ON
        t2.address = t1.creator
    ```

### gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_diff_v

**Query ID:** 3870892 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    ConditionalTokens_evt_TransferBatch AS (
        SELECT 
            evt_index
            ,evt_block_time
            ,"from"
            ,to
            ,id
            ,value
            ,idx - 1 AS outcomeIndex
        FROM
            omen_gnosis.ConditionalTokens_evt_TransferBatch
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(ids, "values") WITH ORDINALITY AS a(id, value, idx)
    ),
    
    ConditionalTokens_evt_TransferSingle AS (
        SELECT 
            evt_index
            ,evt_block_time
            ,"from"
            ,to
            ,id
            ,value
            ,NULL AS outcomeIndex
        FROM
            omen_gnosis.ConditionalTokens_evt_TransferSingle
    ),
    
    OutcomeTokens_transfers AS (
        SELECT * FROM ConditionalTokens_evt_TransferBatch
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM ConditionalTokens_evt_TransferSingle
    ),
    
    inflow AS (
        SELECT
            id
            ,evt_block_time 
            ,evt_index
            ,to AS user
            ,CAST(value AS INT256) AS value
            ,outcomeIndex
        FROM 
            OutcomeTokens_transfers
    ),
    
    outflow AS (
        SELECT
            id
            ,evt_block_time 
            ,evt_index
            ,"from" AS user
            ,CAST(-value AS INT256) AS value
            ,outcomeIndex
        FROM 
            OutcomeTokens_transfers
    ),
    
    netflow AS (
        SELECT
            id
            ,evt_block_time
            ,evt_index
            ,user
            ,value AS outcomeToken
            ,MAX(outcomeIndex) OVER (PARTITION BY id) AS outcomeIndex
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM inflow
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM outflow
        )
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets AS (
        SELECT fixedProductMarketMaker, collateralToken, outcomeSlotCount FROM query_3668567
    ),
    
    outputTokens_market AS (
        SELECT
            DISTINCT
            t2.fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,t2.collateralToken
            ,t2.outcomeSlotCount
            ,t1.id
        FROM 
            netflow t1
        INNER JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets t2
            ON t2.fixedProductMarketMaker = t1.user
    ),
    
    netflow_market AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,t2.collateralToken
            ,t2.outcomeSlotCount
            ,t1.* 
        FROM 
            netflow t1
        INNER JOIN 
            outputTokens_market t2
            ON t2.id = t1.id
    ),
    
    outcomeToken_balances_delta AS (
        SELECT
            fixedProductMarketMaker 
            ,collateralToken
            ,evt_block_time
            ,evt_index
            ,user
            ,TRANSFORM(
                SEQUENCE(0,CAST(outcomeSlotCount AS INTEGER) - 1), 
                x -> IF(CARDINALITY(delta_outcomeTokens) > 1, delta_outcomeTokens[x+1], IF(outcomeIndexes[1] = x,delta_outcomeTokens[1],CAST(0 AS INT256) ))
            ) AS delta_outcomeTokens
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                fixedProductMarketMaker 
                ,collateralToken
                ,evt_block_time
                ,evt_index
                ,user
                ,outcomeSlotCount
               ,ARRAY_AGG(outcomeToken ORDER BY outcomeIndex) AS delta_outcomeTokens
               ,ARRAY_AGG(outcomeIndex ORDER BY outcomeIndex) AS outcomeIndexes
            FROM netflow_market
            GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
        )
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM outcomeToken_balances_delta
    ```

### gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse_v

**Query ID:** 3684914 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
         fixedProductMarketMaker
         ,collateralToken
        ,evt_block_time
        ,evt_index
        ,user
        ,ARRAY_AGG(value ORDER BY idx) AS outcomeTokens
    FROM (
        SELECT
            fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,collateralToken
            ,evt_block_time
            ,evt_index
            ,user
            ,idx
            ,SUM(value) OVER (PARTITION BY fixedProductMarketMaker, user, idx ORDER BY evt_block_time, evt_index) AS value
        FROM
            query_3870892 --gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_diff_v
            ,UNNEST(delta_outcomeTokens) WITH ORDINALITY d(value,idx)
    )
    GROUP BY
        1,2,3,4,5
    ```

### gnosis_omen_shares_balance_diff_v

**Query ID:** 4008320 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omen_gnosis_PFMM_addresses AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3703139
    )
    
    SELECT
        t2.fixedproductmarketmaker 
        ,t1.tx_hash
        ,t1.block_time
        ,t1.evt_index
        ,to AS address
        ,CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
    FROM
        tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
    INNER JOIN
        omen_gnosis_PFMM_addresses t2
        ON
        t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.contract_address
    WHERE
        t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT
        t2.fixedproductmarketmaker 
        ,t1.tx_hash
        ,t1.block_time
        ,t1.evt_index
        ,"from" AS address
        ,-CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
    FROM
        tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
    INNER JOIN
        omen_gnosis_PFMM_addresses t2
        ON
        t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.contract_address
    WHERE
        t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
    ```

### gnosis_omen_trades&liquidity_v

**Query ID:** 4009097 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omen_gnosis_markets_status AS (
        SELECT 
            fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,collateralToken
            ,status
            ,is_valid
            ,payoutNumerators
            ,question
        FROM 
            query_3601593
    ),
    
    gnosis_reserves_trades AS (
          SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.trades
    ),
    
    gnosis_reserves_liquidity AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4009271 --omen_gnosis.liquidity
    ),
    
    gnosis_reserves_delta AS (
        SELECT
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,block_time
            ,action
            ,tx_hash
            ,evt_index
            ,reserves_delta
        FROM gnosis_reserves_liquidity
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,block_time
            ,action
            ,tx_hash
            ,evt_index
            ,reserves_delta
        FROM gnosis_reserves_trades
    ),
    
    
    probabilities AS (
        SELECT 
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,block_time
            ,action
            ,tx_hash
            ,evt_index
            ,reserves
            ,total_reserves
            ,TRANSFORM(
                reserves, 
                x -> ROUND( (CAST(1 AS REAL)/NULLIF(x,0)) / total_inv_reserves, 4)
            ) AS odds
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                fixedproductmarketmaker
                ,block_time
                ,action
                ,tx_hash
                ,evt_index
                ,array_agg(reserve) AS reserves
                ,SUM(reserve) AS total_reserves
                ,SUM(CAST(1 AS REAL)/NULLIF(CAST(reserve AS REAL),0)) AS total_inv_reserves
            FROM (
                SELECT 
                    fixedproductmarketmaker
                    ,block_time
                    ,action
                    ,tx_hash
                    ,evt_index
                    ,idx
                    ,SUM(value) OVER (PARTITION BY fixedproductmarketmaker, idx ORDER BY block_time, evt_index) AS reserve
                FROM 
                    gnosis_reserves_delta 
                CROSS JOIN unnest(reserves_delta) WITH ORDINALITY AS a(value, idx)
            ) AS summed_values
            GROUP BY 
                1,2,3,4,5
        )
    ),
    
    lag_probabilities AS (
    SELECT
        fixedproductmarketmaker
        ,tx_hash
        ,evt_index
        ,odds
        ,LAG(odds) OVER (PARTITION BY fixedproductmarketmaker ORDER BY block_time, evt_index) AS odds_before
    FROM
        probabilities
    ),
    
    trades_list AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_time
            ,get_href(get_chain_explorer_tx_hash('gnosis', t1.tx_hash), t1.action) AS action
            ,t1.address
            ,t1.outcomeIndex AS outcome
            ,t1.amount
            ,NULL AS shares
            ,NULL AS outcometokens_amount
            ,NULL AS collateralremovedfromfeepool
            ,t4.odds_before
            ,t4.odds AS odds_after
            ,t3.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,t3.question
            ,t3.status
            ,t3.collateralToken
            ,t3.is_valid
            ,t3.payoutNumerators
        FROM
            gnosis_reserves_trades t1
        INNER JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets_status t3
            ON t3.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        INNER JOIN
            lag_probabilities t4
            ON
            t4.tx_hash = t1.tx_hash
            AND
            t4.evt_index = t1.evt_index
    ),
    
    liquidity_list AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_time
            ,get_href(get_chain_explorer_tx_hash('gnosis', t1.tx_hash), t1.action) AS action
            ,t1.address
            ,NULL AS outcome
            ,NULL AS amount
            ,t1.shares
            ,t1.outcometokens_amount
            ,t1.collateralremovedfromfeepool
            ,t4.odds_before
            ,t4.odds AS odds_after
            ,t3.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,t3.question
            ,t3.status
            ,t3.collateralToken
            ,t3.is_valid
            ,t3.payoutNumerators
        FROM
            gnosis_reserves_liquidity t1
        INNER JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets_status t3
            ON t3.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        INNER JOIN
            lag_probabilities t4
            ON
            t4.tx_hash = t1.tx_hash
            AND
            t4.evt_index = t1.evt_index
    )
    
    SELECT 
        * 
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM trades_list
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM liquidity_list
    ) 
    --ORDER BY block_time
    ```

### gnosis_omen_user_address_v

**Query ID:** 3667730 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH 
    
    ConditionalTokens_evt_TransferBatch AS (
        SELECT 
            *
        FROM
            omen_gnosis.ConditionalTokens_evt_TransferBatch
    ),
    
    user_id_batch AS (
        --Assumes max 2  TransferBatch with such constraint
        SELECT
            evt_tx_hash
            ,from_list[1] AS fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,CASE
                WHEN from_list[2] = to_list[1] THEN IF(to_list[2]!= 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000,to_list[2],to_list[1])
            END AS user
        FROM (
            SELECT
                evt_tx_hash
                ,ARRAY_AGG("from" ORDER BY evt_index) AS from_list
                ,ARRAY_AGG(to ORDER BY evt_index) AS to_list
            FROM 
                ConditionalTokens_evt_TransferBatch
            WHERE
                operator = "from" 
            GROUP BY 1
        )
        WHERE CARDINALITY(from_list) = 2
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM user_id_batch
    ```

## Omni

*2 queries*

### gnosis_omni_bridge_daily_flows_v

**Query ID:** 4708620 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omni_flows_daily_sparse AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS block_day
            ,token_address
            ,SUM(inflow_raw) AS inflow_raw
            ,SUM(outflow_raw) AS outflow_raw
        FROM
            query_4708562 --gnosis_omni_bridge_flows_v
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            token_address
            ,block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT
                token_address
                ,MIN(block_day) AS min_block_day
            FROM
                omni_flows_daily_sparse
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_day AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.block_day
        ,t1.token_address
        ,t3.symbol
        ,COALESCE(t2.inflow_raw,0) AS inflow_raw
        ,COALESCE(t2.outflow_raw,0) AS outflow_raw
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.inflow_raw,0) + COALESCE(t2.outflow_raw,0)) OVER w AS netflow_raw
        ,COALESCE(t2.inflow_raw,0)/POWER(10,t3.decimals) AS inflow
        ,COALESCE(t2.outflow_raw,0)/POWER(10,t3.decimals) AS outflow
        ,(SUM(COALESCE(t2.inflow_raw,0) + COALESCE(t2.outflow_raw,0)) OVER w)/POWER(10,t3.decimals) AS netflow
        ,COALESCE(t2.inflow_raw,0)/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price AS inflow_usd
        ,COALESCE(t2.outflow_raw,0)/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price AS outflow_usd
        ,(SUM(COALESCE(t2.inflow_raw,0) + COALESCE(t2.outflow_raw,0)) OVER w)/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price AS netflow_usd
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        omni_flows_daily_sparse t2
        ON t2.block_day = t1.block_day
        AND t2.token_address = t1.token_address
    LEFT JOIN
        dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v t3 --gnosis_daily_token_prices_v
        ON t3.token_address = t1.token_address
        AND t3.block_date = t1.block_day
    WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY t1.token_address ORDER BY t1.block_day)
    ```

### gnosis_omni_bridge_flows_v

**Query ID:** 4708562 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omni_bridge_outflow AS (
        SELECT 
             evt_block_time AS block_time
             ,token AS token_address
            ,sender AS counterparty
            ,-CAST(value AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            omnibridge_gnosis.homeomnibridge_evt_tokensbridginginitiated
    ),
    
    omni_bridge_inflow AS (
        SELECT 
             evt_block_time AS block_time
             ,token AS token_address
            ,recipient AS counterparty
            ,CAST(value AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            omnibridge_gnosis.homeomnibridge_evt_tokensbridged
    ),
    
    omni_bridge_flows AS (
        SELECT
            block_time
            ,token_address
            ,counterparty
            ,SUM(IF(amount_raw<0,amount_raw,0)) AS outflow_raw
            ,SUM(IF(amount_raw>=0,amount_raw,0)) AS inflow_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM omni_bridge_outflow
            UNION ALL 
            SELECT * FROM omni_bridge_inflow
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM omni_bridge_flows
    ```

### % STAKE of total supply swapped per day on Ethereum - [ STAKE-GNO merge ]

**Query ID:** 286342 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT time, swapped/total_supply AS percentage
    FROM (
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS time, SUM(value)/1e18/0.0326292707 AS swapped
        FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
        WHERE (
            "from" = '\x7F30A53F290fc551a089bd83107906bE649a92Bd' AND
            contract_address = '\x6810e776880C02933D47DB1b9fc05908e5386b96'
        )
        GROUP BY 1
    ) AS swapped_data
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT circulating_supply - bridge_balance AS total_supply
        FROM (
            SELECT SUM(amount)/1e18 AS circulating_supply
            FROM (
                SELECT SUM(value) AS amount
                FROM stake."STAKE_evt_Transfer0" tr
                WHERE "from" IN (
                    '\x9bc4a93883c522d3c79c81c2999aab52e2268d03',
                    '\x3cfe51b61e25750ab1426b0072e5d0cc5c30aafa',
                    '\x0218b706898d234b85d2494df21eb0677eaea918'
                )
            UNION ALL
                SELECT SUM(-value) AS amount
                FROM stake."STAKE_evt_Transfer0" tr
                WHERE "to" IN (
                    '\x9bc4a93883c522d3c79c81c2999aab52e2268d03',
                    '\x3cfe51b61e25750ab1426b0072e5d0cc5c30aafa',
                    '\x0218b706898d234b85d2494df21eb0677eaea918',
                    '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000',
                    '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000001',
                    '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000002',
                    '\x00000000219ab540356cbb839cbe05303d7705fa'
                )
            UNION ALL
                SELECT SUM(value) AS amount
                FROM stake."STAKE_evt_Transfer" tr
                WHERE "from" IN (
                    '\x9bc4a93883c522d3c79c81c2999aab52e2268d03',
                    '\x3cfe51b61e25750ab1426b0072e5d0cc5c30aafa',
                    '\x0218b706898d234b85d2494df21eb0677eaea918'
                )
            UNION ALL
                SELECT SUM(-value) AS amount
                FROM stake."STAKE_evt_Transfer" tr
                WHERE "to" IN (
                    '\x9bc4a93883c522d3c79c81c2999aab52e2268d03',
                    '\x3cfe51b61e25750ab1426b0072e5d0cc5c30aafa',
                    '\x0218b706898d234b85d2494df21eb0677eaea918',
                    '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000',
                    '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000001',
                    '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000002',
                    '\x00000000219ab540356cbb839cbe05303d7705fa'
                )
            UNION ALL
                SELECT SUM(amount) AS amount
                FROM stake."STAKE_evt_Mint"
            ) AS transfers
        ) AS circulating
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT SUM(value)/1e18 AS bridge_balance
            FROM (
                SELECT value
                FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
                WHERE (
                    "to" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671' AND
                    contract_address = '\x0Ae055097C6d159879521C384F1D2123D1f195e6'
                )
            UNION ALL
                SELECT -value AS value
                FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
                WHERE (
                    "from" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671' AND
                    contract_address = '\x0Ae055097C6d159879521C384F1D2123D1f195e6'
                )
            ) AS data
        ) AS bridge ON 1=1
    ) AS supply on 1=1
    ```

### % STAKE of total supply swapped per day on xDai - [ STAKE-GNO merge ]

    ```sql
    SELECT time, swapped/total_supply AS percentage
    ```

### % of GNO converted to mGNO but not deposited - [ GBC Deposits ]

**Query ID:** 295338 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT 100 - total_deposited/total_supply*100 AS percentage
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(value)/1e18 AS total_deposited
        FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
        WHERE (
            "to" = '\x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9' AND
            contract_address = '\x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68'
        )
    ) AS deposited
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT SUM(value)/1e18 AS total_supply
        FROM (
            SELECT value
            FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE (
                "from" = '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000' AND
                contract_address = '\x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68'
            )
        UNION ALL
            SELECT -value AS value
            FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE (
                "to" = '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000' AND
                contract_address = '\x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68'
            )
        ) AS values
    ) AS supply ON 1=1
    ```

### 10 largest tips paid - [ EIP-1559 ]

**Query ID:** 239382 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT (("gas_used" * "priority_fee_per_gas") / 10^18) AS tip,
           "max_priority_fee_per_gas"/(10^9) AS max_tip,
           "priority_fee_per_gas"/(10^9) AS tip,
           "block_time",
           CONCAT('0x', ENCODE("hash", 'hex')) AS txhash
    FROM xdai."transactions"
    WHERE "block_number" >= 19040000
    AND "priority_fee_per_gas" IS NOT NULL
    AND "success" = 'true'
    ORDER BY 1 DESC
    LIMIT 10
    ```

### 200M TX Age

**Query ID:** 3551980 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH 
        final AS (
    SELECT 
            blockchain
            ,COUNT(week) OVER (PARTITION BY blockchain ORDER BY week) AS week_age
            ,SUM(cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY blockchain ORDER BY week) AS txs
    FROM (
            SELECT 
                blockchain
                ,DATE_TRUNC('month',block_time) AS week  
                ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
            FROM evms.transactions
            WHERE 
                 blockchain != 'goerli'
            --    success = TRUE
            GROUP BY 
                1, 2
        )
        )
        
    SELECT
    blockchain 
    ,MIN(week_age) AS age
    FROM final
    WHERE
    txs >= 200e6
    GROUP BY 1
    ```

### 3 Month Daily Transactions by Projects

**Query ID:** 2428835 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
        projects AS (SELECT * FROM query_2418768),
        transactions AS (SELECT * FROM query_2428358),
        main_projects_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, name AS project
            FROM transactions txs
            LEFT JOIN projects ON txs."to" = projects.address
        ),
        chainlink_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, 'Chainlink' AS project
            FROM transactions
            WHERE "from" IN (
                0x577b17c9A02B7A360e0cf945D623D6C1ace6074c,
                0x582067f4b986775EAF8949Cc6370B8b75B836572,
                0xCd906f0467eFaB9f0A59DF479e873B4A5320D1Be,
                0x4562845F37813A201b9DDB52E57A902659b7AE6A,
                0x049Bd8C3adC3fE7d3Fc2a44541d955A537c2A484,
                0x2607E6F021922A5483D64935F87e15EA797FE8d4,
                0x6D04B8dB14B5a891f9aA1e32C093584815291551,
                0xFc7C442154C04C31203e2b94B96fd57C44ac003D,
                0x12d61a95CF55e18D267C2F1AA67d8e42ae1368f8,
                0x56CD9228cD980e8aE3afdF8dfFA7a2E87e8360d9,
                0x6f4AaDBB17789B4F5E9E97D456DC4e01b117Ccb3
            )
        ),
        eoa_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, 'EOA' AS project
            FROM transactions
            WHERE data IS NULL
        ),
        amb_bridge_txs AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash AS hash, evt_block_time AS block_time, 'AMB Bridge' AS project
            FROM (
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_UserRequestForSignature
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForUserRequest
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForAffirmation
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_UserRequestForSignature
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForUserRequest
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForAffirmation
            ) AS amb_txs
            WHERE evt_block_time > now() - INTERVAL '30' day
        ),
        inscription_txs AS (
            SELECT tx_hash AS hash, block_time, 'Inscriptions' AS project
            FROM inscription.mints m
            WHERE blockchain in ('gnosis')
        )
    
    SELECT
        date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day,
        project,
        COUNT(hash) AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT block_time, hash, MAX(project) AS project
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM main_projects_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM chainlink_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM eoa_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM amb_bridge_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM inscription_txs
        ) AS txs
        WHERE block_time > now() - INTERVAL '90' day
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ) AS txs2
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ORDER BY 3 ASC;
    ```

    ```sql
      COUNT(hash) AS total
    ```

### Aave Borrow: 1-Hop Flow

**Query ID:** 5132494 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    monthly_borrow_1hop AS (
        SELECT
            month
            ,CASE -- clean-up labels
                WHEN hop1_name LIKE 'aGno%' THEN 'Aave'
                WHEN hop1_name = 'aToken' THEN 'Aave'
                WHEN hop1_name = 'spToken' THEN 'Spark'
                WHEN hop1_name LIKE 'armm%' THEN 'realT'
                WHEN hop1_name LIKE 'ag%' THEN 'AugFi'
                WHEN hop1_name LIKE '%CRV%' THEN 'Curve'
                WHEN hop1_name LIKE 'Uniswap%' THEN 'Uniswap'
                WHEN hop1_name LIKE '%SBCDepositContract' THEN 'BeaconDeposit'
                WHEN hop1_name LIKE '%SafeL2_v1_3_0' THEN 'safe'
                WHEN hop1_name LIKE 'Contango_v2%' THEN 'Contango'
                WHEN hop1_name LIKE 'Balancer%' THEN 'Balancer'
                WHEN hop1_name = 'HOP Bridge' 
                    OR hop1_name = 'Omnibridge' 
                    OR hop1_name = 'Socket' 
                    OR hop1_name = 'Connext_amarok: ConnextDiamond' 
                    THEN 'BridgedOut'
                
                ELSE hop1_name
            END AS hop1_name
            ,borrow_amount_usd
            ,hop_amount_usd
            ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY hop_amount_usd DESC) AS rank
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                DATE_TRUNC('month',borrow_time) AS month
                ,hop1_name
                ,SUM(borrow_amount_usd) AS borrow_amount_usd
                ,SUM(IF(borrow_amount - hop1_amount<0, borrow_amount_usd, hop1_amount_usd)) AS hop_amount_usd
            FROM query_5131984 -- gnosis_aave_borrows_1hop_v
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        )
    )
    
    SELECT 
        month
        ,IF(rank<=10, hop1_name, 'Others') AS name
        ,SUM(hop_amount_usd) AS amount_usd
    FROM monthly_borrow_1hop
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        month
        ,'Total: Borrow' AS name
        ,SUM(borrow_amount_usd) AS amount_usd
    FROM monthly_borrow_1hop
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        month
        ,'Total: 1-Hop Flow' AS name
        ,SUM(hop_amount_usd) AS amount_usd
    FROM monthly_borrow_1hop
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### Active Accounts (Stables)

**Query ID:** 3113897 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH 
        NormalizedTransactions AS (
            -- Normalize value to USD or a consistent unit, assuming 1 unit for simplicity here
            SELECT "from", "to", "value" * 1 AS normalized_value, CAST("to" AS VARCHAR(255)) as token_address
            FROM gnosis.transactions
            WHERE 
                "to" IN (
                    0xDDAfbb505ad214D7b80b1f830fcCc89B60fb7A83, -- USDC
                    0x4ecaba5870353805a9f068101a40e0f32ed605c6, -- USDT
                    0xe91D153E0b41518A2Ce8Dd3D7944Fa863463a97d, -- WXDAI
                    0xaf204776c7245bF4147c2612BF6e5972Ee483701, -- sDAI
                    0xcB444e90D8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12FC56E  -- EURe
                )
            UNION ALL
            -- Assuming native transactions have data = '0x'
            SELECT "from", "to", "value" * 1 AS normalized_value, CAST('native' AS VARCHAR(255)) as token_address
            FROM gnosis.transactions
            WHERE
                data = 0x
        ),
        FilteredTransactions AS (
            -- Filter transactions by normalized value
            SELECT *
            FROM NormalizedTransactions
            --WHERE normalized_value > 0.1 -- needs to be done via ERC20 table
        )
    SELECT
        token_address,
        COUNT(DISTINCT "from") as "active_addresses"
    FROM
        FilteredTransactions
    GROUP BY
        token_address;
    ```

### Active Accounts in Past 24h

**Query ID:** 2420122 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "from") AS total
    FROM gnosis.transactions 
    WHERE block_time > (NOW() - interval '1' day)
    ```

### Active Accounts per Hour (24hr Moving Average)

**Query ID:** 2420133 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT date_trunc('hour', block_time) AS hour,
    AVG(COUNT(DISTINCT "from")) OVER(ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', block_time) ROWS BETWEEN 23 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as moving_average,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "from") AS totcal
    FROM gnosis.transactions 
    WHERE block_time > now() - INTERVAL '20' day
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY 1 DESC;
    ```

### Active Users

**Query ID:** 4899404 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT 
        block_date
        ,SUM(annual_rolling_fees_total) AS annual_rolling_fees_total
        ,SUM(users_cnt) AS "Active Users"
        ,125000 AS "First Milestone"
        ,250000 AS "Second Milestone"
        ,500000 AS "Third Milestone"
        ,1000000 AS "Fourth Milestone"
    FROM query_4899387--gnosis_rev_total_revenue_by_cohorts_v
    WHERE cohort IN ('6-10', '10-100', '>=100') AND users_cnt>0
    GROUP BY 1
    ```

### Active Users

**Query ID:** 3510997 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH 
    hourly_addresses AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('hour', block_time) AS hour,
            "from"
        FROM gnosis.transactions
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    first_appearance AS (
        SELECT
            "from",
            MIN(hour) AS first_hour
        FROM hourly_addresses
        GROUP BY "from"
    ), 
    
    hourly_returning_addresses AS (
        SELECT
            w.hour,
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN w.hour > f.first_hour THEN w."from" END) AS returning_addresses
        FROM 
            hourly_addresses w
        JOIN first_appearance f 
            ON w."from" = f."from"
        GROUP BY w.hour
    ), 
    
    
    total_addresses_per_hour AS (
        SELECT
            hour,
            COUNT(DISTINCT "from") AS total_addresses
        FROM hourly_addresses
        GROUP BY hour
    ),
    
    
    daily_returning_addresses AS (
        SELECT
             DATE_TRUNC('day', w.hour) As day,
             MAX(w.hour) AS hour,
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DATE_TRUNC('day', w.hour) > DATE_TRUNC('day',f.first_hour)  THEN w."from" END) AS returning_addresses
        FROM 
            hourly_addresses w
        JOIN first_appearance f 
            ON w."from" = f."from"
        GROUP BY 1
    ), 
    
    total_addresses_per_day AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', hour) As day,
            MAX(hour) AS hour,
            COUNT(DISTINCT "from") AS total_addresses
        FROM hourly_addresses
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    users_hourly AS (
    SELECT
        t.hour AS hour,
        COALESCE(w.returning_addresses, 0) AS returning,
        t.total_addresses - COALESCE(w.returning_addresses, 0) AS new
    FROM total_addresses_per_hour t
    LEFT JOIN hourly_returning_addresses w 
        ON t.hour = w.hour
    WHERE
        t.hour > NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR
    ),
    
    users_daily AS (
    SELECT
        t.day,
        t.hour AS hour,
        COALESCE(w.returning_addresses, 0) AS returning,
        t.total_addresses - COALESCE(w.returning_addresses, 0) AS new
    FROM total_addresses_per_day t
    LEFT JOIN daily_returning_addresses w 
        ON t.day = w.day
    WHERE
        t.day > NOW() - INTERVAL '3' YEAR
    )
    
    SELECT
        day,
        NULL AS hour,
        returning,
        new
    FROM
        users_daily 
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        NULL AS day,
        hour,
        returning,
        new
    FROM
        users_hourly 
    ORDER BY 1 DESC
    ```

### Active Validators

**Query ID:** 4165026 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    inout AS (
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,SUM(amount) AS amount
    FROM (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,IF(contract_address = 0x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68, amount/32,amount) AS amount
        FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers
        WHERE
            token_standard = 'erc20'
            AND
            to = 0x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9
            AND
            (
                contract_address = 0x9C58BAcC331c9aa871AFD802DB6379a98e80CEdb --GNO
                OR
                contract_address = 0x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68 --mGNO
            )
            AND
            block_month >= DATE '2021-12-01'
            
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,IF(contract_address = 0x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68, -amount/32,-amount) AS amount
        FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers
        WHERE
            token_standard = 'erc20'
            AND
            "from" = 0x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9
            AND
             (
                contract_address = 0x9C58BAcC331c9aa871AFD802DB6379a98e80CEdb --GNO
                OR
                contract_address = 0x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68 --mGNO
            )
            AND
            block_month >= DATE '2021-12-01'
    )
    GROUP BY 1
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(block_date) AS VARCHAR),' - Q', CAST(QUARTER(block_date) AS VARCHAR)) AS block_date
        ,ARRAY_AGG(amount ORDER BY block_date DESC)[1] AS amount
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,CAST(SUM(amount) OVER(ORDER BY block_date) AS INT) AS amount
        FROM
            inout
    )
    WHERE
        block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1' YEAR
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY 1 DESC
    ```

    ```sql
        FROM

                OR

            )

        SELECT

            ,IF(contract_address = 0x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68, -amount/32,-amount) AS amount
        FROM

    FROM

    ORDER BY 1
    ```
