### Active Wallets

**Query ID:** 3680579 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_gw_signupPerson AS (
        SELECT * FROM dune.hdser.query_3663810
        WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-05-01'
    ),
    
    minmax_dates AS (
        SELECT
            CAST(MIN(DATE_TRUNC('month',created_at)) AS DATE) AS start_day
            ,CURRENT_DATE AS end_day
        FROM 
            gnosis_gw_signupPerson
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            day
        FROM
            minmax_dates t1
            ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(t1.start_day, t1.end_day)) AS s(day)
    ),
    
    
    user_transactions AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_time
            ,t1.to AS safe_wallet
        FROM
            gnosis.transactions t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_gw_signupPerson t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1.to
       WHERE
            t1.block_time >= t2.created_at
    ),
    
    daily_user_transactions AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS day
            ,COUNT(DISTINCT safe_wallet) AS daily_cnt
        FROM
            user_transactions
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    weekly_user_transactions AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS week
            ,COUNT(DISTINCT safe_wallet) AS weekly_cnt
        FROM
            user_transactions
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    monthly_user_transactions AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('month', block_time) AS month
            ,COUNT(DISTINCT safe_wallet) AS monthly_cnt
        FROM
            user_transactions
        GROUP BY 1
    )
    
    
    SELECT
         t1.day
        ,COALESCE(t2.daily_cnt,0) AS daily
        ,t3.weekly_cnt AS weekly
        ,t4.monthly_cnt AS monthly
    FROM calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        daily_user_transactions t2
        ON
        t2.day = t1.day
    LEFT JOIN
        weekly_user_transactions t3
        ON
        t3.week = t1.day
    LEFT JOIN
        monthly_user_transactions t4
        ON
        t4.month = t1.day
    ```

### Active accounts by projects last 24hrs

**Query ID:** 2428865 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    projects AS (
        -- there are multiple names for the same address, keep one per address
        SELECT 
            address
            ,ARRAY_AGG(name ORDER BY name)[1] AS name 
        FROM query_2418768
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    transactions AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_2428358 
    ),
    
    amb_bridge_txs AS (
        SELECT evt_tx_hash AS hash, 'AMB Bridge' AS project
        FROM (
            SELECT evt_block_time, sender, evt_tx_hash
            FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_AffirmationCompleted
            WHERE evt_block_time > now() - INTERVAL '1' day
        UNION ALL
            SELECT evt_block_time, sender, evt_tx_hash
            FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_AffirmationCompleted
            WHERE evt_block_time > now() - INTERVAL '1' day
        ) AS amb_txs
        
    ),
    inscription_txs AS (
        SELECT tx_hash AS hash, 'Inscriptions' AS project
        FROM inscription.mints m
        WHERE blockchain in ('gnosis')
        AND block_time > now() - INTERVAL '1' day
    ),
    
    projects_txs AS (
        SELECT 
            t1."from" AS user
            ,t1.hash
            ,t1.block_time
            ,CASE
                WHEN t1."to" = t2.address THEN t2.name
                WHEN t2.address IS NULL THEN 
                    CASE
                        WHEN t1.data IS NULL THEN 'EOA'
                        ELSE COALESCE(t3.project,t4.project,'Others')
                    END  
            END AS project
        FROM transactions t1
        LEFT JOIN projects t2
            ON t2.address = t1."to"
        LEFT JOIN amb_bridge_txs t3
            ON t3.hash = t1.hash
        LEFT JOIN inscription_txs t4
            ON t4.hash = t1.hash
        WHERE 
            t1."to" IS NOT NULL -- remove contract creation
    )
    
    
    
    --SELECT SUM(cnt) FROM (
    SELECT 
        project
        ,COUNT(DISTINCT user) AS cnt
    FROM 
        projects_txs
    GROUP BY 1
    --)
    ```

            FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_AffirmationCompleted
            WHERE evt_block_time > now() - INTERVAL '30' day
        ) AS amb_txs
        
    ),
    inscription_txs AS (
        SELECT tx_hash AS hash, 'Inscriptions' AS project
        FROM inscription.mints m
        WHERE blockchain in ('gnosis')
        AND block_time > now() - INTERVAL '30' day
    ),
    
    projects_txs AS (
        SELECT 
            t1."from" AS user
            ,t1.hash
            ,t1.block_time
            ,CASE
                WHEN t1."to" = t2.address THEN t2.name
                WHEN t2.address IS NULL THEN 
                    CASE
                        WHEN t1.data IS NULL THEN 'EOA'
                        ELSE COALESCE(t3.project,t4.project,'Others')
                    END  
            END AS project
        FROM transactions t1
        LEFT JOIN projects t2
            ON t2.address = t1."to"
        LEFT JOIN amb_bridge_txs t3
            ON t3.hash = t1.hash
        LEFT JOIN inscription_txs t4
            ON t4.hash = t1.hash

### Active accounts by projects per day

**Query ID:** 2428864 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
        projects AS (SELECT * FROM query_2418768),
        transactions AS (SELECT * FROM query_2428358),
        main_projects_txs AS (
            SELECT "from" as user, hash, block_time, name AS project
            FROM transactions txs
            LEFT JOIN projects ON txs."to" = projects.address
        ),
        chainlink_txs AS (
            SELECT "from" as user, hash, block_time, 'Chainlink' AS project
            FROM transactions
            WHERE "from" IN (
                0x577b17c9A02B7A360e0cf945D623D6C1ace6074c,
                0x582067f4b986775EAF8949Cc6370B8b75B836572,
                0xCd906f0467eFaB9f0A59DF479e873B4A5320D1Be,
                0x4562845F37813A201b9DDB52E57A902659b7AE6A,
                0x049Bd8C3adC3fE7d3Fc2a44541d955A537c2A484,
                0x2607E6F021922A5483D64935F87e15EA797FE8d4,
                0x6D04B8dB14B5a891f9aA1e32C093584815291551,
                0xFc7C442154C04C31203e2b94B96fd57C44ac003D,
                0x12d61a95CF55e18D267C2F1AA67d8e42ae1368f8,
                0x56CD9228cD980e8aE3afdF8dfFA7a2E87e8360d9,
                0x6f4AaDBB17789B4F5E9E97D456DC4e01b117Ccb3
            )
        ),
        eoa_txs AS (
            SELECT "from" as user, hash, block_time, 'EOA' AS project
            FROM transactions
            WHERE data IS NULL
        ),
        amb_bridge_txs AS (
            SELECT sender as user, evt_tx_hash AS hash, evt_block_time AS block_time, 'AMB Bridge' AS project
            FROM (
                SELECT evt_block_time, sender, evt_tx_hash
                FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_AffirmationCompleted
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, sender, evt_tx_hash
                FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_AffirmationCompleted
            ) AS amb_txs
            WHERE evt_block_time > now() - INTERVAL '30' day
        ),
        inscription_txs AS (
            SELECT tx_from AS user, tx_hash AS hash, block_time, 'Inscriptions' AS project
            FROM inscription.mints m
            WHERE blockchain in ('gnosis')
            AND block_time > now() - INTERVAL '30' day
        )
    
    SELECT
        date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day,
        project,
        COUNT(DISTINCT "user") AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT block_time, hash, "user", MAX(project) AS project
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM main_projects_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM chainlink_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM eoa_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM amb_bridge_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM inscription_txs
        ) AS txs
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ) AS txs2
    GROUP BY 1, 2;
    ```

            ('Momint', '\x168376c2996FfE15e2EF1FE053E796a3B73CBEAd'),
            ('HoprBoost NFT', '\x43d13D7B83607F14335cF2cB75E87dA369D056c7'),
            ('xDaiPunks', '\x9f0B5B31e7FBDe3D9B1aF4e482Ef262b4ae9Ed90'),
            ('xDaiPunks', '\x4b1208Cb7BCaD7b5181c557F1295Fc3c722fa878'),
            ('xDai Tigers', '\x22570d137e36099700A9c80E5DDDd4a0d353f6c2')
    ) 
    SELECT * INTO temporary table projects FROM vals;
    
    WITH
        main_projects_txs AS (
            SELECT evt_block_time, "user", name AS project
            FROM (
                SELECT evt_block_time, contract_address, "from" AS user
                FROM erc721."ERC721_evt_Transfer"
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, contract_address, "to" AS user
                FROM erc721."ERC721_evt_Transfer"
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, contract_address, "from" AS user
                FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferBatch"
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, contract_address, "to" AS user
                FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferBatch"
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, contract_address, "from" AS user
                FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferSingle"
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, contract_address, "to" AS user
                FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferSingle"
            ) AS tr
            LEFT JOIN projects ON tr.contract_address = projects.address
        )
        
    SELECT
        date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day,
        COALESCE(project, 'Others') AS project,
        COUNT(DISTINCT "user") AS total
    FROM main_projects_txs
    WHERE DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 90
    GROUP BY 1, 2;
    ```

            ('UniqueBubbles', '\xf4993427b3b5c314005a152a6dd2978da2468ffe'),
            ('HashAvatars', '\x022E2426227E510123aABaFf4108Ddb6f59c2f8a'),
            ('HashAvatars', '\x3086f887Ed3c682fe3282BDB0305Fa9aF8a363dc'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x56510d0AF4dE9Ba2b5a78e195EAa366683feBBA1'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x8064ede05622F302C41C8653A06Cc9C0a413b03d'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x30470b1062b44FFC4Fe308716CD1B9E39f37d1E9'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x693c05A83Ea3e1ae81ce3a831A2Df82A0e7681aE'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x40E16b47ecE11B182c5bd597b3a66d815b4cB8ee'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x2a254f0179786a43c9b449CBe6aA2Dce77e1561D'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x712A8A2C730249ebA85eBd7ef5D011754533e1e1'),
            ('POLKADOGE', '\xe2F706679eEA413cC551c7c75353E5b632756DCB'),
            ('Genuino', '\x33fE0277e483445174F31575d5C0E58Ef124BE2e'),
            ('HoneyFarm', '\xB44825cF0d8D4dD552f2434056c41582415AaAa1'),
            ('Momint', '\x168376c2996FfE15e2EF1FE053E796a3B73CBEAd'),
            ('HoprBoost NFT', '\x43d13D7B83607F14335cF2cB75E87dA369D056c7'),
            ('xDaiPunks', '\x9f0B5B31e7FBDe3D9B1aF4e482Ef262b4ae9Ed90'),
            ('xDaiPunks', '\x4b1208Cb7BCaD7b5181c557F1295Fc3c722fa878'),
            ('xDai Tigers', '\x22570d137e36099700A9c80E5DDDd4a0d353f6c2')
    ) 
    SELECT * INTO temporary table projects FROM vals;
    
    SELECT
        CONCAT('0x', ENCODE(contract_address, 'hex')) AS token,
        name,
        users
    FROM (
        SELECT
            contract_address,
            COUNT(DISTINCT user_address) AS users
        FROM (
            SELECT contract_address, evt_block_time, "from" AS user_address
            FROM erc721."ERC721_evt_Transfer"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT contract_address, evt_block_time, "to" AS user_address
            FROM erc721."ERC721_evt_Transfer"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT contract_address, evt_block_time, "from" AS user_address
            FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferBatch"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT contract_address, evt_block_time, "to" AS user_address
            FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferBatch"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT contract_address, evt_block_time, "from" AS user_address
            FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferSingle"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT contract_address, evt_block_time, "to" AS user_address
            FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferSingle"
        ) AS txs
        WHERE DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 7
        GROUP BY 1
    ) AS transf
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT * FROM projects
    ) AS proj ON transf.contract_address = proj.address
    ORDER BY users DESC;
    ```

### Agent Actions History

**Query ID:** 4800089 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent_traders` (enum): `PredictionProphetGPT4`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_reserves_trades AS (
          SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.trades
    ),
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3668567
    ),
    
    trades AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.block_time) AS block_day
            ,t1.action
            ,COUNT(*) AS n_trades
            ,SUM(t1.amount/POWER(10,t4.decimals)*t4.price) AS amount_usd
        FROM
            gnosis_reserves_trades t1
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders AS t2
            ON 
            t2.address = t1.address
        INNER JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets t3
            ON t3.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        LEFT JOIN
            prices.usd t4
            ON t4.contract_address = t3.collateraltoken
            AND t4.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND t4.minute = DATE_TRUNC('minute',t1.block_time)
        WHERE
            t2.label = '{{agent_traders}}'
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            action
            ,block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT
                action 
                ,MIN(block_day) AS min_block_day
            FROM
                trades
            GROUP BY 1
        )
        ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_day AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.block_day
        ,t1.action
        ,COALESCE(t2.n_trades,0) AS n_trades
        ,COALESCE(t2.amount_usd,0) AS amount_usd
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.n_trades,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.action ORDER BY t1.block_day) AS n_trades_cumsum
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.amount_usd,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.action ORDER BY t1.block_day) AS amount_usd_cumsum
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        trades t2
        ON t2.block_day = t1.block_day
        AND t2.action = t1.action
    ```

### Agent Balance & PnL

**Query ID:** 3816937 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent_traders` (enum): `PredictionProphetGPT4`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994
        WHERE label = '{{agent_traders}}'
    ),
    
    gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse AS (
        SELECT
            t1.fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,t1.collateralToken
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour',t1.evt_block_time) AS date_time
            ,ARRAY_AGG(t1.outcomeTokens ORDER BY t1.evt_block_time, t1.evt_index DESC)[1] AS outcomeTokens
        FROM
            query_3684914 t1
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders t2
            ON
            t2.address = t1.user
        GROUP BY 
            1,2,3
    ),
    
    relevant_markets AS (
        SELECT 
            fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,collateralToken
            ,CAST(MIN(date_time) AS TIMESTAMP) AS date_time_min
            ,CAST(MAX(date_time) AS TIMESTAMP) AS date_time_max
        FROM gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    colateral_invested AS (
        SELECT
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,collateralToken
            ,date_time
            ,SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY fixedproductmarketmaker ORDER BY date_time) AS amount
            ,LEAD(date_time) OVER (PARTITION BY fixedproductmarketmaker ORDER BY date_time) AS date_time_lead
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t2.fixedproductmarketmaker
                ,t2.collateralToken
                ,DATE_TRUNC('hour',t1.block_time) AS date_time
                ,SUM(
                    CASE 
                        WHEN t1."from" = t2.fixedproductmarketmaker THEN CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)
                        ELSE -CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)
                    END
                ) AS amount
            FROM
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                relevant_markets t2
                ON
                t1.contract_address = t2.collateralToken
            CROSS JOIN
                ai_agents_traders t3
            WHERE
                 t1.block_time >= t2.date_time_min
                 AND
                 t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
                AND
                (
                    (
                        t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1."from"
                        AND
                        t3.address = t1.to
                    )
                    OR 
                    (
                        t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.to
                        AND
                        t3.address = t1."from"
                    )
                )
            GROUP BY
                1, 2, 3
        ) 
    ),
    
    gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse_lead AS (
        SELECT
            fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,collateralToken
            ,date_time
            ,outcomeTokens
            ,LEAD(date_time) OVER (PARTITION BY fixedProductMarketMaker ORDER BY date_time) AS date_time_lead
        FROM
            gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets_odds_reserves AS (
        SELECT 
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour', block_time) AS date_time 
            ,ARRAY_AGG(odds ORDER BY block_time DESC)[1] AS odds 
        FROM
            query_3668140 
        INNER JOIN
            relevant_markets
            USING(fixedproductmarketmaker)
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets_odds_reserves_lead AS (
        SELECT 
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,date_time 
            ,odds 
            ,LEAD(date_time) OVER (PARTITION BY fixedproductmarketmaker ORDER BY date_time) AS date_time_lead
        FROM
            omen_gnosis_markets_odds_reserves 
    ),
    
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,date_time
        FROM
            relevant_markets 
            ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(date_time_min,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP), INTERVAL '1' HOUR)) a(date_time)
    ),
    
    odds_and_balance AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,t3.collateralToken
            ,t1.date_time
            ,t2.odds
            ,t3.outcomeTokens
            ,ARRAY_MAX(t3.outcomeTokens) AS max_payout 
            ,ARRAY_MIN(t3.outcomeTokens) AS min_payout 
            ,REDUCE(
                ZIP_WITH(t2.odds,t3.outcomeTokens, (x,s) -> x*s)
                ,0
                ,(s, x) -> s + x, s -> s
            ) AS realizable
            ,t4.amount AS invested
        FROM
            calendar t1
        LEFT JOIN 
            omen_gnosis_markets_odds_reserves_lead t2 
            ON
            t2.fixedProductMarketMaker = t1.fixedProductMarketMaker
        LEFT JOIN
            gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse_lead t3
            ON
            t3.fixedProductMarketMaker = t1.fixedProductMarketMaker
        LEFT JOIN
            colateral_invested t4
            ON
            t4.fixedProductMarketMaker = t1.fixedProductMarketMaker
        WHERE
            t1.date_time >= t2.date_time AND (t1.date_time < t2.date_time_lead OR t2.date_time_lead IS NULL) 
            AND
            t1.date_time >= t3.date_time AND (t1.date_time < t3.date_time_lead OR t3.date_time_lead IS NULL) 
            AND
            t1.date_time >= t4.date_time AND (t1.date_time < t4.date_time_lead OR t4.date_time_lead IS NULL)
            AND
            ARRAY_MAX(t3.outcomeTokens) > 0
    ),
    
    
    ai_agents_tokens_balance AS (
        SELECT
            date_time
            ,balance_usd
            ,LEAD(date_time) OVER (ORDER BY date_time) AS date_time_lead
        FROM (
            SELECT
            date_time
            ,(SUM(balance_diff) OVER (ORDER BY date_time)) AS balance_usd
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_hour AS date_time
                ,SUM(t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,decimals)*price) AS balance_diff
            FROM 
                query_3817332 t1 --gnosis_omen_ai_agents_balance_diff_hourly_sparse_v
            INNER JOIN
                ai_agents_traders 
                USING (address)
            LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd t2
                ON t2.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t2.minute = t1.block_hour
                AND
                (
                    t2.contract_address = t1.token_address
                    OR 
                    (
                        t2.contract_address = 0xe91D153E0b41518A2Ce8Dd3D7944Fa863463a97d 
                        AND 
                        t1.token_standard = 'native'
                    )
                )
            GROUP BY 1
            ) 
        ) t1
    ),
    
    
    PayoutRedemption AS (
        SELECT
            t1.date_time
            ,SUM(t1.payout/POWER(10,t2.decimals)*t2.price) AS payout_usd
        FROM (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('hour', t1.evt_block_time) AS date_time
            ,t1.collateralToken
            ,SUM(t1.payout) AS payout
        FROM
            omen_gnosis.ConditionalTokens_evt_PayoutRedemption t1
         INNER JOIN
                ai_agents_traders t2
                ON
                t2.address = t1.redeemer
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
        ) t1
        LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd t2
                ON t2.contract_address = t1.collateralToken
                AND t2.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t2.minute = t1.date_time
        GROUP BY
            1
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.date_time
            ,t2.balance_usd AS "Balance"
            ,COALESCE(t4.payout_usd,0) AS "Payout"
            ,SUM((t1.max_payout + t1.invested)/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price) AS "Max Profit"
            ,SUM((t1.min_payout + t1.invested)/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price) AS "Min Profit"
            ,SUM(COALESCE((t1.realizable ),0)/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price) AS "Realizable"
            ,SUM((t1.invested)/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price) AS "Investment"
            ,SUM((t1.max_payout)/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price) AS "Max Payout"
            ,SUM((t1.min_payout)/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price) AS "Min Payout"
        FROM odds_and_balance t1
        LEFT JOIN
            ai_agents_tokens_balance t2
            ON TRUE
         LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd t3
                ON t3.contract_address = t1.collateralToken
                AND t3.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t3.minute = t1.date_time
        LEFT JOIN
            PayoutRedemption t4
            ON
            t4.date_time = t1.date_time
        WHERE
            t1.date_time >= t2.date_time AND (t1.date_time < t2.date_time_lead OR t2.date_time_lead IS NULL) 
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    calendar_time AS (
        SELECT 
            date_time
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                MIN(date_time) AS min_date_time
                ,MAX(date_time) AS max_date_time
            FROM
                final
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(min_date_time, max_date_time, INTERVAL '1' HOUR)) s(date_time)
    )
    
    SELECT
        date_time
        ,"Balance"
        ,"Payout"
        ,"Max Profit"
        ,"Min Profit"
        ,"Realizable"
        ,"Investment"
        ,"Max Payout"
        ,"Min Payout"
        ,"Balance" + "Realizable" AS "Realizable Balance"
        ,"Balance" + "Max Payout" AS "Max Balance"
        ,"Balance" + "Min Payout" AS "Min Balance"
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            t2.date_time
            ,LAST_VALUE("Balance") IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY t2.date_time) AS "Balance"
            ,COALESCE("Payout",0) AS "Payout"
            ,LAST_VALUE("Max Profit") IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY t2.date_time) AS "Max Profit"
            ,LAST_VALUE("Min Profit") IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY t2.date_time) AS "Min Profit"
            ,LAST_VALUE("Realizable") IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY t2.date_time) AS "Realizable"
            ,LAST_VALUE("Investment") IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY t2.date_time) AS "Investment"
            ,LAST_VALUE("Max Payout") IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY t2.date_time) AS "Max Payout"
            ,LAST_VALUE("Min Payout") IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY t2.date_time) AS "Min Payout"
        FROM final t1
        RIGHT JOIN
            calendar_time t2
            ON 
            t2.date_time = t1.date_time
    )
    ```

### Agent Balance & PnL (Daily)

**Query ID:** 3941596 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent_traders` (enum): `PredictionProphetGPT4`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994
        WHERE label = '{{agent_traders}}'
    ),
    
    gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse AS (
        SELECT
            t1.fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,t1.collateralToken
            ,DATE_TRUNC('day',t1.evt_block_time) AS date_time
            ,ARRAY_AGG(t1.outcomeTokens ORDER BY t1.evt_block_time DESC)[1] AS outcomeTokens
        FROM
            query_3684914 t1
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders t2
            ON
            t2.address = t1.user
        GROUP BY 
            1,2,3
    ),
    
    relevant_markets AS (
        SELECT 
            fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,collateralToken
            ,CAST(MIN(date_time) AS TIMESTAMP) AS date_time_min
            ,CAST(MAX(date_time) AS TIMESTAMP) AS date_time_max
        FROM gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    colateral_invested AS (
        SELECT
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,collateralToken
            ,date_time
            ,SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY fixedproductmarketmaker ORDER BY date_time) AS amount
            ,LEAD(date_time) OVER (PARTITION BY fixedproductmarketmaker ORDER BY date_time) AS date_time_lead
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t2.fixedproductmarketmaker
                ,t2.collateralToken
                ,DATE_TRUNC('day',t1.block_time) AS date_time
                ,SUM(
                    CASE 
                        WHEN t1."from" = t2.fixedproductmarketmaker THEN CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)
                        ELSE -CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)
                    END
                ) AS amount
            FROM
                --query_3935887 t1 --tokens_gnosis_transfers_bare_v ASSUMPTION: not validator, no suicide
                test_schema.git_dunesql_8b40f15_tokens_gnosis_transfers t1
               -- tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                relevant_markets t2
                ON
                t1.contract_address = t2.collateralToken
            CROSS JOIN
                ai_agents_traders t3
            WHERE
                 t1.block_time >= t2.date_time_min
                 AND
                 t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
                AND
                (
                    (
                        t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1."from"
                        AND
                        t3.address = t1.to
                    )
                    OR 
                    (
                        t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.to
                        AND
                        t3.address = t1."from"
                    )
                )
            GROUP BY
                1, 2, 3
        ) 
    ),
    
    gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse_lead AS (
        SELECT
            fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,collateralToken
            ,date_time
            ,outcomeTokens
            ,LEAD(date_time) OVER (PARTITION BY fixedProductMarketMaker ORDER BY date_time) AS date_time_lead
        FROM
            gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets_odds_reserves AS (
        SELECT 
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS date_time 
            ,ARRAY_AGG(odds ORDER BY block_time DESC)[1] AS odds 
        FROM
            query_3668140 
        INNER JOIN
            relevant_markets
            USING(fixedproductmarketmaker)
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets_odds_reserves_lead AS (
        SELECT 
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,date_time 
            ,odds 
            ,LEAD(date_time) OVER (PARTITION BY fixedproductmarketmaker ORDER BY date_time) AS date_time_lead
        FROM
            omen_gnosis_markets_odds_reserves 
    ),
    
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,date_time
        FROM
            relevant_markets 
            ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(date_time_min,date_time_max, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) a(date_time)
    ),
    
    odds_and_balance AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,t3.collateralToken
            ,t1.date_time
            ,t2.odds
            ,t3.outcomeTokens
            ,ARRAY_MAX(t3.outcomeTokens) AS max_payout 
            ,ARRAY_MIN(t3.outcomeTokens) AS min_payout 
            ,REDUCE(
                ZIP_WITH(t2.odds,t3.outcomeTokens, (x,s) -> x*s)
                ,0
                ,(s, x) -> s + x, s -> s
            ) AS realizable
            ,t4.amount AS invested
        FROM
            calendar t1
        LEFT JOIN 
            omen_gnosis_markets_odds_reserves_lead t2 
            ON
            t2.fixedProductMarketMaker = t1.fixedProductMarketMaker
        LEFT JOIN
            gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse_lead t3
            ON
            t3.fixedProductMarketMaker = t1.fixedProductMarketMaker
        LEFT JOIN
            colateral_invested t4
            ON
            t4.fixedProductMarketMaker = t1.fixedProductMarketMaker
        WHERE
            t1.date_time >= t2.date_time AND (t1.date_time < t2.date_time_lead OR t2.date_time_lead IS NULL) 
            AND
            t1.date_time >= t3.date_time AND (t1.date_time < t3.date_time_lead OR t3.date_time_lead IS NULL) 
            AND
            t1.date_time >= t4.date_time AND (t1.date_time < t4.date_time_lead OR t4.date_time_lead IS NULL)
    ),
    
    
    ai_agents_tokens_balance AS (
        SELECT
            date_time
            --,COALESCE(balance_usd,0) AS balance_usd
            ,balance_usd
            ,LEAD(date_time) OVER (ORDER BY date_time) AS date_time_lead
        FROM (
            SELECT
            date_time
            ,(SUM(balance_diff) OVER (ORDER BY date_time)) AS balance_usd
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_day AS date_time
                ,SUM(t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,decimals)*price) AS balance_diff
            FROM 
                query_3941586 t1 --gnosis_omen_ai_agents_balance_diff_daily_sparse_v
            INNER JOIN
                ai_agents_traders 
                USING (address)
            LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd t2
                ON t2.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t2.minute = t1.block_day
                AND
                (
                    t2.contract_address = t1.token_address
                    OR 
                    (
                        t2.contract_address = 0xe91D153E0b41518A2Ce8Dd3D7944Fa863463a97d 
                        AND 
                        t1.token_standard = 'native'
                    )
                )
            GROUP BY 1
            ) 
        ) t1
    ),
    
    
    PayoutRedemption AS (
        SELECT
            t1.date_time
            ,SUM(t1.payout/POWER(10,t2.decimals)*t2.price) AS payout_usd
        FROM (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.evt_block_time) AS date_time
            ,t1.collateralToken
            ,SUM(t1.payout) AS payout
        FROM
            omen_gnosis.ConditionalTokens_evt_PayoutRedemption t1
         INNER JOIN
                ai_agents_traders t2
                ON
                t2.address = t1.redeemer
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
        ) t1
        LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd t2
                ON t2.contract_address = t1.collateralToken
                AND t2.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t2.minute = t1.date_time
        GROUP BY
            1
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.date_time
            ,t2.balance_usd AS "Balance"
            ,COALESCE(t4.payout_usd,0) AS "Payout"
            ,SUM((t1.max_payout + t1.invested)/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price) AS "Max Profit"
            ,SUM((t1.min_payout + t1.invested)/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price) AS "Min Profit"
            ,SUM(COALESCE((t1.realizable ),0)/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price) AS "Realizable"
            ,SUM((t1.invested)/POWER(10,t3.decimals)*t3.price) AS "Investment"
        FROM odds_and_balance t1
        LEFT JOIN
            ai_agents_tokens_balance t2
            ON TRUE
         LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd t3
                ON t3.contract_address = t1.collateralToken
                AND t3.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t3.minute = t1.date_time
        LEFT JOIN
            PayoutRedemption t4
            ON
            t4.date_time = t1.date_time
        WHERE
            t1.date_time >= t2.date_time AND (t1.date_time < t2.date_time_lead OR t2.date_time_lead IS NULL) 
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    calendar_time AS (
        SELECT 
            date_time
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                MIN(date_time) AS min_date_time
                ,MAX(date_time) AS max_date_time
            FROM
                final
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(min_date_time, max_date_time, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(date_time)
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t2.date_time
        ,LAST_VALUE("Balance") IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY t2.date_time) AS "Balance"
        ,COALESCE("Payout",0) AS "Payout"
        ,LAST_VALUE("Max Profit") IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY t2.date_time) AS "Max Profit"
        ,LAST_VALUE("Min Profit") IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY t2.date_time) AS "Min Profit"
        ,LAST_VALUE("Realizable") IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY t2.date_time) AS "Realizable"
        ,LAST_VALUE("Investment") IGNORE NULLS OVER (ORDER BY t2.date_time) AS "Investment"
    FROM final t1
    RIGHT JOIN
        calendar_time t2
        ON 
        t2.date_time = t1.date_time
    ```

### Agent Liquidity History

**Query ID:** 3584370 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent_maker` (enum): `Replicator`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    omen_gnosis_liquidity AS (
        SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.liquidity
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3668567
    ),
    
    ai_agents_makers AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3584116
    ),
    
    ConditionalTokens_evt_PositionsMerge AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,get_href(get_chain_explorer_tx_hash('gnosis', t1.evt_tx_hash), 'merge') AS action
            ,NULL AS outcome
            ,t1.amount
            , NULL AS outcomeTokens_amount
            ,t2.question
            ,t2.fixedproductmarketmaker
        FROM omen_gnosis.ConditionalTokens_evt_PositionsMerge t1
        INNER JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets t2
            ON t2.conditionId = t1.conditionid
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_makers AS t3
            ON t3.address = t1.evt_tx_from
        WHERE
        t3.label = '{{agent_maker}}'
    ),
    
    ConditionalTokens_evt_PositionSplit AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,get_href(get_chain_explorer_tx_hash('gnosis', t1.evt_tx_hash), 'split') AS action
            ,NULL AS outcome
            ,t1.amount
            , NULL AS outcomeTokens_amount
            ,t2.question
            ,t2.fixedproductmarketmaker
        FROM omen_gnosis.ConditionalTokens_evt_PositionSplit t1
        INNER JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets t2
            ON t2.conditionId = t1.conditionid
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_makers AS t3
            ON t3.address = t1.evt_tx_from OR t3.address = t1.evt_tx_to
        WHERE
        t3.label = '{{agent_maker}}'
    ),
    
    add_remove AS (
    SELECT 
        t1.block_time
        ,get_href(get_chain_explorer_tx_hash('gnosis', t1.tx_hash), t1.action) AS action
        ,t1.outcomeIndex AS outcome
        ,NULL AS amount
        ,t1.outcomeTokens_amount
        ,t3.question
        ,t3.fixedproductmarketmaker
    FROM
        omen_gnosis_liquidity t1
    INNER JOIN
        ai_agents_makers AS t2
        ON t2.address = t1.tx_from OR t2.address = t1.tx_to
    INNER JOIN
        omen_gnosis_markets t3
        ON t3.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
    WHERE
        t2.label = '{{agent_maker}}'
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM add_remove
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT * FROM ConditionalTokens_evt_PositionsMerge
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT * FROM ConditionalTokens_evt_PositionSplit
    ORDER BY
        1
    ```

### Agent Markets Status

**Query ID:** 4011784 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent_maker` (enum): `Replicator`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    ai_agents_makers AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3584116
        WHERE label = '{{agent_maker}}'
    ),
    
    status_list AS (
        SELECT
            status
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY['Closed','Open', 'Under Finalization', 'Finalized', 'Resolved']) s(status)
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        t3.status
        ,COALESCE(t1.cnt,0) AS cnt
    FROM
        query_4011780 t1 --gnosis_omen_markets_status_creators_v
    INNER JOIN
        ai_agents_makers t2
        ON 
        t2.address = t1.creator
    RIGHT JOIN
        status_list t3
        ON
        t3.status = t1.status
    ORDER BY 1
    ```

### Agent Payout

**Query ID:** 5552485 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent` (enum): `coinflip-highest-liquidity-seer`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH agent_results AS (
      SELECT *
      FROM query_5140465
      WHERE label = '{{agent}}'
    ),
    
    daily_payout AS (
      SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS day,
        SUM(Payout)                   AS payout_usd
      FROM agent_results
      GROUP BY 1
    )
    
    SELECT
      day,
      payout_usd,
      SUM(payout_usd) OVER (ORDER BY day) AS cumsum_payout_usd
    FROM daily_payout
    ORDER BY day DESC;
    ```

### Agent Payout

**Query ID:** 3584660 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent_traders` (enum): `PredictionProphetGPT4`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omen_gnosis_payouts AS (
        SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.ConditionalTokens_evt_PayoutRedemption
    ),
    
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994
    )
    
    SELECT
        day
        ,payout_usd
        ,SUM(payout_usd) OVER (ORDER BY day) AS cumsum_payout_usd
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('day',evt_block_time) AS day
            ,SUM(payout/POWER(10,t4.decimals)*t4.price) AS payout_usd
        FROM
            omen_gnosis_payouts t1
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders AS t2
            ON t2.address = t1.evt_tx_from OR t2.address = t1.evt_tx_to
        LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd t4
                ON t4.contract_address = t1.collateralToken
                AND t4.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t4.minute = DATE_TRUNC('minute',t1.evt_block_time)
        WHERE
            t2.label = '{{agent_traders}}'
        GROUP BY 
            1
    )
    ORDER BY
        1 DESC
    ```

### Agent Performance per Category

**Query ID:** 3608098 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent_traders` (enum): `PredictionProphetGPT4`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omen_gnosis_trades AS (
          SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.trades
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets_status AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3601593
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3668567
    ),
    
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994
        WHERE label = '{{agent_traders}}'
    ),
    
    relevant_markets AS (
        SELECT
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,label
            ,ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT bet_outcome ) AS bet_outcome
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT 
                t2.label
                ,fixedproductmarketmaker
                ,outcomeIndex AS bet_outcome
            FROM omen_gnosis_trades t1
            INNER JOIN
                ai_agents_traders AS t2
                ON t2.address = t1.tx_from OR t2.address = t1.tx_to
            WHERE
                action = 'Buy'
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    
    ),
    
    markets_outcome AS (
    SELECT 
            t1.category
            ,t1.conditionid
            ,t1.questionid
            ,t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,t1.creation_time AS start_time
            ,t1.opening_time
            ,t1.timeout
            ,t3.Status AS market_status
            ,FILTER(
              TRANSFORM(
                t3.payoutNumerators,
                x -> CASE WHEN x <> 0 THEN ARRAY_POSITION(t3.payoutNumerators, x) - 1 ELSE NULL END
              )
              , x -> x IS NOT NULL) AS payout_outcome
            ,t2.bet_outcome
            ,t3.resolution_time
            ,t3.is_valid
        FROM 
            omen_gnosis_markets t1
        INNER JOIN
            relevant_markets t2
           ON t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        LEFT JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets_status t3
            ON t3.conditionId = t1.conditionid
            AND t3.questionId = t1.questionid
        WHERE
            t3.is_valid = True
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            *
            ,array_union(payout_outcome,bet_outcome) = payout_outcome AS correct_bet
        FROM markets_outcome
    ),
    
    accuracy_sparse AS (
        SELECT 
            category
            ,resolution_time
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' THEN 1 END) OVER w AS cnt_resolved
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN correct_bet THEN 1 END) OVER w AS cnt_correct
            ,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN correct_bet THEN 1 END) OVER w AS REAL) 
                / (COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' THEN 1 END) OVER w)  AS pct_correct
        FROM
            final
        WHERE 
            market_status = 'Resolved'
        WINDOW w AS (
            PARTITION BY 
                category
            ORDER BY 
                resolution_time
        )
    ),
    
    start_times AS (
        SELECT
            category
            ,MIN(resolution_time) AS resolution_time_min
        FROM
            accuracy_sparse
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            t2.category
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour',t1.time) AS hour
        FROM
            gnosis.blocks t1
        CROSS JOIN
            start_times t2
        WHERE
            t1.time >= t2.resolution_time_min
        GROUP BY 
            1,2
    ),
    
    accuracy_sparse_hour AS (
        SELECT
            category
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour', resolution_time) AS hour
             ,ARRAY_AGG(cnt_resolved ORDER BY resolution_time DESC)[1] AS cnt_resolved
             ,ARRAY_AGG(cnt_correct ORDER BY resolution_time DESC)[1] AS cnt_correct
            ,ARRAY_AGG(pct_correct ORDER BY resolution_time DESC)[1] AS pct_correct
        FROM
            accuracy_sparse 
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        category
        ,hour
        ,LAST_VALUE(cnt_resolved) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY hour) AS cnt_resolved
        ,LAST_VALUE(cnt_correct) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY hour) AS cnt_correct
        ,LAST_VALUE(pct_correct) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY hour) AS pct_correct
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.category
            ,t2.hour
            ,t1.cnt_resolved
            ,t1.cnt_correct
            ,t1.pct_correct
        FROM
            accuracy_sparse_hour t1
        RIGHT JOIN
            calendar t2
            ON t2.category = t1.category
            AND t2.hour = t1.hour
    )
    ORDER BY 2
    ```

### Agent ROI

**Query ID:** 3870996 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent_traders` (enum): `PredictionProphetGPT4`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994
        WHERE label = '{{agent_traders}}'
    ),
    
    relevant_markets AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,t1.collateralToken
            ,CAST(MIN(evt_block_time) AS TIMESTAMP) AS date_time_min
            ,CAST(MAX(evt_block_time) AS TIMESTAMP) AS date_time_max
        FROM
            query_3684914 t1 --gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse_v
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders t2
            ON
            t2.address = t1.user
        GROUP BY 1,2
    ),
    
    market_investment AS (
            SELECT
                t2.fixedproductmarketmaker
                ,SUM(
                    CASE 
                        WHEN t1."from" = t2.fixedproductmarketmaker THEN CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)
                        ELSE -CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)
                    END
                ) AS invested
            FROM
                --test_schema.git_dunesql_1e47e2a_tokens_gnosis_transfers t1
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            INNER JOIN
                relevant_markets t2
                ON
                t1.contract_address = t2.collateralToken
            CROSS JOIN
                ai_agents_traders t3
            WHERE
                 t1.token_standard = 'erc20'
                 AND
                 t1.block_time >= t2.date_time_min
                 AND
                 t1.block_time <= t2.date_time_max
                 AND
                (
                    (
                        t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1."from"
                        AND
                        t3.address = t1.to
                    )
                    OR 
                    (
                        t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.to
                        AND
                        t3.address = t1."from"
                    )
                )
            GROUP BY
                1
    ),
    
    
    PayoutRedemption AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('hour', t1.evt_block_time) AS date_time
            ,t3.fixedProductMarketMaker
            ,t1.collateralToken
            ,SUM(t1.payout) AS payout
        FROM
            omen_gnosis.ConditionalTokens_evt_PayoutRedemption t1
        INNER JOIN
                ai_agents_traders t2
                ON
                t2.address = t1.redeemer
        INNER JOIN
            query_3668567 t3 --omen_gnosis_markets_v
            ON
            t3.conditionId = t1.conditionId
        GROUP BY
            1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.date_time
            ,t2.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,t1.invested
            ,t2.payout
            ,COALESCE(t2.payout/POWER(10,18)/NULLIF(ABS(t1.invested)/POWER(10,18),0),0) - 1 AS roi
        FROM
            market_investment t1
        INNER JOIN 
            PayoutRedemption t2
            ON
            t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        day
        ,ROI_7DMA
        ,ROI_30DMA
        ,POWER(1 + ROI_7DMA, 52) - 1 AS AR_7DMA
        ,POWER(1 + ROI_30DMA, 12) - 1 AS AR_30DMA
        ,(POWER(1 + ROI_7DMA, 52) - 1) * 100 AS pct_AR_7DMA
        ,(POWER(1 + ROI_30DMA, 12) - 1) * 100 AS pct_AR_30DMA
    FROM (
        SELECT
            day
            ,(AVG(avg_daily_roi) OVER (ORDER BY day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)) AS ROI_7DMA
            ,AVG(avg_daily_roi) OVER (ORDER BY day ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ROI_30DMA
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                DATE_TRUNC('day',date_time) AS day
                ,AVG(roi) AS avg_daily_roi
            FROM 
                final
            GROUP BY 1
        )
    )
    ORDER BY 1 DESC
    ```

### Agent Trade History

**Query ID:** 3578780 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent_traders` (enum): `PredictionProphetGPT4`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_reserves_trades AS (
          SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.trades
    ),
    
    gnosis_reserves_liquidity AS (
        SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.liquidity
    ),
    
    gnosis_reserves_delta AS (
        SELECT
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,block_time
            ,action
            ,tx_hash
            ,evt_index
            ,reserves_delta
        FROM gnosis_reserves_liquidity
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,block_time
            ,action
            ,tx_hash
            ,evt_index
            ,reserves_delta
        FROM gnosis_reserves_trades
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3668567
    ),
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994
    ),
    
    probabilities AS (
        SELECT 
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,block_time
            ,action
            ,tx_hash
            ,evt_index
            ,reserves
            ,total_reserves
            ,TRANSFORM(
                reserves, 
                x -> ROUND( (CAST(1 AS REAL)/NULLIF(x,0)) / total_inv_reserves, 4)
            ) AS odds
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                fixedproductmarketmaker
                ,block_time
                ,action
                ,tx_hash
                ,evt_index
                ,array_agg(reserve) AS reserves
                ,SUM(reserve) AS total_reserves
                ,SUM(CAST(1 AS REAL)/NULLIF(CAST(reserve AS REAL),0)) AS total_inv_reserves
            FROM (
                SELECT 
                    fixedproductmarketmaker
                    ,block_time
                    ,action
                    ,tx_hash
                    ,evt_index
                    ,idx
                    ,SUM(value) OVER (PARTITION BY fixedproductmarketmaker, idx ORDER BY block_time, evt_index) AS reserve
                FROM 
                    gnosis_reserves_delta 
                CROSS JOIN unnest(reserves_delta) WITH ORDINALITY AS a(value, idx)
            ) AS summed_values
            GROUP BY 
                1,2,3,4,5
        )
    ),
    
    lag_probabilities AS (
    SELECT
        fixedproductmarketmaker
        ,tx_hash
        ,evt_index
        ,odds
        ,LAG(odds) OVER (PARTITION BY fixedproductmarketmaker ORDER BY block_time, evt_index) AS odds_before
    FROM
        probabilities
    ),
    
    trades_list AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_time
            ,get_href(get_chain_explorer_tx_hash('gnosis', t1.tx_hash), t1.action) AS action
            ,t1.outcomeIndex AS outcome
            ,t1.amount
            ,t4.odds_before
            ,t4.odds AS odds_after
            ,t3.fixedproductmarketmaker
        FROM
            gnosis_reserves_trades t1
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders AS t2
            ON 
            t2.address = t1.address
            --t2.address = t1.tx_from OR 
            --t2.address = t1.tx_to
        INNER JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets t3
            ON t3.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        INNER JOIN
            lag_probabilities t4
            ON
            t4.tx_hash = t1.tx_hash
            AND
            t4.evt_index = t1.evt_index
        WHERE
            t2.label = '{{agent_traders}}'
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM trades_list
    ```

### Agent Trade History - Seer

**Query ID:** 5128685 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent` (enum): `coinflip-highest-liquidity-seer`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      ai_agent AS (
        SELECT
          address,
          label
        FROM query_5102644
        WHERE label = '{{agent}}'
        LIMIT 1
      ),
    
      token_index_map AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          tok.token       AS outcome_token,
          tok.idx - 1     AS outcome_index
        FROM query_5030312
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(wrapped_tokens) WITH ORDINALITY AS tok(token, idx)
      ),
    
      market_params AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          params
        FROM query_4963697
      ),
    
      trades_list AS (
        SELECT
          r.ts                                       AS block_time,
          get_href(
            get_chain_explorer_tx_hash('gnosis', r.tx_hash),
            r.action
          )                                          AS action,
          JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(
            mp.params,
            CONCAT('$.outcomes[', CAST(tim.outcome_index AS VARCHAR), ']')
          )                                          AS outcome,
          r.delta_usd                                AS amount_usd,
          LAG(r.implied_prob) OVER (
            PARTITION BY r.pool, r.outcome_token
            ORDER BY r.ts
          )                                          AS odds_before,
          r.implied_prob                             AS odds_after,
          r.pool                                     AS market
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_seer_all_trades r
        JOIN ai_agent a
          ON r.user_from = a.address
        JOIN token_index_map tim
          ON tim.conditionId   = r.conditionId
         AND tim.outcome_token = r.outcome_token
        LEFT JOIN market_params mp
          ON mp.conditionId = r.conditionId
        WHERE r.market_type IN ('categorical','multicategorical')
      )
    
    SELECT
      block_time,
      action,
      outcome,      
      amount_usd,
      odds_before,
      odds_after,
      market
    FROM trades_list
    ORDER BY block_time DESC;
    ```

### Agent Trade History - Seer - Scalar

**Query ID:** 5563783 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent_scalar` (enum): `prophet-gpt4o-scalar-agent-seer`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      ai_agent AS (
        SELECT address, label
        FROM query_5102644
        WHERE label = '{{agent_scalar}}'
        LIMIT 1
      ),
    
      token_index_map AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          tok.token       AS outcome_token,
          tok.idx - 1     AS outcome_index
        FROM query_5030312
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(wrapped_tokens) WITH ORDINALITY AS tok(token, idx)
      ),
    
      market_params AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          params                               AS params_json,
          CAST(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(params, '$.lowerBound')   AS DOUBLE)/1e18 AS lower_bound,
          CAST(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(params, '$.upperBound')   AS DOUBLE)/1e18 AS upper_bound
        FROM query_4963697
        WHERE market_type IN ('scalar','multiscalar')
      ),
    
      map AS (
        SELECT pool, token0, token1, conditionId, outcome_token
        FROM query_5059435
      ),
    
      price_states AS (
        SELECT
          m.conditionId,
          m.outcome_token,
          p.evt_block_time AS ts,
          CASE
            WHEN m.token0 = m.outcome_token
              THEN POWER(1.0001, CAST(p.tick AS DOUBLE))
            ELSE 1 / POWER(1.0001, CAST(p.tick AS DOUBLE))
          END                                      AS implied_prob
        FROM (
          SELECT contract_address, evt_block_time, tick
          FROM swaprv3_gnosis.algebrapool_evt_initialize
          UNION ALL
          SELECT contract_address, evt_block_time, tick
          FROM swaprv3_gnosis.algebrapool_evt_swap
        ) AS p
        JOIN map AS m
          ON m.pool = p.contract_address
      ),
    
      trades_raw AS (
        SELECT
          r.ts               AS block_time,
          r.tx_hash,
          r.action,
          r.implied_prob,
          r.delta_usd,
          r.pool,
          r.conditionId,
          tim.outcome_index,
          tim.outcome_token,
          mp.params_json,
          mp.lower_bound,
          mp.upper_bound
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_seer_all_trades r
        JOIN ai_agent a
          ON r.user_from = a.address
        JOIN token_index_map tim
          ON tim.conditionId   = r.conditionId
         AND tim.outcome_token = r.outcome_token
        LEFT JOIN market_params mp
          ON mp.conditionId    = r.conditionId
        WHERE r.market_type IN ('scalar','multiscalar')
      ),
    
      price_joined AS (
        SELECT
          tr.*,
          ps.implied_prob      AS prob_before,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY tr.tx_hash
            ORDER BY ps.ts DESC
          )                     AS rn
        FROM trades_raw tr
        JOIN price_states ps
          ON ps.conditionId   = tr.conditionId
         AND ps.outcome_token = tr.outcome_token
         AND ps.ts            < tr.block_time
      ),
    
      trades_list AS (
        SELECT
          pj.block_time,
          get_href(
            get_chain_explorer_tx_hash('gnosis', pj.tx_hash),
            pj.action
          )                                              AS action,
    
          JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(
            pj.params_json,
            CONCAT('$.outcomes[', CAST(pj.outcome_index AS VARCHAR), ']')
          )                                              AS outcome_label,
    
          COALESCE(pj.prob_before, pj.implied_prob)       AS prob_before,
    
          pj.implied_prob                                 AS prob_after,
    
          (
            COALESCE(pj.prob_before, pj.implied_prob)
            * (pj.upper_bound - pj.lower_bound)
            + pj.lower_bound
          )                                              AS value_before,
          (
            pj.implied_prob
            * (pj.upper_bound - pj.lower_bound)
            + pj.lower_bound
          )                                              AS value_after,
    
          pj.delta_usd                                   AS amount_usd,
          pj.pool                                        AS market
        FROM price_joined pj
        WHERE pj.rn = 1
      )
    
    SELECT
      block_time,
      action,
      outcome_label,
      value_before,
      value_after,
      amount_usd,
      market
    FROM trades_list
    ORDER BY block_time DESC;
    ```

### Agent Trades

**Query ID:** 3584516 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent_traders` (enum): `PredictionProphetGPT4`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omen_gnosis_trades AS (
          SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.trades
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3668567
    ),
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994
    ),
    
    trades_list AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            t1.block_time
            ,action
            ,t1.outcomeIndex AS outcome
            ,t1.amount
            ,t1.amount/POWER(10,t4.decimals)*t4.price AS amount_usd
            ,t3.question
            ,t3.fixedproductmarketmaker
        FROM
            omen_gnosis_trades t1
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders AS t2
            ON t2.address = t1.tx_from OR t2.address = t1.tx_to
        INNER JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets t3
            ON t3.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        LEFT JOIN
            prices.usd t4
            ON t4.contract_address = t3.collateraltoken
            AND t4.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND t4.minute = DATE_TRUNC('minute',t1.block_time)
        WHERE
            (t1.action = 'Buy' OR t1.action = 'Sell')
            AND
            t2.label = '{{agent_traders}}'
    ),
    
    daily_volume AS (
        SELECT 
            *
            ,SUM(amount_usd) OVER (ORDER BY day) AS cumsum_amount_usd
            ,SUM(cnt) OVER (ORDER BY day) AS cumsum_cnt
        FROM (
            SELECT
                DATE_TRUNC('day',block_time) AS day
                ,SUM(amount_usd) AS amount_usd
                ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
            FROM
                trades_list
            GROUP BY 1
        )
    )
    
    SELECT  * FROM daily_volume
    ORDER BY 1 DESC
    ```

### Agent Trades Summary

**Query ID:** 3615668 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent_traders` (enum): `PredictionProphetGPT4`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    omen_gnosis_trades AS (
          SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.trades
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets_status AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3601593
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3668567 
    ),
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3582994
    ),
    
    trades_list AS (
        SELECT
             ARRAY_AGG(t3.question)AS question
            ,t3.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,ARRAY_AGG(t1.action ORDER BY t1.block_time) AS actions
            ,ARRAY_AGG(t1.outcomeIndex ORDER BY t1.block_time) AS outcomes
            ,t4.status
            ,t4.is_valid
            ,FILTER(
              TRANSFORM(
                t4.payoutNumerators,
                x -> CASE WHEN x <> 0 THEN ARRAY_POSITION(t4.payoutNumerators, x) - 1 ELSE NULL END
              )
              , x -> x IS NOT NULL) AS payout_outcome
        FROM
            omen_gnosis_trades t1
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_traders AS t2
            ON t2.address = t1.tx_from OR t2.address = t1.tx_to
        INNER JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets t3
            ON t3.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        LEFT JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets_status t4
            ON t4.conditionId = t3.conditionid
            AND t4.questionId = t3.questionid
        WHERE
            t2.label = '{{agent_traders}}'
        GROUP BY
            2,5,6,7
    )
    
    SELECT 
        question
        ,actions
        ,outcomes
        ,status
        ,is_valid
        ,payout_outcome
        ,fixedproductmarketmaker
    FROM trades_list
    ```

### Agent Trades Summary - Seer

**Query ID:** 5128825 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent` (enum): `coinflip-highest-liquidity-seer`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      ai_agent AS (
        SELECT
          address,
          label
        FROM query_5102644
        WHERE label = '{{agent}}'
        LIMIT 1
      ),
    
      token_index_map AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          tok.token       AS outcome_token,
          tok.idx - 1     AS outcome_index
        FROM query_5030312
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(wrapped_tokens) WITH ORDINALITY AS tok(token, idx)
      ),
    
      agent_trades AS (
        SELECT
          r.conditionId,
          r.tx_hash,
          r.action,
          r.ts                         AS block_time,
          tim.outcome_index,
          tim.outcome_token
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_seer_all_trades r
        JOIN ai_agent a
          ON r.user_from = a.address
        JOIN token_index_map tim
          ON tim.conditionId   = r.conditionId
         AND tim.outcome_token = r.outcome_token
        WHERE r.market_type IN ('categorical','multicategorical')
      ),
    
      market_params AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          params
        FROM query_4963697
      ),
    
      agent_trades_labeled AS (
        SELECT
          at.*,
          JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(
            mp.params,
            CONCAT('$.outcomes[', CAST(at.outcome_index AS VARCHAR), ']')
          ) AS outcome_label
        FROM agent_trades at
        LEFT JOIN market_params mp
          ON mp.conditionId = at.conditionId
      ),
    
      market_info AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
          conditionId,
          question
        FROM query_4963697
      ),
    
      market_status AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          status
        FROM query_5132435
      ),
    
      resolution AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          payoutNumerators
        FROM omen_gnosis.conditionaltokens_evt_conditionresolution
      ),
    
      trades_summary AS (
        SELECT
          mi.question                                            AS question,
          atl.conditionId                                        AS conditionId,
          ARRAY_AGG(atl.action       ORDER BY atl.block_time)    AS actions,
          ARRAY_AGG(atl.outcome_label ORDER BY atl.block_time)   AS outcomes,
          COALESCE(ms.status, 'Unknown')                         AS status,
          TRUE                                                    AS is_valid,
          FILTER(
            TRANSFORM(
              pr.payoutNumerators,
              x -> CASE WHEN x <> 0
                        THEN ARRAY_POSITION(pr.payoutNumerators, x) - 1
                        ELSE NULL
                   END
            ),
            x -> x IS NOT NULL
          )                                                       AS payout_outcome
        FROM agent_trades_labeled atl
        LEFT JOIN market_info   mi ON mi.conditionId = atl.conditionId
        LEFT JOIN market_status ms ON ms.conditionId = atl.conditionId
        LEFT JOIN resolution    pr ON pr.conditionId = atl.conditionId
        GROUP BY
          mi.question,
          atl.conditionId,
          ms.status,
          pr.payoutNumerators
      )
    
    SELECT
      question,
      actions,
      outcomes,
      status,
      is_valid,
      payout_outcome,
      conditionId
    FROM trades_summary
    ORDER BY question;
    ```

### Agent Trades Summary - Seer - Scalar

**Query ID:** 5568106 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `agent_scalar` (enum): `prophet-gpt4o-scalar-agent-seer`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      ai_agent AS (
        SELECT address, label
        FROM query_5102644
        WHERE label = '{{agent_scalar}}'
        LIMIT 1
      ),
    
      token_index_map AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          tok.token       AS outcome_token,
          tok.idx - 1     AS outcome_index
        FROM query_5030312
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(wrapped_tokens) WITH ORDINALITY AS tok(token, idx)
      ),
    
      agent_trades AS (
        SELECT
          r.conditionId,
          r.tx_hash,
          r.action,
          r.ts                      AS block_time,
          tim.outcome_index,
          tim.outcome_token
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_seer_all_trades r
        JOIN ai_agent a
          ON r.user_from = a.address
        JOIN token_index_map tim
          ON  tim.conditionId   = r.conditionId
          AND tim.outcome_token = r.outcome_token
        WHERE r.market_type IN ('scalar','multiscalar')
      ),
    
      market_params AS (
        SELECT conditionId, params
        FROM query_4963697
      ),
    
      agent_trades_labeled AS (
        SELECT
          at.*,
          JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(
            mp.params,
            CONCAT('$.outcomes[', CAST(at.outcome_index AS VARCHAR), ']')
          ) AS outcome_label
        FROM agent_trades at
        LEFT JOIN market_params mp
          ON mp.conditionId = at.conditionId
      ),
    
      market_info AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT conditionId, question
        FROM query_4963697
      ),
    
      market_status AS (
        SELECT conditionId, status
        FROM query_5132435
      ),
    
      resolution AS (
        SELECT conditionId, payoutNumerators
        FROM omen_gnosis.conditionaltokens_evt_conditionresolution
      ),
    
      trades_summary AS (
        SELECT
          mi.question                                         AS question,
          atl.conditionId                                     AS conditionId,
          ARRAY_AGG(atl.action       ORDER BY atl.block_time) AS actions,
          ARRAY_AGG(atl.outcome_label ORDER BY atl.block_time) AS outcomes,
          COALESCE(ms.status, 'Unknown')                      AS status,
          TRUE                                                 AS is_valid,
          FILTER(
            TRANSFORM(
              pr.payoutNumerators,
              x -> CASE WHEN x <> 0
                        THEN ARRAY_POSITION(pr.payoutNumerators, x) - 1
                        ELSE NULL
                   END
            ),
            x -> x IS NOT NULL
          )                                                    AS payout_outcome
        FROM agent_trades_labeled atl
        LEFT JOIN market_info   mi ON mi.conditionId = atl.conditionId
        LEFT JOIN market_status ms ON ms.conditionId = atl.conditionId
        LEFT JOIN resolution    pr ON pr.conditionId = atl.conditionId
        GROUP BY
          mi.question,
          atl.conditionId,
          ms.status,
          pr.payoutNumerators
      )
    
    SELECT
      question,
      actions,
      outcomes,
      status,
      is_valid,
      payout_outcome,
      conditionId
    FROM trades_summary
    ORDER BY question;
    ```

### Agents Performance

**Query ID:** 3579882 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omen_gnosis_trades AS (
        SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.trades
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets_status AS (
        SELECT * FROM dune.hdser.query_3601593
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets AS (
        SELECT * FROM dune.hdser.result_omen_gnosis_markets_mv
    ),
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT 
            * 
        FROM 
            dune.hdser.query_3582994
    ),
    
    relevant_markets AS (
        SELECT
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,label
            ,ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT bet_outcome ) AS bet_outcome
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT 
                t2.label
                ,fixedproductmarketmaker
                ,outcomeIndex AS bet_outcome
            FROM omen_gnosis_trades t1
            INNER JOIN
                ai_agents_traders AS t2
                ON t2.address = t1.tx_from OR  t2.address = t1.tx_to
            WHERE
                action = 'Buy'
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    
    ),
    
    markets_outcome AS (
    SELECT 
            t2.label
            ,t1.conditionid
            ,t1.questionid
            ,t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,t1.creation_time AS start_time
            ,t1.opening_time
            ,t1.timeout
            ,t3.Status AS market_status
            ,FILTER(
              TRANSFORM(
                t3.payoutNumerators,
                x -> CASE WHEN x <> 0 THEN ARRAY_POSITION(t3.payoutNumerators, x) - 1 ELSE NULL END
              )
              , x -> x IS NOT NULL) AS payout_outcome
            ,t2.bet_outcome
            ,t3.resolution_time
        FROM 
            omen_gnosis_markets t1
        INNER JOIN
            relevant_markets t2
           ON t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        LEFT JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets_status t3
            ON t3.conditionId = t1.conditionid
            AND t3.questionId = t1.questionid
        WHERE
            t3.is_valid = True
    ),
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            *
            ,array_union(payout_outcome,bet_outcome) = payout_outcome AS correct_bet
        FROM markets_outcome
    ),
    
    accuracy_sparse AS (
        SELECT 
            label AS agent
            ,resolution_time
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' THEN 1 END) OVER w AS cnt_resolved
            ,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN correct_bet THEN 1 END) OVER w AS REAL) 
                / (COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' THEN 1 END) OVER w)  AS pct_correct
        FROM
            final
        WHERE 
            market_status = 'Resolved'
        WINDOW w AS (
            PARTITION BY 
                label
            ORDER BY 
                resolution_time
        )
    ),
    
    start_times AS (
        SELECT
            agent
            ,MIN(resolution_time) AS resolution_time_min
        FROM
            accuracy_sparse
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            t2.agent
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour',t1.time) AS hour
        FROM
            gnosis.blocks t1
        CROSS JOIN
            start_times t2
        WHERE
            t1.time >= t2.resolution_time_min
        GROUP BY 
            1,2
    ),
    
    accuracy_sparse_hour AS (
        SELECT
            agent
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour', resolution_time) AS hour
             ,ARRAY_AGG(cnt_resolved ORDER BY resolution_time DESC)[1] AS cnt_resolved
            ,ARRAY_AGG(pct_correct ORDER BY resolution_time DESC)[1] AS pct_correct
        FROM
            accuracy_sparse 
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        agent
        ,hour
        ,LAST_VALUE(cnt_resolved) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY agent ORDER BY hour) AS cnt_resolved
        ,LAST_VALUE(pct_correct) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY agent ORDER BY hour) AS pct_correct
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.agent
            ,t2.hour
            ,t1.cnt_resolved
            ,t1.pct_correct
        FROM
            accuracy_sparse_hour t1
        RIGHT JOIN
            calendar t2
            ON t2.agent = t1.agent
            AND t2.hour = t1.hour
    )
    ORDER BY 2
    ```

### Agents Performance by Rank

**Query ID:** 4244913 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `market creator` (enum): `Replicator`
- `range` (enum): `Last Month`
- `ranking` (enum): `Top 10 by Accuracy`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    omen_gnosis_trades AS (
          SELECT * FROM omen_gnosis.trades
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets_status AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3601593
    ),
    
    omen_gnosis_markets AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3668567 
    ),
    
    ai_agents_makers AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3584116
        WHERE
            label = '{{market creator}}' OR '{{market creator}}' = 'All'
    ),
    
    
    ai_agents_traders AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.address
            ,t1.label
            ,t2.date_cutoff
        FROM 
            query_3582994 t1
        INNER JOIN
             query_3644289 t2
             ON t2.label = t1.label
        WHERE
            t2.ranking = '{{ranking}}'
            AND
            t2.range = '{{range}}'
    ),
    
    relevant_markets AS (
        SELECT
            fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,label
            ,ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT bet_outcome ) AS bet_outcome
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT 
                t2.label
                ,fixedproductmarketmaker
                ,outcomeIndex AS bet_outcome
            FROM omen_gnosis_trades t1
            INNER JOIN
                ai_agents_traders AS t2
                ON t2.address = t1.tx_from OR  t2.address = t1.tx_to
            WHERE
                action = 'Buy'
           --     AND
            --    t1.block_time >= t2.date_cutoff
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    
    ),
    
    markets_outcome AS (
    SELECT 
            t2.label
            ,t1.conditionid
            ,t1.questionid
            ,t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,t1.creation_time AS start_time
            ,t1.opening_time
            ,t1.timeout
            ,t3.Status AS market_status
            ,FILTER(
              TRANSFORM(
                t3.payoutNumerators,
                x -> CASE WHEN x <> 0 THEN ARRAY_POSITION(t3.payoutNumerators, x) - 1 ELSE NULL END
              )
              , x -> x IS NOT NULL) AS payout_outcome
            ,t2.bet_outcome
            ,t3.resolution_time
            ,t3.is_valid
        FROM 
            omen_gnosis_markets t1
        INNER JOIN
            relevant_markets t2
           ON t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        LEFT JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets_status t3
            ON t3.conditionId = t1.conditionid
            AND t3.questionId = t1.questionid
        INNER JOIN
            ai_agents_makers AS t4
            ON t4.address = t1.creator OR '{{market creator}}' = 'All'
        WHERE
            t3.resolution_time >= (SELECT date_cutoff FROM ai_agents_traders LIMIT 1)
       --     t3.is_valid = True
    ),
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            *
            ,array_union(payout_outcome,bet_outcome) = payout_outcome AS correct_bet
        FROM markets_outcome
    ),
    
    accuracy_sparse AS (
        SELECT 
            label AS agent
            ,resolution_time
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' THEN 1 END) OVER w AS cnt_resolved
            ,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN correct_bet AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) OVER w AS REAL) 
                /  NULLIF((COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) OVER w),0)  AS pct_correct
        FROM
            final
        WHERE 
            market_status = 'Resolved'
        WINDOW w AS (
            PARTITION BY 
                label
            ORDER BY 
                resolution_time
        )
    ),
    
    start_times AS (
        SELECT
            agent
            ,MIN(resolution_time) AS resolution_time_min
        FROM
            accuracy_sparse
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            t2.agent
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour',t1.time) AS hour
        FROM
            gnosis.blocks t1
        CROSS JOIN
            start_times t2
        WHERE
            t1.time >= t2.resolution_time_min
        GROUP BY 
            1,2
    ),
    
    accuracy_sparse_hour AS (
        SELECT
            agent
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour', resolution_time) AS hour
             ,ARRAY_AGG(cnt_resolved ORDER BY resolution_time DESC)[1] AS cnt_resolved
            ,ARRAY_AGG(pct_correct ORDER BY resolution_time DESC)[1] AS pct_correct
        FROM
            accuracy_sparse 
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        agent
        ,hour
        ,LAST_VALUE(cnt_resolved) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY agent ORDER BY hour) AS cnt_resolved
        ,LAST_VALUE(pct_correct) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY agent ORDER BY hour) AS pct_correct
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.agent
            ,t2.hour
            ,t1.cnt_resolved
            ,t1.pct_correct
        FROM
            accuracy_sparse_hour t1
        RIGHT JOIN
            calendar t2
            ON t2.agent = t1.agent
            AND t2.hour = t1.hour
    )
    ORDER BY 2
    ```

    ),
    
    accuracy_sparse AS (
        SELECT 
            label AS agent
            ,resolution_time
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' THEN 1 END) OVER w AS cnt_resolved
            ,CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN correct_bet AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) OVER w AS REAL) 
                /  NULLIF((COUNT(CASE WHEN market_status = 'Resolved' AND is_valid = True THEN 1 END) OVER w),0)  AS pct_correct
        FROM
            final
        WHERE 
            market_status = 'Resolved'
        WINDOW w AS (
            PARTITION BY 
                label
            ORDER BY 
                resolution_time
        )
    ),
    
    start_times AS (
        SELECT
            agent
            ,MIN(resolution_time) AS resolution_time_min
        FROM
            accuracy_sparse
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            t2.agent
            ,DATE_TRUNC('hour',t1.time) AS hour
        FROM
            gnosis.blocks t1
        CROSS JOIN
            start_times t2
        WHERE
            t1.time >= t2.resolution_time_min
        GROUP BY 
            1,2
    ),
    
    accuracy_sparse_hour AS (
