### Dappnode Validators Incentives

**Query ID:** 3729021 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    dappnode_ClaimedIncentive AS (
        SELECT 
            block_time
            ,varbinary_substring(topic1,13,20) AS address
        FROM
            gnosis.logs
        WHERE
            contract_address = 0x6C68322cf55f5f025F2aebd93a28761182d077c3
            AND 
            topic0 = 0x652ee135e6d0db045dcd363ddd0952e0d36eabf828e2217d91116d6d65c6bf8c
            AND
            block_time >= DATE '2022-01-01'
    ),
    
    RegisteredUser AS (
        SELECT 
            *
            ,varbinary_substring(data,13,20) AS beneficiary
            ,varbinary_substring(data,45,20) AS safe
        FROM
            gnosis.logs
        WHERE
            contract_address = 0x485c6Be503D32511c1282b68dD99E85f250572c3
            AND
            topic0 = 0xefca3fdd715e739f1e080ddc77892fc7ccce29dc771f8b664f46554d69efda4c
            AND
            block_time >= DATE '2023-07-01'
    ),
    
    SubmitPendingDeposits AS (
        SELECT 
            *
            ,varbinary_substring(data,13,20) AS beneficiary
            ,varbinary_to_integer(varbinary_ltrim(varbinary_substring(data,33))) AS "count"
        FROM
            gnosis.logs
        WHERE
            contract_address = 0x485c6Be503D32511c1282b68dD99E85f250572c3
            AND
            topic0 = 0x93f6070aea1a15ae7674f723a52497bd095d70f7d2ce4bb421376401d107b990
            AND
            block_time >= DATE '2023-07-01'
    ),
    
    dappnode_SubmitPendingDeposits AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.block_time
           -- ,t1.beneficiary
            ,t1.safe As address
            --,t2."count"
        FROM RegisteredUser t1
        INNER JOIN
            SubmitPendingDeposits t2
            ON
            t2.beneficiary = t1.beneficiary
        
    ),
    
    dappnode_incentives AS (
        SELECT * FROM dappnode_ClaimedIncentive
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM dappnode_SubmitPendingDeposits
    ),
    
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                CAST(MIN(block_time) AS DATE) AS block_time_min
                ,CAST(MAX(block_time) AS DATE) AS block_time_max
            FROM
                dappnode_incentives
            )
            ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(block_time_min,block_time_max,INTERVAL '1' DAY)) a(day)
    ),
    
    distinct_withdrawal_credentials_eth1 AS (
        SELECT 
            varbinary_substring(
                withdrawal_credentials,
                13,
                20
            )
            AS address
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM gnosis_chain_gnosis.SBCDepositContract_evt_DepositEvent
        WHERE
            varbinary_substring(withdrawal_credentials,1,1) = 0x01
        GROUP BY 1
    )
    
    SELECT
        day
        ,SUM(wk_counts) OVER (ORDER BY day) AS wk_counts
        ,SUM(validators_counts) OVER (ORDER BY day) AS validators_counts
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t3.day
            ,COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT t1.address),0) AS wk_counts
            ,COALESCE(SUM(t2.cnt),0) AS validators_counts
        FROM
            dappnode_incentives t1
        INNER JOIN
            distinct_withdrawal_credentials_eth1 t2
            -- dune.hdser.dataset_distinct_withdrawal_credentials_eth1_17757328 t2
            ON 
            t2.address = t1.address
        RIGHT JOIN
            calendar t3
            ON
            t3.day = DATE_TRUNC('day',t1.block_time) 
        GROUP BY 1
    )
    ORDER BY 1 DESC
    ```

### Deposit fees by token in the last 30 days - [ xDai-ETH Bridges ]

**Query ID:** 200852 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tokens;
    WITH  vals (name, address) AS (
        VALUES
            ('USDC'::text, '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48'::bytea),
            ('USDT', '\xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7'),
            ('DAI', '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F'),
            ('WETH', '\xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2'),
            ('WBTC', '\x2260FAC5E5542a773Aa44fBCfeDf7C193bc2C599')
    ) 
    SELECT * INTO temporary table tokens FROM vals;
    
    SELECT name AS token, SUM(gas_used * gas_price)/1e18 AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT name, evt_tx_hash
        FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer" tr
        LEFT JOIN tokens ON tr.contract_address = tokens.address
        WHERE (
            DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 30
            AND contract_address IN (SELECT address FROM tokens)
            AND "to" IN (
                '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671',
                '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016'
            )
            AND "from" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643'
        )
    ) AS transfers
    LEFT JOIN ethereum.transactions ON transfers.evt_tx_hash = ethereum.transactions.hash
    GROUP BY 1;
    ```

### Deposits / Withdrawals

**Query ID:** 3183163 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH deposits_cte AS (
        -- Query for deposits
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', evt_block_time) AS day,
             COUNT(*) AS deposits
        FROM gnosis_chain_gnosis.SBCDepositContract_evt_DepositEvent
        WHERE evt_block_number > 29242932
        GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', evt_block_time)
    ),
    withdrawals_cte AS (
        -- Query for withdrawals
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', evt_block_time) AS day,
             -- Sum withdrawn values from withdrawal events
             SUM(CAST(value AS DOUBLE))/1e18 * -1 AS withdrawals
        FROM erc20_gnosis.evt_Transfer
        WHERE "from" = 0x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9
            AND contract_address = 0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb -- Address without quotes
            AND evt_block_number > 29242932
        GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', evt_block_time)
    )
    SELECT
        COALESCE(deposits_cte.day, withdrawals_cte.day) AS day,
        COALESCE(deposits, 0) AS deposits,
        COALESCE(withdrawals, 0) AS withdrawals
    FROM deposits_cte
    FULL JOIN withdrawals_cte ON deposits_cte.day = withdrawals_cte.day
    ORDER BY day;
    ```

### Deposits / Withdrawals

**Query ID:** 3183142 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH daily_transactions AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', evt_block_time) AS week,
            SUM(
                CASE
                    WHEN contract_address = 0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb AND "to" = 0x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9 THEN
                        CAST(value AS DOUBLE)/1e18 -- GNO deposits after Shapella
                    WHEN contract_address = 0x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68 AND "to" = 0x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9 THEN
                        CAST(value AS DOUBLE)/1e18/32 -- mGNO deposits before Shapella
                    ELSE 0
                END
            ) AS deposits,
            SUM(
                CASE
                    WHEN contract_address = 0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb AND "from" = 0x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9 THEN
                        -CAST(value AS DOUBLE)/1e18 -- Withdrawals after Shapella
                    ELSE 0
                END
            ) AS withdrawals
        FROM erc20_gnosis.evt_Transfer
        WHERE (
            contract_address IN (0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb, 0x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68) AND
            ( "to" = 0x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9 OR "from" = 0x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9 ) AND
            evt_tx_hash != 0x38ba82a7fe6aa86d2275207582b3b35a72185ff60fe52ceca5b9f46394c87579
        )
        GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', evt_block_time)
    )
    SELECT 
        week, 
        deposits,
        withdrawals
    FROM daily_transactions
    WHERE week >= now() - interval '6' month
    ORDER BY week
    ```

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tokens;
    WITH  vals (name, address) AS (
        VALUES
            ('USDC'::text, '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48'::bytea),
            ('USDT', '\xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7'),
            ('DAI', '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F'),
            ('WETH', '\xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2'),
            ('WBTC', '\x2260FAC5E5542a773Aa44fBCfeDf7C193bc2C599')
    ) 
    SELECT * INTO temporary table tokens FROM vals;
    
    SELECT name AS token, COUNT(evt_tx_hash) AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT name, evt_tx_hash
        FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer" transfers
        LEFT JOIN tokens ON transfers.contract_address = tokens.address
        WHERE (
            DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 30
            AND contract_address IN (SELECT address FROM tokens)
            AND "to" IN (
                '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671',
                '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016'
            )
            AND "from" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643'
        )
    ) AS transfers2
    GROUP BY 1;
    ```

### Dex Trades

**Query ID:** 4380823 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    weekly_volume AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_date) AS block_date
            ,project
            ,SUM(amount_usd) AS amount_usd
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM dex.trades
        WHERE
            blockchain = 'gnosis'
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    
    SELECT
        *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,project
            ,amount_usd
            ,cnt
        FROM
            weekly_volume
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,'total' AS project
            ,SUM(amount_usd) AS amount_usd
            ,SUM(cnt) AS cnt
        FROM
            weekly_volume
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    ORDER BY 1, 2
    ```

### EIP-1559 transaction type adoption - [ EIP-1559 ]

**Query ID:** 366350 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN "type" = 'DynamicFee' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "DynamicFee",
        COUNT(CASE WHEN "type" = 'Legacy' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "Legacy"
    FROM xdai."transactions"
    WHERE "block_number" >= 19040000
    GROUP BY 1
    ```

### ETH-xDAI AMB Flow: Blueships

**Query ID:** 3516066 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    tokens AS (
        SELECT 
            contract_address AS token_address
            ,symbol
            ,decimals
        FROM 
            tokens.erc20
        WHERE 
            blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND
            contract_address IN (
                0x8e5bBbb09Ed1ebdE8674Cda39A0c169401db4252, --WBTC
                0x44fA8E6f47987339850636F88629646662444217, --DAI
                0x9C58BAcC331c9aa871AFD802DB6379a98e80CEdb, --GNO
                0x6A023CCd1ff6F2045C3309768eAd9E68F978f6e1, --WETH
                0x177127622c4A00F3d409B75571e12cB3c8973d3c --COW
            )
    ),
    
    prices AS (
        SELECT
            p.contract_address
            ,t.symbol
            ,p.minute
            ,p.price
        FROM 
            prices.usd p
        INNER JOIN
            tokens t
            ON 
            t.token_address = p.contract_address
        WHERE
            p.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND 
            p.minute >= (SELECT time FROM gnosis.blocks WHERE number = 11300566)
           
    ),
    
    inflow AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day',  l.block_time) AS day
            ,t.symbol
            ,varbinary_ltrim(l.topic1) AS token_address
           -- ,varbinary_ltrim(topic2) AS recipient
            ,SUM(varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_ltrim(l.data))/POWER(10,t.decimals)) AS value
            ,SUM(varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_ltrim(l.data))/POWER(10,t.decimals) * p.price) AS value_usd
        FROM
            gnosis.logs l
        LEFT JOIN
            tokens t
            ON
            t.token_address = varbinary_ltrim(l.topic1)
        LEFT JOIN
            prices p
            ON
            p.contract_address =  varbinary_ltrim(l.topic1)
            AND
            p.minute = DATE_TRUNC('minute',  l.block_time)
        WHERE
            l.contract_address = 0xf6A78083ca3e2a662D6dd1703c939c8aCE2e268d -- OmniBridge
            AND
            l.topic0 = 0x9afd47907e25028cdaca89d193518c302bbb128617d5a992c5abd45815526593 --TokensBridged 
        GROUP BY
            1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    outflow AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day',  l.block_time) AS day
            ,t.symbol
            ,varbinary_ltrim(l.topic1) AS token_address
            --,varbinary_ltrim(topic2) AS sender
            ,SUM(varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_ltrim(l.data))/POWER(10,t.decimals)) AS value
            ,SUM(varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_ltrim(l.data))/POWER(10,t.decimals) * p.price) AS value_usd
        FROM
            gnosis.logs l
        LEFT JOIN
            prices p
            ON
            p.contract_address =  varbinary_ltrim(l.topic1)
            AND
            p.minute = DATE_TRUNC('minute',  l.block_time)
        LEFT JOIN
            tokens t
            ON
            t.token_address = varbinary_ltrim(l.topic1)
        WHERE
            l.contract_address = 0xf6A78083ca3e2a662D6dd1703c939c8aCE2e268d -- OmniBridge
            AND
            l.topic0 = 0x59a9a8027b9c87b961e254899821c9a276b5efc35d1f7409ea4f291470f1629a --TokensBridgingInitiated 
        GROUP BY
            1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    start_dates AS (
        SELECT
            --token_address
            symbol
            ,MIN(day) AS day
        FROM
            inflow
        GROUP BY
            1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day',time) AS day
        FROM
            gnosis.blocks
        WHERE
            number >= 11300566 -- OmniBridge contract creation block
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    tokens_calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            c.day
            ,s.symbol
        FROM
            calendar c
        CROSS JOIN
            start_dates s
        WHERE
            c.day >= s.day
            AND 
            s.symbol IS NOT NULL
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        tc.day
        ,tc.symbol
        ,COALESCE(i.value,0) AS inflow
        ,COALESCE(-o.value,0) AS outflow
        ,COALESCE(i.value,0) - COALESCE(o.value,0) AS net_value
        ,SUM(COALESCE(i.value,0) - COALESCE(o.value,0)) OVER w AS total
        
        ,COALESCE(i.value_usd,0) AS inflow_usd
        ,COALESCE(-o.value_usd,0) AS outflow_usd
        ,(COALESCE(i.value,0) - COALESCE(o.value,0))* p.price AS net_value_usd
        
        
        ,(SUM(COALESCE(i.value,0) - COALESCE(o.value,0)) OVER w) * p.price AS total_usd
        ,p.price
    FROM
        tokens_calendar tc
    LEFT JOIN
        inflow i
        ON
        i.day = tc.day
        and
        i.symbol = tc.symbol
    LEFT JOIN
        outflow o
        ON
        o.day = tc.day
        and
        o.symbol = i.symbol
    LEFT JOIN
            prices p
            ON
            p.symbol =  tc.symbol
            AND
            p.minute = DATE_TRUNC('minute',  tc.day)
    WINDOW w AS (
        PARTITION BY
            tc.symbol
        ORDER BY 
            tc.day
    )
    ORDER BY 1, 2
    ```

### ETH-xDAI AMB Flow: Stablecoins

**Query ID:** 3518057 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    stablecoins AS (
        SELECT
            t.token_address
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[
                0xdd96B45877d0E8361a4DDb732da741e97f3191Ff, --BUSD
                0x7300AaFC0Ef0d47Daeb850f8b6a1931b40aCab33, --mUSD
                0xaBEf652195F98A91E490f047A5006B71c85f058d, --crvUSD
                0x4C36d2919e407f0Cc2Ee3c993ccF8ac26d9CE64e, --sUSD
                0xFe7ed09C4956f7cdb54eC4ffCB9818Db2D7025b8, --USDP
                0xB714654e905eDad1CA1940b7790A8239ece5A9ff, --TUSD
                0x9ec9551d4A1a1593b0ee8124D98590CC71b3B09D, --hUSDC
                0x91f8490eC27cbB1b2FaEdd29c2eC23011d7355FB, --hUSDT
                0x1e37E5b504F7773460d6eB0e24D2e7C223B66EC7, --HUSD
                0x4ECaBa5870353805a9F068101A40E0f32ed605C6, --USDT
                0xDDAfbb505ad214D7b80b1f830fcCc89B60fb7A83 --USDC
                ]) t(token_address)
    ),
    
    tokens AS (
        SELECT 
            t.contract_address AS token_address
            ,t.symbol
            ,t.decimals
        FROM 
            tokens.erc20 t
        INNER JOIN
            stablecoins st
            ON
            st.token_address = t.contract_address
        WHERE 
            blockchain = 'gnosis'
    ),
    
    prices AS (
        SELECT
            p.contract_address AS token_address
            ,p.minute
            ,p.price
        FROM 
            prices.usd p
        WHERE
            p.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND 
            p.minute >= (SELECT time FROM gnosis.blocks WHERE number = 11300566)
           
    ),
    
    inflows AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day',  l.block_time) AS day
            ,varbinary_ltrim(l.topic1) AS token_address
            ,SUM(varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_ltrim(l.data))/POWER(10,t.decimals)) AS value
        FROM
            gnosis.logs l
        LEFT JOIN
            tokens t
            ON
            t.token_address = varbinary_ltrim(l.topic1)
        WHERE
            l.contract_address = 0xf6A78083ca3e2a662D6dd1703c939c8aCE2e268d -- OmniBridge
            AND
            l.topic0 = 0x9afd47907e25028cdaca89d193518c302bbb128617d5a992c5abd45815526593 --TokensBridged 
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    ),
    
    outflows AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day',  l.block_time) AS day
            ,varbinary_ltrim(l.topic1) AS token_address
            ,SUM(varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_ltrim(l.data))/POWER(10,t.decimals)) AS value
        FROM
            gnosis.logs l
        LEFT JOIN
            tokens t
            ON
            t.token_address = varbinary_ltrim(l.topic1)
        WHERE
            l.contract_address = 0xf6A78083ca3e2a662D6dd1703c939c8aCE2e268d -- OmniBridge
            AND
            l.topic0 = 0x59a9a8027b9c87b961e254899821c9a276b5efc35d1f7409ea4f291470f1629a --TokensBridgingInitiated 
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    ),
    
    net_flow AS (
        SELECT
            day
            ,token_address
            ,SUM(inflow) AS inflow
            ,SUM(outflow) AS outflow
            ,SUM(inflow) + SUM(outflow) AS netflow
        FROM
            (
            SELECT 
                day
                ,token_address
                ,value AS inflow
                ,0 AS outflow
            FROM
                inflows
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 
                day
                ,token_address
                ,0 AS inflow
                ,-value AS outflow
            FROM
                outflows
        )
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    ),
    
    
    start_dates AS (
        SELECT
            token_address
            ,MIN(day) AS day
        FROM
            net_flow
        GROUP BY
            1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day',time) AS day
        FROM
            gnosis.blocks
        WHERE
            number >= 11300566 -- OmniBridge contract creation block
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    tokens_calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            c.day
            ,s.token_address
        FROM
            calendar c
        CROSS JOIN
            start_dates s
        WHERE
            c.day >= s.day
            AND 
            s.token_address IS NOT NULL
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        tc.day
        ,t.symbol
        ,COALESCE(n.inflow,0) AS inflow
        ,COALESCE(n.outflow,0) AS outflow
        ,COALESCE(n.netflow,0) AS netflow
        ,SUM(COALESCE(n.netflow,0)) OVER w AS total_flow
    FROM
        tokens_calendar tc
    LEFT JOIN
        net_flow n
        ON
        n.day = tc.day
        and
        n.token_address = tc.token_address
    INNER JOIN
        tokens t
        ON 
        t.token_address = tc.token_address
    WINDOW w AS (
        PARTITION BY
            tc.token_address
        ORDER BY 
            tc.day
    )
    ```

### ETH-xDAI AMB Flow: Token Cohorts

**Query ID:** 3512543 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    bluechips AS (
        SELECT
            t.token_address
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[
                0x8e5bBbb09Ed1ebdE8674Cda39A0c169401db4252, --WBTC
                0x44fA8E6f47987339850636F88629646662444217, --DAI
                0x9C58BAcC331c9aa871AFD802DB6379a98e80CEdb, --GNO
                0x6A023CCd1ff6F2045C3309768eAd9E68F978f6e1, --WETH
                0x177127622c4A00F3d409B75571e12cB3c8973d3c --COW
                ]) t(token_address)
    ),
    
    stablecoins AS (
        SELECT
            t.token_address
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[
                0xdd96B45877d0E8361a4DDb732da741e97f3191Ff, --BUSD
                0x7300AaFC0Ef0d47Daeb850f8b6a1931b40aCab33, --mUSD
                0xaBEf652195F98A91E490f047A5006B71c85f058d, --crvUSD
                0x4C36d2919e407f0Cc2Ee3c993ccF8ac26d9CE64e, --sUSD
                0xFe7ed09C4956f7cdb54eC4ffCB9818Db2D7025b8, --USDP
                0xB714654e905eDad1CA1940b7790A8239ece5A9ff, --TUSD
                0x9ec9551d4A1a1593b0ee8124D98590CC71b3B09D, --hUSDC
                0x91f8490eC27cbB1b2FaEdd29c2eC23011d7355FB, --hUSDT
                0x1e37E5b504F7773460d6eB0e24D2e7C223B66EC7, --HUSD
                0x4ECaBa5870353805a9F068101A40E0f32ed605C6, --USDT
                0xDDAfbb505ad214D7b80b1f830fcCc89B60fb7A83 --USDC
                ]) t(token_address)
    ),
    
    tokens AS (
        SELECT 
            contract_address AS token_address
            ,symbol
            ,decimals
        FROM 
            tokens.erc20
        WHERE 
            blockchain = 'gnosis'
    ),
    
    prices AS (
        SELECT
            p.contract_address AS token_address
            ,p.minute
            ,p.price
        FROM 
            prices.usd p
        WHERE
            p.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND 
            p.minute >= (SELECT time FROM gnosis.blocks WHERE number = 11300566)
           
    ),
    
    inflow AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day',  l.block_time) AS day
            ,varbinary_substring(l.topic1,13,20) AS token_address
           -- ,varbinary_ltrim(l.topic1) AS token_address
            ,SUM(varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_ltrim(l.data))/POWER(10,t.decimals)) AS value
        FROM
            gnosis.logs l
        LEFT JOIN
            tokens t
            ON
            t.token_address = varbinary_substring(l.topic1,13,20)
        LEFT JOIN
            stablecoins st
            ON
            st.token_address = varbinary_substring(l.topic1,13,20)
        LEFT JOIN
            bluechips bs
            ON
            bs.token_address = varbinary_substring(l.topic1,13,20)
        WHERE
            l.contract_address = 0xf6A78083ca3e2a662D6dd1703c939c8aCE2e268d -- OmniBridge Gnosis: xDai Bridge
            AND
            l.topic0 = 0x9afd47907e25028cdaca89d193518c302bbb128617d5a992c5abd45815526593 --TokensBridged 
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    ),
    
    outflow AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day',  l.block_time) AS day
            ,varbinary_substring(l.topic1,13,20) AS token_address
            ,SUM(varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_ltrim(l.data))/POWER(10,t.decimals)) AS value
        FROM
            gnosis.logs l
        LEFT JOIN
            tokens t
            ON
            t.token_address = varbinary_substring(l.topic1,13,20)
        WHERE
            l.contract_address = 0xf6A78083ca3e2a662D6dd1703c939c8aCE2e268d -- OmniBridge
            AND
            l.topic0 = 0x59a9a8027b9c87b961e254899821c9a276b5efc35d1f7409ea4f291470f1629a --TokensBridgingInitiated 
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    ),
    
    net_flow AS (
        SELECT
            day
            ,token_address
            ,SUM(inflow) AS inflow
            ,SUM(outflow) AS outflow
            ,SUM(inflow) + SUM(outflow) AS netflow
        FROM
            (
            SELECT 
                day
                ,token_address
                ,value AS inflow
                ,0 AS outflow
            FROM
                inflow
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 
                day
                ,token_address
                ,0 AS inflow
                ,-value AS outflow
            FROM
                outflow
        )
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    ),
    
    
    start_dates AS (
        SELECT
            token_address
            ,MIN(day) AS day
        FROM
            net_flow
        GROUP BY
            1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day',time) AS day
        FROM
            gnosis.blocks
        WHERE
            number >= 11300566 -- OmniBridge contract creation block
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    tokens_calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            c.day
            ,s.token_address
        FROM
            calendar c
        CROSS JOIN
            start_dates s
        WHERE
            c.day >= s.day
            AND 
            s.token_address IS NOT NULL
    ),
    
    total_per_token AS (
        SELECT 
            tc.day
            ,tc.token_address
            ,COALESCE(n.inflow,0) AS inflow
            ,COALESCE(n.outflow,0) AS outflow
            ,COALESCE(n.netflow,0) AS netflow
            ,COALESCE(SUM(n.netflow) OVER w,0) AS total_flow
            
            ,COALESCE(n.inflow * p.price,0) AS inflow_usd
            ,COALESCE(n.outflow * p.price,0) AS outflow_usd
            ,COALESCE(n.netflow * p.price,0) AS netflow_usd
            ,COALESCE((SUM(n.netflow) OVER w) * p.price,0) AS total_flow_usd
        FROM
            tokens_calendar tc
        LEFT JOIN
            net_flow n
            ON
            n.day = tc.day
            and
            n.token_address = tc.token_address
        LEFT JOIN
                prices p
                ON
                p.token_address =  tc.token_address
                AND
                p.minute = DATE_TRUNC('minute',  tc.day)
        WINDOW w AS (
            PARTITION BY
                tc.token_address
            ORDER BY 
                tc.day
        )
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t.day
        ,CASE
            WHEN s.token_address IS NOT NULL THEN 'Stablecoins'
            WHEN b.token_address IS NOT NULL THEN 'Bluechips'
            ELSE 'Alts'
        END AS type
        ,SUM(t.inflow_usd) AS inflow_usd
        ,SUM(t.outflow_usd) AS outflow_usd
        ,SUM(t.netflow_usd) AS netflow_usd
        ,SUM(CASE
                WHEN s.token_address IS NOT NULL THEN t.total_flow
                ELSE t.total_flow_usd
            END
            )
         AS total_flow_usd2
        ,SUM(t.total_flow_usd) AS total_flow_usd
    FROM
        total_per_token t
    LEFT JOIN
        bluechips b
        ON
        b.token_address = t.token_address
    LEFT JOIN
        stablecoins s
        ON
        s.token_address = t.token_address
    GROUP BY
        1, 2
    ```

### EURe Revenue by Cohort (Monthly)

**Query ID:** 6518700 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    eure_fees_dense AS (
        SELECT 
           block_date
            ,user
            ,fees
        FROM query_6518631 --gnosis_rev_eure_monthly_fees_per_address_dense_v2
    ),
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '>=100',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 0.1 THEN '0.01-0.1'
                    WHEN upper = 0.5 THEN '0.1-0.5'
                    WHEN upper = 1 THEN '0.5-1'
                    WHEN upper = 3 THEN '1-3'
                    WHEN upper = 6 THEN '3-6'
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '6-10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '10-100'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[0.01,0.1,0.5,1,3,6,10,100]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[0.1,0.5,1,3,6,10,100,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    weekly_size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,lower
            ,upper
            ,cohort
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT block_date FROM eure_fees_dense
        ) t1
        CROSS JOIN
            size_cohorts t2
    )
    
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cohort
        ,SUM(COALESCE(fees,0)) AS fees_total
        ,SUM(IF(fees>0,1,0)) AS users_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.block_date
            ,t2.cohort
            ,IF(t1.fees >= t2.lower AND t1.fees < t2.upper,t1.fees, 0) AS fees
        FROM eure_fees_dense t1
        INNER JOIN
            weekly_size_cohorts t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            
    )
    WHERE
        block_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### EURe Revenue by Cohort (Rolling Year)

**Query ID:** 6518806 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    eure_fees_dense AS (
        SELECT 
           block_date
            ,user
            ,annual_rolling_fees
        FROM query_6518535 --gnosis_rev_eure_rolling_fees_per_address_dense_v2
    ),
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '>=100',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 3 THEN '1-3'
                    WHEN upper = 6 THEN '3-6'
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '6-10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '10-100'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[1,3,6,10,100]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[3,6,10,100,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    weekly_size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,lower
            ,upper
            ,cohort
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT block_date FROM eure_fees_dense
        ) t1
        CROSS JOIN
            size_cohorts t2
    )
    
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cohort
        ,SUM(COALESCE(annual_rolling_fees,0)) AS annual_rolling_fees_total
        ,SUM(IF(annual_rolling_fees>0,1,0)) AS users_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.block_date
            ,t2.cohort
            ,IF(t1.annual_rolling_fees >= t2.lower AND t1.annual_rolling_fees < t2.upper,t1.annual_rolling_fees, 0) AS annual_rolling_fees
        FROM eure_fees_dense t1
        INNER JOIN
            weekly_size_cohorts t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            
    )
    WHERE
        block_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### EVMs Daily Active Users

**Query ID:** 3904777 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `from_date` (datetime): `2024-06-01 00:00:00`
- `to_date` (datetime): `2024-07-08 00:00:00`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        day
        ,blockchain
        ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            DATE_TRUNC('day',block_time) AS day
            ,blockchain
            ,"from" AS user
        FROM evms.transactions
        WHERE
            block_time >= TIMESTAMP '{{from_date}}'
            AND
            block_time <= TIMESTAMP '{{to_date}}'
    )
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### Earned interest over time (AAVE) - [Compounding in xDai bridges]

**Query ID:** 214966 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day,
        SUM(interest / 1e18) AS interest
    FROM bridge."InterestFetcher_evt_InterestFetched"
    WHERE token = '\x7fc66500c84a76ad7e9c93437bfc5ac33e2ddae9'
    GROUP BY 1
    ```

### Earned interest over time (USDC, USDT, DAI) - [Compounding in xDai bridges]

**Query ID:** 212501 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tokens;
    WITH  vals (name, address, decimals) AS (
        VALUES
            ('USDT'::text, '\xdac17f958d2ee523a2206206994597c13d831ec7'::bytea, 1e6::int),
            ('USDC', '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48', 1e6),
            ('DAI', '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F', 1e18)
    ) 
    SELECT * INTO temporary table tokens FROM vals;
    
    SELECT
        date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day,
        name,
        SUM(interest / decimals) AS interest
    FROM bridge."InterestFetcher_evt_InterestFetched" evts
    LEFT JOIN tokens ON evts.token = tokens.address
    WHERE name IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

**Query ID:** 214991 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tokens;
    WITH  vals (name, address, decimals) AS (
        VALUES
            ('USDT'::text, '\xdac17f958d2ee523a2206206994597c13d831ec7'::bytea, 1e6::int),
            ('USDC', '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48', 1e6),
            ('DAI', '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F', 1e18)
    ) 
    SELECT * INTO temporary table tokens FROM vals;
    
    SELECT
        date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day,
        SUM(interest / decimals) AS interest
    FROM bridge."InterestFetcher_evt_InterestFetched" evts
    LEFT JOIN tokens ON evts.token = tokens.address
    WHERE name IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1
    ```

### EasyStaking Total Staked

**Query ID:** 16540 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT total_deposited, total_deposited_usd, (total_deposited*100/circulating_supply) AS percent_of_circulating_supply
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(total) AS total_deposited, SUM(total*price) AS total_deposited_usd
        FROM 
         (
            SELECT SUM((amount+"accruedEmission")/1e18) AS total
            FROM stake."EasyStaking_evt_Deposited"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT SUM((-amount-fee+"accruedEmission")/1e18) AS total
            FROM stake."EasyStaking_evt_Withdrawn"
        ) AS total
        CROSS JOIN (
            SELECT price
            FROM (
                SELECT price
                FROM prices.usd
                WHERE symbol = 'STAKE'
                ORDER BY minute DESC
                LIMIT 1
            ) AS price
        ) AS data
    ) AS deposit_data
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT SUM(amount)/1e18 AS circulating_supply
        FROM (
            SELECT SUM(value) AS amount
            FROM stake."STAKE_evt_Transfer0" tr
            WHERE "from" IN (
                '\x9bc4a93883c522d3c79c81c2999aab52e2268d03',
                '\x3cfe51b61e25750ab1426b0072e5d0cc5c30aafa',
                '\x0218b706898d234b85d2494df21eb0677eaea918'
            )
        UNION ALL
            SELECT SUM(-value) AS amount
            FROM stake."STAKE_evt_Transfer0" tr
            WHERE "to" IN (
                '\x9bc4a93883c522d3c79c81c2999aab52e2268d03',
                '\x3cfe51b61e25750ab1426b0072e5d0cc5c30aafa',
                '\x0218b706898d234b85d2494df21eb0677eaea918',
                '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000',
                '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000001',
                '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000002',
                '\x00000000219ab540356cbb839cbe05303d7705fa'
            )
        UNION ALL
            SELECT SUM(value) AS amount
            FROM stake."STAKE_evt_Transfer" tr
            WHERE "from" IN (
                '\x9bc4a93883c522d3c79c81c2999aab52e2268d03',
                '\x3cfe51b61e25750ab1426b0072e5d0cc5c30aafa',
                '\x0218b706898d234b85d2494df21eb0677eaea918'
            )
        UNION ALL
            SELECT SUM(-value) AS amount
            FROM stake."STAKE_evt_Transfer" tr
            WHERE "to" IN (
                '\x9bc4a93883c522d3c79c81c2999aab52e2268d03',
                '\x3cfe51b61e25750ab1426b0072e5d0cc5c30aafa',
                '\x0218b706898d234b85d2494df21eb0677eaea918',
                '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000',
                '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000001',
                '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000002',
                '\x00000000219ab540356cbb839cbe05303d7705fa'
            )
        UNION ALL
            SELECT SUM(amount) AS amount
            FROM stake."STAKE_evt_Mint"
        ) AS transfers
    ) AS circulating_supply_data;
    ```

### Eywa Flows

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql

      DATE_TRUNC('month', evt_block_time) AS date,
      targetChain                         AS chain,
      SUM(underlying_usd)                 AS amount_usd
    FROM
    ```

### Eywa Flows

**Query ID:** 5237952 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH daily_signed AS (
      SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('day', evt_block_time)    AS day,
        underlying_symbol                    AS symbol,
        CASE
          WHEN sourceChain = 'gnosis' 
           AND targetChain <> 'gnosis' THEN -underlying_usd
          WHEN targetChain = 'gnosis' 
           AND sourceChain <> 'gnosis' THEN  underlying_usd
          ELSE 0
        END                                   AS signed_usd
      FROM
        query_5233748
      WHERE 
           (sourceChain = 'gnosis' AND targetChain <> 'gnosis')
        OR (targetChain = 'gnosis' AND sourceChain <> 'gnosis')
    ),
    
    monthly_netflow AS (
      SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('month', day) AS month,
        symbol,
        SUM(signed_usd)        AS netflow_usd
      FROM
        daily_signed
      GROUP BY
        1, 2
    )
    
    SELECT
      month    AS date,
      symbol,
      netflow_usd
    FROM
      monthly_netflow
    ORDER BY
      date,
      symbol;
    ```

### Eywa Flows

**Query ID:** 5237944 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH gnosis_flows AS (
      SELECT
        evt_block_time      AS block_time,
        sourceChain         AS source_chain,
        targetChain         AS target_chain,
        underlying_usd      AS amount_usd
      FROM
        query_5233748
    ),
    
    daily_net AS (
      SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS date,
        SUM(
          CASE 
            WHEN source_chain = 'gnosis'
             AND target_chain <> 'gnosis'
            THEN -amount_usd
            ELSE 0
          END
        ) AS outflow_usd,
        SUM(
          CASE 
            WHEN target_chain = 'gnosis'
             AND source_chain <> 'gnosis'
            THEN amount_usd
            ELSE 0
          END
        ) AS inflow_usd
      FROM
        gnosis_flows
      GROUP BY
        1
    )
    
    SELECT
      date,
      outflow_usd   AS "Outflow",
      inflow_usd    AS "Inflow",
      SUM(inflow_usd + outflow_usd) OVER (ORDER BY date) AS "Netflow"
    FROM
      daily_net
    ORDER BY
      date;
    ```

### Eywa Flows

**Query ID:** 5237658 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH gnosis_flows AS (
      SELECT
        evt_block_time         AS block_time,
        sourceChain            AS source_chain,
        targetChain            AS target_chain,
        underlying_token       AS token_address,
        underlying_symbol      AS symbol,
        underlying_amount_raw  AS amount,
        underlying_usd         AS amount_usd
      FROM
        query_5233748
    )
    
    SELECT
      source_chain   AS chain,
      symbol,
      SUM(amount_usd) AS amount_usd,
      'Inflow'       AS label
    FROM
      gnosis_flows
    WHERE
      target_chain = 'gnosis'
      AND source_chain <> 'gnosis'
      AND block_time > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30' DAY
    GROUP BY
      1, 2, 4
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT
      target_chain   AS chain,
      symbol,
      SUM(amount_usd) AS amount_usd,
      'Outflow'      AS label
    FROM
      gnosis_flows
    WHERE
      source_chain = 'gnosis'
      AND target_chain <> 'gnosis'
      AND block_time > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30' DAY
    GROUP BY
      1, 2, 4
    
    ORDER BY
      chain,
      symbol,
      label;
    ```

### Failed Txs

**Query ID:** 3510953 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
      COUNT(CASE WHEN success = FALSE THEN 1 END) AS "Fail"
    FROM gnosis.transactions
    WHERE
      block_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24' HOUR
    ```

### Fees Revenue

**Query ID:** 3495900 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    blocks AS (
        SELECT
            time as block_time
            ,base_fee_per_gas
        FROM
          gnosis.blocks
        WHERE
          time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR
    )
    
    SELECT
        SUM(CAST((tx.gas_price - blk.base_fee_per_gas) AS DOUBLE) * tx.gas_used) /POWER(10,18) As revenue_value
    FROM
      gnosis.transactions tx
    INNER JOIN
        blocks blk
        ON
        blk.block_time = tx.block_time
    ```

### Fees paid for WETH transfers by the oracle per day - [ Omnibridge ]

**Query ID:** 298025 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT date_trunc('day', block_time) AS time, SUM(gas_used*gas_price)/1e18 AS eth_fee
    FROM ethereum."transactions"
    WHERE hash IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash
        FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
        WHERE (
            "from" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671' AND
            contract_address = '\xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2' AND
            evt_block_time > '2021-10-01'
        )
    ) AND "from" = '\x87533bfd390C6d11aFD8dF1A8c095657E0eeeD0d'
    GROUP BY 1
    ```

### Finalized Markets Info

**Query ID:** 3782132 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    
    omen_gnosis_markets_status AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3601593
        WHERE
            status IN ('Finalized','Under Finalization')
    ),
    
    gnosis_omen_markets_tvl AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,t3.symbol
            ,t3.decimals
            ,ARRAY_AGG(t1.tvl ORDER BY t1.block_time DESC, t1.evt_index DESC)[1] AS tvl
        FROM query_3668377 t1
        INNER JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets_status t2
            ON 
            t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        LEFT JOIN
            tokens.erc20 t3
            ON
            t3.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND
            t3.contract_address = t2.collateralToken
        GROUP BY
            1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_supply AS (
        --gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_balance_sparse_v
        SELECT  
            t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,-ARRAY_AGG(t1.outcomeTokens ORDER BY t1.evt_block_time DESC, t1.evt_index DESC)[1][1] AS supply
        FROM query_3684914 t1
        INNER JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets_status t2
            ON 
            t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        WHERE 
            t1.user = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    gnosis_omen_markets_odds_reserves AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
            ,ARRAY_AGG(t1.odds ORDER BY t1.block_time DESC, t1.evt_index DESC)[1] AS odds
        FROM query_3668140 t1
        INNER JOIN
            omen_gnosis_markets_status t2
            ON 
            t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
        GROUP BY 
            1
    )
    
    SELECT 
        status,
        REGEXP_REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(question, '␟', 3) ,'[^A-Za-z]', '') AS Category,
        ARRAY[SPLIT_PART(question, '␟', 1), SPLIT_PART(question, '␟', 2) ] AS Question,
        DATE_DIFF('day',creation_time, opening_time) AS "Duration in Days",
        opening_time AS "Closing Time",
        answer_time
    FROM omen_gnosis_markets_status t1
    INNER JOIN
        gnosis_omen_markets_tvl t2
        ON 
        t2.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
    INNER JOIN
        gnosis_omen_outcomeTokens_supply t3
        ON 
        t3.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
    INNER JOIN
        gnosis_omen_markets_odds_reserves t4
        ON 
        t4.fixedproductmarketmaker = t1.fixedproductmarketmaker
    ```

### First Moves Labeled Distribution

**Query ID:** 5346209 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Weeks` (number): `24`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      cutoff AS (
        SELECT CAST(date_add('week', -{{Last Weeks}}, now()) AS date) AS since_date
      ),
    
      custom_labels AS (
        SELECT
          address,
          label     AS name,
          'Custom'  AS category
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_address_labels_v
      ),
    
      combined_labels AS (
        SELECT * FROM custom_labels
      ),
    
      deduped_labels AS (
        SELECT address, name, category
        FROM (
          SELECT
            address, name, category,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY address) AS rn
          FROM combined_labels
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      first_moves AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_5346207
      ),
    
      mint_info AS (
        SELECT
          fm.*,
          l.contract_address                    AS mint_contract,
          l.value                               AS mint_raw,
          CAST(l.evt_block_date AS date)        AS mint_date
        FROM first_moves fm
        JOIN query_5260204 l
          ON l.evt_tx_hash = fm.mint_tx_hash
         AND l.evt_index   = fm.mint_evt_index
         AND l."from"      = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        , cutoff
        WHERE l.evt_block_date >= cutoff.since_date
      ),
    
      price_tbl AS (
        SELECT
          token_address,
          block_date,
          price,
          decimals
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v, cutoff
        WHERE block_date >= cutoff.since_date
      ),
    
      labeled_moves AS (
        SELECT
          mi.*,
          lower('0x' || to_hex(dl.address))               AS label_address,
          dl.category                                     AS label_category,
          dl.name                                         AS label_name,
          (mi.mint_raw / POWER(10, pt.decimals)) * pt.price AS mint_usd
        FROM mint_info mi
        LEFT JOIN deduped_labels dl
          ON mi.move_to = dl.address
        LEFT JOIN price_tbl pt
          ON pt.token_address = mi.mint_contract
         AND pt.block_date    = mi.mint_date
      )
    
    SELECT
      COALESCE(label_address,  'Unlabeled')   AS label_address,
      COALESCE(label_category, 'Unlabeled')   AS label_category,
      COALESCE(label_name,     'Unknown')     AS label_name,
      COUNT(*)                                 AS num_first_moves,
      ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2)          AS pct_of_moves,
      ROUND(SUM(mint_usd), 2)                                     AS volume_usd,
      ROUND(SUM(mint_usd) * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(mint_usd)) OVER (), 2) AS pct_of_volume
    FROM labeled_moves
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ORDER BY num_first_moves DESC;
    ```

### First Moves Labeled Distribution - BRLA

**Query ID:** 5469325 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Weeks` (number): `24`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      cutoff AS (
        SELECT
          date_add('week', -{{Last Weeks}}, now())               AS since_ts,
          CAST(date_add('week', -{{Last Weeks}}, now()) AS date) AS since_date
      ),
    
      custom_labels AS (
        SELECT
          address,
          label     AS name,
          'Custom'  AS category
        FROM query_5132156
      ),
    
      combined_labels AS (
        SELECT * FROM custom_labels
      ),
    
      deduped_labels AS (
        SELECT address, name, category
        FROM (
          SELECT
            address, name, category,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY address
            ) AS rn
          FROM combined_labels
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      first_moves AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM query_5469278
        CROSS JOIN cutoff
        WHERE mint_time >= cutoff.since_ts
      ),
    
      mint_info AS (
        SELECT
          fm.*,
          l.contract_address                     AS mint_contract_address,
          l.value                                AS mint_raw,
          CAST(l.evt_block_date AS date)         AS mint_date
        FROM first_moves fm
        JOIN brla_gnosis.brlav1_1_evt_transfer l
          ON l.evt_tx_hash = fm.mint_tx_hash
         AND l.evt_index   = fm.mint_evt_index
         AND l."from"      = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
        CROSS JOIN cutoff
        WHERE l.contract_address = 0xfecb3f7c54e2caae9dc6ac9060a822d47e053760
          AND l.evt_block_time >= cutoff.since_ts
      ),
    
      price_tbl AS (
        SELECT
          token_address,
          block_date,
          price,
          decimals
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v
        CROSS JOIN cutoff
        WHERE block_date   >= cutoff.since_date
          AND token_address = 0xfecb3f7c54e2caae9dc6ac9060a822d47e053760
      ),
    
      labeled_moves AS (
        SELECT
          mi.*,
          lower('0x' || to_hex(dl.address))                AS label_address,
          dl.category                                      AS label_category,
          dl.name                                          AS label_name,
          (mi.mint_raw / POWER(10, pt.decimals)) * pt.price AS mint_usd
        FROM mint_info mi
        LEFT JOIN deduped_labels dl
          ON mi.move_to = dl.address
        LEFT JOIN price_tbl pt
          ON pt.token_address = mi.mint_contract_address
         AND pt.block_date    = mi.mint_date
      )
    
    SELECT
      COALESCE(label_address,  'Unlabeled')  AS label_address,
      COALESCE(label_category, 'Unlabeled')  AS label_category,
      COALESCE(label_name,     'Unknown')    AS label_name,
      COUNT(*)                                AS num_first_moves,
      ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2)  AS pct_of_moves,
      ROUND(SUM(mint_usd), 2)                               AS volume_usd,
      ROUND(SUM(mint_usd) * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(mint_usd)) OVER (), 2) AS pct_of_volume
    FROM labeled_moves
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ORDER BY num_first_moves DESC;
    ```

### First Moves Labeled Distribution - Buenbit

**Query ID:** 5787857 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Weeks` (number): `24`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      cutoff AS (
        SELECT CAST(date_add('week', -{{Last Weeks}}, now()) AS date) AS since_date
      ),
    
      first_moves AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM query_5787730, cutoff
        WHERE CAST(mint_time AS date) >= cutoff.since_date
      ),
    
      custom_labels AS (
        SELECT address, label AS name, 'Custom' AS category
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_address_labels_v
      ),
      combined_labels AS (
        SELECT * FROM custom_labels
      ),
      deduped_labels AS (
        SELECT address, name, category
        FROM (
          SELECT address, name, category,
                 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY address) AS rn
          FROM combined_labels
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      labeled_moves AS (
        SELECT
          fm.*,
          lower('0x' || to_hex(dl.address)) AS label_address,
          dl.category                        AS label_category,
          dl.name                            AS label_name,
          -- already priced in USD by Dune; fallback to native if ever null
          COALESCE(fm.mint_amount_usd, fm.mint_amount_native) AS mint_usd
        FROM first_moves fm
        LEFT JOIN deduped_labels dl
          ON fm.move_to = dl.address
      )
    
    SELECT
      COALESCE(label_address,  'Unlabeled') AS label_address,
      COALESCE(label_category, 'Unlabeled') AS label_category,
      COALESCE(label_name,     'Unknown')   AS label_name,
      COUNT(*)                               AS num_first_moves,
      ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2)                  AS pct_of_moves,
      ROUND(SUM(mint_usd), 2)                                               AS volume_usd,
      ROUND(SUM(mint_usd) * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(mint_usd)) OVER (), 2)         AS pct_of_volume
    FROM labeled_moves
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ORDER BY num_first_moves DESC;
    ```

### First Tx in Block Gas Price per Tx-Type

**Query ID:** 3493239 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
         date_trunc('hour', block_time) AS hour
        ,type AS tx_type
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(gas_price,0.5)/POWER(10,9) AS median_tx_gas_price_gwei
    FROM 
        gnosis.transactions
    WHERE
        block_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR
        AND
        index = 0
    GROUP BY
        date_trunc('hour', block_time)
        ,type
    ```

### First-Mint to Burn Holding Time Distribution

**Query ID:** 5391309 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Weeks` (number): `24`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      cutoff AS (
        SELECT date_add('week', -{{Last Weeks}}, now()) AS since_ts
      ),
    
      dedup_mints AS (
        SELECT
          evt_tx_hash,
          "to"               AS user,
          evt_block_time     AS mint_time
        FROM (
          SELECT
            q.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY q.evt_tx_hash
              ORDER BY (q.version = 'V2') DESC, q.evt_block_time
            ) AS rn
          FROM query_5260204 q
          CROSS JOIN cutoff
          WHERE q."from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
            AND q.evt_block_time >= cutoff.since_ts
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      first_mint AS (
        SELECT
          user,
          MIN(mint_time) AS mint_time
        FROM dedup_mints
        GROUP BY user
      ),
    
      dedup_burns AS (
        SELECT
          evt_tx_hash,
          "from"             AS user,
          evt_block_time     AS burn_time
        FROM (
          SELECT
            q.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY q.evt_tx_hash
              ORDER BY (q.version = 'V2') DESC, q.evt_block_time
            ) AS rn
          FROM query_5260204 q
          CROSS JOIN cutoff
          WHERE q."to" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
            AND q.evt_block_time >= cutoff.since_ts
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      hold_times AS (
        SELECT
          f.user,
          DATE_DIFF('day', f.mint_time, MIN(b.burn_time)) AS days_held
        FROM first_mint f
        JOIN dedup_burns b
          ON b.user = f.user
         AND b.burn_time > f.mint_time
        GROUP BY f.user, f.mint_time
      ),
    
      buckets AS (
        SELECT
          CASE
            WHEN days_held = 0            THEN 'Same day'
            WHEN days_held BETWEEN 1 AND 7   THEN '1–7 days'
            WHEN days_held BETWEEN 8 AND 30  THEN '8–30 days'
            ELSE                               '> 30 days'
          END AS bucket,
          COUNT(*) AS num_users
        FROM hold_times
        GROUP BY 1
      )
    
    SELECT
      bucket,
      num_users,
      ROUND(num_users * 100.0 / SUM(num_users) OVER (), 2) AS pct_of_users
    FROM buckets
    ORDER BY
      CASE bucket
        WHEN 'Same day'  THEN 1
        WHEN '1–7 days'  THEN 2
        WHEN '8–30 days' THEN 3
        ELSE                 4
      END;
    ```

### First-Mint to Burn Holding Time Distribution - BRLA

**Query ID:** 5472072 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Weeks` (number): `24`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      cutoff AS (
        SELECT date_add('week', -{{Last Weeks}}, now()) AS since_ts
      ),
    
      dedup_mints AS (
        SELECT
          evt_tx_hash,
          "to"               AS user,
          evt_block_time     AS mint_time
        FROM (
          SELECT
            t.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY t.evt_tx_hash
              ORDER BY t.evt_block_time
            ) AS rn
          FROM brla_gnosis.brlav1_1_evt_transfer t
          CROSS JOIN cutoff
          WHERE t."from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
            AND t.evt_block_time >= cutoff.since_ts
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      first_mint AS (
        SELECT
          user,
          MIN(mint_time) AS mint_time
        FROM dedup_mints
        GROUP BY user
      ),
    
      dedup_burns AS (
        SELECT
          evt_tx_hash,
          "from"           AS user,
          evt_block_time   AS burn_time
        FROM (
          SELECT
            t.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY t.evt_tx_hash
              ORDER BY t.evt_block_time
            ) AS rn
          FROM brla_gnosis.brlav1_1_evt_transfer t
          CROSS JOIN cutoff
          WHERE t."to" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
            AND t.evt_block_time >= cutoff.since_ts
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      hold_times AS (
        SELECT
          f.user,
          DATE_DIFF('day', f.mint_time, MIN(b.burn_time)) AS days_held
        FROM first_mint f
        JOIN dedup_burns b
          ON b.user = f.user
         AND b.burn_time > f.mint_time
        GROUP BY f.user, f.mint_time
      ),
    
      buckets AS (
        SELECT
          CASE
            WHEN days_held = 0            THEN 'Same day'
            WHEN days_held BETWEEN 1 AND 7 THEN '1–7 days'
            WHEN days_held BETWEEN 8 AND 30 THEN '8–30 days'
            ELSE                             '> 30 days'
          END AS bucket,
          COUNT(*) AS num_users
        FROM hold_times
        GROUP BY 1
      )
    
    SELECT
      bucket,
      num_users,
      ROUND(num_users * 100.0 / SUM(num_users) OVER (), 2) AS pct_of_users
    FROM buckets
    ORDER BY
      CASE bucket
        WHEN 'Same day'  THEN 1
        WHEN '1–7 days'  THEN 2
        WHEN '8–30 days' THEN 3
        ELSE                4
      END;
    ```

### Forex Trading Volume

**Query ID:** 4311595 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_token_labels AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4302711
        WHERE sector = 'Stable'
            
    ),
    
    trades AS (
        SELECT 
            CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(t1.block_date) AS VARCHAR),' - Q', CAST(QUARTER(t1.block_date) AS VARCHAR)) AS block_date
            ,token_pair
            ,SUM(amount_usd) AS amount_usd
        FROM dex.trades t1
        INNER JOIN 
            gnosis_token_labels t2
            ON t2.token_address = t1.token_bought_address
        INNER JOIN 
            gnosis_token_labels t3
            ON t3.token_address = t1.token_sold_address
            AND t3.currency != t2.currency
        WHERE
            t1.block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1' YEAR
            AND
            t1.blockchain = 'gnosis'
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    
    
    SELECT
         block_date
        ,CASE
            WHEN rcnt > 5 THEN 'Other Pairs'
            ELSE token_pair
        END AS token_pair
        ,SUM(amount_usd) AS amount_usd
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            *
            ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY block_date ORDER BY amount_usd DESC) AS rcnt
        FROM
            trades
    )
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ORDER BY 2 ASC
    ```

### GNO

**Query ID:** 4378268 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    gno_labels_sparse_daily_balance AS (
        SELECT 
            *
        FROM 
            query_4378260 --gnosis_gno_labels_sparse_daily_balance_v
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            label
            ,block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                label
                ,MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
                gno_labels_sparse_daily_balance
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.block_date
        ,t1.label
        ,LAST_VALUE(t2.amount) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY t1.label ORDER BY t1.block_date) AS amount
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        gno_labels_sparse_daily_balance t2
        ON t2.label = t1.label
        AND t2.block_date = t1.block_date
    WHERE
        t1.block_date >= DATE '2021-01-01'
    ORDER BY 1 DESC, 2 ASC
    ```

### GNO Holders on Ethereum

**Query ID:** 3228881 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `tokenContract` (text): `default value`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    balance as (
        SELECT address ,sum(amount)/1e18 as amount
        FROM (
            SELECT -- tokens sold
                "from" as address, 
                -SUM(value) as amount
            FROM erc20_ethereum.evt_Transfer
            WHERE contract_address = from_hex('{{tokenContract}}')
            GROUP BY 1
            
            UNION ALL
        
            SELECT -- tokens bought
                "to" as address, 
                SUM(value) as amount
            FROM erc20_ethereum.evt_Transfer
            WHERE contract_address = from_hex('{{tokenContract}}')
            GROUP BY 1
            ) temp
        GROUP BY 1
        ORDER BY 2 DESC
    )
    
    SELECT 
        address
        ,amount
    FROM balance WHERE amount > 0
    ```

### GNO Mint/Burn

**Query ID:** 3511402 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    supply_mint AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('hour', block_time) AS hour
            ,SUM(varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_ltrim(varbinary_substring(data,1,32)))/POWER(10,18)) AS value
        FROM 
            gnosis.logs
        WHERE 
            contract_address = 0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb 
            AND
            topic0 = 0x0f6798a560793a54c3bcfe86a93cde1e73087d944c0ea20544137d4121396885
            AND
            block_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR
        GROUP BY
            1
    ),
    
    supply_burn AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('hour', block_time) AS hour
            ,SUM(varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_ltrim(varbinary_substring(data,1,32)))/POWER(10,18)) AS value
        FROM 
            gnosis.logs
        WHERE 
            contract_address = 0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb 
            AND
            topic0 = 0xcc16f5dbb4873280815c1ee09dbd06736cffcc184412cf7a71a0fdb75d397ca5
            AND
            block_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR
        GROUP BY
            1
    ),
    
    block_hours AS (
        SELECT
             DATE_TRUNC('hour', time) AS hour
        FROM
            gnosis.blocks
        WHERE
            time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR
        GROUP BY 
            1
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        hour
        ,mint
        ,burn
        ,SUM(mint) OVER w AS mint_tot
        ,-SUM(burn) OVER w AS burn_tot
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            d.hour
            ,COALESCE(m.value,0)  AS mint
            ,-COALESCE(b.value,0) AS burn
        FROM
            block_hours d
        LEFT JOIN
            supply_mint m
            ON
            m.hour = d.hour
        LEFT JOIN 
            supply_burn b
            ON
            b.hour = d.hour
    )
    WINDOW w AS (
        ORDER BY 
            hour
    )
    ORDER BY hour DESC
    ```

### GNO Supply

**Query ID:** 4615226 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gno_supply_diff_ethereum AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,SUM(
                IF("from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000, 
                    CAST(amount_raw AS INT256),
                    -CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)
                    )
                ) AS amount_raw
        FROM tokens_ethereum.transfers
        WHERE 
            contract_address = 0x6810e776880C02933D47DB1b9fc05908e5386b96
            AND
            ("from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 OR "to" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000)
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    gno_supply_diff_gnosis AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,SUM(
                IF("from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000, 
                    CAST(amount_raw AS INT256),
                    -CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)
                    )
                ) AS amount_raw
        FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers
        WHERE 
            contract_address = 0x9C58BAcC331c9aa871AFD802DB6379a98e80CEdb
            AND
            ("from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 OR "to" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000)
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    vesting_balance_diff AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,SUM(
                IF("to" = 0xeC83f750adfe0e52A8b0DbA6eeB6be5Ba0beE535, 
                    CAST(amount_raw AS INT256),
                    -CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)
                    )
                ) AS amount_raw
        FROM tokens_ethereum.transfers
        WHERE 
            contract_address = 0x6810e776880C02933D47DB1b9fc05908e5386b96
            AND
            ("from" = 0xeC83f750adfe0e52A8b0DbA6eeB6be5Ba0beE535 OR "to" = 0xeC83f750adfe0e52A8b0DbA6eeB6be5Ba0beE535)
        GROUP BY 1
    
        UNION ALL
    
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,SUM(
                IF("to" = 0x851b7f3ab81bd8df354f0d7640efcd7288553419, 
                    CAST(amount_raw AS INT256),
                    -CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)
                    )
                ) AS amount_raw
        FROM tokens_ethereum.transfers
        WHERE 
            contract_address = 0x6810e776880C02933D47DB1b9fc05908e5386b96
            AND
            ("from" = 0x851b7f3ab81bd8df354f0d7640efcd7288553419 OR "to" = 0x851b7f3ab81bd8df354f0d7640efcd7288553419)
        GROUP BY 1
    
        UNION ALL
    
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,SUM(
                IF("to" = 0x3257bde8cf067ae6f1ddc0e4b140fe02e3c5e44f, 
                    CAST(amount_raw AS INT256),
                    -CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)
                    )
                ) AS amount_raw
        FROM tokens_ethereum.transfers
        WHERE 
            contract_address = 0x6810e776880C02933D47DB1b9fc05908e5386b96
            AND
            ("from" = 0x3257bde8cf067ae6f1ddc0e4b140fe02e3c5e44f OR "to" = 0x3257bde8cf067ae6f1ddc0e4b140fe02e3c5e44f)
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    bridge_balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,SUM(
                IF("to" = 0x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671, 
                    CAST(amount_raw AS INT256),
                    -CAST(amount_raw AS INT256)
                    )
                ) AS amount_raw
        FROM tokens_ethereum.transfers
        WHERE 
            contract_address = 0x6810e776880C02933D47DB1b9fc05908e5386b96
            AND
            ("from" = 0x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671 OR "to" = 0x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671)
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    supply_diff AS (
        SELECT
            label
            ,block_date
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT 'Ethereum Circ. Supply' AS label, block_date, amount_raw FROM gno_supply_diff_ethereum
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 'Ethereum Circ. Supply' AS label, block_date, -amount_raw FROM vesting_balance_diff
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 'Ethereum Circ. Supply' AS label, block_date, -amount_raw FROM bridge_balance_diff
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 'Non-Circ. Supply' AS label, block_date, amount_raw FROM vesting_balance_diff
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 'Gnosis Circ. Supply' AS label, block_date, amount_raw FROM gno_supply_diff_gnosis
        
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            label
            ,block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                label
                ,MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM 
                supply_diff
            GROUp BY 1
        )
        ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(DATE(min_block_date), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    ),
    
    daily_supply AS (
        SELECT
            t1.label
            ,t1.block_date
            ,(SUM(COALESCE(t2.amount_raw, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.label ORDER BY t1.block_date))/POWER(10,18) AS supply
        FROM
            calendar t1
        LEFT JOIN
            supply_diff t2
            ON
            t2.label = t1.label
            AND
            t2.block_date = t1.block_date
    )
    
    SELECT label, block_date, supply FROM daily_supply
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Total Supply' AS label, block_date, SUM(supply) AS supply FROM daily_supply GROUP BY 2
    ```

### GNO Supply

**Query ID:** 4171784 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    staked_gno AS (
        SELECT
                SUM(amount) AS staked
        FROM (
            SELECT
                amount AS amount
            FROM
                tokens_gnosis.transfers
            WHERE
                token_standard = 'erc20'
                AND
                to = 0x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9
                AND
                    contract_address = 0x9C58BAcC331c9aa871AFD802DB6379a98e80CEdb --GNO
                AND
                block_month >= DATE '2021-12-01'
                
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT
                -amount AS amount
            FROM
                tokens_gnosis.transfers
            WHERE
                token_standard = 'erc20'
                AND
                "from" = 0x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9
                AND
                    contract_address = 0x9C58BAcC331c9aa871AFD802DB6379a98e80CEdb --GNO
                AND
                block_month >= DATE '2021-12-01'
            )
    ),
    
    supply_gno AS (
        SELECT 
            SUM(IF("from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000,amount_raw,-amount_raw))/POWER(10,18) AS supply
        FROM 
            tokens_gnosis.transfers
        WHERE 
            (
                "from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
                OR
                to = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
            )
            AND
            contract_address = 0x9C58BAcC331c9aa871AFD802DB6379a98e80CEdb
    )
    
    SELECT staked, supply, staked/supply * 100 AS pct FROM staked_gno, supply_gno
    --CROSS JOIN supply_gno
    ```

### GNO Supply

**Query ID:** 3509079 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    --0x11249f0fc79fc134a15a10d1da8291b79515bf987e036ced05b9ec119614070b ContractFallbackCallFailed
        --0xe19260aff97b920c7df27010903aeb9c8d2be5d310a2c67824cf3f15396e4c16 Transfer
        --0xcc16f5dbb4873280815c1ee09dbd06736cffcc184412cf7a71a0fdb75d397ca5 Burn
        --0x0f6798a560793a54c3bcfe86a93cde1e73087d944c0ea20544137d4121396885 Mint
        --0xddf252ad1be2c89b69c2b068fc378daa952ba7f163c4a11628f55a4df523b3ef Transfer
        --0x8c5be1e5ebec7d5bd14f71427d1e84f3dd0314c0f7b2291e5b200ac8c7c3b925 Approval
    WITH
    supply_mint AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS day
            ,SUM(varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_ltrim(varbinary_substring(data,1,32)))/POWER(10,18)) AS value
        FROM 
            gnosis.logs
        WHERE 
            contract_address = 0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb 
            AND
            topic0 = 0x0f6798a560793a54c3bcfe86a93cde1e73087d944c0ea20544137d4121396885
        GROUP BY
            1
    ),
    
    supply_burn AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS day
            ,SUM(varbinary_to_uint256(varbinary_ltrim(varbinary_substring(data,1,32)))/POWER(10,18)) AS value
        FROM 
            gnosis.logs
        WHERE 
            contract_address = 0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb 
            AND
            topic0 = 0xcc16f5dbb4873280815c1ee09dbd06736cffcc184412cf7a71a0fdb75d397ca5
        GROUP BY
            1
    ),
    
    block_days AS (
        SELECT
             DATE_TRUNC('day', time) AS day
        FROM
            gnosis.blocks
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    supply_net AS (
        SELECT 
            d.day
            ,COALESCE(m.value,0)  AS mint
            ,COALESCE(b.value,0) AS burn
            ,COALESCE(m.value,0) - COALESCE(b.value,0) AS net
        FROM
            block_days d
        LEFT JOIN
            supply_mint m
            ON
            m.day = d.day
        LEFT JOIN 
            supply_burn b
            ON
            b.day = d.day
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            day
            ,mint
            ,burn
            ,net AS "Net Change"
            ,SUM(mint) OVER w AS cumsum_mint
            ,SUM(burn) OVER w AS cumsum_burn
            ,SUM(net) OVER w AS "Supply"
        FROM
            supply_net
        WINDOW w AS (
            ORDER BY day
        )
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM final 
    WHERE --"Supply" > 0
        day > NOW() - INTERVAL '3' YEAR
    ```

### GNO deposited per day - [ GBC Deposits ]

**Query ID:** 286773 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT days.day, COALESCE(value, 0) AS value
    FROM (
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, SUM(value/1e18/32) AS value
        FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
        WHERE (
            "to" = '\x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9' AND
            contract_address = '\x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68'
        )
        GROUP BY 1
    ) AS deposits
    RIGHT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT date_trunc('day', time) AS day
        FROM xdai."blocks"
        WHERE "number" > 19469076
    ) AS days ON deposits.day = days.day
    ```

### GNO invested for purchasing cashback CRC

**Query ID:** 6575877 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH weekly_outflow AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS week,
            SUM(amount_raw) / 1e18 AS gno_outflow
        FROM tokens.transfers
        WHERE
            blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND contract_address = 0x9C58BAcC331c9aa871AFD802DB6379a98e80CEdb
            AND "from" = 0x7aBE74B71F2958B624Cb2bE0596678784c0Caf6A
            AND block_time >= TIMESTAMP '2025-12-01'
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    weeks AS (
        SELECT week
        FROM UNNEST(
            SEQUENCE(
                DATE '2025-12-01',
                CURRENT_DATE,
                INTERVAL '7' DAY
            )
        ) AS t(week)
    ),
    filled_weeks AS (
        SELECT
            w.week,
            COALESCE(o.gno_outflow, 0) AS gno_outflow
        FROM weeks w
        LEFT JOIN weekly_outflow o
            ON w.week = CAST(o.week AS DATE)
    )
    
    SELECT
        week,
        gno_outflow,
    
        SUM(gno_outflow) OVER (
            ORDER BY week
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS cumulative_gno_outflow
    
    FROM filled_weeks
    ORDER BY week;
    ```

### GNO invested in GNO Offer

**Query ID:** 6575399 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    offer_claimed AS (
        SELECT * FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20tokenoffercycle_evt_offerclaimed
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20tokenoffercyclev2_evt_offerclaimed
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20tokenoffercyclev3_evt_offerclaimed
    )
    
    SELECT 
        offer
        ,start_date
       ,cnt
       ,received
       ,SUM(cnt) OVER (ORDER BY start_date) AS total_cnt
       ,SUM(received) OVER (ORDER BY start_date) AS total_received
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            offer
            ,MIN(evt_block_date) AS start_date
           ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
           ,SUM(received)/POWER(10,18) AS received
        FROM offer_claimed
        GROUP BY 1
    )
    ```
