### Gas Price Position Cohort

**Query ID:** 3493298 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
      DATE_TRUNC('hour', block_time) AS hour
      ,tx_position
      ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(gas_price, 0.5) / POWER(10, 9) AS median_tx_gas_price_gwei
      ,AVG(gas_price) / POWER(10, 9) AS avg_tx_gas_price_gwei
      ,MAX(gas_price) / POWER(10, 9) AS max_tx_gas_price_gwei
    FROM (
      SELECT
        block_time,
        CASE 
            WHEN "index" = 0 THEN '0' 
            WHEN "index" >= 1 AND "index" < 10  THEN '1-10' 
            WHEN "index" >= 10 AND "index" < 100  THEN '10-100' 
            ELSE '100+' 
        END AS tx_position,
        gas_price
      FROM gnosis.transactions
      WHERE
        block_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY
    ) AS subquery
    GROUP BY
      DATE_TRUNC('hour', block_time),
      tx_position
    ```

### Gas Price by Hour of Day per Tx position cohort

**Query ID:** 3502880 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
       EXTRACT(hour FROM block_time) AS hour
      ,tx_position
      ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(gas_price, 0.5)/POWER(10,9)  AS median_gas_price_gwei
      ,AVG(gas_price)/POWER(10,9)  AS mean_gas_price_gwei
    FROM (
      SELECT
        block_time,
        CASE 
            WHEN "index" = 0 THEN '0' 
            WHEN "index" >= 1 AND "index" < 10  THEN '1-10' 
            WHEN "index" >= 10 AND "index" < 100  THEN '10-100' 
            ELSE '100+' 
        END AS tx_position,
        gas_price
      FROM gnosis.transactions
      WHERE
        block_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY
    ) AS subquery
    GROUP BY
     1,2
    ```

### Gas Used by Hour of Day

**Query ID:** 3494006 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(HOUR FROM time) AS hour
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(gas_used,0.5) AS "Median" 
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(gas_used,0.1) AS "10th Percentile" 
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(gas_used,0.9) AS "90th Percentile" 
        ,AVG(gas_used) AS "Mean" 
    FROM
      gnosis.blocks
    WHERE
      date > NOW() - INTERVAL '1' MONTH
    GROUP BY
        1
    ```

### Gas Used per Tx Type

**Query ID:** 3491966 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    block_gas AS (
        SELECT
            time AS block_time
            ,"number" AS block_number
            ,gas_limit
            ,gas_used
            ,base_fee_per_gas
        FROM
            gnosis.blocks
    ),
    
    tx_gas AS (
    SELECT
         tx.block_time
        ,tx.block_number
        ,tx.index
        ,tx.success
        ,tx.type AS tx_type
        ,tx.gas_limit AS tx_gas_limit
        ,tx.gas_price AS tx_gas_price
        ,tx.gas_used AS tx_gas_used
        ,CASE
            WHEN tx.type = 'DynamicFee' THEN tx.max_fee_per_gas 
            ELSE tx.gas_price
        END AS tx_max_fee
        ,CASE
            WHEN tx.type = 'DynamicFee' THEN tx.max_priority_fee_per_gas
            ELSE tx.gas_price 
        END AS tx_max_priority_fee
        ,CASE
            WHEN type = 'DynamicFee' THEN tx.priority_fee_per_gas 
            ELSE tx.gas_price - blk.base_fee_per_gas
        END AS  tx_priority_fee
    FROM 
        gnosis.transactions tx
    INNER JOIN 
        block_gas blk
        ON 
        blk.block_number = tx.block_number
    ORDER BY  
        tx.block_number
        ,tx.index
    ),
    
    tx_gas_res AS (
        SELECT
          date_trunc('day', block_time) AS block_day
          ,tx_type
          ,COUNT(1) AS cnt
          ,SUM(TRY_CAST(tx_gas_used AS DOUBLE))/POWER(10,9) AS total_tx_gas_used_gwei
          ,AVG(TRY_CAST(tx_gas_price AS DOUBLE))/POWER(10,9) AS avg_tx_gas_price_gwei
          ,MAX(TRY_CAST(tx_gas_price AS DOUBLE))/POWER(10,9) AS max_tx_gas_price_gwei
          ,MIN(TRY_CAST(tx_gas_price AS DOUBLE))/POWER(10,9) AS min_tx_gas_price_gwei
          ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(TRY_CAST(tx_gas_price AS DOUBLE),0.5)/POWER(10,9) AS median_tx_gas_price_gwei
          
          ,AVG(TRY_CAST(tx_max_fee AS DOUBLE))/POWER(10,9) AS avg_tx_max_fee_gwei
          ,MAX(TRY_CAST(tx_max_fee AS DOUBLE))/POWER(10,9) AS max_tx_max_fee_gwei
          ,MIN(TRY_CAST(tx_max_fee AS DOUBLE))/POWER(10,9) AS min_tx_max_fee_gwei
          ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(TRY_CAST(tx_max_fee AS DOUBLE),0.5)/POWER(10,9) AS median_tx_max_fee_gwei
        FROM 
            tx_gas 
        GROUP BY
            date_trunc('day', block_time)
            ,tx_type
    ),
    
    block_gas_res AS (
        SELECT
            date_trunc('day', block_time) AS block_day
            ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(TRY_CAST(gas_limit AS DOUBLE),0.5)/POWER(10,9) AS median_gas_limit_gwei
            ,AVG(TRY_CAST(gas_limit AS DOUBLE))/POWER(10,9) AS avg_gas_limit_gwei
            ,SUM(TRY_CAST(gas_used AS DOUBLE))/POWER(10,9) AS total_gas_used_gwei
            ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(TRY_CAST(base_fee_per_gas AS DOUBLE),0.5)/POWER(10,9) AS median_base_fee_gwei
            ,AVG(TRY_CAST(base_fee_per_gas AS DOUBLE))/POWER(10,9) AS avg_base_fee_gwei
        FROM
            block_gas
        GROUP BY
            date_trunc('day', block_time)
    )
    
    SELECT 
        tx.block_day
        ,tx_type
        ,cnt
        ,total_tx_gas_used_gwei/total_gas_used_gwei AS weighted_cnt
        ,total_tx_gas_used_gwei
        ,total_gas_used_gwei
        ,avg_tx_gas_price_gwei
        ,max_tx_gas_price_gwei
        ,min_tx_gas_price_gwei
        ,median_tx_gas_price_gwei
        
        ,avg_tx_max_fee_gwei
        ,max_tx_max_fee_gwei
        ,min_tx_max_fee_gwei
        ,median_tx_max_fee_gwei
    FROM
        tx_gas_res tx
    INNER JOIN
        block_gas_res blk
        ON
        blk.block_day = tx.block_day
    ORDER BY 1,2
    ```

        ,name AS "Offer Name"
        ,COUNT() OVER (PARTITION BY evt_block_date, name) AS "Buys"
        ,COUNT() OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY evt_block_date) AS "Cumulative Buys"
        ,COUNT(DISTINCT payer) OVER (PARTITION BY evt_block_date, name) AS "Users"
        ,COUNT(DISTINCT payer) OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY evt_block_date) AS "Cummulative Users"
        ,COUNT() OVER () AS "Total Buys"
        ,COUNT(DISTINCT payer) OVER () AS "Total Users"

        query_6679414 --gnosis_app_marketplace_payments_v

        name IN (SELECT marketplace_offer FROM query_6707158) --gnosis_app_marketplace_offers_v
    ORDER BY 1 DESC

### Gnosis App: Overview

**Query ID:** 6587416 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `12`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    user_txs AS (
        SELECT 
             block_time
            ,tx_hash
        FROM query_6582559 --gnosis_app_users_txs_v
    ),
    
    
    circles_txs AS (
        SELECT
            tx_hash
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t1.evt_tx_hash AS tx_hash
            FROM 
                circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.Hub_evt_Trust t1
            INNER JOIN
                user_txs t2
                ON t2.tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
        
            UNION ALL
        
            SELECT
                t1.evt_tx_hash AS tx_hash
            FROM 
                circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_personalmint t1
            INNER JOIN
                user_txs t2
                ON t2.tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
        
            UNION ALL
        
            SELECT
                t1.evt_tx_hash AS tx_hash
            FROM 
                circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_groupmint t1
            INNER JOIN
                user_txs t2
                ON t2.tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
        
            UNION ALL
        
            SELECT
                t1.evt_tx_hash AS tx_hash
            FROM 
                circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_streamcompleted t1
            INNER JOIN
                user_txs t2
                ON t2.tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
        
            UNION ALL
        
            SELECT
                t1.evt_tx_hash AS tx_hash
            FROM 
                circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registerhuman t1
            INNER JOIN
                user_txs t2
                ON t2.tx_hash = t1.evt_tx_hash
        )
        
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.block_time) AS date
        ,IF(t2.tx_hash = t1.tx_hash, 'Circles', 'Other') AS label
        ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM 
        user_txs t1
    LEFT JOIN
        circles_txs t2
        ON t2.tx_hash = t1.tx_hash
    WHERE
        DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.block_time) >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### Gnosis App: Overview

**Query ID:** 6587354 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `12`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    users AS (
        SELECT 
            address
        FROM query_6582075 --gnosis_app_users_v
    ),
    
    comethRelayersV4 AS (
         SELECT
            address,
            label
        FROM (
            VALUES
                (0x79c02F38dba39da361B4a0484C40351d50D55a94, 'Bundler1'),
                (0xf03DDBe5b9b4dDeC66009d94DC5D33dD719F34e1, 'Bundler2'),
                (0xF0F772FA5F01BC19064a8bA323A4f53505586cE1, 'Bundler3')
        ) AS v(address, label)
    ),
    
    tokens AS (
       SELECT 
           token_address
           ,symbol
           ,decimals
       FROM query_4361013 --gnosis_bluechip_tokens_v
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 
           erc20Wrapper AS token_address
           ,'CRC' AS symbol
           ,18 AS decimals
       FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20lift_evt_erc20wrapperdeployed
    ),
    
    trades AS (
        SELECT 
            t3.evt_block_time
            ,t3.evt_index
            ,t3.buyAmount
            ,t3.buyToken
            ,t4.symbol AS buySymbol
            ,t3.sellAmount
            ,t3.sellToken
            ,t5.symbol AS sellSymbol
        FROM 
            gnosis_protocol_v2_gnosis.gpv2settlement_evt_presignature t1
        INNER JOIN
            users t2 --gnosis_metri_users_v
            ON t2.address = t1.owner
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_protocol_v2_gnosis.gpv2settlement_evt_trade t3
            ON t3.owner = t2.address
            AND t3.orderUid =  t1.orderUid
        LEFT JOIN
            tokens t4
            ON t4.token_address = t3.buyToken
        LEFT JOIN
            tokens t5
            ON t5.token_address = t3.sellToken
        WHERE 
            t1.evt_tx_to = 0x0000000071727de22e5e9d8baf0edac6f37da032
            AND
            t1.evt_tx_from IN (SELECT address FROM comethRelayersV4)
            AND 
            t3.evt_block_time >= DATE '2025-11-12'
            
    )
    
    
    SELECT
         block_date
        ,pair
        ,sellAmount
        ,buyAmount
        ,volume_usd
        ,ntrades
        ,SUM(volume_usd) OVER () AS total_volume
        ,SUM(ntrades) OVER () AS total_ntrades
    FROM (
        SELECT
             DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.evt_block_time) AS block_date
            ,CONCAT(t1.sellSymbol,' -> ',t1.buySymbol) AS pair
            ,SUM(t1.sellAmount) AS sellAmount
            ,SUM(t1.buyAmount) AS buyAmount
            ,SUM(COALESCE(t1.buyAmount/POWER(10,t2.decimals) * t2.price, t1.sellAmount/POWER(10,t3.decimals) * t3.price )) AS volume_usd
            ,COUNT(*) AS ntrades
        FROM 
            trades t1
        LEFT JOIN
            dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v t2
            ON LOWER(t2.symbol) = LOWER(t1.buySymbol) -- use symbol until prices get fixed
            AND t2.block_date = CAST(t1.evt_block_time AS DATE)
        LEFT JOIN
            dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v t3
            ON LOWER(t3.symbol) = LOWER(t1.sellSymbol)
            AND t3.block_date = CAST(t1.evt_block_time AS DATE)
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    WHERE
        block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
    ORDER BY 1 DESC
    ```

### Gnosis App: Overview

**Query ID:** 6582405 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `12`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    users AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('day', app_first_appearence) AS block_date
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM query_6582075 --gnosis_app_users_v
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
                users
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    ),
    
    users_cnt AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,COALESCE(t2.cnt,0) AS cnt
            ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt,0)) OVER (ORDER BY t1.block_date) AS total
        FROM
            calendar t1
        LEFT JOIN
            users t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
    )
    
    SELECT
        block_date, 
        cnt AS "New",
        total AS "Total"
    FROM users_cnt
    WHERE block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
    ORDER BY block_date DESC
    ```

### Gnosis CRC Holdings Main Positions

**Query ID:** 6582104 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    /* ===========================================================
       WEEK CALENDAR
    =========================================================== */
    weeks AS (
        SELECT week
        FROM UNNEST(
            SEQUENCE(
                DATE_TRUNC('week', DATE '2025-06-01'),
                DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE),
                INTERVAL '7' DAY
            )
        ) AS t(week)
    ),
    
    /* ===========================================================
       DAILY CONVERSION FACTORS
    =========================================================== */
    
    factors_daily AS (
    
        SELECT 
            DATE_ADD('day', day, DATE '2020-10-15') AS day,
            CAST(CAST(split_part(factor, '"', 2) AS VARCHAR) AS UINT256)
              / POWER(10,27) AS factor
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.dataset_circlesv2_inflationary_to_demurrage
    ),
    
    /* ===========================================================
       ERC20 WEEKLY NET FLOWS
    =========================================================== */
    
    erc20_weekly AS (
    
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS week,
            address,
            LOWER(TO_HEX(token_address)) AS asset,
            SUM(amount_raw) / POWER(10,18) AS net_amount
        FROM query_6567638
        WHERE
            (
                (token_address = 0x548c20e6c24E4876E20daDbEAb75362e2F5A4bC1
                 AND address = 0x7aBE74B71F2958B624Cb2bE0596678784c0Caf6A)
              OR
                (token_address = 0xeeF7B1f06B092625228C835Dd5D5B14641D1e54A
                 AND address = 0xAeeE89E27203B1837D89dA3ffc748b5853ff0AeD)
            )
            AND block_time >= DATE '2025-06-01'
        GROUP BY 1,2,3
    ),
    
    erc20_universe AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT address, asset
        FROM erc20_weekly
    ),
    
    erc20_grid AS (
        SELECT
            w.week,
            u.address,
            u.asset
        FROM weeks w
        CROSS JOIN erc20_universe u
    ),
    
    erc20_balances_raw AS (
    
        SELECT
            g.week,
            g.address,
            g.asset,
            'erc20' AS token_type,
    
            SUM(COALESCE(e.net_amount, 0))
              OVER (
                PARTITION BY g.address, g.asset
                ORDER BY g.week
              ) AS balance
    
        FROM erc20_grid g
        LEFT JOIN erc20_weekly e
          ON e.week = g.week
         AND e.address = g.address
         AND e.asset = g.asset
    ),
    
    /* ===========================================================
       APPLY CONVERSION FACTOR (ONLY TARGET ERC20 ADDRESS)
    =========================================================== */
    
    erc20_balances AS (
    
        SELECT
            b.week,
            b.address,
            b.asset,
            b.token_type,
    
            CASE
                WHEN b.address = 0xAeeE89E27203B1837D89dA3ffc748b5853ff0AeD
                THEN b.balance * COALESCE(f.factor, 1)
                ELSE b.balance
            END AS balance
    
        FROM erc20_balances_raw b
    
        LEFT JOIN factors_daily f
          ON f.day = b.week + INTERVAL '6' DAY
    ),
    
    /* ===========================================================
       ERC1155 WEEKLY NET FLOWS
    =========================================================== */
    
    erc1155_weekly AS (
    
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_hour) AS week,
            avatar AS address,
            SUM(amount_raw) / POWER(10,18) AS net_amount
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                DATE_TRUNC('hour', block_time) AS block_hour,
                avatar,
                token_id,
                SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
            FROM (
                SELECT 
                    block_time,
                    "from" AS avatar,
                    token_id,
                    -CAST(amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
                FROM query_4714366
    
                UNION ALL
    
                SELECT 
                    block_time,
                    "to" AS avatar,
                    token_id,
                    CAST(amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
                FROM query_4714366
            )
            GROUP BY 1,2,3
        )
        WHERE avatar IN (
            0x97FD8f7829A019946329f6D2E763A72741047518,
            0x0aFd8899bca011Bb95611409f09c8EFbf6b169cF,
            0x9CbD1B318AE1B4585c84C5896548B89f84bb42dd,
            0x808da12fdd0a56413551449053c2ff918822e7d6,
            0xf1bb4aa292735be93c6f6e7410403bf2bb72138a,
            0xf3d6b8857f9b748a82d3c4549b3cb715081e43fd,
            0xAeeE89E27203B1837D89dA3ffc748b5853ff0AeD
        )
        GROUP BY 1,2
    ),
    
    erc1155_universe AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT address
        FROM erc1155_weekly
    ),
    
    erc1155_grid AS (
        SELECT
            w.week,
            u.address
        FROM weeks w
        CROSS JOIN erc1155_universe u
    ),
    
    erc1155_balances AS (
    
        SELECT
            g.week,
            g.address,
            'all_crc' AS asset,
            'erc1155' AS token_type,
    
            SUM(COALESCE(e.net_amount, 0))
              OVER (
                PARTITION BY g.address
                ORDER BY g.week
              ) AS balance
    
        FROM erc1155_grid g
        LEFT JOIN erc1155_weekly e
          ON e.week = g.week
         AND e.address = g.address
    )
    
    /* ===========================================================
       FINAL OUTPUT
    =========================================================== */
    
    SELECT
        week,
        address,
        asset,
        token_type,
        balance
    FROM erc20_balances
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT
        week,
        address,
        asset,
        token_type,
        balance
    FROM erc1155_balances
    
    ORDER BY address, asset, token_type, week;
    ```

### Gnosis Chain Transactions

**Query ID:** 3817121 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    inscriptions AS (
        SELECT 
            CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(block_time) AS VARCHAR),' - Q', CAST(QUARTER(block_time) AS VARCHAR)) AS block_date
            ,COUNT(*) cnt
        FROM    
            inscription.all
        WHERE
            blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND
            block_time >= DATE '2023-01-01'
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    total_txs AS (
    SELECT 
        CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(t1.block_time) AS VARCHAR),' - Q', CAST(QUARTER(t1.block_time) AS VARCHAR)) AS block_date
        ,COUNT(*) As cnt
    FROM 
        gnosis.transactions t1
    WHERE 
        t1.block_time >= DATE '2023-01-01'
    GROUP BY 1
    )
    
    SELECT
      t1.block_date
      ,t1.cnt - COALESCE(t2.cnt,0) AS standard
      ,COALESCE(t2.cnt,0) AS inscriptions
    FROM 
        total_txs t1
    LEFT JOIN
        inscriptions t2
        ON
        t2.block_date = t1.block_date
    ```

### Gnosis Chain Transactions

**Query ID:** 2927352 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        month,
        total,
        SUM(total) OVER (ORDER BY month ASC) AS cumulative_total
    FROM (
        SELECT
            date_trunc('month', block_time) AS month,
            COUNT(hash) AS total
        FROM gnosis.transactions
        GROUP BY 1
    ) subquery
    ORDER BY month DESC;
    ```

### Gnosis Chain Trending dApps - Rising Stars

**Query ID:** 2975043 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH 
        time_periods AS (
          SELECT 'Month 1' as period, now() - INTERVAL '30' day as start_date, now() as end_date
          UNION ALL
          SELECT 'Month 2', now() - INTERVAL '60' day, now() - INTERVAL '30' day
          UNION ALL
          SELECT 'Month 3', now() - INTERVAL '90' day, now() - INTERVAL '60' day
          UNION ALL
          SELECT 'Month 4', now() - INTERVAL '120' day, now() - INTERVAL '90' day
          UNION ALL
          SELECT 'Month 5', now() - INTERVAL '150' day, now() - INTERVAL '120' day
          UNION ALL
          SELECT 'Month 6', now() - INTERVAL '180' day, now() - INTERVAL '150' day
    
        ),
        projects AS (SELECT * FROM query_2418768),
        /*
        -- faster but less labels
        main_projects_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, COALESCE(name, CAST(txs."to" AS VARCHAR)) AS project
            FROM gnosis.transactions txs
            INNER JOIN projects ON txs."to" = projects.address
            -- specify INTERVAL
            WHERE block_time BETWEEN (now() - INTERVAL '120' day) AND now()
        ),
        */
        -- if we get only addresses instead of labels we can also use Dune's label database instead of only the Gnosis labels table
        main_projects_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, txs."to" AS contract_address, COALESCE(query_labels.name, all_labels.name, CAST(txs."to" AS VARCHAR)) AS project
            FROM gnosis.transactions txs
            LEFT JOIN projects AS query_labels ON txs."to" = query_labels.address
            LEFT JOIN labels.all AS all_labels ON txs."to" = all_labels.address AND label_type = 'identifier'
            WHERE block_time BETWEEN (now() - INTERVAL '180' day) AND now()
        ),
        
        eoa_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, "to" AS contract_address, 'EOA' AS project
            FROM gnosis.transactions
            -- specify INTERVAL
            WHERE data IS NULL AND block_time BETWEEN (now() - INTERVAL '180' day) AND now()
        ),
        
        amb_bridge_txs AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash AS hash, evt_block_time AS block_time, contract_address, 'AMB Bridge' AS project
            FROM (
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash, contract_address FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_UserRequestForSignature
                UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash, contract_address FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForUserRequest
                UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash, contract_address FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForAffirmation
                UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash, contract_address FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_UserRequestForSignature
                UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash, contract_address FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForUserRequest
                UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash, contract_address FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForAffirmation
            ) AS amb_txs
        ),
        
        inscription_txs AS (
            SELECT tx_hash AS hash, block_time, NULL AS contract_address, 'Inscriptions' AS project
            FROM inscription.mints m
            WHERE blockchain in ('gnosis')
            AND block_time BETWEEN (now() - INTERVAL '180' day) AND now()
        ),
        
        combined_txs AS (
            SELECT 
                t.period,
                txs2.project,
                MIN(txs2.contract_address) AS contract_address,
                COUNT(txs2.hash) AS total
            FROM (
                SELECT 
                    block_time, 
                    contract_address,
                    hash, 
                    MAX(project) AS project
                FROM (
                    SELECT * FROM main_projects_txs
                    UNION
                    SELECT * FROM eoa_txs
                    UNION 
                    SELECT * FROM amb_bridge_txs
                    UNION
                    SELECT * FROM inscription_txs
                ) AS txs2
                GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
            ) AS txs2
            CROSS JOIN time_periods AS t
            WHERE txs2.block_time BETWEEN t.start_date AND t.end_date
            GROUP BY t.period, txs2.project
        ),
        
        all_projects AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT project
            FROM combined_txs
        ),
        all_periods AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT period
            FROM combined_txs
        ),
        complete_set AS (
            SELECT p.project, tp.period
            FROM all_projects p
            CROSS JOIN all_periods tp
        ),
        -- CTE to rank projects within each period
        ranked_projects AS (
            SELECT 
              *,
              -- showing how the top 10 dApps changed
              RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY period ORDER BY total DESC) AS rn
            FROM combined_txs
          ),
        -- CTE to correctly attribute changes
        calculated_stats AS (
            SELECT 
              cs.project,
              cs.period,
              cs.contract_address,
              cs.total,
              cs.rn,
              cs.total - LAG(cs.total, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY cs.project ORDER BY cs.period DESC) AS "Transaction Change",
              100 * (cs.total - LAG(cs.total, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY cs.project ORDER BY cs.period DESC)) / LAG(cs.total, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY cs.project ORDER BY cs.period DESC) AS "Percent Change"
            FROM ranked_projects cs
      )
    
    SELECT 
      project,
      period,
      CONCAT(
        CAST('<a href="https://gnosisscan.io/address/' AS VARCHAR),
        CAST(contract_address AS VARCHAR),
        CAST('" target="_blank"> 🔗 ' AS VARCHAR),
        CAST(contract_address AS VARCHAR),
        CAST('</a>' AS VARCHAR)
      ) AS contract_address,
      total,
      "Transaction Change",
      "Percent Change"
    FROM calculated_stats
    WHERE rn <= 10
    ORDER BY period DESC, total DESC;
    ```

### Gnosis Chain Unique Addresses

**Query ID:** 2927349 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        month,
        total,
        SUM(total) OVER (ORDER BY month ASC) AS cumulative_total
    FROM (
        SELECT
            date_trunc('month', block_time) AS month,
            COUNT(DISTINCT "from") AS total
        FROM gnosis.transactions
        GROUP BY 1
    ) subquery
    ORDER BY month DESC;
    ```

### Gnosis Chain Volume per Token

**Query ID:** 3925763 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `token address` (text): `default value`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    
    volume_raw AS (
        SELECT
            evt_block_date AS block_day
            ,contract_address AS token_address
            ,SUM(value) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            erc20_gnosis.evt_transfer
        WHERE
            evt_block_date >= DATE '2023-01-01'
            AND
            evt_block_date < DATE '2024-07-01'
            AND
            value > 0
            AND
            contract_address = CAST({{token address}} AS varbinary)
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    volume AS (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_day
                ,t1.token_address
                ,t2.symbol
                ,t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals) AS amount
            FROM volume_raw t1
            LEFT JOIN
                tokens.erc20 t2
                ON t2.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND
                t2.contract_address = t1.token_address
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(block_day) AS VARCHAR),' - Q', CAST(QUARTER(block_day) AS VARCHAR)) AS block_date
        ,token_address
        ,symbol
        ,COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS amount
    FROM volume
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    ```

### Gnosis Chain Volume: Stablecoins

**Query ID:** 3836795 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    tokens_volume_raw AS (
        SELECT
            block_day
            ,token_address
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            test_schema.git_dunesql_3334f50_transfers_gnosis_erc20_agg_day
        WHERE
            block_day >= DATE '2023-01-01'
            AND
            amount_raw > 0
            AND 
            token_address IN (
                0xaf204776c7245bF4147c2612BF6e5972Ee483701,
                0xDDAfbb505ad214D7b80b1f830fcCc89B60fb7A83,
                0x4ECaBa5870353805a9F068101A40E0f32ed605C6,
                0xcB444e90D8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12FC56E,
                0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108,
                0xe91D153E0b41518A2Ce8Dd3D7944Fa863463a97d,
                0xc6B7AcA6DE8a6044E0e32d0c841a89244A10D284,
                0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2,
                0xaBEf652195F98A91E490f047A5006B71c85f058d,
                0x7a5c3860a77a8DC1b225BD46d0fb2ac1C6D191BC,
                0xdd96B45877d0E8361a4DDb732da741e97f3191Ff
            )
        GROUP BY 1,2
    ),
    
    xdai_volume_raw AS (
        SELECT
            block_day
            ,token_address
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            test_schema.git_dunesql_3334f50_transfers_gnosis_xdai_agg_day
        WHERE
            block_day >= DATE '2023-01-01'
            AND
            amount_raw > 0
        GROUP BY 1,2
    ),
    
    volume_raw AS (
        SELECT * FROM tokens_volume_raw
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM xdai_volume_raw
    ),
    
    
    volume AS (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_day
                ,CASE
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee THEN 'xDAI'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 THEN 'GBPe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xc6B7AcA6DE8a6044E0e32d0c841a89244A10D284 THEN 'aGnoUSDC'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2 THEN 'aGnoEURe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x7a5c3860a77a8DC1b225BD46d0fb2ac1C6D191BC THEN 'aGnosDAI'
                    ELSE t2.symbol
                END AS symbol
                ,SUM(
                    CASE
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*1.25
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0xc6B7AcA6DE8a6044E0e32d0c841a89244A10D284
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,6)*1.0
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0x7a5c3860a77a8DC1b225BD46d0fb2ac1C6D191BC
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*1.0
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*t2.price
                        ELSE  t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals)*t2.price
                    END
                ) AS amount
            FROM volume_raw t1
            LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd t2
                ON t2.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t2.minute = t1.block_day
                AND
                (
                t2.contract_address = t1.token_address
                OR 
                (t2.contract_address = 0xe91D153E0b41518A2Ce8Dd3D7944Fa863463a97d 
                    AND 
                t1.token_address = 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee)
                OR 
                (t2.contract_address = 0xcB444e90D8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12FC56E 
                    AND 
                t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2)
                )
            GROUP BY 1,2
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
       -- DATE_TRUNC('quarter', block_day) AS block_date
        CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(block_day) AS VARCHAR),' - Q', CAST(QUARTER(block_day) AS VARCHAR)) AS block_date
        ,symbol
        ,COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS amount
    FROM volume
    GROUP BY 1,2
    ORDER BY 3 DESC
    ```

### Gnosis Chain Volume: Tokens + Stablecoins

**Query ID:** 3836686 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    wxdai_volume AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,token_address
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                evt_block_date AS block_date
                ,contract_address AS token_address
                ,SUM(wad) AS amount_raw
            FROM 
                wxdai_gnosis.WXDAI_evt_Deposit
            WHERE
                evt_block_date >= DATE '2023-01-01'
            GROUP BY 1, 2
            
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT 
                 evt_block_date AS block_date
                ,contract_address AS token_address
                ,SUM(wad) AS amount_raw
            FROM 
                wxdai_gnosis.WXDAI_evt_Withdrawal
            WHERE
                evt_block_date >= DATE '2023-01-01'
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        )
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    ),
    
    xdai_volume AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee AS token_address
            ,SUM(value) AS amount_raw
        FROM gnosis.traces
        WHERE success
            AND (call_type NOT IN ('delegatecall', 'callcode', 'staticcall') OR call_type IS null)
            AND value > UINT256 '0'
            AND
            block_date >= DATE '2023-01-01'
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    tokens_volume AS (
        SELECT
            evt_block_date AS block_day
            ,contract_address AS token_address
            ,SUM(value) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            erc20_gnosis.evt_transfer
        WHERE
            evt_block_date >= DATE '2023-01-01'
            AND
            value > 0
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    volume_raw AS (
        SELECT * FROM tokens_volume
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM wxdai_volume
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM xdai_volume
    ),
    
    volume AS (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_day
                ,CASE
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee THEN 'xDAI'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 THEN 'GBPe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xc6B7AcA6DE8a6044E0e32d0c841a89244A10D284 THEN 'aGnoUSDC'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2 THEN 'aGnoEURe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x7a5c3860a77a8DC1b225BD46d0fb2ac1C6D191BC THEN 'aGnosDAI'
                    ELSE t2.symbol
                END AS symbol
                ,SUM(
                    CASE
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*1.25
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0xc6B7AcA6DE8a6044E0e32d0c841a89244A10D284
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,6)*1.0
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0x7a5c3860a77a8DC1b225BD46d0fb2ac1C6D191BC
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*1.0
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*t2.price
                        ELSE  t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals)*t2.price
                    END
                ) AS amount
            FROM volume_raw t1
            LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd_daily t2
                ON t2.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t2.day = t1.block_day
                AND
                (
                t2.contract_address = t1.token_address
                OR 
                (t2.contract_address = 0xe91D153E0b41518A2Ce8Dd3D7944Fa863463a97d 
                    AND 
                t1.token_address = 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee)
                OR 
                (t2.contract_address = 0xcB444e90D8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12FC56E 
                    AND 
                t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2)
                )
            GROUP BY 1,2
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,symbol
        ,amount
    FROM (
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,symbol
        ,amount
        ,amount/(SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY block_date) ) AS frac
    FROM (
    SELECT 
        CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(block_day) AS VARCHAR),' - Q', CAST(QUARTER(block_day) AS VARCHAR)) AS block_date
        ,IF(symbol IN ('xDAI','WXDAI','sDAI','USDC','USDT','EURe','GBPe','aGnoUSDC','aGnoEURe','CRVUSD', 'aGnosDAI','BUSD','USDC.e'), 'Stablecoins', symbol) AS symbol
        --,symbol
        ,COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS amount
    FROM volume
    GROUP BY 1,2
    )
    )
    WHERE frac >= 0.01
    ORDER BY 3 DESC
    ```

### Gnosis Cumulative CRC earnings and expenses

**Query ID:** 6576005 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    /* ===========================================================
       DAILY CONVERSION FACTORS
    =========================================================== */
    
    factors_daily AS (
    
        SELECT 
            DATE_ADD('day', day, DATE '2020-10-15') AS day,
            CAST(CAST(split_part(factor, '"', 2) AS VARCHAR) AS UINT256)
              / POWER(10,27) AS factor
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.dataset_circlesv2_inflationary_to_demurrage
    ),
    
    /* ===========================================================
       WEEKLY REVENUE
    =========================================================== */
    
    weekly_revenue AS (
    
        SELECT
            week,
            SUM(amount_raw_inflow) / 1e18 AS total_revenue
        FROM query_6574062
        WHERE address IN (
            0x97FD8f7829A019946329f6D2E763A72741047518,
            0x0aFd8899bca011Bb95611409f09c8EFbf6b169cF,
            0x7ADd2C8D1f7CE98cA9a6A7c0122916787988071F,
            0x9CbD1B318AE1B4585c84C5896548B89f84bb42dd,
            0x808da12fdd0a56413551449053c2ff918822e7d6
        )
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    /* ===========================================================
       OPERATING EXPENSES
    =========================================================== */
    
    weekly_operating_expenses AS (
    
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS week,
            SUM(-amount_raw) / 1e18 AS operating_expenses
        FROM query_6567638
        WHERE
            token_address = 0x548c20e6c24E4876E20daDbEAb75362e2F5A4bC1
            AND address = 0x7aBE74B71F2958B624Cb2bE0596678784c0Caf6A
            AND amount_raw < 0
            AND block_time >= DATE '2025-12-05'
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    /* ===========================================================
       LIQUIDITY INVESTMENTS (RAW)
    =========================================================== */
    
    weekly_liquidity_investments_raw AS (
    
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS week,
            SUM(-amount_raw) / 1e18 AS invested_liquidity
        FROM query_6567638
        WHERE
            address = 0xAeeE89E27203B1837D89dA3ffc748b5853ff0AeD
            AND token_address IN (
                0xa0ea681f5685BFa6857d776b5aCbf3D51bbeCC9a,
                0xeeF7B1f06B092625228C835Dd5D5B14641D1e54A
            )
            AND amount_raw < 0
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    /* ===========================================================
       APPLY CONVERSION FACTOR TO LIQUIDITY
    =========================================================== */
    
    weekly_liquidity_investments AS (
    
        SELECT
            l.week,
    
            l.invested_liquidity
              * COALESCE(f.factor, 1) AS invested_liquidity
    
        FROM weekly_liquidity_investments_raw l
    
        LEFT JOIN factors_daily f
          ON f.day = l.week + INTERVAL '6' DAY
    ),
    
    /* ===========================================================
       WEEKLY P&L (NO INVESTMENTS)
    =========================================================== */
    
    weekly_pnl AS (
    
        SELECT
            r.week,
            r.total_revenue,
            COALESCE(e.operating_expenses, 0) AS operating_expenses,
            r.total_revenue - COALESCE(e.operating_expenses, 0) AS net_delta
        FROM weekly_revenue r
        LEFT JOIN weekly_operating_expenses e
            ON r.week = e.week
    )
    
    /* ===========================================================
       FINAL OUTPUT
    =========================================================== */
    
    SELECT
        p.week,
        p.total_revenue,
        p.operating_expenses,
        p.net_delta,
    
        l.invested_liquidity,
    
        /* cumulative revenue */
    
        SUM(p.total_revenue) OVER (
            ORDER BY p.week
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS cum_revenue,
    
        SUM(p.operating_expenses) OVER (
            ORDER BY p.week
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS cum_operating_expenses,
    
        SUM(p.net_delta) OVER (
            ORDER BY p.week
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS cum_net_delta,
    
        /* cumulative capital deployment (factor-adjusted) */
    
        SUM(COALESCE(l.invested_liquidity, 0)) OVER (
            ORDER BY p.week
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS cumulative_invested_liquidity
    
    FROM weekly_pnl p
    LEFT JOIN weekly_liquidity_investments l
        ON p.week = l.week
    
    ORDER BY p.week;
    ```

### Gnosis Group Circulating Supply

**Query ID:** 6574858 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT 
        t3."group" AS address
        ,t3.name
        ,t3.symbol 
        ,t1.token_id
        ,t1.block_date
        ,t1.supply
        ,t1.change
    FROM
       -- query_4717272 t1 --gnosis_circlesv2_supply_hour_v
        query_6560476 t1 --gnosis_circlesv2_supply_daily_v
    INNER JOIN
        query_4712923 t2
        ON t2.token_id = t1.token_id
    INNER JOIN
         circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.hub_evt_registergroup t3
         ON t3."group" = t2.avatar
    WHERE
        t3."group" = 0xc19bc204eb1c1d5b3fe500e5e5dfabab625f286c
    ORDER BY block_date DESC
    ```

### Gnosis Group Potential Supply

**Query ID:** 6574964 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
         "group"
        ,block_date
        ,token_id
        ,avatar
        ,SUM(potential_amount) AS potential_amount
    FROM (
        SELECT
            "group"
            ,block_date
            ,IF(rank<=0, CAST(token_id AS VARCHAR), 'Others') AS token_id
            ,IF(rank<=0, CAST(avatar AS VARCHAR), 'Others') AS avatar
            ,potential_amount
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                "group"
                ,block_date
                ,token_id
                ,avatar
                ,potential_amount
                ,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY "group", block_date ORDER BY potential_amount DESC ) AS rank
            FROM
                --query_4911058 --gnosis_circlesv2_groups_potential_v 
                query_6560502 --gnosis_circlesv2_groups_potential_daily_v
            WHERE
                "group" = 0xc19bc204eb1c1d5b3fe500e5e5dfabab625f286c
        )
    )
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    ```

### Gnosis Inscription Mints

**Query ID:** 3279358 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT COUNT(tx_hash) AS transactions, DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS day, CONCAT('Inscriptions: ', inscription_symbol) AS project
    FROM inscription.mints m
    WHERE blockchain in ('gnosis')
    AND block_time > now() - INTERVAL '30' day
    GROUP BY 2,3
    ```

### Gnosis Inscription Users

**Query ID:** 3279357 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH inscription_data AS (
      SELECT
        tx_from,
        amount
      FROM
        inscription.mints
      WHERE
        blockchain IN ('gnosis')
        AND block_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1' DAY
    )
    SELECT
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(amount) DESC) AS "Rank",
      tx_from AS "Address",
      COUNT(*) AS "Transactions",
      SUM(amount) AS "Token Amount",
      CONCAT(CAST((COUNT(tx_from) / 210000.0000) AS VARCHAR), '%') AS "Share"
    FROM
      inscription_data
    GROUP BY
      tx_from
    ORDER BY
      "Rank";
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Balance

**Query ID:** 3746283 | **Updated:** --
 | **Tags:** `Entities`, `Balance`

Entities (Wallet + Owner) Daily Balances including ERC20 tokens and xDAI

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    balances_diff AS (
        SELECT 
            block_day
             ,token_address
            ,label
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM 
            query_3814057 -- gnosis_gp_balance_diff_daily_v
        GROUP BY
            1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            token_address
            ,label
            ,block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t1.token_address
                ,t1.label
                ,MIN(t1.block_day) AS block_day_min
            FROM
                balances_diff t1
            GROUP BY 1,2
        )
        ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(block_day_min AS DATE),CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    ),
    
    balances_diff_dense AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.block_day
            ,t2.token_address
            ,t2.label
            ,COALESCE(t1.amount_raw,0) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            balances_diff t1
        RIGHT JOIN
            calendar t2
            ON
            t2.block_day = t1.block_day
            AND 
            t2.token_address = t1.token_address
            AND 
            t2.label = t1.label
    ),
    
    monerium_versions AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4339524
    ),
    
    balances_entities AS (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_day
                ,label
                ,SUM(t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals)*t2.price) AS amount
            FROM (
                SELECT
                 t1.block_day
                ,t1.token_address
                ,t1.label
                ,SUM(t1.amount_raw) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.label,t1.token_address ORDER BY t1.block_day) AS amount_raw
                FROM
                    balances_diff_dense  t1
                LEFT JOIN
                    monerium_versions t2
                    ON t2.token_address = t1.token_address
                WHERE
                    t2.token_address IS NULL
                    OR
                    (t2.token_address = t1.token_address AND (t1.block_day < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL))
            ) t1
            LEFT JOIN
                query_4338954 t2 --gnosis_daily_token_prices_v
                ON t2.block_date = t1.block_day
                AND
                (
                t2.token_address = t1.token_address
                 OR  -- EURe versions
                (t2.token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e AND t1.token_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430)
                OR -- GBPe versions
                (t2.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 AND t1.token_address = 0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053)
                )
            GROUP BY 1,2
    )
    
    SELECT
        block_day
        ,label
        ,t1.amount
        ,(t1.amount/(LAG(t1.amount,7) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_day)) - 1) * 100 AS balance_change_7d_pct
    FROM balances_entities t1
    WHERE
        block_day >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1' YEAR
        AND
        block_day < CURRENT_DATE
    ORDER BY
        block_day DESC, label ASC
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Cards

**Query ID:** 4106065 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM
        query_3707804 --gnosis_gp_users
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Cards

**Query ID:** 4105840 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    creation AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('day',creation_time) AS day
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM
            query_3707804 --gnosis_gp_users
        WHERE
            DATE_TRUNC('day',creation_time) >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90' DAY
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    activation AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('day',activation_time) AS day
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM
            query_3707804 --gnosis_gp_users
        WHERE
            DATE_TRUNC('day',activation_time) >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90' DAY
        GROUP BY 
            1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            day
        FROM
            UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90' DAY, CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(day)
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.day
        ,COALESCE(t2.cnt,0) AS cnt_creation
        ,COALESCE(t3.cnt,0) AS cnt_activation
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t2.cnt,0)) OVER(ORDER BY t1.day) AS cumsum_creation
        ,SUM(COALESCE(t3.cnt,0)) OVER(ORDER BY t1.day) AS cumsum_activation
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        creation t2
        ON
        t2.day = t1.day
    LEFT JOIN
        activation t3
        ON
        t3.day = t1.day
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Cashback Rewards

**Query ID:** 4106034 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        week
        ,amount
        ,amount_usd
        ,SUM(amount) OVER(ORDER BY week ASC) AS cumsum_amount
        ,SUM(amount_usd) OVER(ORDER BY week ASC) AS cumsum_amount_usd
    FROM (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week',block_date) As week
            ,SUM(amount) AS amount
            ,SUM(amount_usd) AS amount_usd
        FROM 
            query_4105958 --gnosis_gnosispay_daily_cachback_per_wallet_v
        GROUP BY 1
    )
    ORDER BY week DESC
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Cohorts

**Query ID:** 4368446 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    
    balances_diff AS (
        SELECT 
            block_day
            ,token_address
            ,entity_id
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM 
            query_3814057 -- gnosis_gp_balance_diff_daily_v
        WHERE
            label = 'Wallet'
        GROUP BY
            1, 2, 3
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            token_address
            ,entity_id
            ,block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t1.token_address
                ,t1.entity_id
                ,MIN(t1.block_day) AS block_day_min
            FROM
                balances_diff t1
            GROUP BY 1,2
        )
        ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(block_day_min AS DATE),CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    ),
    
    monerium_versions AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4339524
    ),
    
    balances_diff_dense AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.block_day
            ,t2.token_address
            ,t2.entity_id
            ,COALESCE(t1.amount_raw,0) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            balances_diff t1
        RIGHT JOIN
            calendar t2
            ON
            t2.block_day = t1.block_day
            AND 
            t2.token_address = t1.token_address
            AND 
            t2.entity_id = t1.entity_id
    ),
    
    balances_entities AS (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_day
                ,entity_id
                ,COALESCE(SUM(t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals)*t2.price),0) AS amount
            FROM (
                SELECT
                 t1.block_day
                ,t1.token_address
                ,t1.entity_id
                ,SUM(t1.amount_raw) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.entity_id,t1.token_address ORDER BY t1.block_day) AS amount_raw
                FROM
                    balances_diff_dense t1
                LEFT JOIN
                    monerium_versions t2
                    ON t2.token_address = t1.token_address
                WHERE
                    t2.token_address IS NULL
                    OR
                    (t2.token_address = t1.token_address AND (t1.block_day < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL))
            ) t1
            LEFT JOIN
                query_4338954 t2 --gnosis_daily_token_prices_v
                ON t2.block_date = t1.block_day
                AND
                (
                t2.token_address = t1.token_address
                 OR  -- EURe versions
                (t2.token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e AND t1.token_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430)
                OR -- GBPe versions
                (t2.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 AND t1.token_address = 0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053)
                )
            GROUP BY 1,2
    ),
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '1M>=',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '0-10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '10-100'
                    WHEN upper = 1e3 THEN '100-1K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e4 THEN '1K-10K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e5 THEN '10K-100K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e6 THEN '100K-1M'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[0,10,1e2,1e3,1e4,1e5,1e6]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[10,1e2,1e3,1e4,1e5,1e6,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    )
    
    SELECT
        block_day
        ,cohort
        ,SUM(amount) AS amount
        ,COUNT(*) AS entities_cnt
    FROM
        (
    SELECT 
        t1.block_day
       ,t2.cohort
       ,t1.amount
    FROM balances_entities t1
    CROSS JOIN
        size_cohorts t2
    WHERE
        t1.amount >= t2.lower AND t1.amount < t2.upper
        AND 
        block_day >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1' YEAR
        AND
        block_day < CURRENT_DATE
      )
     GROUP BY 1,2
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Cohorts

**Query ID:** 4368002 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '>=1000',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 0.1 THEN '<0.1'
                    WHEN upper = 1 THEN '0.1-1'
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '1-10'
                    WHEN upper = 1e2 THEN '10-100'
                    WHEN upper = 1e3 THEN '100-1000'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[0,0.1,1,10,1e2,1e3]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[0.1,1,10,1e2,1e3,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    )
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cohort
        ,SUM(volume) AS volume
        ,COUNT(*) AS entities_cnt
    FROM
        (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_date
               ,t2.cohort
               ,t1.volume
            FROM query_4362229 t1 --gnosis_gnosispay_daily_payments_wallet_per_token_sparse_v 
            CROSS JOIN
                size_cohorts t2
            WHERE
                t1.volume_usd >= t2.lower AND t1.volume_usd < t2.upper
                AND 
                block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12' MONTH
                AND
                block_date < CURRENT_DATE
                AND symbol = 'GBPe'
        )
    GROUP BY 1,2
    ```

                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '1-10'

### Gnosis Pay EURe Balances

**Query ID:** 2797616 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    -- approximating the Gnosis Pay balances as EURe transfers into any Safe wallets 
    WITH inflows AS (
        SELECT
          "to" as account,
          SUM(value)/POW(10, 18) as received
        FROM
          erc20_gnosis.evt_Transfer
        WHERE
          contract_address = 0xcB444e90D8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12FC56E -- EURe
          AND evt_block_time >= timestamp '2023-07-17' -- Start of ETHCC/ETHG Paris 2023
          AND evt_block_time < timestamp '2023-07-23' -- End of ETHCC/ETHG Paris 2023
          --AND "from" NOT IN (0xfa5ed56a203466cbbc2430a43c66b9d8723528e7 /* LayerZero */, 0xd7f1dd5d49206349cae8b585fcb0ce3d96f1696f /* Zerion */)
          AND to NOT in (0x3d4fd6a1a7a1382ae1d62c3dd7247254a0236847) -- Sales address
        GROUP BY
          "to"
      ),
      outflows AS (
        SELECT
          "from" as account,
          SUM(value)/POW(10, 18) as sent
        FROM
          erc20_gnosis.evt_Transfer
        WHERE
          contract_address = 0xcB444e90D8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12FC56E -- EURe
          --AND "to" NOT IN (0xfa5ed56a203466cbbc2430a43c66b9d8723528e7, 0xd7f1dd5d49206349cae8b585fcb0ce3d96f1696f)
        GROUP BY
          "from"
      ),
      balances AS (
        SELECT
          COALESCE(inflows.account, outflows.account) as account,
          COALESCE(inflows.received, 0) - COALESCE(outflows.sent, 0) as balance
        FROM
          inflows
          FULL OUTER JOIN outflows ON inflows.account = outflows.account
      ),
      contract_addresses AS (
        SELECT address, "from"
        FROM gnosis.creation_traces
        WHERE "from" IN (0xa6b71e26c5e0845f74c812102ca7114b6a896ab2)
      )
    SELECT
      CONCAT(
        CAST('<a href="https://gnosisscan.io/address/' AS VARCHAR),
        CAST(balances.account AS VARCHAR),CAST('" target="_blank"> 🔗 ' AS VARCHAR),CAST(balances.account AS VARCHAR),CAST('</a>' AS VARCHAR)) AS account,
      balance
    FROM
      balances
    JOIN
      contract_addresses ON balances.account = contract_addresses.address
    WHERE
      balance > 0
    ORDER BY balance DESC
    
    /** LiFi
    0xbed7d7f73d4daa4b2423f229bfc305e33e47db01
    0x1231deb6f5749ef6ce6943a275a1d3e7486f4eae
    0xdd1305150d27aecc60c066630105db419977e367
    0x9b11bc9fac17c058cab6286b0c785be6a65492ef
    0xbe27f03c8e6a61e2a4b1ee7940dbcb9204744d1c
    **/
    ```

### Gnosis Pay EURe Sales

**Query ID:** 2808700 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
      COUNT(*) as sales
    FROM
      erc20_gnosis.evt_Transfer
    WHERE
      contract_address = 0xcB444e90D8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12FC56E -- Monerium EURe
      --AND evt_block_time >= timestamp '2023-07-17' -- Start of ETHCC/ETHG Paris 2023
      --AND evt_block_time < timestamp '2023-07-23' -- End of ETHCC/ETHG Paris 2023
      AND to = 0x3d4fd6a1a7a1382ae1d62c3dd7247254a0236847 -- Gnosis Pay payment address
    ```

### Gnosis Pay EURe Sales Per Week

**Query ID:** 2860912 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
      date_trunc('week', evt_block_time) as week_start,
      COUNT(*) as sales
    FROM
      erc20_gnosis.evt_Transfer
    WHERE
      contract_address = 0xcB444e90D8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12FC56E -- Monerium EURe
      --AND evt_block_time >= timestamp '2023-07-17' -- Start of ETHCC/ETHG Paris 2023
      --AND evt_block_time < timestamp '2023-07-23' -- End of ETHCC/ETHG Paris 2023
      AND to = 0x3d4fd6a1a7a1382ae1d62c3dd7247254a0236847 -- Gnosis Pay payment address
    GROUP BY
      date_trunc('week', evt_block_time)
    ORDER BY
      week_start ASC;
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Entity Balances

**Query ID:** 4366632 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `wallet` (enum): `0x5e944a9364013ba236c7a16a17b02534570d200b`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_gp_users AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3707804
        WHERE pay_wallet = CAST({{wallet}} AS VARBINARY)
    ),
    
    balances_diff AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.block_day
            ,CASE
                WHEN t1.token_address IS NULL THEN 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee
                ELSE t1.token_address
            END AS token_address
            ,t1.symbol
            ,t1.label
            ,t1.amount_raw
        FROM 
            query_3814057 t1 -- gnosis_gp_balance_diff_daily_v
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_gp_users t2
            ON t2.entity_id = t1.entity_id
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            label
            ,token_address
            ,block_day
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                token_address
                ,label
                ,MIN(block_day) AS block_day_min
            FROM
                balances_diff
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        )
        ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(block_day_min AS DATE),CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_day)
    ),
    
    balances_diff_dense AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.label
            ,t2.block_day
            ,t2.token_address
            ,COALESCE(t1.amount_raw,0) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            balances_diff t1
        RIGHT JOIN
            calendar t2
            ON
            t2.block_day = t1.block_day
            AND 
            t2.token_address = t1.token_address
            AND
            t2.label = t1.label
    ),
    
    monerium_versions AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4339524
    ),
    
    balances_entities AS (
            SELECT 
                t1.label
                ,t1.block_day
                ,t2.symbol
                ,SUM(t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals)*t2.price) AS amount
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    t1.label
                 ,t1.block_day
                ,t1.token_address
                ,SUM(t1.amount_raw) OVER (PARTITION BY  t1.label, t1.token_address ORDER BY t1.block_day) AS amount_raw
                FROM
                    balances_diff_dense  t1
                LEFT JOIN
                    monerium_versions t2
                    ON t2.token_address = t1.token_address
                WHERE
                    t2.token_address IS NULL
                    OR
                    (t2.token_address = t1.token_address AND (t1.block_day < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL))
            ) t1
            INNER JOIN
                query_4338954 t2 --gnosis_daily_token_prices_v
                ON t2.block_date = t1.block_day
                AND
                (
                t2.token_address = t1.token_address
                 OR  -- EURe versions
                (t2.token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e AND t1.token_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430)
                OR -- GBPe versions
                (t2.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 AND t1.token_address = 0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053)
                )
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 
    )
    
    
    SELECT
         block_day
        ,symbol
        ,owner_balance
        ,wallet_balance
        ,SUM(owner_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY block_day) AS cumsum_owner_balance
        ,SUM(COALESCE(wallet_balance,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY block_day) AS cumsum_wallet_balance
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            block_day
            ,symbol
            ,amount AS owner_balance
            ,NULL AS wallet_balance
        FROM balances_entities
        WHERE
            label = 'Owner'
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT 
            block_day
            ,symbol
            ,NULL AS owner_balance
            ,amount AS wallet_balance
        FROM balances_entities
        WHERE
            label = 'Wallet'
    )
    ORDER BY 1 DESC
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Fees Revenue by Cohort

### Gnosis Pay Fees Revenue: EURe (Monthly)

**Query ID:** 6527205 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gpay_fees_dense AS (
        SELECT 
           block_date
            ,user
            ,fees
        FROM query_6527169--gnosis_rev_gpay_monthly_fees_per_address_dense_v2
        WHERE symbol = 'EURe'
    ),
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '>=100',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 0.1 THEN '0.01-0.1'
                    WHEN upper = 0.5 THEN '0.1-0.5'
                    WHEN upper = 1 THEN '0.5-1'
                    WHEN upper = 3 THEN '1-3'
                    WHEN upper = 6 THEN '3-6'
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '6-10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '10-100'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[0.01,0.1,0.5,1,3,6,10,100]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[0.1,0.5,1,3,6,10,100,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    weekly_size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,lower
            ,upper
            ,cohort
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT block_date FROM gpay_fees_dense
        ) t1
        CROSS JOIN
            size_cohorts t2
    )
    
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cohort
        ,SUM(COALESCE(fees,0)) AS fees_total
        ,SUM(IF(fees>0,1,0)) AS users_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.block_date
            ,t2.cohort
            ,IF(t1.fees >= t2.lower AND t1.fees < t2.upper,t1.fees, 0) AS fees
        FROM gpay_fees_dense t1
        INNER JOIN
            weekly_size_cohorts t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            
    )
    WHERE
        block_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Fees Revenue: EURe (Rolling Year)

**Query ID:** 6527094 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gpay_fees_dense AS (
        SELECT 
           block_date
            ,user
            ,annual_rolling_fees
        FROM query_6527039 --gnosis_rev_gpay_rolling_fees_per_address_dense_v
        WHERE symbol = 'EURe'
    ),
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '>=100',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 3 THEN '1-3'
                    WHEN upper = 6 THEN '3-6'
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '6-10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '10-100'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[1,3,6,10,100]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[3,6,10,100,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    weekly_size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,lower
            ,upper
            ,cohort
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT block_date FROM gpay_fees_dense
        ) t1
        CROSS JOIN
            size_cohorts t2
    )
    
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cohort
        ,SUM(COALESCE(annual_rolling_fees,0)) AS annual_rolling_fees_total
        ,SUM(IF(annual_rolling_fees>0,1,0)) AS users_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.block_date
            ,t2.cohort
            ,IF(t1.annual_rolling_fees >= t2.lower AND t1.annual_rolling_fees < t2.upper,t1.annual_rolling_fees, 0) AS annual_rolling_fees
        FROM gpay_fees_dense t1
        INNER JOIN
            weekly_size_cohorts t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            
    )
    WHERE
        block_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Historical

**Query ID:** 4117667 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    activation AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('week',activation_time) AS week
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM
            query_3707804 --gnosis_gp_users
        GROUP BY 
            1
    )
    
    SELECT 
        week
        ,COALESCE(cnt,0) AS cnt_activation
        ,SUM(COALESCE(cnt,0)) OVER(ORDER BY week) AS cumsum_activation
    FROM
        activation
    ORDER BY 
        week DESC
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Historical

**Query ID:** 4105502 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT 
    * 
    ,SUM(total_volume_usd) OVER(PARTITION BY week) AS total_volume_usd_all
    ,SUM(total_payments) OVER(PARTITION BY week) AS total_payments_all
    FROM
        query_4105280
    ORDER BY 
        week DESC,
        symbol ASC
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Historical Active Users

**Query ID:** 4105557 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    daily AS (
    SELECT * FROM query_4105354
    ),
    weekly AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4105342
    ),
    monthly AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4105355
    )
    
    SELECT
        day
        ,NULL AS week
        ,NULL AS month
        ,users AS daily_users
        ,NULL As weekly_users
        ,NULL As monthly_users
    FROM
        daily
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        NULL AS day
        ,week
        ,NULL AS month
        ,NULL AS daily_users
        ,users As weekly_users
        ,NULL As monthly_users
    FROM
        weekly
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        NULL AS day
        ,NULL AS week
        ,month
        ,NULL AS daily_users
        ,NULL As weekly_users
        ,users As monthly_users
    FROM
        monthly
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Launch at ETHCC 2023 - POAP Minted

**Query ID:** 2808801 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    -- unique holders, should be identical to https://poap.gallery/event/143006
    SELECT 
        MIN(poap.tokenId) as tokenId,
        MIN(et.evt_tx_hash) as evt_tx_hash,
        MIN(et.evt_block_time) as evt_block_time,
        et.to,
        MIN(poap.eventId) as eventId
    FROM 
        erc721_gnosis.evt_Transfer AS et
    LEFT JOIN 
        tokens_gnosis.nft AS gnft ON gnft.contract_address = et.contract_address 
    LEFT JOIN 
        poap_gnosis.Poap_evt_EventToken AS poap ON et.evt_tx_hash = poap.evt_tx_hash 
    WHERE 
        gnft.contract_address = 0x22c1f6050e56d2876009903609a2cc3fef83b415 
        AND CAST(poap.eventId AS varchar) = '143006'
        AND et."from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
    GROUP BY 
        et.to
    
    /**
    -- non-unique holders
    
    SELECT 
        poap.tokenId,
        et.evt_tx_hash,
        et.evt_block_time,
        to,
        eventId
    FROM erc721_gnosis.evt_Transfer AS et
    LEFT JOIN tokens_gnosis.nft AS gnft ON gnft.contract_address = et.contract_address -- adds name, symbol
    LEFT JOIN poap_gnosis.Poap_evt_EventToken AS poap ON et.evt_tx_hash = poap.evt_tx_hash -- adds POAP event ID
    WHERE gnft.contract_address = 0x22c1f6050e56d2876009903609a2cc3fef83b415
    AND CAST(poap.eventId AS varchar) = '143006' -- Gnosis Pay Launch at ETHCC 2023
    AND et."from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
    
    **/
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Payments/Volume per User

**Query ID:** 4105885 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    payments AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date AS day
            ,SUM(volume) AS volume
            ,SUM(payments) AS payments
        FROM query_4105811 --gnosis_gnosispay_daily_payments_per_token_v
        GROUP BY
            1
    ),
    
    users AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4105354 --gnosis_gnosispay_daily_users_v
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.day
        ,t1.volume/t2.users AS "Volume"
        ,CAST(t1.payments AS REAL)/t2.users AS "Payments"
    FROM
        payments t1
    LEFT JOIN
        users t2
        ON 
        t2.day = t1.day
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Promotion NFT Holders

**Query ID:** 2808776 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH gnosis_holders AS (
        SELECT tokenId, contract_address, DATE(evt_block_time) as day, MAX(evt_block_time) as max_time, to AS holder
        FROM erc721_gnosis.evt_Transfer
        WHERE contract_address IN (
            0x417e1d9998aaadd1064365671f9256621fc5def3, -- Gnosis Pay Eiffel
            0x0d0ce23ddb2eac9439d2ba79f802016a60325b09 -- Gnosis Pay VIP
        ) 
        GROUP BY tokenId, contract_address, DATE(evt_block_time), to
    ),
    poap_holders AS (
        SELECT et.to AS holder, DATE(et.evt_block_time) as day, gnft.contract_address
        FROM erc721_gnosis.evt_Transfer AS et
        JOIN tokens_gnosis.nft AS gnft ON gnft.contract_address = et.contract_address
        JOIN poap_gnosis.Poap_evt_EventToken AS poap ON et.evt_tx_hash = poap.evt_tx_hash
        WHERE gnft.contract_address = 0x22c1f6050e56d2876009903609a2cc3fef83b415
        AND CAST(poap.eventId AS varchar) = '143006'
        AND et."from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
    ),
    all_holders AS (
        SELECT day, contract_address, holder FROM gnosis_holders
        UNION ALL
        SELECT day, contract_address, holder FROM poap_holders
    ),
    distinct_counts AS (
        SELECT day, contract_address, COUNT(DISTINCT holder) AS unique_holders_day
        FROM all_holders
        GROUP BY day, contract_address
    )
    SELECT day, 
           CASE 
               WHEN contract_address = 0x417e1d9998aaadd1064365671f9256621fc5def3 THEN 'Gnosis Pay Eiffel'
               WHEN contract_address = 0x0d0ce23ddb2eac9439d2ba79f802016a60325b09 THEN 'Gnosis Pay VIP'
               WHEN contract_address = 0x22c1f6050e56d2876009903609a2cc3fef83b415 THEN 'POAP'
           END AS label,
           unique_holders_day, 
           SUM(unique_holders_day) OVER (ORDER BY day ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS unique_holders_cumulative
    FROM distinct_counts
    ORDER BY day, label;
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Promotion NFT Holders - List

**Query ID:** 2809126 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH last_transfers AS (
        SELECT tokenId, MAX(evt_block_time) as max_time
        FROM erc721_gnosis.evt_Transfer
        WHERE contract_address IN (
            0x417e1d9998aaadd1064365671f9256621fc5def3 -- Gnosis Pay Eiffel https://niftyfair.io/gc/collection/0x417e1d9998aaadd1064365671f9256621fc5def3/
            ,0x0d0ce23ddb2eac9439d2ba79f802016a60325b09 -- Gnosis Pay VIP https://niftyfair.io/gc/collection/0x0d0ce23ddb2eac9439d2ba79f802016a60325b09/
            --,0x805df61e05dfc0bef1ae6c66ee59fbcc31f361c7 -- The Nifty Collection - Gnosis Pay
            ) 
        GROUP BY tokenId
    ),
    holders AS (
        SELECT et.tokenId, et.to AS holder
        FROM erc721_gnosis.evt_Transfer AS et
        JOIN last_transfers ON et.tokenId = last_transfers.tokenId AND et.evt_block_time = last_transfers.max_time
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT holder AS unique_holders
    FROM holders
    ```

### Gnosis Pay Promotion NFT Holders - Total

**Query ID:** 2809011 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH gnosis_holders AS (
        SELECT tokenId, contract_address, MAX(evt_block_time) as max_time, to AS holder
        FROM erc721_gnosis.evt_Transfer
        WHERE contract_address IN (
            0x417e1d9998aaadd1064365671f9256621fc5def3, -- Gnosis Pay Eiffel
            0x0d0ce23ddb2eac9439d2ba79f802016a60325b09 -- Gnosis Pay VIP
        ) 
        GROUP BY 1,2,4
    ),
    poap_holders AS (
        SELECT et.to AS holder, gnft.contract_address
        FROM erc721_gnosis.evt_Transfer AS et
        JOIN tokens_gnosis.nft AS gnft ON gnft.contract_address = et.contract_address
        JOIN poap_gnosis.Poap_evt_EventToken AS poap ON et.evt_tx_hash = poap.evt_tx_hash
        WHERE gnft.contract_address = 0x22c1f6050e56d2876009903609a2cc3fef83b415
        AND CAST(poap.eventId AS varchar) = '143006'
        AND et."from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
    ),
    all_holders AS (
        SELECT contract_address, holder FROM gnosis_holders
        UNION ALL
        SELECT contract_address, holder FROM poap_holders
    )
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN contract_address = 0x417e1d9998aaadd1064365671f9256621fc5def3 THEN 'Gnosis Pay Eiffel'
            WHEN contract_address = 0x0d0ce23ddb2eac9439d2ba79f802016a60325b09 THEN 'Gnosis Pay VIP'
            WHEN contract_address = 0x22c1f6050e56d2876009903609a2cc3fef83b415 THEN 'POAP'
        END AS label,
        COUNT(DISTINCT holder) AS unique_holders_total,
        contract_address
    FROM all_holders
    GROUP BY contract_address;
    ```
