### Total Staked

**Query ID:** 17070 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, SUM(amount)/1e18 AS total_staked_per_day
    FROM (
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS time, SUM(amount+"accruedEmission") AS amount
        FROM stake."EasyStaking_evt_Deposited"
        GROUP BY 1
    UNION ALL
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS time, SUM(-amount-fee+"accruedEmission") AS amount
        FROM stake."EasyStaking_evt_Withdrawn"
        GROUP BY 1
    ) AS transfers
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day
        FROM stake."EasyStaking_evt_Deposited"
    UNION
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day
        FROM stake."EasyStaking_evt_Withdrawn"
    ) AS days ON 1 = 1
    WHERE transfers.time <= days.day
    GROUP BY 1;
    ```

### Total Staked on xDai

**Query ID:** 17612 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, SUM(staked)/1e18 AS total_staked_per_day
    FROM (
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS time, SUM(amount) AS staked
        FROM (
            SELECT -amount AS amount, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id, evt_block_time
            FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_OrderedWithdrawal"
        UNION ALL 
            SELECT -amount AS amount, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id, evt_block_time
            FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_OrderedWithdrawal_1"
        UNION ALL 
            SELECT amount AS amount, _bytea2numeric("toPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id, evt_block_time
            FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_PlacedStake"
        UNION ALL 
            SELECT amount AS amount, "toPoolId" AS pool_id, evt_block_time
            FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_PlacedStake_1"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT -amount AS amount, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id, evt_block_time
            FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_WithdrewStake"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT -amount AS amount, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id, evt_block_time
            FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_WithdrewStake_1"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT -amount AS amount, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id, evt_block_time
            FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_MovedStake"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT -amount AS amount, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id, evt_block_time
            FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_MovedStake_1"
        ) AS stakes
        WHERE pool_id IN (
            SELECT pool_id
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    unnest("_initialMiningAddresses") AS mining_address,
                    _bytea2numeric(unnest("_initialStakingAddresses")) AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_call_initialize"
            UNION ALL
                SELECT
                    "_miningAddress" AS mining_address,
                    _bytea2numeric("_stakingAddress") AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_call_setStakingAddress"
                WHERE call_success = true
            UNION ALL
                SELECT "newMiningAddress" AS mining_address, "poolId" AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_evt_ChangedMiningAddress"
            UNION ALL 
                SELECT "oldMiningAddress" AS mining_address, "poolId" AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_evt_ChangedMiningAddress"
            UNION ALL 
                SELECT "poolMiningAddress" AS mining_address, "poolId" AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_AddedPool_1"
            ) AS validators
            WHERE mining_address IN (
                SELECT unnest("newSet")
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_evt_InitiateChange"
            )
        )
        GROUP BY 1
    ) AS stakes
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day
        FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_OrderedWithdrawal"
    UNION
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day
        FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_OrderedWithdrawal_1"
    UNION
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day
        FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_PlacedStake"
    UNION
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day
        FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_PlacedStake_1"
    UNION
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day
        FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_WithdrewStake"
    UNION
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day
        FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_WithdrewStake_1"
    UNION
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day
        FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_MovedStake"
    UNION
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day
        FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_MovedStake_1"
    ) AS days ON 1 = 1
    WHERE stakes.time <= days.day AND days.day >= DATE('2020-12-14')
    GROUP BY 1;
    ```

### Total Transaction By Period

**Query ID:** 2517586 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `end_data` (datetime): `2023-06-05 00:00:00`
- `start_data` (datetime): `2023-05-29 00:00:00`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT COUNT(*) as total
    FROM gnosis.transactions
    WHERE (timestamp '{{end_data}}'> block_time) AND ( block_time > timestamp '{{start_data}}')
    ```

### Total Users

**Query ID:** 17005 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, COUNT(sender) AS users
    FROM (
        SELECT day, sender, SUM(amount) AS amount
        FROM (
            SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) as time, sender, amount
            FROM stake."EasyStaking_evt_Deposited"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS time, sender, -amount-fee AS amount
            FROM stake."EasyStaking_evt_Withdrawn"
        ) AS transfers
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day
            FROM stake."EasyStaking_evt_Deposited"
        UNION
            SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day
            FROM stake."EasyStaking_evt_Withdrawn"
        ) AS days ON 1 = 1
        WHERE transfers.time <= days.day
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ) AS users
    WHERE amount > 0
    GROUP BY 1;
    ```

### Total Volume Processed

**Query ID:** 4139862 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    volume_raw AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date AS block_day
            ,CASE
                WHEN contract_address IS NULL THEN 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee
                ELSE contract_address
            END AS token_address
            ,SUM(CAST(amount_raw AS DOUBLE)) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            tokens_gnosis.transfers
        WHERE
           block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1' YEAR
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    monerium_versions AS (
        SELECT
            token_address,
            symbol,
            date_end
        FROM (
            VALUES
                (0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e, 'EURe', DATE '2024-08-25'),
                (0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430, 'EURe', NULL),
                (0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108, 'GBPe', DATE '2024-08-25'),
                (0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053, 'GBPe', NULL)
        ) AS v(token_address, symbol, date_end)
    ),
    
    volume AS (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_day
                ,CASE
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee THEN 'xDAI'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 THEN 'GBPe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xc6B7AcA6DE8a6044E0e32d0c841a89244A10D284 THEN 'aGnoUSDC'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2 THEN 'aGnoEURe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x7a5c3860a77a8DC1b225BD46d0fb2ac1C6D191BC THEN 'aGnosDAI'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 THEN 'GBPe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053 THEN 'GBPe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430 THEN 'EURe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e THEN 'EURe'
                    ELSE t2.symbol
                END AS symbol
                ,SUM(
                    CASE
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 
                            OR t1.token_address = 0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053 
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*1.25
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0xc6B7AcA6DE8a6044E0e32d0c841a89244A10D284
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,6)*1.0
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0x7a5c3860a77a8DC1b225BD46d0fb2ac1C6D191BC
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*1.0
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*t2.price
                        ELSE  t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals)*t2.price
                    END
                ) AS amount
            FROM volume_raw t1
            LEFT JOIN
                    monerium_versions t3
                    ON t3.token_address = t1.token_address
            LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd_daily t2
                ON t2.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t2.day = t1.block_day
                AND
                (
                t2.contract_address = t1.token_address
                OR 
                (t2.contract_address = 0xe91D153E0b41518A2Ce8Dd3D7944Fa863463a97d 
                    AND 
                t1.token_address = 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee)
                OR 
                (t2.contract_address = 0xcB444e90D8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12FC56E 
                    AND 
                t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2)
                )
            WHERE
                t3.token_address IS NULL
                OR
                (t3.token_address = t1.token_address AND (t1.block_day < t3.date_end OR t3.date_end IS NULL))
            GROUP BY 1,2
    )
    
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,symbol
        ,amount
    FROM (
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,symbol
        ,amount
        ,amount/(SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY block_date) ) AS frac
    FROM (
    SELECT 
        CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(block_day) AS VARCHAR),' - Q', CAST(QUARTER(block_day) AS VARCHAR)) AS block_date
        ,IF(symbol IN ('xDAI','WXDAI','sDAI','SDAI','USDC','USDT','EURe','GBPe','aGnoUSDC','aGnoEURe','CRVUSD', 'aGnosDAI','BUSD','USDC.e', 'agEUR'), 'Stablecoins', symbol) AS symbol
        ,COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS amount
    FROM volume
    GROUP BY 1,2
    )
    )
    WHERE frac >= 0.01
    ORDER BY 3 DESC
    ```

### Total accounts over time - [ Omnibridge ]

**Query ID:** 66656 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, SUM(accounts) over (order by day) AS total_accounts
    FROM (
        SELECT day, count(account) AS accounts
        FROM (
            SELECT MIN(day) AS day, account
            FROM (
                SELECT date_trunc('day', MIN(evt_block_time)) AS day, "from" AS account
                FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
                WHERE "to" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
                GROUP BY 2
            UNION ALL
                SELECT date_trunc('day', MIN(evt_block_time)) AS day, "to" AS account
                FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
                WHERE "from" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
                GROUP BY 2
            ) AS transfers
            GROUP BY 2
        ) AS days
        GROUP BY 1
    ) AS total_by_day;
    ```

### Total accounts over time - [ Omnibridge stablecoins ]

**Query ID:** 70967 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, SUM(accounts) over (order by day) AS total_accounts
    FROM (
        SELECT day, count(account) AS accounts
        FROM (
            SELECT MIN(day) AS day, account
            FROM (
                SELECT date_trunc('day', MIN(evt_block_time)) AS day, "from" AS account
                FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
                WHERE (
                    contract_address IN (
                        '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48',
                        '\xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7',
                        '\x1456688345527bE1f37E9e627DA0837D6f08C925',
                        '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F'
                    )
                    AND "to" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
                    AND "from" != '\x87d48c565d0d85770406d248efd7dc3cbd41e729'
                )
                GROUP BY 2
            UNION ALL
                SELECT date_trunc('day', MIN(evt_block_time)) AS day, "to" AS account
                FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
                WHERE (
                    contract_address IN (
                        '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48',
                        '\xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7',
                        '\x1456688345527bE1f37E9e627DA0837D6f08C925',
                        '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F'
                    )
                    AND "from" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
                    AND "to" != '\x87d48c565d0d85770406d248efd7dc3cbd41e729'
                )
                GROUP BY 2
            ) AS transfers
            GROUP BY 2
        ) AS days
        GROUP BY 1
    ) AS total_by_day;
    ```

### Total accounts over time - [ xDai Bridge ]

**Query ID:** 63253 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, SUM(accounts) over (order by day) AS total_accounts
    FROM (
        SELECT day, count(account) AS accounts
        FROM (
            SELECT MIN(day) AS day, account
            FROM (
                SELECT date_trunc('day', MIN(evt_block_time)) AS day, "from" AS account
                FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
                WHERE (
                    contract_address = '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F' AND
                    "to" = '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016' AND
                    "from" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643'
                )
                GROUP BY 2
            UNION ALL
                SELECT date_trunc('day', MIN(evt_block_time)) AS day, "to" AS account
                FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
                WHERE (
                    contract_address = '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F' AND
                    "from" = '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016' AND
                    "to" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643'
                )
                GROUP BY 2
            ) AS transfers
            GROUP BY 2
        ) AS days
        GROUP BY 1
    ) AS total_by_day;
    ```

### Total deposited - [ GBC Deposits ]

**Query ID:** 286679 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT total, total*price AS total_usd
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(value)/1e18/32 AS total
        FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
        WHERE (
            "to" = '\x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9' AND
            contract_address = '\x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68'
        )
    ) AS a
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT current/1e8 AS price
        FROM chainlink."AccessControlledOffchainAggregator_evt_AnswerUpdated"
        WHERE contract_address = '\x016a45F646bbd35B61fE7A496a75D9Ea69bD243E'
        ORDER BY "updatedAt" DESC
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS b ON 1=1
    ```

### Total deposited on the data

**Query ID:** 2517593 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `end_data` (datetime): `2023-06-05 00:00:00`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
      total,
      total * price AS total_usd
    FROM
      (
        SELECT
          SUM(CAST(value AS DOUBLE)) / 1e18 / 32 AS total
        FROM
          erc20_gnosis.evt_Transfer
        WHERE
          (
            "to" = 0x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9
            AND contract_address = 0x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68
            AND (timestamp '{{end_data}}' > evt_block_time)
          )
      ) AS a
      LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
          price
        FROM
          prices.usd_latest
        WHERE
          symbol = 'GNO'
        LIMIT
          1
      ) AS b ON 1 = 1
    ```

### Total liquidity - [ Curve.fi 3pool ]

**Query ID:** 102551 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT token_supply/1e18 AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT token_supply, evt_block_time
        FROM curvefi."x3pool_swap_evt_AddLiquidity"
    UNION ALL
        SELECT token_supply, evt_block_time
        FROM curvefi."x3pool_swap_evt_RemoveLiquidity"
    ) AS evts
    ORDER BY evt_block_time DESC
    LIMIT 1;
    ```

### Total liquidity - [ Curve.fi sGNO/GNO ]

??? note "SQL"

    ```sql
    SELECT token_supply/1e18 AS total
    FROM (

        FROM curvefi."sgno_gno_pool_swap_evt_AddLiquidity"
    UNION ALL

        FROM curvefi."sgno_gno_pool_swap_evt_RemoveLiquidity"
    ) AS evts
    ORDER BY evt_block_time DESC
    LIMIT 1;
    ```

### Total liquidity over time - [ Curve.fi 3pool ]

**Query ID:** 92309 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, SUM(TriPool) as total
        FROM (
    with timeseries as (select coalesce(a.day,b.day) as day, 
    max(case when b.TriPool > 0 then b.TriPool else a.TriPool end) as TriPool
    from (
    select date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, max(a.mx) AS mx, max((token_supply/1e18)) as TriPool from curvefi."x3pool_swap_evt_AddLiquidity" csa
    INNER JOIN (select date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, max(evt_block_time) mx from curvefi."x3pool_swap_evt_AddLiquidity" csa group by 1) a ON a.mx = evt_block_time and date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) = a.day   group by 1
    ) a
    FULL OUTER JOIN 
    (
    select date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, max(a.mx) AS mx, min((token_supply / 1e18)) as TriPool from curvefi."x3pool_swap_evt_RemoveLiquidity" csa
    INNER JOIN (select date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, max(evt_block_time) mx from curvefi."x3pool_swap_evt_RemoveLiquidity" csa group by 1) a ON a.mx = evt_block_time and date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) = a.day  group by 1
    ) b ON a.day=b.day group by 1)
    
    
    select 
        day, 
        first_value(TriPool) over (partition by grp_TriPool) as TriPool
    from (
          select day, TriPool,
                 sum(case when TriPool > 0 then 1 end) over (order by day) as grp_TriPool
          from   timeseries
    ) t order by 1) t2 group by 1
    ```

### Total liquidity over time - [ Curve.fi sGNO/GNO ]

**Query ID:** 676004 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, SUM(sGNOPool) as total
        FROM (
    with timeseries as (select coalesce(a.day,b.day) as day, 
    max(case when b.sGNOPool > 0 then b.sGNOPool else a.sGNOPool end) as sGNOPool
    from (
    select date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, max(a.mx) AS mx, max((token_supply / 1e18)) as sGNOPool from curvefi."sgno_gno_pool_swap_evt_AddLiquidity" csa
    INNER JOIN (select date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, max(evt_block_time) mx from curvefi."sgno_gno_pool_swap_evt_AddLiquidity" csa group by 1) a ON a.mx = evt_block_time and date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) = a.day   group by 1
    ) a
    FULL OUTER JOIN 
    (
    select date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, max(a.mx) AS mx, min((token_supply / 1e18)) as sGNOPool from curvefi."sgno_gno_pool_swap_evt_RemoveLiquidity" csa
    INNER JOIN (select date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, max(evt_block_time) mx from curvefi."sgno_gno_pool_swap_evt_RemoveLiquidity" csa group by 1) a ON a.mx = evt_block_time and date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) = a.day  group by 1
    ) b ON a.day=b.day group by 1)
    
    
    select 
        day, 
        first_value(sGNOPool) over (partition by grp_sGNOPool) as sGNOPool
    from (
          select day, sGNOPool,
                 sum(case when sGNOPool > 0 then 1 end) over (order by day) as grp_sGNOPool
          from   timeseries
    ) t order by 1) t2 group by 1
    ```

    ```sql
            ('RealityCards', '\x3Dfc9bF910B6B5E765a5acAec79F8e1A1E1DD0Bb'),

            ('Unique One', '\x93d0c9a35c43f6BC999416A06aaDF21E68B29EBA'),
            ('Epor.io', '\x13A24bA31A6F81b4B4F8e9759b8bDa49bD5904A1'),
            ('TokenUp', '\x0146e205E81BC727F2fe56F7463E15da79c8DE4D'),
            ('Snafu', '\xED1eFC6EFCEAAB9F6d609feC89c9E675Bf1efB0a'),
            ('ChievMint', '\xe0D25a9eAcCc946a016cD046EC1e5Cdf413Aa110'),
            ('Gitcoin Kudos', '\x74e596525C63393f42C76987b6A66F4e52733efa'),
            ('BeyondNFT', '\x55B8EC92793C9a7AB6Cb381E308D692C4fbFAe02'),
            ('UniqueBubbles', '\xf4993427b3b5c314005a152a6dd2978da2468ffe'),
            ('HashAvatars', '\x022E2426227E510123aABaFf4108Ddb6f59c2f8a'),
            ('HashAvatars', '\x3086f887Ed3c682fe3282BDB0305Fa9aF8a363dc'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x56510d0AF4dE9Ba2b5a78e195EAa366683feBBA1'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x8064ede05622F302C41C8653A06Cc9C0a413b03d'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x30470b1062b44FFC4Fe308716CD1B9E39f37d1E9'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x693c05A83Ea3e1ae81ce3a831A2Df82A0e7681aE'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x40E16b47ecE11B182c5bd597b3a66d815b4cB8ee'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x2a254f0179786a43c9b449CBe6aA2Dce77e1561D'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x712A8A2C730249ebA85eBd7ef5D011754533e1e1'),
            ('POLKADOGE', '\xe2F706679eEA413cC551c7c75353E5b632756DCB'),
            ('Genuino', '\x33fE0277e483445174F31575d5C0E58Ef124BE2e'),
            ('HoneyFarm', '\xB44825cF0d8D4dD552f2434056c41582415AaAa1'),
            ('Momint', '\x168376c2996FfE15e2EF1FE053E796a3B73CBEAd'),
            ('HoprBoost NFT', '\x43d13D7B83607F14335cF2cB75E87dA369D056c7'),
            ('xDaiPunks', '\x9f0B5B31e7FBDe3D9B1aF4e482Ef262b4ae9Ed90'),
            ('xDaiPunks', '\x4b1208Cb7BCaD7b5181c557F1295Fc3c722fa878'),
            ('xDai Tigers', '\x22570d137e36099700A9c80E5DDDd4a0d353f6c2')
    ) 
    SELECT * INTO temporary table projects FROM vals;
    
    SELECT
        CONCAT('0x', ENCODE(contract_address, 'hex')) AS token,
        name,
        mintings
    FROM (
        SELECT
            contract_address,
            SUM(counter) AS mintings
        FROM (
            SELECT contract_address, 1 AS counter
            FROM erc721."ERC721_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE "from" = '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000'
        UNION ALL
            SELECT contract_address, -1 AS counter
            FROM erc721."ERC721_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE "to" = '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000'
        UNION ALL
            SELECT contract_address, 1 AS counter
            FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferBatch"
            WHERE "from" = '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000'
        UNION ALL
            SELECT contract_address, -1 AS counter
            FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferBatch"
            WHERE "to" = '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000'
        UNION ALL
            SELECT contract_address, 1 AS counter
            FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferSingle"
            WHERE "from" = '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000'
        UNION ALL
            SELECT contract_address, -1 AS counter
            FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferSingle"
            WHERE "to" = '\x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000'
        ) AS txs
        GROUP BY 1
    ) AS transf
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT * FROM projects
    ) AS proj ON transf.contract_address = proj.address
    ORDER BY mintings DESC;
    ```

### Total trading fee - [ Curve.fi 3pool ]

**Query ID:** 92969 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, sum(total) OVER ( ORDER BY day ASC ROWS BETWEEN unbounded preceding AND CURRENT ROW) * 0.0004 AS total_fee FROM (
    
    select day, sum(TriPool) as total from (
    
    select date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, sum(tokens_sold/(case 
    when sold_id = 0 then 1e18
    when sold_id = 1 then 1e6
    when sold_id = 2 then 1e6
    end)) as TriPool from curvefi."x3pool_swap_evt_TokenExchange" as cst
    group by 1
    
    ) a group by 1) c ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1
    ```

### Total trading fee - [ Curve.fi sGNO/GNO ]

**Query ID:** 675844 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, sum(total) OVER ( ORDER BY day ASC ROWS BETWEEN unbounded preceding AND CURRENT ROW) * 0.0004 AS total_fee FROM (
    
    select day, sum(sGNOPool) as total from (
    
    select date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, sum(tokens_sold/1e18) as sGNOPool from curvefi."sgno_gno_pool_swap_evt_TokenExchange" as cst
    group by 1
    
    ) a group by 1) c ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1
    ```

### Total transactions by projects per day (120 days)

**Query ID:** 2455481 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
        projects AS (SELECT * FROM query_2418768),
        transactions AS (SELECT * FROM query_2455476),
        main_projects_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, name AS project
            FROM transactions txs
            LEFT JOIN projects ON txs."to" = projects.address
        ),
        chainlink_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, 'Chainlink' AS project
            FROM transactions
            WHERE "from" IN (
                0x577b17c9A02B7A360e0cf945D623D6C1ace6074c,
                0x582067f4b986775EAF8949Cc6370B8b75B836572,
                0xCd906f0467eFaB9f0A59DF479e873B4A5320D1Be,
                0x4562845F37813A201b9DDB52E57A902659b7AE6A,
                0x049Bd8C3adC3fE7d3Fc2a44541d955A537c2A484,
                0x2607E6F021922A5483D64935F87e15EA797FE8d4,
                0x6D04B8dB14B5a891f9aA1e32C093584815291551,
                0xFc7C442154C04C31203e2b94B96fd57C44ac003D,
                0x12d61a95CF55e18D267C2F1AA67d8e42ae1368f8,
                0x56CD9228cD980e8aE3afdF8dfFA7a2E87e8360d9,
                0x6f4AaDBB17789B4F5E9E97D456DC4e01b117Ccb3
            )
        ),
        eoa_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, 'EOA' AS project
            FROM transactions
            WHERE data IS NULL
        ),
        amb_bridge_txs AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash AS hash, evt_block_time AS block_time, 'AMB Bridge' AS project
            FROM (
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_UserRequestForSignature
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForUserRequest
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForAffirmation
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_UserRequestForSignature
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForUserRequest
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForAffirmation
            ) AS amb_txs
            WHERE evt_block_time > now() - INTERVAL '120' day
        )
    
    SELECT
        date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day,
        project,
        COUNT(hash) AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT block_time, hash, MAX(project) AS project
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM main_projects_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM chainlink_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM eoa_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM amb_bridge_txs
        ) AS txs
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ) AS txs2
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ORDER BY total Desc;
    ```

### Total transactions by projects per month

**Query ID:** 2999684 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
        projects AS (SELECT * FROM query_2418768),
        transactions AS (
            SELECT * FROM gnosis.transactions
            -- WHERE block_time > now() - INTERVAL '90' day
            WHERE block_time > timestamp '2023-07-01 00:00'
        ),
        main_projects_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, name AS project
            FROM transactions txs
            LEFT JOIN projects ON txs."to" = projects.address
        ),
        chainlink_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, 'Chainlink' AS project
            FROM transactions
            WHERE "from" IN (
                0x577b17c9A02B7A360e0cf945D623D6C1ace6074c,
                0x582067f4b986775EAF8949Cc6370B8b75B836572,
                0xCd906f0467eFaB9f0A59DF479e873B4A5320D1Be,
                0x4562845F37813A201b9DDB52E57A902659b7AE6A,
                0x049Bd8C3adC3fE7d3Fc2a44541d955A537c2A484,
                0x2607E6F021922A5483D64935F87e15EA797FE8d4,
                0x6D04B8dB14B5a891f9aA1e32C093584815291551,
                0xFc7C442154C04C31203e2b94B96fd57C44ac003D,
                0x12d61a95CF55e18D267C2F1AA67d8e42ae1368f8,
                0x56CD9228cD980e8aE3afdF8dfFA7a2E87e8360d9,
                0x6f4AaDBB17789B4F5E9E97D456DC4e01b117Ccb3
            )
        ),
        eoa_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, 'EOA' AS project
            FROM transactions
            WHERE data IS NULL
        ),
        amb_bridge_txs AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash AS hash, evt_block_time AS block_time, 'AMB Bridge' AS project
            FROM (
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_UserRequestForSignature
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForUserRequest
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForAffirmation
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_UserRequestForSignature
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForUserRequest
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_block_time, evt_tx_hash
                FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_SignedForAffirmation
            ) AS amb_txs
            --WHERE evt_block_time > now() - INTERVAL '90' day
            WHERE evt_block_time > timestamp '2023-07-01 00:00'
        )
    
    SELECT
        date_trunc('month', block_time) AS month,
        project,
        COUNT(hash) AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT block_time, hash, MAX(project) AS project
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM main_projects_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM chainlink_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM eoa_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM amb_bridge_txs
        ) AS txs
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ) AS txs2
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ORDER BY 3 ASC;
    ```

### Total transfer volume - [ Omnibridge stablecoins ]

**Query ID:** 69198 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT SUM(value/10^decimals) AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT
            SUM(value) AS value,
            (SELECT decimals FROM erc20.tokens WHERE contract_address = transfers.contract_address) AS decimals
        FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer" transfers
        WHERE (
            contract_address IN (
                '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48',
                '\xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7',
                '\x1456688345527bE1f37E9e627DA0837D6f08C925',
                '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F'
            ) AND (
                "to" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671' OR
                "from" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
            )
            AND "from" != '\x87d48c565d0d85770406d248efd7dc3cbd41e729'
            AND "to" != '\x87d48c565d0d85770406d248efd7dc3cbd41e729'
        )
        GROUP BY contract_address
    ) AS values;
    ```

    ```sql
        WHERE (
    ```

### Total value locked - [ Omnibridge stablecoins ]

**Query ID:** 66749 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT SUM(value/10^decimals) AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT
            SUM(value) AS value,
            (SELECT decimals FROM erc20.tokens WHERE contract_address = transfers.contract_address) AS decimals
        FROM (
            SELECT value, contract_address
            FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE (
                contract_address IN (
                    '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48',
                    '\xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7',
                    '\x1456688345527bE1f37E9e627DA0837D6f08C925',
                    '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F'
                )
                AND "to" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
                AND "from" != '\x87d48c565d0d85770406d248efd7dc3cbd41e729'
            )
        UNION ALL
            SELECT -value AS value, contract_address
            FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE (
                contract_address IN (
                    '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48',
                    '\xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7',
                    '\x1456688345527bE1f37E9e627DA0837D6f08C925',
                    '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F'
                )
                AND "from" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
                AND "to" != '\x87d48c565d0d85770406d248efd7dc3cbd41e729'
            )
        ) AS transfers
        GROUP BY contract_address
    ) AS totals
    ```

### Total value locked over time - [ Omnibridge stablecoins ]

**Query ID:** 70956 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, SUM(value) over (order by day) AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) as day, SUM(value/10^decimals) AS value
        FROM (
            SELECT evt_block_time, value, contract_address
            FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE (
                contract_address IN (
                    '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48',
                    '\xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7',
                    '\x1456688345527bE1f37E9e627DA0837D6f08C925',
                    '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F'
                )
                AND "to" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
                AND "from" != '\x87d48c565d0d85770406d248efd7dc3cbd41e729'
            )
        UNION ALL
            SELECT evt_block_time, -value AS value, contract_address
            FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE (
                contract_address IN (
                    '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48',
                    '\xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7',
                    '\x1456688345527bE1f37E9e627DA0837D6f08C925',
                    '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F'
                )
                AND "from" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
                AND "to" != '\x87d48c565d0d85770406d248efd7dc3cbd41e729'
            )
        ) AS transfers
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT decimals, contract_address
            FROM erc20.tokens
            WHERE contract_address IN (
                '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48',
                '\xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7',
                '\x1456688345527bE1f37E9e627DA0837D6f08C925',
                '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F'
            )
        ) AS decimals ON transfers.contract_address = decimals.contract_address
        GROUP BY 1
    ) AS data;
    ```

### Total value locked over time - [ xDai Bridge ]

**Query ID:** 63247 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, SUM(value) over (order by day) AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) as day, SUM(value)/1e18 AS value
        FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
        WHERE (
            contract_address = '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F' AND
            "to" = '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016' AND
            "from" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643'
        )
        GROUP BY 1
    UNION ALL
        SELECT date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) as day, SUM(-value)/1e18 AS value
        FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
        WHERE (
            contract_address = '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F' AND
            "from" = '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016' AND
            "to" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643'
        )
        GROUP BY 1
    ) AS transfers
    ```

### Total volume - [ Curve.fi 3pool ]

**Query ID:** 92964 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, sum(total) OVER ( ORDER BY day ASC ROWS BETWEEN unbounded preceding AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_volume FROM (
    
    select day, sum(TriPool) as total from (
    
    select date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, sum(tokens_sold/(case 
    when sold_id = 0 then 1e18
    when sold_id = 1 then 1e6
    when sold_id = 2 then 1e6
    end)) as TriPool from curvefi."x3pool_swap_evt_TokenExchange" as cst
    group by 1
    
    ) a group by 1) c ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1
    ```

### Total volume - [ Curve.fi sGNO/GNO ]

**Query ID:** 675689 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT day, sum(total) OVER ( ORDER BY day ASC ROWS BETWEEN unbounded preceding AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_volume FROM (
    
    select day, sum(sGNOPool) as total from (
    
    select date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, sum(tokens_sold/1e18) as sGNOPool from curvefi."sgno_gno_pool_swap_evt_TokenExchange" as cst
    group by 1
    
    ) a group by 1) c ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1
    ```

### Total weekly s-gCRC liquidity

**Query ID:** 6582291 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH relevant_addrs AS (
        SELECT
            address,
            label
        FROM (
            VALUES
                (0xbA1333333333a1BA1108E8412f11850A5C319bA9, 'Balancer'),
                (0x582f85e3fdd6efe0ccf71d1fa6b1b87d8e64ce7d, 'Univ3 sDAI'),
                (0xe2935A6D63Ef7B73a469E733b124487a1b9eaaf4, 'Univ3 EURe')
        ) AS v(address, label)
    ),
    
    weekly_diff AS (
    
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', t1.block_time) AS week,
            t1.address,
            t2.label,
            SUM(t1.amount_raw) AS diff
        FROM query_6574290 t1
        INNER JOIN relevant_addrs t2
            ON t2.address = t1.address
        WHERE t1.token_address = 0xeeF7B1f06B092625228C835Dd5D5B14641D1e54A
        GROUP BY 1,2,3
    )
    
    SELECT
        week,
        address,
        label,
        SUM(diff)
            OVER (PARTITION BY address ORDER BY week)
            / POWER(10,18) AS balance
    FROM weekly_diff
    ORDER BY address, week;
    ```

### Total xDai burned - [ EIP-1559 ]

**Query ID:** 239314 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT SUM(("base_fee_per_gas" * ("gas_used" - COALESCE("zero_price_gas_used", 0)))/(10^18)) AS total_xdai_burned
    FROM (
        SELECT "base_fee_per_gas", "gas_used", "number"
        FROM xdai."blocks"
        WHERE "number" >= 19040000
    ) AS blocks
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT "block_number", SUM("gas_used") AS "zero_price_gas_used"
        FROM xdai."transactions"
        WHERE "block_number" >= 19040000 AND "gas_price" = 0
        GROUP BY "block_number"
    ) AS zero_txs ON blocks."number" = zero_txs."block_number"
    ```

### Trading Volume per Sector

**Query ID:** 4303170 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_token_labels AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4302711
    ),
    
    trades AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,sector
            ,amount_usd
            ,amount_usd/(SUM(amount_usd) OVER(PARTITION BY block_date)) AS frac
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(t1.block_date) AS VARCHAR),' - Q', CAST(QUARTER(t1.block_date) AS VARCHAR)) AS block_date
                ,CASE
                    WHEN t2.sector = 'Stable' AND  t3.sector = 'Stable'
                        THEN IF(t2.currency=t3.currency, 'Stable Conversion', 'Forex')
                    WHEN (t2.sector = 'Stable' AND  t3.sector = 'Crypto') 
                        OR 
                        (t3.sector = 'Stable' AND  t2.sector = 'Crypto')
                        THEN 'Stable <-> Crypto'
                    ELSE 'Crypto <-> Crypto' 
                END AS sector
                ,SUM(amount_usd) AS amount_usd
            FROM dex.trades t1
            INNER JOIN 
                gnosis_token_labels t2
                ON t2.token_address = t1.token_bought_address
            INNER JOIN 
                gnosis_token_labels t3
                ON t3.token_address = t1.token_sold_address
            WHERE
                t1.block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1' YEAR
                AND
                t1.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        )
    )
    
    
    SELECT 
        *
    FROM
        trades
    ORDER BY 
        sector ASC
    ```

### Trading volume for all time - [ NFT on xDai ]

**Query ID:** 108230 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT SUM(value)/1e18 AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash
        FROM erc721."ERC721_evt_Transfer"
    UNION
        SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash
        FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferBatch"
    UNION
        SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash
        FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferSingle"
    ) AS transfers
    LEFT JOIN xdai.transactions ON transfers.evt_tx_hash = xdai.transactions.hash
    ```

### Trading volume in the last 7 days - [ NFT on xDai ]

**Query ID:** 106941 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT SUM(value)/1e18 AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash, evt_block_time
        FROM erc721."ERC721_evt_Transfer"
    UNION
        SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash, evt_block_time
        FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferBatch"
    UNION
        SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash, evt_block_time
        FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferSingle"
    ) AS transfers
    LEFT JOIN xdai.transactions ON transfers.evt_tx_hash = xdai.transactions.hash
    WHERE DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 7
    ```

### Trading volume per day - [ NFT on xDai ]

**Query ID:** 106943 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day, SUM(value)/1e18 AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash, evt_block_time
        FROM erc721."ERC721_evt_Transfer"
    UNION
        SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash, evt_block_time
        FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferBatch"
    UNION
        SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash, evt_block_time
        FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferSingle"
    ) AS transfers
    LEFT JOIN xdai.transactions ON transfers.evt_tx_hash = xdai.transactions.hash
    WHERE DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 90
    GROUP BY 1;
    ```

### Trading volume per month - [ NFT on xDai ]

**Query ID:** 106945 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT date_trunc('month', block_time) AS month, SUM(value)/1e18 AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash, evt_block_time
        FROM erc721."ERC721_evt_Transfer"
    UNION
        SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash, evt_block_time
        FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferBatch"
    UNION
        SELECT DISTINCT evt_tx_hash, evt_block_time
        FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferSingle"
    ) AS transfers
    LEFT JOIN xdai.transactions ON transfers.evt_tx_hash = xdai.transactions.hash
    GROUP BY 1;
    ```

### Transaction Success/Fail

**Query ID:** 3511422 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
      DATE_TRUNC('hour', block_time) AS hour,
      COUNT(CASE WHEN success = TRUE THEN 1 END) AS "Success",
      COUNT(CASE WHEN success = FALSE THEN 1 END) AS "Fail",
      COUNT(*) AS "total"
    FROM gnosis.transactions
    WHERE
      block_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24' HOUR
    GROUP BY
      1
    ```

### Transaction fees by projects last 24hrs

**Query ID:** 2485622 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
        projects AS (SELECT * FROM query_2418768),
        transactions AS (SELECT * FROM query_2428365),
        main_projects_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, name AS project, gas_used, gas_price
            FROM transactions txs
            INNER JOIN projects ON txs."to" = projects.address
        ),
        chainlink_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, 'Chainlink' AS project, gas_used, gas_price
            FROM transactions
            WHERE "from" IN (
                0x577b17c9A02B7A360e0cf945D623D6C1ace6074c,
                0x582067f4b986775EAF8949Cc6370B8b75B836572,
                0xCd906f0467eFaB9f0A59DF479e873B4A5320D1Be,
                0x4562845F37813A201b9DDB52E57A902659b7AE6A,
                0x049Bd8C3adC3fE7d3Fc2a44541d955A537c2A484,
                0x2607E6F021922A5483D64935F87e15EA797FE8d4,
                0x6D04B8dB14B5a891f9aA1e32C093584815291551,
                0xFc7C442154C04C31203e2b94B96fd57C44ac003D,
                0x12d61a95CF55e18D267C2F1AA67d8e42ae1368f8,
                0x56CD9228cD980e8aE3afdF8dfFA7a2E87e8360d9,
                0x6f4AaDBB17789B4F5E9E97D456DC4e01b117Ccb3
            )
        ),
        eoa_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, 'EOA' AS project, gas_used, gas_price
            FROM transactions
            WHERE data IS NULL
        ),
        amb_bridge_txs AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT hash, block_time, 'AMB Bridge' AS project, gas_used, gas_price
            FROM transactions
            WHERE hash IN (
                SELECT evt_tx_hash
                FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_AffirmationCompleted
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_tx_hash
                FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_AffirmationCompleted
            )
        )
    
    SELECT project, SUM(total_fee) FROM
    (SELECT
        date_trunc('hour', block_time) AS day,
        COALESCE(project, 'Others') AS project,
        SUM(gas_used * gas_price)/1e18 AS total_fee
    FROM (
        SELECT block_time, hash, MAX(project) AS project, MAX(gas_used) AS gas_used, MAX(gas_price) AS gas_price
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM main_projects_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM chainlink_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM eoa_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM amb_bridge_txs
        ) AS txs
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ) AS txs2
    GROUP BY 1, 2) as all_txns
    GROUP BY 1 order by SUM(total_fee) desc
    ```

### Transaction fees by projects last 30 days

**Query ID:** 2485642 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH projects AS (SELECT * FROM query_2418768),
        transactions AS (SELECT * FROM query_2428358),
        main_projects_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, name AS project, gas_used, gas_price
            FROM transactions txs
            INNER JOIN projects ON txs."to" = projects.address
        ),
        chainlink_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, 'Chainlink' AS project, gas_used, gas_price
            FROM transactions
            WHERE "from" IN (
                0x577b17c9A02B7A360e0cf945D623D6C1ace6074c,
                0x582067f4b986775EAF8949Cc6370B8b75B836572,
                0xCd906f0467eFaB9f0A59DF479e873B4A5320D1Be,
                0x4562845F37813A201b9DDB52E57A902659b7AE6A,
                0x049Bd8C3adC3fE7d3Fc2a44541d955A537c2A484,
                0x2607E6F021922A5483D64935F87e15EA797FE8d4,
                0x6D04B8dB14B5a891f9aA1e32C093584815291551,
                0xFc7C442154C04C31203e2b94B96fd57C44ac003D,
                0x12d61a95CF55e18D267C2F1AA67d8e42ae1368f8,
                0x56CD9228cD980e8aE3afdF8dfFA7a2E87e8360d9,
                0x6f4AaDBB17789B4F5E9E97D456DC4e01b117Ccb3
            )
        ),
        eoa_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, 'EOA' AS project, gas_used, gas_price
            FROM transactions
            WHERE data IS NULL
        ),
        amb_bridge_txs AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT hash, block_time, 'AMB Bridge' AS project, gas_used, gas_price
            FROM transactions
            WHERE hash IN (
                SELECT evt_tx_hash
                FROM bsc_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_AffirmationCompleted
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_tx_hash
                FROM eth_xdai_amb_gnosis.HomeAMB_evt_AffirmationCompleted
            )
        )
    
    SELECT project, SUM(CAST(total_fee AS DOUBLE)) FROM
    (SELECT
        date_trunc('day', block_time) AS month,
        COALESCE(project, 'Others') AS project,
        SUM(CAST(gas_used AS DOUBLE) * CAST(gas_price AS DOUBLE))/1e18 AS total_fee
    FROM (
        SELECT block_time, hash, MAX(project) AS project, MAX(gas_used) AS gas_used, MAX(gas_price) AS gas_price
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM main_projects_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM chainlink_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM eoa_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM amb_bridge_txs
        ) AS txs
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ) AS txs2
    GROUP BY 1, 2) as all_txns
    GROUP BY 1 order by SUM(CAST(total_fee AS DOUBLE)) desc
    ```

    ```sql
            ('Agave', '\xcc1f92a932852D69cEf9824eC99130Afd47E71c0'),

            ('Agave', '\x36A644cC38Ae257136EEca5919800f364d73FeFC'),
            ('Agave', '\xfa255f5104f129B78f477e9a6D050a02f31A5D86'),
            ('Agave', '\xABb5c11A26081d1f285454190f28FdABb1C2E0F9'),
            ('DAOSquare', '\x5e2Ed8c1FaE87F94EC1827517952a861eF111E70'),
            ('DAOSquare', '\x97193AD067EC41cA16119D9b3077745414DDaD8E'),
            ('DAOSquare', '\x8EacB8822fA636b5BB37612C202bA4B0fb199b7D'),
            ('HOPR', '\xF69C45B4246FD91F17AB9851987c7F100e0273cF'),
            ('HOPR', '\x978D91ddFdb0c6eaCC22A258fE498957a79c5F4C'),
            ('xDai Tigers', '\x22570d137e36099700A9c80E5DDDd4a0d353f6c2'),
            ('IDLE', '\xeFf551A4DF0405b0018118e9291FA61F6Edb6AF9'),
            ('CoinQuest', '\x453b7553704594b9832FEcbcdEFcf5f54E95c9D5'),
            ('PlazaDAO', '\x71c41878fcbfc1c7ab3c70e972e3fd1377ab8280'),
            ('1inch', '\x1111111254fb6c44bAC0beD2854e76F90643097d'),
            ('1inch', '\x54431918cEC22932fCF97E54769F4E00f646690F'),
            ('CowSwap', '\x9008D19f58AAbD9eD0D60971565AA8510560ab41'),
            ('CowSwap', '\xc20C9C13E853fc64d054b73fF21d3636B2d97eaB'),
            ('CowSwap', '\x177127622c4A00F3d409B75571e12cB3c8973d3c'),
            ('Conquest.eth', '\x0766835123e3fFCe29744d83d8818B74bd676f15'),
            ('Conquest.eth', '\x7ed5118E042F22DA546C9aaA9540D515A6F776E9'),
            ('Conquest.eth', '\x1874F6326eEbcCe664410a93a5217741a977D14A'),
            ('Conquest.eth', '\x8d82B1900bc77fACdf6f2209869E4f816E4fbcB2'),
            ('RealT Money Market', '\x5B8D36De471880Ee21936f328AAB2383a280CB2A')
    )
    SELECT * INTO temporary table projects FROM vals
    UNION ALL
        SELECT 'Gnosis Safe' AS name, contract_address AS address
        FROM gnosis_safe."GnosisSafe_call_setup";
        
    SELECT * INTO temporary table transactions
    FROM xdai."transactions"
    WHERE block_time > now() - INTERVAL '30 days';
    
    WITH
        main_projects_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, name AS project, gas_used, gas_price
            FROM transactions txs
            LEFT JOIN projects ON txs."to" = projects.address
        ),
        chainlink_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, 'Chainlink' AS project, gas_used, gas_price
            FROM transactions
            WHERE "from" IN (
                '\x577b17c9A02B7A360e0cf945D623D6C1ace6074c',
                '\x582067f4b986775EAF8949Cc6370B8b75B836572',
                '\xCd906f0467eFaB9f0A59DF479e873B4A5320D1Be',
                '\x4562845F37813A201b9DDB52E57A902659b7AE6A',
                '\x049Bd8C3adC3fE7d3Fc2a44541d955A537c2A484',
                '\x2607E6F021922A5483D64935F87e15EA797FE8d4',
                '\x6D04B8dB14B5a891f9aA1e32C093584815291551',
                '\xFc7C442154C04C31203e2b94B96fd57C44ac003D',
                '\x12d61a95CF55e18D267C2F1AA67d8e42ae1368f8',
                '\x56CD9228cD980e8aE3afdF8dfFA7a2E87e8360d9',
                '\x6f4AaDBB17789B4F5E9E97D456DC4e01b117Ccb3'
            )
        ),
        eoa_txs AS (
            SELECT hash, block_time, 'EOA' AS project, gas_used, gas_price
            FROM transactions
            WHERE data IS NULL
        ),
        amb_bridge_txs AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT hash, block_time, 'AMB Bridge' AS project, gas_used, gas_price
            FROM transactions
            WHERE hash IN (
                SELECT evt_tx_hash
                FROM bsc_xdai_amb."HomeAMB_evt_AffirmationCompleted"
            UNION ALL
                SELECT evt_tx_hash
                FROM eth_xdai_amb."HomeAMB_evt_AffirmationCompleted"
            )
        )
    
    SELECT
        date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day,
        COALESCE(project, 'Others') AS project,
        SUM(gas_used * gas_price)/1e18 AS total_fee
    FROM (
        SELECT block_time, hash, MAX(project) AS project, MAX(gas_used) AS gas_used, MAX(gas_price) AS gas_price
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM main_projects_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM chainlink_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM eoa_txs
            UNION
            SELECT * FROM amb_bridge_txs
        ) AS txs
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ) AS txs2
    GROUP BY 1, 2;
    ```

### Transactions

**Query ID:** 4143166 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(block_time) AS VARCHAR),' - Q', CAST(QUARTER(block_time) AS VARCHAR)) AS block_date
        ,CASE
            WHEN ("LEFT"(from_utf8(data), 8)='data:,{"') = TRUE THEN 'inscriptions'
            ELSE 'organic'
        END AS type
        ,COUNT(*) AS tx
    FROM gnosis.transactions
    WHERE
        block_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1' YEAR
        AND
        success = TRUE
    GROUP BY
      1, 2
    ```

### Transactions

**Query ID:** 3510922 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
      DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS day,
      COUNT(CASE WHEN success = TRUE THEN 1 END) AS "Success",
      COUNT(CASE WHEN success = FALSE THEN 1 END) AS "Fail",
      COUNT(*) AS "total"
    FROM gnosis.transactions
    WHERE
        block_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '3' YEAR
    GROUP BY
      1
    ```

### Transfer volume in the last 30 days - [ Omnibridge DAI ]

**Query ID:** 70990 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT SUM(value)/1e18 AS total
    FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
    WHERE (
        DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 30 AND
        contract_address = '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F' AND
        (
            "to" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671' OR
            "from" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
        )
    );
    ```

### Transfer volume in the last 30 days - [ Omnibridge USDC ]

**Query ID:** 66690 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT SUM(value)/1e6 AS total
    FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
    WHERE (
        DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 30 AND
        contract_address = '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48'
        AND (
            "to" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671' OR
            "from" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
        )
        AND "from" != '\x87d48c565d0d85770406d248efd7dc3cbd41e729'
        AND "to" != '\x87d48c565d0d85770406d248efd7dc3cbd41e729'
    );
    ```

### Transfers by amount in the last 30 days - (xDai Bridge)

**Query ID:** 2485696 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
    size_cohort
    ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT
            CASE 
                WHEN value <= (10 * 1e18) THEN '<10'
                WHEN value > (10 * 1e18) AND value <= (50 * 1e18) THEN '10-50 DAI'
                WHEN (value > (50 * 1e18) AND value <= (100 * 1e18)) THEN '50-100 DAI'
                WHEN (value > (100 * 1e18) AND value <= (500 * 1e18)) THEN '100-500 DAI'
                WHEN (value > (500 * 1e18) AND value <= (1000 * 1e18)) THEN '500-1000 DAI'
                WHEN (value > (1000 * 1e18) AND value <= (10000 * 1e18)) THEN '1000-10000 DAI'
                WHEN (value > (10000 * 1e18) AND value <= (50000 * 1e18)) THEN '10000-50000 DAI'
                WHEN value > (50000 * 1e18) THEN '>50000'
            END AS "size_cohort"
        FROM
          erc20_ethereum.evt_Transfer
        WHERE
          ( DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - DATE_TRUNC('day', evt_block_time) < INTERVAL '90' day)
            AND contract_address = 0x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F
            AND (
              "to" = 0x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016
              OR "from" = 0x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016
            )
            AND (
              "to" <> 0x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643
              AND "from" <> 0x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643
            )
        )  
    GROUP BY 1
    ```

### Transfers by amount in the last 30 days - [ xDai Bridge ]

**Query ID:** 63366 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
       unnest(array['< 10 DAI', '10-50 DAI', '50-100 DAI','100-500 DAI', '500-1,000 DAI', '1,000-10,000 DAI', '10,000-50,000 DAI', '> 50,000 DAI']) AS amount,
       unnest(array["<10", "10-50", "50-100","100-500", "500-1000", "1000-10000", "10000-50000", ">50000"]) AS transfers
    FROM (
        SELECT
            COUNT(CASE WHEN value <= (10 * 1e18) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "<10",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value > (10 * 1e18) AND value <= (50 * 1e18)) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "10-50",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value > (50 * 1e18) AND value <= (100 * 1e18)) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "50-100",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value > (100 * 1e18) AND value <= (500 * 1e18)) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "100-500",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value > (500 * 1e18) AND value <= (1000 * 1e18)) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "500-1000",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value > (1000 * 1e18) AND value <= (10000 * 1e18)) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "1000-10000",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value > (10000 * 1e18) AND value <= (50000 * 1e18)) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "10000-50000",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN value > (50000 * 1e18) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS ">50000"
        FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
        WHERE (
            DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 30 AND
            contract_address = '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F' AND
            (
                "to" = '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016' OR
                "from" = '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016'
            ) AND
            (
                "to" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643' AND
                "from" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643'
            )
        )
    ) AS data;
    ```

    ```sql
            ('Dark Forest', '\x678ACb78948Be7F354B28DaAb79B1ABD81574c1B'),
            ('Dark Forest', '\x621ce133521c3b1cf11c0b9423406f01835af0ee'),

            ('Unique One', '\x93dfaf57D986B9cA77Df9376c50878E013D9c7C8'),
            ('Unique One', '\x93d0c9a35c43f6BC999416A06aaDF21E68B29EBA'),
            ('Epor.io', '\x13A24bA31A6F81b4B4F8e9759b8bDa49bD5904A1'),
            ('TokenUp', '\x0146e205E81BC727F2fe56F7463E15da79c8DE4D'),
            ('Snafu', '\xED1eFC6EFCEAAB9F6d609feC89c9E675Bf1efB0a'),
            ('ChievMint', '\xe0D25a9eAcCc946a016cD046EC1e5Cdf413Aa110'),
            ('Gitcoin Kudos', '\x74e596525C63393f42C76987b6A66F4e52733efa'),
            ('BeyondNFT', '\x55B8EC92793C9a7AB6Cb381E308D692C4fbFAe02'),
            ('UniqueBubbles', '\xf4993427b3b5c314005a152a6dd2978da2468ffe'),
            ('HashAvatars', '\x022E2426227E510123aABaFf4108Ddb6f59c2f8a'),
            ('HashAvatars', '\x3086f887Ed3c682fe3282BDB0305Fa9aF8a363dc'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x56510d0AF4dE9Ba2b5a78e195EAa366683feBBA1'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x8064ede05622F302C41C8653A06Cc9C0a413b03d'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x30470b1062b44FFC4Fe308716CD1B9E39f37d1E9'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x693c05A83Ea3e1ae81ce3a831A2Df82A0e7681aE'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x40E16b47ecE11B182c5bd597b3a66d815b4cB8ee'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x2a254f0179786a43c9b449CBe6aA2Dce77e1561D'),
            ('Cold Truth Culture', '\x712A8A2C730249ebA85eBd7ef5D011754533e1e1'),
            ('POLKADOGE', '\xe2F706679eEA413cC551c7c75353E5b632756DCB'),
            ('Genuino', '\x33fE0277e483445174F31575d5C0E58Ef124BE2e'),
            ('HoneyFarm', '\xB44825cF0d8D4dD552f2434056c41582415AaAa1'),
            ('Momint', '\x168376c2996FfE15e2EF1FE053E796a3B73CBEAd'),
            ('HoprBoost NFT', '\x43d13D7B83607F14335cF2cB75E87dA369D056c7'),
            ('xDaiPunks', '\x9f0B5B31e7FBDe3D9B1aF4e482Ef262b4ae9Ed90'),
            ('xDaiPunks', '\x4b1208Cb7BCaD7b5181c557F1295Fc3c722fa878'),
            ('xDai Tigers', '\x22570d137e36099700A9c80E5DDDd4a0d353f6c2')
    ) 
    SELECT * INTO temporary table projects FROM vals;
    
    SELECT
        CONCAT('0x', ENCODE(contract_address, 'hex')) AS token,
        name,
        txs
    FROM (
        SELECT
            contract_address,
            COUNT(evt_tx_hash) AS txs
        FROM (
            SELECT evt_tx_hash, evt_block_time, contract_address
            FROM erc721."ERC721_evt_Transfer"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT evt_tx_hash, evt_block_time, contract_address
            FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferBatch"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT evt_tx_hash, evt_block_time, contract_address
            FROM erc1155."ERC1155_evt_TransferSingle"
        ) AS transfers
        WHERE DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 7
        GROUP BY 1
    ) AS transf
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT * FROM projects
    ) AS proj ON transf.contract_address = proj.address
    ORDER BY txs DESC;
    ```

    ```sql
            "from" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
    ```
    ```sql
        )
    );
    ```

### Tx Gas Price per Tx-Type

**Query ID:** 3492825 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
         date_trunc('hour', block_time) AS hour
        ,type AS tx_type
        ,APPROX_PERCENTILE(gas_price,0.5)/POWER(10,9) AS median_tx_gas_price_gwei
    FROM 
        gnosis.transactions
    WHERE
        block_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR
    GROUP BY
        date_trunc('hour', block_time)
        ,type
    ```

### Tx Types Dominance: Count

**Query ID:** 3489052 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    block_gas AS (
        SELECT
            time AS block_time
            ,"number" AS block_number
            ,gas_limit
            ,gas_used
            ,base_fee_per_gas
        FROM
            gnosis.blocks
        WHERE
         time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2' DAY
    ),
    
    tx_gas AS (
    SELECT
         tx.block_time
        ,tx.block_number
        ,tx.index
        ,tx.success
        ,tx.type AS tx_type
        ,tx.gas_limit AS tx_gas_limit
        ,tx.gas_price AS tx_gas_price
        ,tx.gas_used AS tx_gas_used
        ,CASE
            WHEN tx.type = 'Legacy' THEN tx.gas_price
            ELSE tx.max_fee_per_gas
        END AS tx_max_fee
        ,CASE
            WHEN tx.type = 'Legacy' THEN tx.gas_price
            ELSE tx.max_priority_fee_per_gas
        END AS tx_max_priority_fee
        ,CASE
            WHEN type = 'Legacy' THEN tx.gas_price - blk.base_fee_per_gas
            ELSE tx.priority_fee_per_gas
        END AS  tx_priority_fee
        ,blk.base_fee_per_gas
        ,blk.gas_limit
        ,blk.gas_used
    FROM 
        gnosis.transactions tx
    INNER JOIN 
        block_gas blk
        ON 
        blk.block_number = tx.block_number
    ORDER BY  
        tx.block_number
        ,tx.index
    )
    
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('minute', block_time) AS time
        --,index
        ,tx_type
        ,COUNT(1) AS cnt
    FROM
        tx_gas
    GROUP BY
        DATE_TRUNC('minute', block_time)
        --,index
        ,tx_type
    ```

### Tx Types Dominance: weighted by gas used

**Query ID:** 3491754 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH 
    block_gas AS (
      SELECT
        time AS block_time,
        "number" AS block_number,
        gas_limit,
        gas_used,
        base_fee_per_gas
      FROM gnosis.blocks
      WHERE
        time >= NOW() - interval '2' day
    ), 
    tx_gas AS (
      SELECT
        tx.block_time,
        tx.block_number,
        tx.index,
        tx.success,
        tx.type AS tx_type,
        tx.gas_limit AS tx_gas_limit,
        tx.gas_price AS tx_gas_price,
        tx.gas_used AS tx_gas_used,
        CASE WHEN tx.type = 'Legacy' THEN tx.gas_price ELSE tx.max_fee_per_gas END AS tx_max_fee,
        CASE WHEN tx.type = 'Legacy' THEN tx.gas_price ELSE tx.max_priority_fee_per_gas END AS tx_max_priority_fee,
        CASE
          WHEN tx.type = 'Legacy'
          THEN tx.gas_price - blk.base_fee_per_gas
          ELSE tx.priority_fee_per_gas
        END AS tx_priority_fee,
        blk.base_fee_per_gas,
        blk.gas_limit,
        blk.gas_used
      FROM gnosis.transactions AS tx
      INNER JOIN block_gas AS blk
        ON blk.block_number = tx.block_number
      ORDER BY
        tx.block_number,
        tx.index
    )
    
    SELECT 
        date_trunc('minute', block_time) AS time
        ,tx_type
        ,SUM(tx_gas_used) AS tx_gas_used
        ,SUM(gas_used) AS gas_used
        ,TRY_CAST(SUM(tx_gas_used) AS DOUBLE)/TRY_CAST(SUM(gas_used) AS DOUBLE) AS weighted_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT
          block_time
          ,tx_type
          ,SUM(tx_gas_used) AS tx_gas_used
          ,ANY_VALUE(gas_used) AS gas_used
        FROM tx_gas 
        GROUP BY
          block_time
          ,tx_type
    
    )
    GROUP BY
        date_trunc('minute', block_time)
        ,tx_type
    ORDER BY
      1,
      2
    ```

### Tx-Type Count

**Query ID:** 3514003 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    last_day_txs_per_hour AS (
        SELECT
             date_trunc('hour', block_time) AS hour
            ,type AS tx_type
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN success THEN hash END) AS cnt
            ,COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT success THEN hash END) AS cnt_failed
        FROM 
            gnosis.transactions
        WHERE
            block_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR
        GROUP BY
            date_trunc('hour', block_time)
            ,type
    ),
    
    cumulative_txs AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(hour) AS hour
        ,SUM(cnt) AS cnt_tot
        ,SUM(cnt_failed) AS cnt_failed_tot
    FROM
        last_day_txs_per_hour
    )
    
    SELECT
         t1.hour
        ,t1.tx_type
        ,t1.cnt
        ,t2.cnt_tot
        ,t2.cnt_failed_tot
    FROM
        last_day_txs_per_hour t1
    LEFT JOIN
        cumulative_txs t2
        ON 
        t2.hour = t1.hour
    ORDER BY
        t1.hour DESC
    ```

### USDC claim fees by amount in the last 30 days - [ xDai-ETH Bridges ]

**Query ID:** 201569 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
       unnest(array['< 1', '1-10', '10-25','25-50', '50-100', '100-500', '500-1,000', '1,000-5,000', '5,000-10,000', '10,000-25,000', '25,000-50,000', '> 50,000']) AS amount,
       unnest(array["<1", "1-10", "10-25","25-50", "50-100", "100-500", "500-1000", "1000-5000", "5000-10000", "10000-25000", "25000-50000", ">50000"]) AS transfers
    FROM (
        SELECT
            SUM(CASE WHEN amount < 1 THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "<1",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 1 AND amount < 10) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "1-10",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 10 AND amount < 25) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "10-25",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 25 AND amount < 50) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "25-50",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 50 AND amount < 100) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "50-100",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 100 AND amount < 500) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "100-500",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 500 AND amount < 1000) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "500-1000",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 1000 AND amount < 5000) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "1000-5000",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 5000 AND amount < 10000) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "5000-10000",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 10000 AND amount < 25000) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "10000-25000",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 25000 AND amount < 50000) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "25000-50000",
            SUM(CASE WHEN amount >= 50000 THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS ">50000"
        FROM (
            SELECT value/1e6 AS amount, evt_tx_hash
            FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE (
                contract_address = '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48' AND
                DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 30 AND
                "from" IN (
                    '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671',
                    '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016'
                ) AND
                "to" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643'
            )
        ) AS transfers
        LEFT JOIN ethereum.transactions ON transfers.evt_tx_hash = ethereum.transactions.hash
    ) AS transfers2
    ```

### USDC claims by amount in the last 30 days - [ xDai-ETH Bridges ]

**Query ID:** 200800 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
       unnest(array['< 1', '1-10', '10-25','25-50', '50-100', '100-500', '500-1,000', '1,000-5,000', '5,000-10,000', '10,000-25,000', '25,000-50,000', '> 50,000']) AS amount,
       unnest(array["<1", "1-10", "10-25","25-50", "50-100", "100-500", "500-1000", "1000-5000", "5000-10000", "10000-25000", "25000-50000", ">50000"]) AS transfers
    FROM (
        SELECT
            COUNT(CASE WHEN value < 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "<1",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 1 AND value < 10) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "1-10",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 10 AND value < 25) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "10-25",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 25 AND value < 50) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "25-50",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 50 AND value < 100) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "50-100",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 100 AND value < 500) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "100-500",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 500 AND value < 1000) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "500-1000",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 1000 AND value < 5000) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "1000-5000",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 5000 AND value < 10000) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "5000-10000",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 10000 AND value < 25000) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "10000-25000",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 25000 AND value < 50000) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "25000-50000",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN value >= 50000 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS ">50000"
        FROM (
            SELECT value/1e6 AS value
            FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE (
                contract_address = '\xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48' AND
                DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 30 AND
                "from" IN (
                    '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671',
                    '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016'
                ) AND
                "to" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643'
            )
        ) AS transfers
    ) AS transfers2
    ```

### USDC.e Revenue by Cohort (Monthly)

**Query ID:** 6518951 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    usdce_fees_dense AS (
        SELECT 
           block_date
            ,user
            ,fees
        FROM query_6518937 --gnosis_rev_usdce_monthly_fees_per_address_dense_v2
    ),
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '>=100',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 0.1 THEN '0.01-0.1'
                    WHEN upper = 0.5 THEN '0.1-0.5'
                    WHEN upper = 1 THEN '0.5-1'
                    WHEN upper = 3 THEN '1-3'
                    WHEN upper = 6 THEN '3-6'
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '6-10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '10-100'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[0.01,0.1,0.5,1,3,6,10,100]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[0.1,0.5,1,3,6,10,100,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    weekly_size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,lower
            ,upper
            ,cohort
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT block_date FROM usdce_fees_dense
        ) t1
        CROSS JOIN
            size_cohorts t2
    )
    
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cohort
        ,SUM(COALESCE(fees,0)) AS fees_total
        ,SUM(IF(fees>0,1,0)) AS users_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.block_date
            ,t2.cohort
            ,IF(t1.fees >= t2.lower AND t1.fees < t2.upper,t1.fees, 0) AS fees
        FROM usdce_fees_dense t1
        INNER JOIN
            weekly_size_cohorts t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            
    )
    WHERE
        block_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### USDC.e Revenue by Cohort (Rolling Year)

**Query ID:** 6518914 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    usdce_fees_dense AS (
        SELECT 
           block_date
            ,user
            ,annual_rolling_fees
        FROM query_6518835 --gnosis_rev_usdce_rolling_fees_per_address_dense_v2
    ),
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '>=100',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 3 THEN '1-3'
                    WHEN upper = 6 THEN '3-6'
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '6-10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '10-100'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[1,3,6,10,100]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[3,6,10,100,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    weekly_size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,lower
            ,upper
            ,cohort
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT block_date FROM usdce_fees_dense
        ) t1
        CROSS JOIN
            size_cohorts t2
    )
    
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cohort
        ,SUM(COALESCE(annual_rolling_fees,0)) AS annual_rolling_fees_total
        ,SUM(IF(annual_rolling_fees>0,1,0)) AS users_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.block_date
            ,t2.cohort
            ,IF(t1.annual_rolling_fees >= t2.lower AND t1.annual_rolling_fees < t2.upper,t1.annual_rolling_fees, 0) AS annual_rolling_fees
        FROM usdce_fees_dense t1
        INNER JOIN
            weekly_size_cohorts t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            
    )
    WHERE
        block_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```
