    ```sql
            )
        ) AS transfers
        LEFT JOIN ethereum.transactions ON transfers.evt_tx_hash = ethereum.transactions.hash
    ) AS transfers2
    ```

### USDT claims by amount in the last 30 days - [ xDai-ETH Bridges ]

**Query ID:** 200809 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
       unnest(array['< 1', '1-10', '10-25','25-50', '50-100', '100-500', '500-1,000', '1,000-5,000', '5,000-10,000', '10,000-25,000', '25,000-50,000', '> 50,000']) AS amount,
       unnest(array["<1", "1-10", "10-25","25-50", "50-100", "100-500", "500-1000", "1000-5000", "5000-10000", "10000-25000", "25000-50000", ">50000"]) AS transfers
    FROM (
        SELECT
            COUNT(CASE WHEN value < 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "<1",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 1 AND value < 10) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "1-10",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 10 AND value < 25) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "10-25",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 25 AND value < 50) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "25-50",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 50 AND value < 100) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "50-100",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 100 AND value < 500) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "100-500",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 500 AND value < 1000) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "500-1000",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 1000 AND value < 5000) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "1000-5000",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 5000 AND value < 10000) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "5000-10000",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 10000 AND value < 25000) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "10000-25000",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 25000 AND value < 50000) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "25000-50000",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN value >= 50000 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS ">50000"
        FROM (
            SELECT value/1e6 AS value
            FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE (
                contract_address = '\xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7' AND
                DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 30 AND
                "from" IN (
                    '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671',
                    '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016'
                ) AND
                "to" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643'
            )
        ) AS transfers
    ) AS transfers2
    ```

### USDT deposit fees by amount in the last 30 days - [ xDai-ETH Bridges ]

**Query ID:** 201564 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
       unnest(array['< 1', '1-10', '10-25','25-50', '50-100', '100-500', '500-1,000', '1,000-5,000', '5,000-10,000', '10,000-25,000', '25,000-50,000', '> 50,000']) AS amount,
       unnest(array["<1", "1-10", "10-25","25-50", "50-100", "100-500", "500-1000", "1000-5000", "5000-10000", "10000-25000", "25000-50000", ">50000"]) AS transfers
    FROM (
        SELECT
            SUM(CASE WHEN amount < 1 THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "<1",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 1 AND amount < 10) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "1-10",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 10 AND amount < 25) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "10-25",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 25 AND amount < 50) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "25-50",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 50 AND amount < 100) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "50-100",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 100 AND amount < 500) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "100-500",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 500 AND amount < 1000) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "500-1000",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 1000 AND amount < 5000) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "1000-5000",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 5000 AND amount < 10000) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "5000-10000",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 10000 AND amount < 25000) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "10000-25000",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 25000 AND amount < 50000) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "25000-50000",
            SUM(CASE WHEN amount >= 50000 THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS ">50000"
        FROM (
            SELECT value/1e6 AS amount, evt_tx_hash
            FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE (
                contract_address = '\xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7' AND
                DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 30 AND
                "to" IN (
                    '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671',
                    '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016'
                ) AND
                "from" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643'
            )
        ) AS transfers
        LEFT JOIN ethereum.transactions ON transfers.evt_tx_hash = ethereum.transactions.hash
    ) AS transfers2
    ```

### Underlying volume per day by type - [ Curve.fi 3pool ]

**Query ID:** 92291 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    select date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day, sum(tokens_sold/(case 
    when sold_id = 0 then 1e18
    when sold_id = 1 then 1e6
    when sold_id = 2 then 1e6
    end)) as y, (case 
    when sold_id = 0 then 'WXDAI'
    when sold_id = 1 then 'USDC'
    when sold_id = 2 then 'USDT'
    end) as name from curvefi."x3pool_swap_evt_TokenExchange" as cst
    LEFT JOIN xdai."transactions" tx ON cst.evt_tx_hash = tx.hash
    group by 1,3
    ```

### Underlying volume per day by type - [ Curve.fi sGNO/GNO ]

**Query ID:** 675866 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    select date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day, sum(tokens_sold/1e18) as y, (case 
    when sold_id = 0 then 'sGNO'
    when sold_id = 1 then 'GNO'
    end) as name from curvefi."sgno_gno_pool_swap_evt_TokenExchange" as cst
    LEFT JOIN xdai."transactions" tx ON cst.evt_tx_hash = tx.hash
    group by 1,3
    ```

### Unified Bridges Flows

**Query ID:** 5334522 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      weekly_flows AS (
        SELECT
          CAST(date_trunc('week', timestamp) AS DATE) AS week_date,
          bridge,
          SUM(CASE WHEN net_usd < 0 THEN net_usd ELSE 0 END)  AS outflow_usd,
          SUM(CASE WHEN net_usd > 0 THEN net_usd ELSE 0 END)  AS inflow_usd
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_unifiedbridges_flows_v
        GROUP BY 1, 2
      ),
    
      cutoff AS (
        SELECT CAST(date_trunc('week', current_timestamp) AS DATE) AS cutoff_week
      ),
    
      bounds_raw AS (
        SELECT
          bridge,
          MIN(week_date) AS min_w,
          MAX(week_date) AS max_w
        FROM weekly_flows
        GROUP BY 1
      ),
    
      bounds AS (
        SELECT
          b.bridge,
          b.min_w,
          CASE
            WHEN b.max_w > DATE_ADD('day', -7, c.cutoff_week)
              THEN DATE_ADD('day', -7, c.cutoff_week)
            ELSE b.max_w
          END AS max_w
        FROM bounds_raw b
        CROSS JOIN cutoff c
      ),
    
      spine AS (
        SELECT
          b.bridge,
          w AS week_date
        FROM bounds b
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SEQUENCE(b.min_w, b.max_w, INTERVAL '7' DAY)) AS t(w)
        WHERE b.max_w >= b.min_w
      ),
    
      filled AS (
        SELECT
          s.week_date,
          s.bridge,
          COALESCE(w.outflow_usd, 0) AS outflow_usd,
          COALESCE(w.inflow_usd,  0) AS inflow_usd
        FROM spine s
        LEFT JOIN weekly_flows w
          ON w.bridge = s.bridge AND w.week_date = s.week_date
      ),
    
      cumulative AS (
        SELECT
          week_date AS week,
          bridge,
          SUM(inflow_usd + outflow_usd)
            OVER (PARTITION BY bridge ORDER BY week_date) AS netflow_usd
        FROM filled
      )
    
    SELECT week, bridge, netflow_usd
    FROM cumulative
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT week, 'total' AS bridge, SUM(netflow_usd) AS netflow_usd
    FROM cumulative
    GROUP BY 1
    
    ORDER BY week, bridge;
    ```

### Unique Active Users (Monthly)

**Query ID:** 6528228 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    total_fees_dense AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,user
            ,SUM(fees) AS fees
        FROM (
            SELECT block_date,user, fees FROM query_6518631 --gnosis_rev_eure_monthly_fees_per_address_dense_v2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT block_date,user, fees FROM query_6521834 --gnosis_rev_zchf_monthly_fees_per_address_dense_v2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT block_date,user, fees FROM query_6522062 --gnosis_rev_brla_monthly_fees_per_address_dense_v2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT block_date,user, fees FROM query_6518937 --gnosis_rev_usdce_monthly_fees_per_address_dense_v2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT block_date,user, fees FROM query_6526462 --gnosis_rev_sdai_monthly_fees_per_address_dense_v2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT block_date,user, fees FROM query_6527169 --gnosis_rev_gpay_monthly_fees_per_address_dense_v2
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '>=100',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 0.1 THEN '0.01-0.1'
                    WHEN upper = 0.5 THEN '0.1-0.5'
                    WHEN upper = 1 THEN '0.5-1'
                    WHEN upper = 3 THEN '1-3'
                    WHEN upper = 6 THEN '3-6'
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '6-10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '10-100'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[0.01,0.1,0.5,1,3,6,10,100]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[0.1,0.5,1,3,6,10,100,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    weekly_size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,lower
            ,upper
            ,cohort
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT block_date FROM total_fees_dense
        ) t1
        CROSS JOIN
            size_cohorts t2
    )
    
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cohort
        ,SUM(COALESCE(fees,0)) AS fees_total
        ,SUM(IF(fees>0,1,0)) AS users_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.block_date
            ,t2.cohort
            ,IF(t1.fees >= t2.lower AND t1.fees < t2.upper,t1.fees, 0) AS fees
        FROM total_fees_dense t1
        INNER JOIN
            weekly_size_cohorts t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            
    )
    WHERE
        block_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### Unique Active Users (Rolling Year)

**Query ID:** 6528169 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    total_fees_dense AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,user
            ,SUM(annual_rolling_fees) AS annual_rolling_fees
        FROM (
            SELECT block_date,user, annual_rolling_fees FROM query_6518535 --gnosis_rev_eure_rolling_fees_per_address_dense_v2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT block_date,user, annual_rolling_fees FROM query_6519006 --gnosis_rev_zchf_rolling_fees_per_address_dense_v2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT block_date,user, annual_rolling_fees FROM query_6522143 --gnosis_rev_brla_rolling_fees_per_address_dense_v2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT block_date,user, annual_rolling_fees FROM query_6518835 --gnosis_rev_usdce_rolling_fees_per_address_dense_v2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT block_date,user, annual_rolling_fees FROM query_6526089 --gnosis_rev_sdai_rolling_fees_per_address_dense_v2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT block_date,user, annual_rolling_fees FROM query_6527039 --gnosis_rev_gpay_rolling_fees_per_address_dense_v2
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '>=100',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 1 THEN '<1'
                    WHEN upper = 3 THEN '1-3'
                    WHEN upper = 6 THEN '3-6'
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '6-10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '10-100'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[0,1,3,6,10,100]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[1,3,6,10,100,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    weekly_size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,lower
            ,upper
            ,cohort
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT block_date FROM total_fees_dense
        ) t1
        CROSS JOIN
            size_cohorts t2
    )
    
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cohort
        ,SUM(COALESCE(annual_rolling_fees,0)) AS annual_rolling_fees_total
        ,SUM(IF(annual_rolling_fees>0,1,0)) AS users_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.block_date
            ,t2.cohort
            ,IF(t1.annual_rolling_fees >= t2.lower AND t1.annual_rolling_fees < t2.upper,t1.annual_rolling_fees, 0) AS annual_rolling_fees
        FROM total_fees_dense t1
        INNER JOIN
            weekly_size_cohorts t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            
    )
    WHERE
        block_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### Unique accounts in the last 30 days - [ Omnibridge ]

**Query ID:** 66650 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account) AS total
    FROM (
        SELECT evt_block_time, "from" AS account
        FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
        WHERE "to" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
    UNION ALL
        SELECT evt_block_time, "to" AS account
        FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
        WHERE "from" = '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671'
    ) AS accounts_table
    WHERE DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 30;
    ```

    ```sql
        )
    UNION ALL

                    '\x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F'
            )

            AND "to" != '\x87d48c565d0d85770406d248efd7dc3cbd41e729'
        )
    ) AS accounts_table
    ```

### Unique depositors per day - [ GBC Deposits ]

**Query ID:** 286774 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT days.day, COALESCE(depositors, 0) AS depositors
    FROM (
        SELECT date_trunc('day', block_time) AS day, COUNT(DISTINCT "from") AS depositors
        FROM xdai."transactions"
        WHERE hash IN (
            SELECT evt_tx_hash
            FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE (
                "to" = '\x0B98057eA310F4d31F2a452B414647007d1645d9' AND
                contract_address = '\x722fc4DAABFEaff81b97894fC623f91814a1BF68'
            )
        )
        GROUP BY 1
    ) AS deposits
    RIGHT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT date_trunc('day', time) AS day
        FROM xdai."blocks"
        WHERE "number" > 19469076
    ) AS days ON deposits.day = days.day
    ```

### User First Engagement

**Query ID:** 3680348 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_gw_signupPerson AS (
        SELECT * FROM dune.hdser.query_3663810
        WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-05-01'
    ),
    
    user_transactions AS (
        SELECT
            CASE
                WHEN t2.created_at < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30' DAY THEN 'Older'
                ELSE 'Last 30 Days'
            END AS label
            ,t1.to AS safe_wallet
            ,MIN(DATE_DIFF('hour', t2.created_at, t1.block_time)) AS min_time_diff
        FROM
            gnosis.transactions t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_gw_signupPerson t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1.to
       WHERE
            t1.block_time >= t2.created_at
        GROUP BY 1,2
    ),
    
    distribution AS (
        SELECT
            label
            ,min_time_diff
            ,COUNT(DISTINCT safe_wallet) AS cnt
        FROM
            user_transactions
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    norm_distribution AS (
        SELECT
            label
            ,min_time_diff AS time_diff
            ,cnt
            ,CAST(cnt AS REAL)/(SUM(cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY label)) AS pct
        FROM
            distribution
    ),
    
    hours_from_creation AS (
        SELECT
            label
            ,time_diff
        FROM
            UNNEST(SEQUENCE(0,47)) s(time_diff)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY['Older', 'Last 30 Days']) s(label)
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        t2.label
        ,t2.time_diff
        ,COALESCE(t1.cnt,0) AS cnt
        ,COALESCE(t1.pct,0) AS pct
    FROM norm_distribution t1
    RIGHT JOIN
        hours_from_creation t2
        ON
        t2.time_diff = t1.time_diff
        AND
        t2.label = t1.label
    ```

### User Mint Distribution

**Query ID:** 5391251 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Weeks` (number): `24`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      cutoff AS (
        SELECT date_add('week', -{{Last Weeks}}, now()) AS since_ts
      ),
    
      mint_counts AS (
        SELECT
          l."to"                        AS user_address,
          COUNT(DISTINCT l.evt_tx_hash) AS mint_count
        FROM query_5260204 l
        CROSS JOIN cutoff
        WHERE l."from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
          AND l.evt_block_time >= cutoff.since_ts
        GROUP BY l."to"
      ),
    
      buckets AS (
        SELECT
          CASE
            WHEN mint_count = 1                THEN '1×'
            WHEN mint_count BETWEEN 2 AND 9    THEN '2–10×'
            WHEN mint_count BETWEEN 10 AND 99  THEN '10–100×'
            WHEN mint_count BETWEEN 100 AND 999 THEN '100–1000×'
            ELSE                                   '≥ 1000×'
          END AS bucket,
          COUNT(*) AS num_users
        FROM mint_counts
        GROUP BY 1
      )
    
    SELECT
      bucket,
      num_users,
      ROUND(num_users * 100.0 / SUM(num_users) OVER (), 2) AS pct_of_users
    FROM buckets
    ORDER BY
      CASE bucket
        WHEN '1×'         THEN 1
        WHEN '2–10×'      THEN 2
        WHEN '10–100×'    THEN 3
        WHEN '100–1000×'  THEN 4
        ELSE                  5
      END;
    ```

### User Mint Distribution - BRLA

**Query ID:** 5471955 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Weeks` (number): `24`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      cutoff AS (
        SELECT
          date_add('week', -{{Last Weeks}}, now()) AS since_ts
      ),
    
      mint_counts AS (
        SELECT
          "to"                        AS user_address,
          COUNT(DISTINCT evt_tx_hash) AS mint_count
        FROM brla_gnosis.brlav1_1_evt_transfer
        CROSS JOIN cutoff
        WHERE "from" = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
          AND evt_block_time >= cutoff.since_ts
        GROUP BY "to"
      ),
    
      buckets AS (
        SELECT
          CASE
            WHEN mint_count = 1                THEN '1×'
            WHEN mint_count BETWEEN 2 AND 9    THEN '2–10×'
            WHEN mint_count BETWEEN 10 AND 99  THEN '10–100×'
            WHEN mint_count BETWEEN 100 AND 999 THEN '100–1000×'
            ELSE                                   '≥ 1000×'
          END         AS bucket,
          COUNT(*)    AS num_users
        FROM mint_counts
        GROUP BY 1
      )
    
    SELECT
      bucket,
      num_users,
      ROUND(num_users * 100.0
        / SUM(num_users) OVER (), 2) AS pct_of_users
    FROM buckets
    ORDER BY
      CASE bucket
        WHEN '1×'        THEN 1
        WHEN '2–10×'     THEN 2
        WHEN '10–100×'   THEN 3
        WHEN '100–1000×' THEN 4
        ELSE                  5
      END;
    ```

### User Mint Distribution - Buenbit

**Query ID:** 5788236 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Weeks` (number): `24`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      cutoff AS (
        SELECT date_add('week', -{{Last Weeks}}, now()) AS since_ts
      ),
    
      dedup_mints AS (
        SELECT tx_hash, "to" AS user, block_time AS mint_time
        FROM (
          SELECT
            l.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY l.tx_hash
              ORDER BY l.block_time
            ) AS rn
          FROM query_5786984 l, cutoff
          WHERE l.direction = 'onramp'
            AND l.block_time >= cutoff.since_ts
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      first_mint AS (
        SELECT user, MIN(mint_time) AS mint_time
        FROM dedup_mints
        GROUP BY user
      ),
    
      dedup_burns AS (
        SELECT tx_hash, "from" AS user, block_time AS burn_time
        FROM (
          SELECT
            l.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY l.tx_hash
              ORDER BY l.block_time
            ) AS rn
          FROM query_5786984 l, cutoff
          WHERE l.direction = 'offramp'
            AND l.block_time >= cutoff.since_ts
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      hold_times AS (
        SELECT
          f.user,
          DATE_DIFF('day', f.mint_time, MIN(b.burn_time)) AS days_held
        FROM first_mint f
        JOIN dedup_burns b
          ON b.user = f.user
         AND b.burn_time > f.mint_time
        GROUP BY f.user, f.mint_time
      ),
    
      buckets AS (
        SELECT
          CASE
            WHEN days_held = 0                THEN 'Same day'
            WHEN days_held BETWEEN 1 AND 7    THEN '1–7 days'
            WHEN days_held BETWEEN 8 AND 30   THEN '8–30 days'
            ELSE                                   '> 30 days'
          END AS bucket,
          COUNT(*) AS num_users
        FROM hold_times
        GROUP BY 1
      )
    
    SELECT
      bucket,
      num_users,
      ROUND(num_users * 100.0 / SUM(num_users) OVER (), 2) AS pct_of_users
    FROM buckets
    ORDER BY
      CASE bucket
        WHEN 'Same day'  THEN 1
        WHEN '1–7 days'  THEN 2
        WHEN '8–30 days' THEN 3
        ELSE                  4
      END;
    ```

### User Retention

**Query ID:** 3699769 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_gw_signupPerson AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3663810
        WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-05-01'
    ),
    
    user_transactions AS (
        SELECT
            t1.to AS safe_wallet
            ,CAST(DATE_TRUNC('week',t1.block_time) AS DATE) AS date
        FROM
            gnosis.transactions t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_gw_signupPerson t2
            ON
            t2.safe_wallet = t1.to
       WHERE
            t1.block_time >= t2.created_at
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    gw_weekly_signups AS (
        SELECT
            CAST(DATE_TRUNC('week', created_at) AS DATE) AS date
            ,safe_wallet AS new_user
        FROM
            gnosis_gw_signupPerson
    ),
    
    gw_weekly_users_total AS (
        SELECT
            date
            ,new_users
            ,total_users
            ,LAG(total_users) OVER (ORDER BY date) AS total_users_lag
        FROM (
            SELECT
                date
                ,new_users
                ,SUM(new_users) OVER (ORDER BY date) AS total_users
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    date
                    ,COUNT(*) AS new_users
                FROM
                    gw_weekly_signups
                GROUp BY 1
            )
        )
    ),
    
    weekly_returning_users AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.safe_wallet AS returning_user
            ,t1.date
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt_txs
        FROM user_transactions t1
        LEFT JOIN
            gw_weekly_signups t2
            ON
            t2.date = t1.date
        WHERE
            t1.safe_wallet != t2.new_user
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            date
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                MIN(date) AS min_date
                ,CAST(DATE_TRUNC('week',NOW()) AS DATE) AS max_date
            FROM
                weekly_returning_users
        ) t1
        ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(t1.min_date, t1.max_date,INTERVAL '7' DAY)) AS s(date)
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        t3.date
        ,COALESCE(CAST(cnt_returning_users AS REAL)/total_users_lag,0) AS "Returning Rate"
        ,1 - COALESCE(CAST(cnt_returning_users AS REAL)/total_users_lag,0) AS "Churn Rate"
        ,COALESCE(cnt_txs,0) AS cnt_txs
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            date
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt_returning_users
            ,SUM(cnt_txs) AS cnt_txs
        FROM
            weekly_returning_users 
        GROUP BY 1
    ) t1
    LEFT JOIN
        gw_weekly_users_total t2
        ON
        t2.date = t1.date
    RIGHT JOIN
        calendar t3
        ON
        t3.date = t1.date
    ```

### Users Balances per Age Cohort

**Query ID:** 4435052 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    age_cohorts_bluechips_token_balances_weekly AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4432533 --gnosis_age_cohorts_bluechips_token_balances_weekly_v
    )

        ,SUM(amount_usd) AS amount_usd
    FROM age_cohorts_bluechips_token_balances_weekly
    WHERE
        block_date >= DATE '2021-01-01'
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### Users by Hour

**Query ID:** 3509168 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH 
    daily_addresses AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('hour', block_time) AS day,
            "from"
        FROM gnosis.transactions
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    first_appearance AS (
        SELECT
            "from",
            MIN(day) AS first_day
        FROM daily_addresses
        GROUP BY "from"
    ), 
    daily_returning_addresses AS (
        SELECT
            w.day,
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN w.day > f.first_day THEN w."from" END) AS returning_addresses
        FROM 
            daily_addresses w
        JOIN first_appearance f 
            ON w."from" = f."from"
        GROUP BY w.day
    ), 
    total_addresses_per_day AS (
        SELECT
            day,
            COUNT(DISTINCT "from") AS total_addresses
        FROM daily_addresses
        GROUP BY day
    )
    
    SELECT
        t.day AS current_day,
        COALESCE(w.returning_addresses, 0) AS "Returning",
        t.total_addresses - COALESCE(w.returning_addresses, 0) AS "New"
    FROM total_addresses_per_day t
    LEFT JOIN daily_returning_addresses w 
        ON t.day = w.day
    WHERE
        t.day > NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY
    ```

### Validator Pools and Delegators on xDai

**Query ID:** 17500 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION _bytea2numeric(_b BYTEA) RETURNS NUMERIC AS $$
    DECLARE
        _n NUMERIC := 0;
    BEGIN
        FOR _i IN 0 .. LENGTH(_b)-1 LOOP
            _n := _n*256+GET_BYTE(_b,_i);
        END LOOP;
        RETURN _n;
    END;
    $$ LANGUAGE PLPGSQL IMMUTABLE STRICT;
    
    SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY staked DESC) id, pool, delegators, staked
    FROM (
        SELECT
            (
                SELECT CONCAT('0x', ENCODE(staking_address, 'hex')) AS pool
                FROM (
                    SELECT *, _bytea2numeric(staking_address) AS pool_id
                    FROM (
                        SELECT unnest("_initialStakingAddresses") AS staking_address, call_block_time AS time
                        FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_call_initialize"
                    UNION ALL
                        SELECT "_stakingAddress" AS staking_address, call_block_time AS time
                        FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_call_setStakingAddress"
                        WHERE call_success = true
                    ) AS calls
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT "newStakingAddress" AS staking_address, evt_block_time AS time, "poolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_evt_ChangedStakingAddress"
                UNION ALL 
                    SELECT "poolStakingAddress" AS staking_address, evt_block_time AS time, "poolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_AddedPool_1"
                ) AS staking_addresses
                WHERE pool_id = stakes.pool_id
                ORDER BY time DESC
                LIMIT 1
            ),
            COUNT(DISTINCT staker) - 1 AS delegators,
            SUM(balance)/1e18 AS staked
        FROM (
            SELECT balance, staker, pool_id
            FROM (
                SELECT SUM(amount) AS balance, staker, pool_id
                FROM (
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_OrderedWithdrawal"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_OrderedWithdrawal_1"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT amount AS amount, staker, _bytea2numeric("toPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_PlacedStake"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT amount AS amount, staker, "toPoolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_PlacedStake_1"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_WithdrewStake"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_WithdrewStake_1"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_MovedStake"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_MovedStake_1"
                ) AS stakes
                GROUP BY staker, pool_id
            ) AS stakes
            WHERE balance > 0
        UNION ALL
            SELECT 0 AS balance, staker, pool_id
            FROM (
                SELECT SUM(amount) AS balance, staker, pool_id
                FROM (
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, evt_block_number, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_OrderedWithdrawal"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, evt_block_number, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_OrderedWithdrawal_1"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT amount AS amount, staker, evt_block_number, _bytea2numeric("toPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_PlacedStake"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT amount AS amount, staker, evt_block_number, "toPoolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_PlacedStake_1"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, evt_block_number, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_WithdrewStake"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, evt_block_number, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_WithdrewStake_1"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, evt_block_number, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_MovedStake"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, evt_block_number, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_MovedStake_1"
                ) AS stakes
                WHERE evt_block_number < (
                    SELECT 14026105 + 120992 * FLOOR(((SELECT MAX(number) FROM xdai."blocks") - 14026105) / 120992)
                )
                GROUP BY staker, pool_id
            ) AS stakes
            WHERE balance > 0
        ) AS stakes
        WHERE pool_id IN (
            SELECT pool_id
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    unnest("_initialMiningAddresses") AS mining_address,
                    _bytea2numeric(unnest("_initialStakingAddresses")) AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_call_initialize"
            UNION ALL
                SELECT
                    "_miningAddress" AS mining_address,
                    _bytea2numeric("_stakingAddress") AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_call_setStakingAddress"
                WHERE call_success = true
            UNION ALL
                SELECT "newMiningAddress" AS mining_address, "poolId" AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_evt_ChangedMiningAddress"
            UNION ALL 
                SELECT "oldMiningAddress" AS mining_address, "poolId" AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_evt_ChangedMiningAddress"
            UNION ALL 
                SELECT "poolMiningAddress" AS mining_address, "poolId" AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_AddedPool_1"
            ) AS validators
            WHERE mining_address IN (
                SELECT unnest("newSet") AS validators
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_evt_InitiateChange"
                WHERE evt_block_number = (SELECT MAX(evt_block_number) FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_evt_InitiateChange")
            )
        )
        GROUP BY pool_id
    ) AS pools
    ORDER BY staked DESC;
    ```

### Validators, Delegators and Total Staked on xDai

**Query ID:** 17276 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION _bytea2numeric(_b BYTEA) RETURNS NUMERIC AS $$
    DECLARE
        _n NUMERIC := 0;
    BEGIN
        FOR _i IN 0 .. LENGTH(_b)-1 LOOP
            _n := _n*256+GET_BYTE(_b,_i);
        END LOOP;
        RETURN _n;
    END;
    $$ LANGUAGE PLPGSQL IMMUTABLE STRICT;
    
    SELECT pools, delegators, staked, (staked * price) AS staked_usd, total_supply, (staked * 100) / total_supply AS percentage_of_total_supply
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pool_id) AS pools, COUNT(DISTINCT staker) - COUNT(DISTINCT pool_id) AS delegators, SUM(balance)/1e18 AS staked
        FROM (
            SELECT balance, staker, pool_id
            FROM (
                SELECT SUM(amount) AS balance, staker, pool_id
                FROM (
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_OrderedWithdrawal"
                UNION ALL 
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_OrderedWithdrawal_1"
                UNION ALL 
                    SELECT amount AS amount, staker, _bytea2numeric("toPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_PlacedStake"
                UNION ALL 
                    SELECT amount AS amount, staker, "toPoolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_PlacedStake_1"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_WithdrewStake"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_WithdrewStake_1"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_MovedStake"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_MovedStake_1"
                ) AS stakes
                GROUP BY staker, pool_id
            ) AS stakes
            WHERE balance > 0
        UNION ALL
            SELECT 0 AS balance, staker, pool_id
            FROM (
                SELECT SUM(amount) AS balance, staker, pool_id
                FROM (
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id, evt_block_number
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_OrderedWithdrawal"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id, evt_block_number
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_OrderedWithdrawal_1"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT amount AS amount, staker, _bytea2numeric("toPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id, evt_block_number
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_PlacedStake"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT amount AS amount, staker, "toPoolId" AS pool_id, evt_block_number
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_PlacedStake_1"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id, evt_block_number
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_WithdrewStake"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id, evt_block_number
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_WithdrewStake_1"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, _bytea2numeric("fromPoolStakingAddress") AS pool_id, evt_block_number
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_MovedStake"
                UNION ALL
                    SELECT -amount AS amount, staker, "fromPoolId" AS pool_id, evt_block_number
                    FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_MovedStake_1"
                ) AS stakes
                WHERE evt_block_number < (
                    SELECT 14026105 + 120992 * FLOOR(((SELECT MAX(number) FROM xdai."blocks") - 14026105) / 120992)
                )
                GROUP BY staker, pool_id
            ) AS stakes
            WHERE balance > 0
        ) AS stakes
        WHERE pool_id IN (
            SELECT pool_id
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    unnest("_initialMiningAddresses") AS mining_address,
                    _bytea2numeric(unnest("_initialStakingAddresses")) AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_call_initialize"
            UNION ALL
                SELECT
                    "_miningAddress" AS mining_address,
                    _bytea2numeric("_stakingAddress") AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_call_setStakingAddress"
                WHERE call_success = true
            UNION ALL
                SELECT "newMiningAddress" AS mining_address, "poolId" AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_evt_ChangedMiningAddress"
            UNION ALL 
                SELECT "oldMiningAddress" AS mining_address, "poolId" AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_evt_ChangedMiningAddress"
            UNION ALL 
                SELECT "poolMiningAddress" AS mining_address, "poolId" AS pool_id
                FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_AddedPool_1"
            ) AS validators
            WHERE mining_address IN (
                SELECT unnest("newSet") AS validators
                FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_evt_InitiateChange"
                WHERE evt_block_number = (SELECT MAX(evt_block_number) FROM xdai_posdao."ValidatorSetAuRa_evt_InitiateChange")
            )
        )
    ) AS stake_values
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT sum(amount)/1e18 - 27687.5 AS total_supply
        FROM (
            SELECT amount
            FROM stake."PermittableToken_evt_Mint"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT -value AS amount
            FROM stake."PermittableToken_evt_Burn"
        UNION ALL
            SELECT "tokensAmount" AS amount
            FROM xdai_posdao."StakingAuRa_evt_ClaimedReward"
        ) AS events
    ) AS total_supply ON 1=1
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT current/1e8 AS price
        FROM chainlink."AccessControlledAggregator_evt_AnswerUpdated"
        WHERE contract_address = '\x6F2A6D693734fE5ea3bb1086e96Aac511d00F808'
        ORDER BY "updatedAt" DESC
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS price ON 1=1;
    ```

### Volume per day - [ Curve.fi 3pool ]

**Query ID:** 92950 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    select day, sum(TriPool) as total from (
    
    select date_trunc('day', evt_block_time) AS day, sum(tokens_sold/(case 
    when sold_id = 0 then 1e18
    when sold_id = 1 then 1e6
    when sold_id = 2 then 1e6
    end)) as TriPool from curvefi."x3pool_swap_evt_TokenExchange" as cst
    group by 1
    
    ) a group by 1
    ```

### WETH claim fees by amount in the last 30 days - [ xDai-ETH Bridges ]

**Query ID:** 342690 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
       unnest(array['< 0.1', '= 0.1', '0.1-0.5','0.5-1', '1-5', '5-10', '> 10']) AS amount,
       unnest(array["<0.1", "=0.1", "0.1-0.5","0.5-1", "1-5", "5-10", ">10"]) AS transfers
    FROM (
        SELECT
            SUM(CASE WHEN amount < 0.1 THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "<0.1",
            SUM(CASE WHEN amount = 0.1 THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "=0.1",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount > 0.1 AND amount < 0.5) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "0.1-0.5",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 0.5 AND amount < 1) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "0.5-1",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 1 AND amount < 5) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "1-5",
            SUM(CASE WHEN (amount >= 5 AND amount < 10) THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS "5-10",
            SUM(CASE WHEN amount >= 10 THEN gas_used*gas_price ELSE 0 END)/1e18 AS ">10"
        FROM (
            SELECT value/1e18 AS amount, evt_tx_hash
            FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE (
                contract_address = '\xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2' AND
                DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 30 AND
                "from" IN (
                    '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671',
                    '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016'
                ) AND
                "to" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643'
            )
        ) AS transfers
        LEFT JOIN ethereum.transactions ON transfers.evt_tx_hash = ethereum.transactions.hash
    ) AS transfers2
    ```

### WETH claims by amount in the last 30 days - [ xDai-ETH Bridges ]

**Query ID:** 342688 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
       unnest(array['< 0.1', '= 0.1', '0.1-0.5','0.5-1', '1-5', '5-10', '> 10']) AS amount,
       unnest(array["<0.1", "=0.1", "0.1-0.5","0.5-1", "1-5", "5-10", ">10"]) AS transfers
    FROM (
        SELECT
            COUNT(CASE WHEN value < 0.1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "<0.1",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN value = 0.1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "=0.1",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value > 0.1 AND value < 0.5) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "0.1-0.5",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 0.5 AND value < 1) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "0.5-1",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 1 AND value < 5) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "1-5",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN (value >= 5 AND value < 10) THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS "5-10",
            COUNT(CASE WHEN value >= 10 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS ">10"
        FROM (
            SELECT value/1e18 AS value
            FROM erc20."ERC20_evt_Transfer"
            WHERE (
                contract_address = '\xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2' AND
                DATE_PART('day', now() - evt_block_time) < 30 AND
                "from" IN (
                    '\x88ad09518695c6c3712AC10a214bE5109a655671',
                    '\x4aa42145Aa6Ebf72e164C9bBC74fbD3788045016'
                ) AND
                "to" != '\x5d3a536e4d6dbd6114cc1ead35777bab948e3643'
            )
        ) AS transfers
    ) AS transfers2
    ```

### Wallet Deployment

**Query ID:** 3785418 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_metri_wallets AS (
        SELECT
             safe_wallet
            ,method
            ,created_at
            ,MIN(imported_at) AS imported_at
        FROM 
            query_3674206
        WHERE 
            (created_at >= DATE '2024-05-01' AND method = 'Created')
            OR
            (imported_at >= DATE '2024-05-01' AND method = 'Imported')
        GROUP BY
        1,2,3
    ),
    
    metri_counts_sparse AS (
        SELECT
            CAST(DATE_TRUNC('day',COALESCE(imported_at,created_at)) AS DATE) AS day
            ,method
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM
            gnosis_metri_wallets
        GROUP BY
            1,2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            day
            ,method
        FROM (
            SELECT
                MIN(day) AS min_day
            FROM
                metri_counts_sparse
        )
        ,UNNEST(SEQUENCE(min_day, CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1' DAY, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(day)
        ,UNNEST(ARRAY['Created','Imported']) t(method)
    ),
    
    metri_counts_dense As (
        SELECT 
            t1.day
            ,t1.method
            ,COALESCE(t2.cnt,0) AS cnt
        FROM calendar t1
        LEFT JOIN
            metri_counts_sparse t2
            ON
            t2.day = t1.day
            AND
            t2.method = t1.method
    )
    
    SELECT 
        day
        ,method
        ,cnt
        ,SUM(cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY method ORDER BY day) AS total
        ,SUM(IF(method='Created',cnt,0)) OVER (ORDER BY day) AS total_created
        ,SUM(IF(method='Imported',cnt,0)) OVER (ORDER BY day) AS total_imported
        ,SUM(cnt) OVER (ORDER BY day) AS total_full
    FROM metri_counts_dense
    ORDER BY
        day DESC
    ```

### Wallet Deployment: Hour of Day

**Query ID:** 3680963 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_gw_signupPerson AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_3663810
        WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-05-01'
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            CASE
                WHEN created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1' MONTH THEN '< 1 Month'
                WHEN created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '2' MONTH THEN '1 - 2 Months'
                WHEN created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '3' MONTH THEN '2 - 3 Months'
            END age_cohort
            ,EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at) AS hour
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM gnosis_gw_signupPerson
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            age_cohort
            ,hour
        FROM 
            UNNEST(SEQUENCE(0,23)) AS s(hour)
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(ARRAY['< 1 Month', '1 - 2 Months', '2 - 3 Months']) AS t(age_cohort)
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t2.age_cohort
        ,t2.hour
        ,COALESCE(t1.cnt,0) AS cnt
        ,CAST(COALESCE(t1.cnt,0) AS REAL)/NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(t1.cnt,0)) OVER (PARTITION BY t2.age_cohort),0) AS pct
    FROM
        final t1
    RIGHT JOIN
        calendar t2
        ON 
        t2.hour = t1.hour
        AND
        t2.age_cohort = t1.age_cohort
    ```

### Wallets Overview

**Query ID:** 5683225 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `6`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    zeal_wallets AS (
        SELECT 
            owner AS address
        FROM query_5616761 --gnosis_zeal_gp_wallets_v
    ),
    
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '$10M>=',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '$1-$10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '$10-$100'
                    WHEN upper = 1e3 THEN '$100-$1K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e4 THEN '$1K-$10K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e5 THEN '$10K-$100K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e6 THEN '$100K-$1M'
                    WHEN upper = 1e7 THEN '$1M-$10M'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[1,10,1e2,1e3,1e4,1e5,1e6,1e7]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[10,1e2,1e3,1e4,1e5,1e6,1e7,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,cohort
            ,upper
            ,SUM(amount) AS amount
            ,COUNT(*) AS entities_cnt
        FROM
            (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_date
               ,t2.cohort
               ,t2.upper
               ,t1.amount_usd AS amount
            FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_bluechips_wallet_volume_weekly_v t1
            CROSS JOIN
                size_cohorts t2
            INNER JOIN
                zeal_wallets t3
                ON t3.address = t1.wallet
            WHERE
                t1.amount_usd >= t2.lower AND t1.amount_usd < t2.upper
                AND block_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)
          )
        GROUP BY 1,2,3
    )
    
    SELECT
        *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,cohort
            ,upper
            ,amount
            ,entities_cnt
            ,SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY block_date) AS total_amount
            ,SUM(entities_cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY block_date) AS total_entities_cnt
        FROM
            final
    )
    WHERE block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
    ORDER BY block_date DESC, upper
    ```

### Wallets Overview

**Query ID:** 5683216 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `6`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    zeal_wallets AS (
        SELECT 
            pay_wallet AS address
        FROM query_5616761 --gnosis_zeal_gp_wallets_v
    ),
    
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '$10M>=',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '$1-$10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '$10-$100'
                    WHEN upper = 1e3 THEN '$100-$1K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e4 THEN '$1K-$10K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e5 THEN '$10K-$100K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e6 THEN '$100K-$1M'
                    WHEN upper = 1e7 THEN '$1M-$10M'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[1,10,1e2,1e3,1e4,1e5,1e6,1e7]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[10,1e2,1e3,1e4,1e5,1e6,1e7,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,cohort
            ,upper
            ,SUM(amount) AS amount
            ,COUNT(*) AS entities_cnt
        FROM
            (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_date
               ,t2.cohort
               ,t2.upper
               ,t1.amount_usd AS amount
            FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_bluechips_wallet_volume_weekly_v t1
            CROSS JOIN
                size_cohorts t2
            INNER JOIN
                zeal_wallets t3
                ON t3.address = t1.wallet
            WHERE
                t1.amount_usd >= t2.lower AND t1.amount_usd < t2.upper
                AND block_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)
          )
        GROUP BY 1,2,3
    )
    
    SELECT
        *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,cohort
            ,upper
            ,amount
            ,entities_cnt
            ,SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY block_date) AS total_amount
            ,SUM(entities_cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY block_date) AS total_entities_cnt
        FROM
            final
    )
    WHERE block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
    ORDER BY block_date DESC, upper
    ```

### Wallets Overview

**Query ID:** 5682147 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `6`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    zeal_wallets AS (
        SELECT 
            owner AS address
        FROM query_5616761 --gnosis_zeal_gp_wallets_v
    ),
    
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '$10M>=',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '$1-$10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '$10-$100'
                    WHEN upper = 1e3 THEN '$100-$1K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e4 THEN '$1K-$10K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e5 THEN '$10K-$100K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e6 THEN '$100K-$1M'
                    WHEN upper = 1e7 THEN '$1M-$10M'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[1,10,1e2,1e3,1e4,1e5,1e6,1e7]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[10,1e2,1e3,1e4,1e5,1e6,1e7,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,cohort
            ,upper
            ,SUM(amount) AS amount
            ,COUNT(*) AS entities_cnt
        FROM
            (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_date
               ,t2.cohort
               ,t1.amount_usd AS amount
               ,t2.upper
            FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_bluechips_balance_wallet_dense_weekly_v t1
            CROSS JOIN
                size_cohorts t2
            INNER JOIN
                zeal_wallets t3
                ON t3.address = t1.wallet
            WHERE
                t1.amount_usd >= t2.lower AND t1.amount_usd < t2.upper
          )
        WHERE block_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)
        GROUP BY 1,2, 3
    )
    
    SELECT
        *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,cohort
            ,upper
            ,amount
            ,entities_cnt
            ,SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY block_date) AS total_amount
            ,SUM(entities_cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY block_date) AS total_entities_cnt
        FROM
            final
    )
    WHERE block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
    ORDER BY block_date DESC, upper
    ```

### Wallets Overview

**Query ID:** 5658285 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `6`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    zeal_addresses AS (
        SELECT 
            owner_creation_time AS block_time
            ,owner AS address
        FROM query_5616761 --gnosis_zeal_gpay_wallets_v
    ),
    
    
    transfers AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.block_date
            ,IF(t3.label IS NULL, 'Unknown', t3.label) AS counterparty
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
            ,SUM(t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t4.decimals)* t4.price) AS value
        FROM 
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            zeal_addresses t2
            ON t2.address = t1."from"
        LEFT JOIN
            dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_address_labels_v t3
            On t3.address = t1."to"
        INNER JOIN
           dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v t4 --gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v
            ON t4.token_address = t1.contract_address
            AND t4.block_date = t1.block_date
        WHERE
            t1.block_time > t2.block_time
            AND t1.block_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            counterparty
            ,block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                counterparty
                ,MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
                transfers
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.counterparty
        ,t1.block_date
        ,COALESCE(cnt,0) AS cnt
        ,COALESCE(value,0) AS value
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        transfers t2
        ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
        AND t2.counterparty = t1.counterparty
    ```

### Wallets Overview

**Query ID:** 5658173 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `6`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    zeal_addresses AS (
        SELECT 
            creation_time AS block_time
            ,pay_wallet AS address
        FROM query_5616761 --gnosis_zeal_gpay_v
    ),
    
    new_users_sparse AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS block_date
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM zeal_addresses
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            CAST(date_col AS TIMESTAMP) AS block_date
        FROM UNNEST(SEQUENCE(
            (SELECT CAST(MIN(block_date) AS DATE) FROM new_users_sparse), 
            CURRENT_DATE, 
            INTERVAL '7' DAY
        )) s(date_col)
    ),
    
    total_users_continuous AS (
        SELECT
            c.block_date
            ,SUM(COALESCE(u.cnt, 0)) OVER (ORDER BY c.block_date) AS total
        FROM calendar c
        LEFT JOIN new_users_sparse u 
            ON u.block_date = c.block_date
    ),
    
    transfers AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            DATE_TRUNC('week',t1.block_time) AS block_date
            ,t1."from" AS address
        FROM 
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            zeal_addresses t2
            ON t2.address = t1."from"
        WHERE
            t1.block_time > t2.block_time
    )
    
    SELECT
        final.block_date
        ,final.cnt  AS "Count"
        ,final.pct  AS "Percentage (%)"
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.cnt  
            ,CAST(t1.cnt AS REAL)/t2.total * 100 AS pct 
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                c.block_date
                ,COALESCE(COUNT(tr.address),0) AS cnt
            FROM 
                calendar c
            LEFT JOIN
                transfers tr
                ON tr.block_date = c.block_date
            GROUP BY 1
        ) t1
        LEFT JOIN
            total_users_continuous t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
    ) final
    WHERE final.block_date >= CAST(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH AS TIMESTAMP)
    ORDER BY final.block_date DESC
    ```

### Wallets Overview

**Query ID:** 5658157 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `6`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    zeal_addresses AS (
        SELECT 
            creation_time AS block_time
            ,pay_wallet AS address
        FROM query_5616761 --gnosis_zeal_gpay_wallet_v
    ),
    
    new_users_sparse AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('day', block_time) AS block_date
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM zeal_addresses
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            CAST(date_col AS TIMESTAMP) AS block_date
        FROM UNNEST(SEQUENCE(
            (SELECT CAST(MIN(block_date) AS DATE) FROM new_users_sparse), 
            CURRENT_DATE, 
            INTERVAL '1' DAY
        )) s(date_col)
    ),
    
    total_users_continuous AS (
        SELECT
            c.block_date
            ,SUM(COALESCE(u.cnt, 0)) OVER (ORDER BY c.block_date) AS total
        FROM calendar c
        LEFT JOIN new_users_sparse u 
            ON u.block_date = c.block_date
    ),
    
    transfers AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.block_time) AS block_date 
            ,t1."from" AS address
        FROM 
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            zeal_addresses t2
            ON t2.address = t1."from"
        WHERE
            t1.block_time > t2.block_time
    )
    
    SELECT
        final.block_date
        ,final.cnt  AS "Count"
        ,final.pct  AS "Percentage (%)"
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.cnt  
            ,CAST(t1.cnt AS REAL)/NULLIF(t2.total, 0) * 100 AS pct 
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                c.block_date
                ,COALESCE(COUNT(tr.address),0) AS cnt
            FROM 
                calendar c
            LEFT JOIN
                transfers tr
                ON tr.block_date = c.block_date
            GROUP BY 1
        ) t1
        LEFT JOIN
            total_users_continuous t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
    ) final
    WHERE final.block_date >= CAST(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH AS TIMESTAMP)
    ORDER BY final.block_date DESC
    ```

### Wallets Overview

**Query ID:** 5658110 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `6`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            delta
            ,CAST(cnt AS REAL)/(SUM(cnt) OVER ()) AS pct
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                date_diff('hour', creation_time, activation_time) AS delta
                ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
            FROM query_5616761 --gnosis_zeal_gpay_wallets_v  
            WHERE creation_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
            GROUP BY 1
        )
    )
    WHERE pct >= 0.01
    ```

- `Last Months` (number): `6`

    ```sql
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cnt
        ,total

            block_date
            ,cnt
            ,SUM(cnt) OVER (ORDER BY block_date) AS total
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                DATE_TRUNC('day',creation_time) AS block_date
                ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
            FROM query_5616761 --gnosis_zeal_gpay_wallets_v   
            GROUP BY 1
        )
    )
    WHERE block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
    ORDER BY 1 DESC
    ```

    ```sql
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.counterparty
        ,t1.block_date
        ,COALESCE(cnt,0) AS cnt
        ,COALESCE(value,0) AS value
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        transfers t2
        ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
        AND t2.counterparty = t1.counterparty
    ```

### Wallets Overview

**Query ID:** 5595373 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `6`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            delta
            ,CAST(cnt AS REAL)/(SUM(cnt) OVER ()) AS pct
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                date_diff('hour', creation_time, activation_time) AS delta
                ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
            FROM query_5590073 --gnosis_gpay_activated_wallets_picnic_v  
            WHERE creation_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
            GROUP BY 1
        )
    )
    WHERE pct >= 0.01
    ```

### Wallets Overview

**Query ID:** 5233381 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `6`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    metri_addresses AS (
        SELECT 
            block_time
            ,address
        FROM query_5233153 -- gnosis_metri_wallets_v
    ),
    
    
    transfers AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.block_date
            ,IF(t3.label IS NULL, 'Unknown', t3.label) AS counterparty
            ,COUNT(*) AS cnt
            ,SUM(t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t4.decimals)* t4.price) AS value
        FROM 
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            metri_addresses t2
            ON t2.address = t1."from"
        LEFT JOIN
            dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_address_labels_v t3
            On t3.address = t1."to"
        INNER JOIN
           dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v t4 --gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v
            ON t4.token_address = t1.contract_address
            AND t4.block_date = t1.block_date
        WHERE
            t1.block_time > t2.block_time
            AND t1.block_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            counterparty
            ,block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                counterparty
                ,MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
                transfers
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    )
    
    SELECT
        t1.counterparty
        ,t1.block_date
        ,COALESCE(cnt,0) AS cnt
        ,COALESCE(value,0) AS value
    FROM 
        calendar t1
    LEFT JOIN
        transfers t2
        ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
        AND t2.counterparty = t1.counterparty
    ```

### Wallets Overview

**Query ID:** 5233357 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `6`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    metri_addresses AS (
        SELECT 
            block_time
            ,address
        FROM query_5233153 -- gnosis_metri_wallets_v
    ),
    
    total_users AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,SUM(cnt) OVER (ORDER BY block_date) AS total
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                DATE_TRUNC('week',block_time) AS block_date
                ,COUNT(*)  AS cnt
            FROM metri_addresses
            GROUP BY 1
        )
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                MIN(block_date) AS min_block_date
            FROM
                total_users
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(min_block_date AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '7' DAY)) s(block_date)
    ),
    
    
    transfers AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', t1.block_date) AS block_date
            ,t1."from" AS address
        FROM 
            tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            metri_addresses t2
            ON t2.address = t1."from"
        WHERE
            t1.block_time > t2.block_time
    ),
    
    transfers_crc AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', t1.block_time) AS block_date
            ,t1."from" AS address
        FROM 
            query_4714366 t1--gnosis_circlesv2_erc1155_transfers_v
        INNER JOIN
            metri_addresses t2
            ON t2.address = t1."from"
        WHERE
            t1.block_time > t2.block_time 
            AND "to" = 0x97FD8f7829A019946329f6D2E763A72741047518
    ),
    
    transfers_all AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
             block_date
            ,address
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM transfers
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM transfers_crc
        )
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cnt  AS "Count"
        ,pct  AS "Percentage (%)"
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t1.block_date
            ,t1.cnt  
            ,CAST(t1.cnt AS REAL)/t2.total * 100 AS pct 
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_date
                ,COALESCE(COUNT(t2.address),0) AS cnt
            FROM 
                calendar t1
            LEFT JOIN
                transfers_all t2
                ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            GROUP BY 1
        ) t1
        LEFT JOIN
            total_users t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
    )
    WHERE block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
    ```

    ```sql
    )
    WHERE block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
    ```

### Wallets Overview

**Query ID:** 5226320 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `6`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    picnic_wallets AS (
        SELECT 
            pay_wallet AS address
        FROM query_5590073 --gnosis_gpay_activated_wallets_picnic_v
    )
    
    SELECT 
        block_date
       ,symbol
       ,SUM(amount_usd)  AS amount
       ,COUNT(*) AS entity_cnt
    FROM 
        dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_bluechips_balance_wallet_dense_weekly_v t1
    INNER JOIN
        picnic_wallets t2
        ON t2.address = t1.wallet
    WHERE
        block_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)
        AND block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
        AND amount_usd > 1
    GROUP BY 1,2
    ORDER BY symbol
    ```

### Wallets Overview

**Query ID:** 5226304 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `Last Months` (number): `6`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    picnic_wallets AS (
        SELECT 
            pay_wallet AS address
        FROM query_5590073 --gnosis_gpay_activated_wallets_picnic_v
    ),
    
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '$10M>=',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '$1-$10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '$10-$100'
                    WHEN upper = 1e3 THEN '$100-$1K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e4 THEN '$1K-$10K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e5 THEN '$10K-$100K'
                    WHEN upper = 1e6 THEN '$100K-$1M'
                    WHEN upper = 1e7 THEN '$1M-$10M'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[1,10,1e2,1e3,1e4,1e5,1e6,1e7]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[10,1e2,1e3,1e4,1e5,1e6,1e7,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,cohort
            ,upper
            ,SUM(amount) AS amount
            ,COUNT(*) AS entities_cnt
        FROM
            (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_date
               ,t2.cohort
               ,t2.upper
               ,t1.amount_usd AS amount
            FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_bluechips_wallet_volume_weekly_v t1
            CROSS JOIN
                size_cohorts t2
            INNER JOIN
                picnic_wallets t3
                ON t3.address = t1.wallet
            WHERE
                t1.amount_usd >= t2.lower AND t1.amount_usd < t2.upper
                AND block_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)
          )
        GROUP BY 1,2,3
    )
    
    SELECT
        *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,cohort
            ,upper
            ,amount
            ,entities_cnt
            ,SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY block_date) AS total_amount
            ,SUM(entities_cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY block_date) AS total_entities_cnt
        FROM
            final
    )
    WHERE block_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '{{Last Months}}' MONTH
    ORDER BY block_date DESC, upper
    ```
