### query_approvals_gp_lifi

**Query ID:** 3921088 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_gp_users AS (
        SELECT 
            pay_wallet 
            ,owner
        FROM query_3707804
    ),
    
    approvals AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.evt_block_time
            ,t2.owner
            ,t2.pay_wallet
            ,t1.contract_address
            ,t1.value AS value_raw
            ,IF(t2.pay_wallet = t1.owner, 'Wallet', 'Owner') AS approval
        FROM
            erc20_gnosis.evt_approval t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_gp_users t2
            ON
            t2.pay_wallet = t1.owner
            OR
            t2.owner = t1.owner
        WHERE 
            t1.spender = 0x1231deb6f5749ef6ce6943a275a1d3e7486f4eae
    )
    
    SELECT 
        owner
        ,pay_wallet
        ,t1.contract_address
        ,symbol
        ,approval
        ,value_raw/POWER(10,decimals) AS value
        ,value_raw
    FROM (
    SELECT 
        owner
        ,pay_wallet
        ,contract_address
        ,approval
        ,ARRAY_AGG(value_raw ORDER BY evt_block_time DESC)[1] AS value_raw
    FROM approvals
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    ) t1
    LEFT JOIN
        tokens.erc20 t2
        ON 
        t2.contract_address = t1.contract_address
        AND
        t2.blockchain = 'gnosis'
    WHERE
        value_raw > 0
    ```

            ,IF(t2.pay_wallet = t1.owner, 'Wallet', 'Owner') AS approval

### realityETHv3_status_v

**Query ID:** 4963713 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      new_q AS (
        SELECT
          evt_tx_hash,
          question_id,
          opening_ts,
          timeout
        FROM reality_eth_gnosis.realityeth_v3_0_evt_lognewquestion
        WHERE evt_block_time >= TIMESTAMP '2020-12-01'
      ),
    
      first_answer AS (
        SELECT
          question_id,
          MIN(evt_block_time) AS first_answer_time
        FROM reality_eth_gnosis.realityeth_v3_0_evt_lognewanswer
        GROUP BY question_id
      ),
    
      resolution AS (
        SELECT
          questionId,
          evt_block_time AS actual_close_time
        FROM omen_gnosis.conditionaltokens_evt_conditionresolution
      )
    
    SELECT
      nq.evt_tx_hash,
    
      FROM_UNIXTIME(nq.opening_ts) AS opening_date,
    
      DATE_ADD('second', nq.timeout, fa.first_answer_time) AS finalization_date,
    
      CASE
        WHEN to_unixtime(current_timestamp) < nq.opening_ts
          THEN 0
        WHEN fa.first_answer_time IS NULL
          AND to_unixtime(current_timestamp) >= nq.opening_ts
          THEN 100
        WHEN to_unixtime(current_timestamp)
             < to_unixtime(fa.first_answer_time) + nq.timeout
          THEN ROUND(
                 100
                 * (to_unixtime(current_timestamp)
                    - to_unixtime(fa.first_answer_time)
                   )
                 / nq.timeout
                 , 2
               )
        ELSE 100
      END AS percent_time_completed,
    
      CASE
        WHEN to_unixtime(current_timestamp) < nq.opening_ts                     THEN 'Upcoming'
        WHEN fa.first_answer_time IS NULL                                      THEN 'Closed'
        WHEN to_unixtime(current_timestamp)
             < to_unixtime(fa.first_answer_time) + nq.timeout                  THEN 'Under Finalization'
        WHEN res.actual_close_time IS NULL                                     THEN 'Finalized'
        ELSE                                                                      'Resolved'
      END AS market_status
    
    FROM new_q nq
    LEFT JOIN first_answer fa ON fa.question_id     = nq.question_id
    LEFT JOIN resolution   res ON res.questionId    = nq.question_id
    
    ORDER BY opening_date;
    ```

### s-gCRC invested into liquidity

**Query ID:** 6582277 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH weekly_outflow AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', block_time) AS week,
            SUM(amount_raw) / 1e18 AS gno_outflow
        FROM tokens.transfers
        WHERE
            blockchain = 'gnosis'
            AND contract_address = 0xeeF7B1f06B092625228C835Dd5D5B14641D1e54A
            AND "from" = 0xAeeE89E27203B1837D89dA3ffc748b5853ff0AeD
            AND block_time >= TIMESTAMP '2025-11-01'
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    weeks AS (
        SELECT week
        FROM UNNEST(
            SEQUENCE(
                DATE '2025-12-01',
                CURRENT_DATE,
                INTERVAL '7' DAY
            )
        ) AS t(week)
    ),
    filled_weeks AS (
        SELECT
            w.week,
            COALESCE(o.gno_outflow, 0) AS gno_outflow
        FROM weeks w
        LEFT JOIN weekly_outflow o
            ON w.week = CAST(o.week AS DATE)
    )
    
    SELECT
        week,
        gno_outflow,
    
        SUM(gno_outflow) OVER (
            ORDER BY week
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS total_crc_outflow
    
    FROM filled_weeks
    ORDER BY week;
    ```

### sDAI Revenue by Cohort (Monthly)

**Query ID:** 6526480 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    sdai_fees_dense AS (
        SELECT 
           block_date
            ,user
            ,fees
        FROM query_6526462 --gnosis_rev_sdai_monthly_fees_per_address_dense_v2
    ),
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '>=100',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 0.1 THEN '0.01-0.1'
                    WHEN upper = 0.5 THEN '0.1-0.5'
                    WHEN upper = 1 THEN '0.5-1'
                    WHEN upper = 3 THEN '1-3'
                    WHEN upper = 6 THEN '3-6'
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '6-10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '10-100'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[0.01,0.1,0.5,1,3,6,10,100]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[0.1,0.5,1,3,6,10,100,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    weekly_size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,lower
            ,upper
            ,cohort
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT block_date FROM sdai_fees_dense
        ) t1
        CROSS JOIN
            size_cohorts t2
    )
    
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cohort
        ,SUM(COALESCE(fees,0)) AS fees_total
        ,SUM(IF(fees>0,1,0)) AS users_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.block_date
            ,t2.cohort
            ,IF(t1.fees >= t2.lower AND t1.fees < t2.upper,t1.fees, 0) AS fees
        FROM sdai_fees_dense t1
        INNER JOIN
            weekly_size_cohorts t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            
    )
    WHERE
        block_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### sDAI Revenue by Cohort (Rolling Year)

**Query ID:** 6526229 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    sdai_fees_dense AS (
        SELECT 
           block_date
            ,user
            ,annual_rolling_fees 
        FROM query_6526089 --gnosis_rev_sdai_rolling_fees_per_address_dense_v2
    ),
    
    size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT
            lower
            ,upper
            ,IF(upper=1e20,
                '>=100',
                CASE
                    WHEN upper = 3 THEN '1-3'
                    WHEN upper = 6 THEN '3-6'
                    WHEN upper = 10 THEN '6-10'
                    WHEN upper = 100 THEN '10-100'
                END
                ) AS cohort
        FROM
            UNNEST(ARRAY[1,3,6,10,100]) WITH ORDINALITY m(lower,idx)
            ,UNNEST(ARRAY[3,6,10,100,1e20]) WITH ORDINALITY s(upper,idx)
        WHERE
            m.idx = s.idx
    ),
    
    weekly_size_cohorts AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,lower
            ,upper
            ,cohort
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT block_date FROM sdai_fees_dense
        ) t1
        CROSS JOIN
            size_cohorts t2
    )
    
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,cohort
        ,SUM(COALESCE(annual_rolling_fees,0)) AS annual_rolling_fees_total
        ,SUM(IF(annual_rolling_fees>0,1,0)) AS users_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT
            t2.block_date
            ,t2.cohort
            ,IF(t1.annual_rolling_fees >= t2.lower AND t1.annual_rolling_fees < t2.upper,t1.annual_rolling_fees, 0) AS annual_rolling_fees
        FROM sdai_fees_dense t1
        INNER JOIN
            weekly_size_cohorts t2
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            
    )
    WHERE
        block_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ```

### safe-tx-counts-gnosis

**Query ID:** 4931050 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    -- select *
    -- FROM safe_gnosis.safes AS s
    -- limit 2;
    
    /*
    Table(s): gnosis.transactions
    Reason: Raw tables recommended
    
    Table(s): safe_gnosis.safes, safe_gnosis.transactions
    Reason: Curated dataset recommendations
    
    Table(s): gnosis_chain_gnosis.safeproxyfactory_v_1_4_1_evt_proxycreation
    Reason: Based on contract addresses or possible project names
    
    */
    
    WITH SafeTransactionCounts AS (
      SELECT
        s.address AS safe_address,
        COUNT(t.tx_hash) AS transaction_count
      FROM safe_gnosis.safes AS s
      LEFT JOIN safe_gnosis.transactions AS t
        ON s.address = t."address"
      WHERE 1=1 
        --s.blockchain = 'Gnosis Chain'
      GROUP BY
        s.address
    )
    SELECT
      safe_address, transaction_count
    FROM SafeTransactionCounts
    ORDER BY
      transaction_count DESC
    ```

### seer_agent_daily_performance_categoricalMarkets_v

**Query ID:** 5557725 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      agent_daily AS (
        SELECT
          label,
          CAST(block_time AS date) AS block_date,
          Invested   AS invested,
          Payout     AS payout,
          Profit     AS return
        FROM query_5140465
      ),
    
      calendar AS (
        SELECT
          t.label,
          DAY_SEQ AS block_date
        FROM (
          SELECT
            label,
            MIN(CAST(block_time AS date)) AS start_date
          FROM query_5140465
          GROUP BY label
        ) t
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(
          SEQUENCE(
            t.start_date,
            CURRENT_DATE,
            INTERVAL '1' DAY
          )
        ) AS u(DAY_SEQ)
      ),
    
      daily AS (
        SELECT
          c.label,
          c.block_date,
          COALESCE(ad.payout,   0) AS payout,
          COALESCE(ad.invested, 0) AS invested,
          COALESCE(ad.return,   0) AS return
        FROM calendar c
        LEFT JOIN agent_daily ad
          ON ad.label      = c.label
         AND ad.block_date = c.block_date
      )
    
    SELECT
      label,
      block_date,
      payout,
      invested,
    
      AVG(ABS(invested))           OVER w AS invested_mean,
    
      SUM(return)                  OVER w AS return_cumsum,
      AVG(return)                  OVER w AS return_mean,
      APPROX_PERCENTILE(return,0.5) OVER w AS return_median,
    
      AVG(
        COALESCE(return / NULLIF(ABS(invested),0), 0)
      ) OVER (
        PARTITION BY label
        ORDER BY block_date
        ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
      ) AS MeanROI_60DMA,
    
      (
        POWER(
          1
          + APPROX_PERCENTILE(
              COALESCE(return / NULLIF(ABS(invested),0), 0),
              0.5
            ) OVER (
              PARTITION BY label
              ORDER BY block_date
              ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
            ),
          356.0
          / SUM(1) OVER (
              PARTITION BY label
              ORDER BY block_date
              ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
            )
        )
        - 1
      ) * 100 AS APY_pct
    
    FROM daily
    WINDOW w AS (
      PARTITION BY label
      ORDER BY block_date
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    )
    ORDER BY label, block_date;
    ```

### seer_agent_daily_performance_scalarMarkets_v

**Query ID:** 5585308 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      agent_daily AS (
        SELECT
          label,
          CAST(block_time AS date) AS block_date,
          Invested   AS invested,
          Payout     AS payout,
          (Payout - Invested) AS return
        FROM query_5585198
      ),
    
      calendar AS (
        SELECT
          t.label,
          DAY_SEQ AS block_date
        FROM (
          SELECT
            label,
            MIN(block_date) AS start_date
          FROM agent_daily
          GROUP BY label
        ) t
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(
          SEQUENCE(t.start_date, CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1' DAY)
        ) AS u(DAY_SEQ)
      ),
    
      daily AS (
        SELECT
          c.label,
          c.block_date,
          COALESCE(ad.payout,   0) AS payout,
          COALESCE(ad.invested, 0) AS invested,
          COALESCE(ad.return,   0) AS return
        FROM calendar c
        LEFT JOIN agent_daily ad
          ON ad.label = c.label
         AND ad.block_date = c.block_date
      )
    
    SELECT
      label,
      block_date,
      payout,
      invested,
    
      AVG(ABS(invested)) OVER w AS invested_mean,
    
      SUM(return)                OVER w AS return_cumsum,
      AVG(return)                OVER w AS return_mean,
      APPROX_PERCENTILE(return,0.5) OVER w AS return_median,
    
      AVG(
        COALESCE(return / NULLIF(ABS(invested),0), 0)
      ) OVER (
        PARTITION BY label
        ORDER BY block_date
        ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
      ) AS MeanROI_60DMA,
    
      (
        POWER(
          1
          + APPROX_PERCENTILE(
              COALESCE(return / NULLIF(ABS(invested),0), 0),
              0.5
            ) OVER (
              PARTITION BY label
              ORDER BY block_date
              ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
            ),
          356.0
          / SUM(1) OVER (
              PARTITION BY label
              ORDER BY block_date
              ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
            )
        )
        - 1
      ) * 100 AS APY_pct
    
    FROM daily
    WINDOW w AS (
      PARTITION BY label
      ORDER BY block_date
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    )
    ORDER BY label, block_date;
    ```

### seer_agent_ranking

**Query ID:** 5125813 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      ai_agents AS (
        SELECT address, label
        FROM query_5102644
      ),
    
      token_index_map AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          tok.token     AS outcome_token,
          tok.idx - 1   AS outcome_index
        FROM query_5030312
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(wrapped_tokens) WITH ORDINALITY AS tok(token, idx)
      ),
    
      relevant_markets AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
          a.label,
          tr.conditionId,
          tim.outcome_index AS bet_outcome
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_seer_all_trades tr
        JOIN ai_agents a
          ON a.address = tr.user_from
        JOIN token_index_map tim
          ON tim.conditionId   = tr.conditionId
         AND tim.outcome_token = tr.outcome_token
        WHERE tr.action = 'Buy'
      ),
    
      seer_resolution AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          evt_block_time      AS resolution_time,
          payoutNumerators,
          TRUE                 AS is_valid
        FROM omen_gnosis.conditionaltokens_evt_conditionresolution
      ),
    
      markets_outcome AS (
        SELECT
          rm.label,
          sr.conditionId,
          sr.resolution_time,
          sr.payoutNumerators,
          ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT rm.bet_outcome) AS bet_outcome,
          sr.is_valid
        FROM relevant_markets rm
        JOIN seer_resolution sr
          ON sr.conditionId = rm.conditionId
        GROUP BY rm.label, sr.conditionId, sr.resolution_time, sr.payoutNumerators, sr.is_valid
      ),
    
      markets_outcome_final AS (
        SELECT
          label,
          resolution_time,
          is_valid,
          /* winning indexes array */
          FILTER(
            TRANSFORM(
              payoutNumerators,
              x -> CASE WHEN x <> 0
                        THEN ARRAY_POSITION(payoutNumerators, x) - 1
                        ELSE NULL
                   END
            ),
            x -> x IS NOT NULL
          )                            AS payout_outcome,
          bet_outcome,
          array_union(
            FILTER(
              TRANSFORM(
                payoutNumerators,
                x -> CASE WHEN x <> 0
                          THEN ARRAY_POSITION(payoutNumerators, x) - 1
                          ELSE NULL
                     END
              ),
              x -> x IS NOT NULL
            ),
            bet_outcome
          ) = FILTER(
            TRANSFORM(
              payoutNumerators,
              x -> CASE WHEN x <> 0
                        THEN ARRAY_POSITION(payoutNumerators, x) - 1
                        ELSE NULL
                   END
            ),
            x -> x IS NOT NULL
          )                             AS correct_bet
        FROM markets_outcome
      ),
    
      range_timestamp AS (
        SELECT 'Full'         AS range, TIMESTAMP '2019-01-01 00:00'         AS date_cutoff
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'Last Month',   NOW() - INTERVAL '1' MONTH
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'Last 3 Months', NOW() - INTERVAL '3' MONTH
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'Last 6 Months', NOW() - INTERVAL '6' MONTH
      ),
    
      final AS (
        SELECT
          m.label,
          rt.range,
          rt.date_cutoff,
          COUNT(*)                            AS cnt_resolved,
          COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE correct_bet AND is_valid)    AS cnt_correct,
          COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT correct_bet AND is_valid) AS cnt_wrong,
          100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE correct_bet AND is_valid)
               / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_valid), 0)   AS pct_correct
        FROM markets_outcome_final m
        JOIN range_timestamp rt
          ON m.resolution_time >= rt.date_cutoff
        GROUP BY m.label, rt.range, rt.date_cutoff
      ),
    
      top10_resolved AS (
        SELECT
          label,
          'Top 10 by Resolved Cnt' AS ranking,
          range,
          date_cutoff
        FROM (
          SELECT
            ARRAY_AGG(label ORDER BY cnt_resolved DESC, pct_correct DESC) AS labels,
            range,
            date_cutoff
          FROM final
          GROUP BY range, date_cutoff
        ) x
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(x.labels) WITH ORDINALITY AS u(label, idx)
        WHERE idx <= 10
      ),
    
      top10_correct AS (
        SELECT
          label,
          'Top 10 by Correct Cnt' AS ranking,
          range,
          date_cutoff
        FROM (
          SELECT
            ARRAY_AGG(label ORDER BY cnt_correct DESC, pct_correct DESC) AS labels,
            range,
            date_cutoff
          FROM final
          GROUP BY range, date_cutoff
        ) x
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(x.labels) WITH ORDINALITY AS u(label, idx)
        WHERE idx <= 10
      ),
    
      top10_accuracy AS (
        SELECT
          label,
          'Top 10 by Accuracy' AS ranking,
          range,
          date_cutoff
        FROM (
          SELECT
            ARRAY_AGG(label ORDER BY pct_correct DESC, cnt_resolved DESC) AS labels,
            range,
            date_cutoff
          FROM final
          --WHERE cnt_resolved >= 20
          GROUP BY range, date_cutoff
        ) x
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(x.labels) WITH ORDINALITY AS u(label, idx)
        WHERE idx <= 10
      ),
    
      pma_agents AS (
        SELECT
          label,
          'PMA'   AS ranking,
          range,
          date_cutoff
        FROM (
          SELECT
            ARRAY_AGG(label) AS labels,
            range,
            date_cutoff
          FROM final
          WHERE label NOT LIKE 'Olas%' AND label NOT LIKE 'mech_%'
          GROUP BY range, date_cutoff
        ) x
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(x.labels) WITH ORDINALITY AS u(label, idx)
      ),
    
      mechs_agents AS (
        SELECT
          label,
          'Mechs' AS ranking,
          range,
          date_cutoff
        FROM (
          SELECT
            ARRAY_AGG(label) AS labels,
            range,
            date_cutoff
          FROM final
          WHERE label LIKE 'mech_%'
          GROUP BY range, date_cutoff
        ) x
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(x.labels) WITH ORDINALITY AS u(label, idx)
      ),
    
      olas_agents AS (
        SELECT
          label,
          'Olas'  AS ranking,
          range,
          date_cutoff
        FROM (
          SELECT
            ARRAY_AGG(label) AS labels,
            range,
            date_cutoff
          FROM final
          WHERE label LIKE 'Olas%'
          GROUP BY range, date_cutoff
        ) x
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(x.labels) WITH ORDINALITY AS u(label, idx)
      )
    
    SELECT * FROM top10_resolved
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM top10_correct
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM top10_accuracy
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM pma_agents
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM mechs_agents
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM olas_agents
    ORDER BY ranking, range, label;
    ```

### seer_agents_RMSE_hourly_scalarmarkets_v

**Query ID:** 5584083 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      ai_agents AS (
        SELECT address, label
        FROM query_5102644
      ),
    
      agent_preds AS (
        SELECT
          pr.evt_block_time            AS pred_time,
          pr.publisherAddress          AS address,
          pr.marketAddress             AS marketAddress,
          pr.estimatedProbabilitiesBps AS bps
        FROM seer_pm_gnosis.agentresultmapping_evt_predictionadded pr
        JOIN ai_agents ag
          ON pr.publisherAddress = ag.address
      ),
    
      market_meta AS (
        SELECT
          bm.market           AS marketAddress,
          bm.conditionId,
          CAST(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(bm.params, '$.lowerBound') AS DOUBLE) AS a_raw,
          CAST(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(bm.params, '$.upperBound') AS DOUBLE) AS b_raw
        FROM query_4963697 bm
        WHERE bm.market_type IN ('scalar','multiscalar')
      ),
    
      resolution AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          ANY_VALUE(payoutNumerators) AS payouts_raw
        FROM omen_gnosis.conditionaltokens_evt_conditionresolution
        GROUP BY conditionId
      ),
    
      preds_meta AS (
        SELECT
          ap.pred_time,
          ap.marketAddress,
          ag.label,
          mm.conditionId,
          mm.a_raw,
          mm.b_raw,
          ap.bps          AS bps,
          res.payouts_raw AS payouts_raw
        FROM agent_preds ap
        JOIN ai_agents   ag  ON ap.address       = ag.address
        JOIN market_meta mm  ON ap.marketAddress = mm.marketAddress
        JOIN resolution  res ON mm.conditionId   = res.conditionId
      ),
    
      event_values AS (
        SELECT
          pm.pred_time,
          pm.marketAddress,
          pm.conditionId,
          pm.label,
          pm.a_raw/1e18       AS lower_bound,
          pm.b_raw/1e18       AS upper_bound,
          slice(pm.bps,1,2)         AS estimatedProbabilitiesBps,
          slice(pm.payouts_raw,1,2) AS payoutNumerators,
    
          -- v = p_down·a + p_up·b
          SUM(
            (bps_el/10000.0)
            * CASE WHEN ord=1 THEN pm.a_raw/1e18 ELSE pm.b_raw/1e18 END
          ) AS forecast_v,
    
          -- w = normalized(payout_down, payout_up) · [a,b]
          SUM(
            (payout_el/1e18)
            * CASE WHEN ord=1 THEN pm.a_raw/1e18 ELSE pm.b_raw/1e18 END
          ) / NULLIF(SUM(payout_el/1e18),0) AS resolution_w
    
        FROM preds_meta pm
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(
          slice(pm.bps,1,2),
          slice(pm.payouts_raw,1,2)
        ) WITH ORDINALITY AS t(bps_el, payout_el, ord)
    
        GROUP BY
          pm.pred_time,
          pm.marketAddress,
          pm.conditionId,
          pm.label,
          pm.a_raw,
          pm.b_raw,
          slice(pm.bps,1,2),
          slice(pm.payouts_raw,1,2)
      ),
    
      market_status AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          status
        FROM query_5132435
      ),
    
      ev_with_status AS (
        SELECT
          ev.*,
          ms.status
        FROM event_values ev
        LEFT JOIN market_status ms
          ON ev.conditionId = ms.conditionId
      ),
    
      metrics AS (
        SELECT
          date_trunc('hour', pred_time) AS block_hour,
          label,
    
          COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'Pool Not Deployed Yet'            THEN 1 END) AS cnt_not_deployed,
          COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'Trading Open / Answers Upcoming' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_open_upcoming,
          COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'Trading Open / Answering Open'   THEN 1 END) AS cnt_open_answering,
          COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'Trading Open / Answering Closed' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_closed_answering,
          COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'Resolved'                        THEN 1 END) AS cnt_resolved,
    
          COUNT(*)                                               AS n_preds,
          ROUND(AVG(ABS(forecast_v - resolution_w)), 6)        AS MAE,
          ROUND(SQRT(AVG(POWER(forecast_v - resolution_w, 2))), 6) AS RMSE,
          ROUND(AVG(forecast_v - resolution_w), 6)              AS bias,
          ROUND(
            CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1
              THEN STDDEV_SAMP(forecast_v - resolution_w) / SQRT(COUNT(*))
              ELSE NULL
            END
          , 6)                                                  AS stderr
    
        FROM ev_with_status
        GROUP BY 1,2
      )
    
    SELECT
      block_hour,
      label,
      cnt_not_deployed,
      cnt_open_upcoming,
      cnt_open_answering,
      cnt_closed_answering,
      cnt_resolved,
      n_preds,
      MAE,
      RMSE,
      bias,
      stderr
    FROM metrics
    ORDER BY block_hour DESC, label;
    ```

### seer_agents_accuracy_hourly_categoricalmarkets_v

**Query ID:** 5552128 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      base AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM query_5551142
      ),
    
      final AS (
        SELECT
          b.*,
          CASE WHEN b.payoutNumerators[b.bet_outcome + 1] > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS correct_bet,
          CASE
            WHEN array_position(b.payoutNumerators, array_max(b.payoutNumerators)) - 1 = b.prediction_outcome
            THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE
          END AS correct_prediction
        FROM base b
      ),
    
      market_metrics AS (
        SELECT
          date_trunc('hour', block_time) AS block_hour,
          label,
          COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'Pool Not Deployed Yet'            THEN 1 END) AS cnt_not_deployed,
          COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'Trading Open / Answers Upcoming' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_open_upcoming,
          COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'Trading Open / Answering Open'   THEN 1 END) AS cnt_open_answering,
          COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'Trading Open / Answering Closed' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_closed_answering,
          COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'Resolved'                        THEN 1 END) AS cnt_resolved
        FROM final
        GROUP BY 1,2
      ),
    
      bets_metrics AS (
        SELECT
          label,
          date_trunc('hour', block_time) AS block_hour,
          COUNT(CASE WHEN correct_bet       AND status = 'Resolved' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_correct_bet,
          COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT correct_bet   AND status = 'Resolved' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_wrong_bet,
          SUM(CASE WHEN correct_bet       AND status = 'Resolved' THEN trade_amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS vol_correct_bet,
          SUM(CASE WHEN NOT correct_bet   AND status = 'Resolved' THEN trade_amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS vol_wrong_bet,
          COUNT(CASE WHEN correct_prediction AND status = 'Resolved' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_correct_prediction,
          COUNT(CASE WHEN NOT correct_prediction AND status = 'Resolved' THEN 1 END) AS cnt_wrong_prediction
        FROM final
        GROUP BY 1,2
      ),
    
      metrics_sparse_hour AS (
        SELECT
          m.label,
          m.block_hour,
          m.cnt_not_deployed,
          m.cnt_open_upcoming,
          m.cnt_open_answering,
          m.cnt_closed_answering,
          m.cnt_resolved,
          COALESCE(b.cnt_correct_bet,        0) AS cnt_correct_bet,
          COALESCE(b.cnt_wrong_bet,          0) AS cnt_wrong_bet,
          COALESCE(b.vol_correct_bet,        0) AS vol_correct_bet,
          COALESCE(b.vol_wrong_bet,          0) AS vol_wrong_bet,
          COALESCE(b.cnt_correct_prediction, 0) AS cnt_correct_prediction,
          COALESCE(b.cnt_wrong_prediction,   0) AS cnt_wrong_prediction
        FROM market_metrics m
        LEFT JOIN bets_metrics b
          ON b.label      = m.label
         AND b.block_hour = m.block_hour
      ),
    
      cumulative AS (
        SELECT
          block_hour,
          label,
          SUM(cnt_not_deployed     ) OVER w AS cum_not_deployed,
          SUM(cnt_open_upcoming    ) OVER w AS cum_open_upcoming,
          SUM(cnt_open_answering   ) OVER w AS cum_open_answering,
          SUM(cnt_closed_answering ) OVER w AS cum_closed_answering,
          SUM(cnt_resolved         ) OVER w AS cum_resolved,
          SUM(cnt_correct_bet      ) OVER w AS cum_correct_bet,
          SUM(cnt_wrong_bet        ) OVER w AS cum_wrong_bet,
          SUM(cnt_correct_prediction) OVER w AS cum_correct_prediction,
          SUM(cnt_wrong_prediction ) OVER w AS cum_wrong_prediction,
          SUM(vol_correct_bet      ) OVER w AS cum_vol_correct_bet,
          SUM(vol_wrong_bet        ) OVER w AS cum_vol_wrong_bet
        FROM metrics_sparse_hour
        WINDOW w AS (
          PARTITION BY label
          ORDER BY block_hour
          ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        )
      )
    
    SELECT
      block_hour,
      label,
    
      cum_not_deployed     AS cnt_not_deployed,
      cum_open_upcoming    AS cnt_open_upcoming,
      cum_open_answering   AS cnt_open_answering,
      cum_closed_answering AS cnt_closed_answering,
      cum_resolved         AS cnt_resolved,
    
      cum_correct_bet,
      cum_wrong_bet,
      cum_correct_prediction AS cnt_correct_prediction,
      cum_wrong_prediction   AS cnt_wrong_prediction,
      cum_vol_correct_bet    AS vol_correct_bet,
      cum_vol_wrong_bet      AS vol_wrong_bet,
    
      ROUND(
        cum_correct_bet * 1e0
          / NULLIF(cum_correct_bet + cum_wrong_bet, 0)
      , 6) AS pct_correct_bet,
    
      ROUND(
        cum_correct_prediction * 1e0
          / NULLIF(cum_correct_prediction + cum_wrong_prediction, 0)
      , 6) AS pct_correct_prediction,
    
      ROUND(
        cum_correct_bet * 100e0
          / NULLIF(cum_correct_bet + cum_wrong_bet, 0)
      , 6) AS acc_bet,
    
      ROUND(
        cum_correct_prediction * 100e0
          / NULLIF(cum_correct_prediction + cum_wrong_prediction, 0)
      , 6) AS acc_prediction
    
    FROM cumulative
    ORDER BY block_hour DESC;
    ```

### seer_agents_event_pipeline_categoricalmarkets_v

**Query ID:** 5551142 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      ai_agents AS (
        SELECT label, address
        FROM query_5102644
      ),
    
      seer_prediction AS (
        SELECT
          pr.marketAddress,
          pr.publisherAddress,
          pr.evt_block_time    AS pred_time,
          array_position(
            pr.estimatedProbabilitiesBps,
            array_max(pr.estimatedProbabilitiesBps)
          ) - 1                AS prediction_outcome,
          txHash               AS trade_tx_hash
        FROM seer_pm_gnosis.agentresultmapping_evt_predictionadded pr
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(pr.txHashes) AS t(txHash)
        WHERE pr.txHashes IS NOT NULL
      ),
    
      seer_markets_status AS (
        SELECT conditionId, status
        FROM query_5132435
      ),
    
      resolution_payout AS (
        SELECT conditionId, payoutNumerators
        FROM omen_gnosis.conditionaltokens_evt_conditionresolution
      ),
    
      token_index_map AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          tok.token       AS outcome_token,
          tok.idx - 1     AS outcome_index
        FROM query_5030312
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(wrapped_tokens) WITH ORDINALITY AS tok(token, idx)
      ),
    
      seer_trades AS (
        SELECT
          t.conditionId,
          t.pool              AS marketAddress,
          t.ts                AS block_time,
          t.tx_hash,
          t.user_from         AS trader,
          t.action            AS bet_action,
          LAG(t.implied_prob)
            OVER (PARTITION BY t.pool, t.outcome_token ORDER BY t.ts)
                             AS odds_before,
          t.implied_prob      AS odds_after,
          t.delta_usd         AS trade_amount_usd,
          t.outcome_token
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_seer_all_trades t
        JOIN ai_agents a
          ON a.address = t.user_from
        WHERE t.market_type IN ('categorical','multicategorical')
      ),
    
      pipeline AS (
        SELECT
          tr.block_time,
          ag.label,
          tr.bet_action,
          tim.outcome_index     AS bet_outcome,
          tr.odds_before,
          tr.odds_after,
          sp.prediction_outcome,
          ms.status,
          tr.trade_amount_usd,
          rp.payoutNumerators
        FROM seer_trades        tr
        JOIN ai_agents         ag
          ON ag.address        = tr.trader
        JOIN token_index_map   tim
          ON tim.conditionId   = tr.conditionId
         AND tim.outcome_token = tr.outcome_token
        LEFT JOIN seer_prediction    sp
          ON sp.trade_tx_hash  = tr.tx_hash
         AND sp.marketAddress  = tr.marketAddress
         AND sp.publisherAddress = tr.trader
        LEFT JOIN seer_markets_status ms
          ON ms.conditionId    = tr.conditionId
        LEFT JOIN resolution_payout   rp
          ON rp.conditionId    = tr.conditionId
      )
    
    SELECT * FROM pipeline;
    ```

### seer_ai_agents

**Query ID:** 5102644 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    omen_agents AS (
      SELECT address, label
      FROM query_3582994
    ),
    
    seer_trades AS (
      SELECT DISTINCT user_from AS address
      FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_seer_all_trades
    ),
    seer_predictions AS (
      SELECT DISTINCT publisherAddress AS address
      FROM seer_pm_gnosis.agentresultmapping_evt_predictionadded
    ),
    
    seer_presence AS (
      SELECT address
      FROM (
        SELECT address FROM seer_trades
        UNION DISTINCT
        SELECT address FROM seer_predictions
      )
    ),
    
    custom_agents AS (
      SELECT * FROM (
        VALUES
          (0xd0363ccd573163df94b754ca00c0aca2bb66b748, 'coinflip-highest-liquidity-seer'),
          (0xD32cbEb0acbEE86670b5De60Ab50596B667B4f69, 'gptr-agent-highest-liquidity-seer'),
          (0xdF99b89934f697f295fDf132Ec5174656bC088BD, 'prophet-gpt4o-scalar-agent-seer')
      ) AS t(address, label)
    ),
    
    unioned AS (
      SELECT oa.address, oa.label, 'omen'   AS src
      FROM omen_agents oa
      JOIN seer_presence sp ON sp.address = oa.address
    
      UNION ALL
    
      SELECT ca.address, ca.label, 'custom' AS src
      FROM custom_agents ca
    ),
    
    -- custom label when an address appears in both sets
    ranked AS (
      SELECT
        address,
        label,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
          PARTITION BY address
          ORDER BY CASE WHEN src = 'custom' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
        ) AS rn
      FROM unioned
    )
    
    SELECT
      label,
      address
    FROM ranked
    WHERE rn = 1
    ORDER BY label;
    ```

### seer_allTrades

**Query ID:** 5063131 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
      market_types AS (
        SELECT
          nm.conditionId,
          CASE
            WHEN cs.call_tx_hash  IS NOT NULL THEN 'scalar'
            WHEN msc.call_tx_hash IS NOT NULL THEN 'multiscalar'
            WHEN cc.call_tx_hash  IS NOT NULL THEN 'categorical'
            WHEN mcc.call_tx_hash IS NOT NULL THEN 'multicategorical'
            ELSE 'unknown'
          END AS market_type
        FROM seer_pm_gnosis.marketfactory_evt_newmarket nm
        LEFT JOIN seer_pm_gnosis.marketfactory_call_createscalarmarket     cs  ON nm.evt_tx_hash = cs.call_tx_hash
        LEFT JOIN seer_pm_gnosis.marketfactory_call_createmultiscalarmarket msc ON nm.evt_tx_hash = msc.call_tx_hash
        LEFT JOIN seer_pm_gnosis.marketfactory_call_createcategoricalmarket  cc  ON nm.evt_tx_hash = cc.call_tx_hash
        LEFT JOIN seer_pm_gnosis.marketfactory_call_createmulticategoricalmarket mcc ON nm.evt_tx_hash = mcc.call_tx_hash
      ),
    
      const AS (
        SELECT X'af204776c7245bf4147c2612bf6e5972ee483701' AS sdai
      ),
    
      map AS (
        SELECT pool, token0, token1, conditionId, outcome_token
        FROM query_5059435
      ),
    
      price_rows AS (
        SELECT
          m.conditionId,
          m.outcome_token,
          p.contract_address AS pool,
          p.evt_block_time   AS ts,
          p.evt_index,
          to_unixtime(p.evt_block_time)*10000 + p.evt_index AS ts_rank,
          CASE
            WHEN m.token0 = m.outcome_token THEN POWER(1.0001, CAST(p.tick AS DOUBLE))
            ELSE 1 / POWER(1.0001, CAST(p.tick AS DOUBLE))
          END                                      AS implied_prob,
          NULL                                     AS action,
          NULL                                     AS delta_raw,
          p.evt_tx_hash                            AS tx_hash,
          NULL                                     AS lp_owner,
          NULL                                     AS swap_sender,
          NULL                                     AS swap_recipient
        FROM (
          SELECT contract_address, evt_block_time, evt_index, evt_tx_hash, tick
          FROM swaprv3_gnosis.algebrapool_evt_initialize
          UNION ALL
          SELECT contract_address, evt_block_time, evt_index, evt_tx_hash, tick
          FROM swaprv3_gnosis.algebrapool_evt_swap
        ) p
        JOIN map m ON m.pool = p.contract_address
      ),
    
      delta_rows AS (
        -- Add liquidity
        SELECT
          mp.conditionId,
          mp.outcome_token,
          m.contract_address AS pool,
          m.evt_block_time   AS ts,
          m.evt_index,
          to_unixtime(m.evt_block_time)*10000 + m.evt_index AS ts_rank,
          NULL                AS implied_prob,
          'Add'               AS action,
          CASE
            WHEN mp.token1 = (SELECT sdai FROM const) THEN m.amount1
            ELSE m.amount0
          END                 AS delta_raw,
          m.evt_tx_hash       AS tx_hash,
          m.owner             AS lp_owner,
          NULL                AS swap_sender,
          NULL                AS swap_recipient
        FROM swaprv3_gnosis.algebrapool_evt_mint m
        JOIN map mp ON mp.pool = m.contract_address
    
        UNION ALL
    
        -- Remove liquidity
        SELECT
          mp.conditionId,
          mp.outcome_token,
          b.contract_address AS pool,
          b.evt_block_time   AS ts,
          b.evt_index,
          to_unixtime(b.evt_block_time)*10000 + b.evt_index AS ts_rank,
          NULL                AS implied_prob,
          'Remove'            AS action,
          -CASE
             WHEN mp.token1 = (SELECT sdai FROM const) THEN b.amount1
             ELSE b.amount0
           END                AS delta_raw,
          b.evt_tx_hash       AS tx_hash,
          b.owner             AS lp_owner,
          NULL                AS swap_sender,
          NULL                AS swap_recipient
        FROM swaprv3_gnosis.algebrapool_evt_burn b
        JOIN map mp ON mp.pool = b.contract_address
    
        UNION ALL
    
        -- Swap → Buy/Sell (corrected)
        SELECT
          mp.conditionId,
          mp.outcome_token,
          s.contract_address AS pool,
          s.evt_block_time   AS ts,
          s.evt_index,
          to_unixtime(s.evt_block_time)*10000 + s.evt_index AS ts_rank,
          NULL                AS implied_prob,
          CASE
            -- pick the sDAI change regardless of token position
            WHEN (CASE WHEN mp.token1 = (SELECT sdai FROM const) THEN s.amount1 ELSE s.amount0 END) > 0
              THEN 'Buy'
            ELSE 'Sell'
          END                 AS action,
          -- sDAI delta (positive = pool received sDAI; negative = pool sent sDAI)
          CASE
            WHEN mp.token1 = (SELECT sdai FROM const) THEN s.amount1
            ELSE s.amount0
          END                 AS delta_raw,
          s.evt_tx_hash       AS tx_hash,
          NULL                AS lp_owner,
          s.sender            AS swap_sender,
          s.recipient         AS swap_recipient
        FROM swaprv3_gnosis.algebrapool_evt_swap s
        JOIN map mp ON mp.pool = s.contract_address
      ),
    
      unioned AS (
        SELECT * FROM price_rows
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM delta_rows
      ),
    
      with_tvl AS (
        SELECT
          u.*,
          ROUND(
            SUM(COALESCE(CAST(u.delta_raw AS DOUBLE), 0) / 1e18)
              OVER (PARTITION BY u.pool ORDER BY u.ts, u.evt_index)
          ,4) AS tvl_sdai
        FROM unioned u
      ),
    
      with_prob AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          outcome_token,
          pool,
          ts,
          evt_index,
          ts_rank,
          action,
          delta_raw,
          tx_hash,
          lp_owner,
          swap_sender,
          swap_recipient,
          tvl_sdai,
          LAST_VALUE(implied_prob) IGNORE NULLS OVER (
            PARTITION BY pool, outcome_token
            ORDER BY ts, evt_index
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
          ) AS implied_prob
        FROM with_tvl
      ),
    
      actions AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          outcome_token,
          pool,
          ts,
          evt_index,
          tx_hash,
          action,
          CASE
            WHEN action IN ('Add','Buy')    THEN  ABS(CAST(delta_raw AS DOUBLE)/1e18)
            WHEN action IN ('Remove','Sell') THEN -ABS(CAST(delta_raw AS DOUBLE)/1e18)
            ELSE 0
          END                                AS delta_sdai,
          tvl_sdai,
          implied_prob,
          lp_owner,
          swap_sender,
          swap_recipient
        FROM with_prob
        WHERE action IS NOT NULL
      ),
    
      cow AS (
        SELECT
          tx_hash,
          ANY_VALUE(trader)   AS trader,
          ANY_VALUE(receiver) AS receiver
        FROM cow_protocol_gnosis.trades
        WHERE buy_token_address  = (SELECT sdai FROM const)
           OR sell_token_address = (SELECT sdai FROM const)
        GROUP BY tx_hash
      ),
    
      tx_meta AS (
        SELECT
          hash    AS tx_hash,
          "from"  AS protocol_from,
          "to"    AS protocol_to
        FROM gnosis.transactions
      ),
    
      sdai_price AS (
        SELECT
          token_address,
          block_date,
          price AS sdai_price_usd
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v
        WHERE symbol = 'sDAI'
      )
    
    SELECT
      a.conditionId,
      mt.market_type,
      a.outcome_token,
      a.pool,
      a.ts,
      a.tx_hash,
      tm.protocol_from,
      tm.protocol_to,
      COALESCE(c.trader, a.lp_owner, a.swap_sender) AS user_from,
      COALESCE(c.receiver, a.swap_recipient)       AS user_to,
      a.action,
      a.delta_sdai,
      a.tvl_sdai,
      a.implied_prob,
      p.sdai_price_usd,
      ROUND(a.delta_sdai * p.sdai_price_usd, 2)    AS delta_usd,
      ROUND(a.tvl_sdai   * p.sdai_price_usd, 2)    AS tvl_usd
    FROM actions a
    LEFT JOIN cow        c  ON c.tx_hash  = a.tx_hash
    LEFT JOIN tx_meta    tm ON tm.tx_hash = a.tx_hash
    LEFT JOIN sdai_price p  ON p.token_address = (SELECT sdai FROM const)
                           AND p.block_date    = CAST(a.ts AS date)
    LEFT JOIN market_types mt ON mt.conditionId = a.conditionId
    ORDER BY a.ts, a.evt_index;
    ```

### seer_conditionid_outcomes_evtindex_slotcount_mapping

**Query ID:** 5030312 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH new_markets AS (
        SELECT
            evt_tx_hash,                       
            evt_block_time,
            evt_block_number,
            evt_index,
            market,
            marketName,
            conditionId,
            questionId,
            questionsIds
        FROM   seer_pm_gnosis.marketfactory_evt_newmarket
    ),
    
    
    wrap_creations AS (
        SELECT
            evt_tx_hash,
            wrappedToken   AS outcome_token,   -- ERC-20 address
            evt_index      AS wrap_evt_index
        FROM   seer_pm_gnosis.wrapped1155factory_evt_wrapped1155creation
    ),
    
    
    prep AS (
        SELECT
            conditionId,
            outcomeSlotCount
        FROM   omen_gnosis.conditionaltokens_evt_conditionpreparation
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        n.*,
        p.outcomeSlotCount                                           AS outcome_slots,
        ARRAY_AGG(w.outcome_token ORDER BY w.wrap_evt_index)         AS wrapped_tokens,
        ARRAY_AGG(w.wrap_evt_index ORDER BY w.wrap_evt_index)        AS wrap_evt_indexes
    FROM        new_markets            n
    LEFT  JOIN  wrap_creations         w  ON w.evt_tx_hash = n.evt_tx_hash
    LEFT  JOIN  prep                   p  ON p.conditionId = n.conditionId
    GROUP BY
        n.evt_tx_hash,
        n.evt_block_time,
        n.evt_block_number,
        n.evt_index,
        n.market,
        n.marketName,
        n.conditionId,
        n.questionId,
        n.questionsIds,
        p.outcomeSlotCount
    ORDER BY n.evt_block_time DESC;
    ```

### seer_gnosis_agent_invest_payout_profit_categoricalMarkets_v

**Query ID:** 5140465 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      ai_agents AS (
        SELECT address, label
        FROM query_5102644
      ),
    
      agent_trades AS (
        SELECT
          a.label,
          r.conditionId,
          r.outcome_token,
          r.action,
          r.ts            AS evt_time,
          r.delta_usd     AS collateral_usd
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_seer_all_trades r
        JOIN ai_agents a
          ON a.address = r.user_from
        WHERE r.market_type IN ('categorical','multicategorical')
      ),
    
      invested AS (
        SELECT
          label,
          conditionId,
          -- pool-centric delta_usd is already + for spends and - for receipts
          SUM(collateral_usd) AS invested_usd
        FROM agent_trades
        GROUP BY 1,2
      ),
    
      resolution AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          MIN(evt_block_time)           AS resolution_time,
          ANY_VALUE(payoutNumerators)   AS payoutNumerators
        FROM omen_gnosis.conditionaltokens_evt_conditionresolution
        GROUP BY conditionId
      ),
    
      token_index AS (
        SELECT
          m.conditionId,
          tok.token        AS outcome_token,
          tok.idx - 1      AS outcome_index
        FROM query_5030312 m
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(wrapped_tokens) WITH ORDINALITY AS tok(token, idx)
      ),
    
      token_flows AS (
        SELECT
          at.label,
          at.conditionId,
          ti.outcome_index,
          SUM(
            CASE at.action WHEN 'Buy' THEN  1
                           WHEN 'Sell' THEN -1
                           ELSE 0
            END
          ) AS net_tokens
        FROM agent_trades at
        JOIN token_index ti
          ON ti.conditionId   = at.conditionId
         AND ti.outcome_token = at.outcome_token
        GROUP BY 1,2,3
      ),
    
      payouts AS (
      SELECT
        tf.label,
        tf.conditionId,
        ROUND(
          SUM(
            tf.net_tokens
            * (res.payoutNumerators[tf.outcome_index + 1] / 1e18)
            * px.price
          )
        , 6) AS payout_usd  
      FROM token_flows tf
      JOIN resolution res
        ON res.conditionId = tf.conditionId
      JOIN query_4338954 px
        ON px.token_address = X'af204776c7245bf4147c2612bf6e5972ee483701'
       AND px.block_date    = CAST(res.resolution_time AS date)
      WHERE res.payoutNumerators[tf.outcome_index + 1] > 0
      GROUP BY 1,2
    ),
    
      agent_results AS (
        SELECT
          i.label,
          i.conditionId,
          r.resolution_time   AS block_time,   -- now the real on-chain resolution time
          i.invested_usd,
          COALESCE(p.payout_usd,0) AS payout_usd
        FROM invested i
        INNER JOIN resolution r
          ON r.conditionId = i.conditionId   -- this drops any market without a resolution
        LEFT JOIN payouts p
          ON p.label       = i.label
         AND p.conditionId = i.conditionId
      )
    
    SELECT
        label,
        block_time,
        conditionId          AS market,
        invested_usd         AS Invested,
        AVG(invested_usd)       OVER w   AS MeanInvested,
        APPROX_PERCENTILE(invested_usd,0.5) OVER w AS MedianInvested,
        payout_usd           AS Payout,
        (payout_usd - invested_usd)         AS Profit,
        (payout_usd/invested_usd - 1)*100    AS ROI,
        SUM(payout_usd - invested_usd)       OVER w   AS CumulativeProfit,
        AVG(payout_usd - invested_usd)       OVER (w ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS MeanProfit_30,
        100 * AVG(payout_usd/invested_usd - 1) OVER (w ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS MeanROI_30,
        100 * (
          AVG(payout_usd - invested_usd) OVER (w ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
        ) / NULLIF(
          SUM(invested_usd) OVER (w ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW),
          0
        ) AS MeanROI_30_w,
        AVG(payout_usd - invested_usd)       OVER w   AS MeanProfit,
        APPROX_PERCENTILE(payout_usd - invested_usd,0.5) OVER w AS MedianProfit,
        100 * AVG(payout_usd/invested_usd - 1) OVER w AS MeanROI,
        100 * (
          AVG(payout_usd - invested_usd) OVER w
        ) / NULLIF(SUM(invested_usd) OVER w,0) AS MeanROI_w
    FROM agent_results
    WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time)
    ORDER BY label, block_time;
    ```

### seer_gnosis_agent_invest_payout_profit_scalarMarkets_v

**Query ID:** 5585198 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      ai_agents AS (
        SELECT address, label
        FROM query_5102644
      ),
    
      agent_trades AS (
        SELECT
          a.label,
          r.conditionId,
          r.outcome_token,
          r.action,
          r.ts            AS evt_time,
          r.delta_usd     AS delta_usd
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_seer_all_trades r
        JOIN ai_agents a
          ON a.address = r.user_from
        WHERE r.market_type IN ('scalar','multiscalar')
      ),
    
      invested AS (
        SELECT
          label,
          conditionId,
          SUM(
            CASE WHEN action = 'Buy'
                 THEN ABS(delta_usd)
                 ELSE 0
            END
          ) AS invested_usd
        FROM agent_trades
        GROUP BY 1,2
      ),
    
      resolution AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          MIN(evt_block_time)           AS resolution_time,
          ANY_VALUE(payoutNumerators)   AS payoutNumerators
        FROM omen_gnosis.conditionaltokens_evt_conditionresolution
        GROUP BY conditionId
      ),
    
      token_index AS (
        SELECT
          m.conditionId,
          tok.token      AS outcome_token,
          tok.idx - 1    AS outcome_index
        FROM query_5030312 m
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(wrapped_tokens) WITH ORDINALITY AS tok(token, idx)
      ),
    
      token_flows AS (
        SELECT
          t.label,
          t.conditionId,
          ti.outcome_index,
          SUM(
            CASE t.action
              WHEN 'Buy'  THEN  1
              WHEN 'Sell' THEN -1
              ELSE 0
            END
          ) AS net_tokens
        FROM agent_trades t
        JOIN token_index ti
          ON ti.conditionId   = t.conditionId
         AND ti.outcome_token = t.outcome_token
        GROUP BY 1,2,3
      ),
    
      payouts AS (
        SELECT
          tf.label,
          tf.conditionId,
          ROUND(
            SUM(
              tf.net_tokens
              * (res.payoutNumerators[tf.outcome_index + 1] / 1e18)
              * px.price
            )
          , 6) AS payout_usd
        FROM token_flows tf
        JOIN resolution res
          ON res.conditionId = tf.conditionId
        JOIN query_4338954 px
          ON px.token_address = X'af204776c7245bf4147c2612bf6e5972ee483701'
         AND px.block_date    = CAST(res.resolution_time AS date)
        WHERE res.payoutNumerators[tf.outcome_index + 1] > 0
        GROUP BY 1,2
      ),
    
      agent_results AS (
        SELECT
          inv.label,
          inv.conditionId,
          res.resolution_time    AS block_time,
          inv.invested_usd,
          COALESCE(p.payout_usd, 0) AS payout_usd
        FROM invested inv
        JOIN resolution res
          ON res.conditionId = inv.conditionId
        LEFT JOIN payouts p
          ON p.label       = inv.label
         AND p.conditionId = inv.conditionId
      )
    
    SELECT
      label,
      block_time,
      conditionId             AS market,
      invested_usd            AS Invested,
      AVG(invested_usd)           OVER w   AS MeanInvested,
      APPROX_PERCENTILE(invested_usd,0.5) OVER w AS MedianInvested,
      payout_usd              AS Payout,
      (payout_usd - invested_usd)       AS Profit,
      (payout_usd/invested_usd - 1)*100  AS ROI,
      SUM(payout_usd - invested_usd)     OVER w   AS CumulativeProfit,
      AVG(payout_usd - invested_usd)     OVER (w ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS MeanProfit_30,
      100 * AVG(payout_usd/invested_usd - 1) OVER (w ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS MeanROI_30,
      100 * (
        AVG(payout_usd - invested_usd) OVER (w ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
      ) / NULLIF(
        SUM(invested_usd) OVER (w ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW),
        0
      ) AS MeanROI_30_w,
      AVG(payout_usd - invested_usd)     OVER w   AS MeanProfit,
      APPROX_PERCENTILE(payout_usd - invested_usd,0.5) OVER w AS MedianProfit,
      100 * AVG(payout_usd/invested_usd - 1) OVER w AS MeanROI,
      100 * (
        AVG(payout_usd - invested_usd) OVER w
      ) / NULLIF(SUM(invested_usd) OVER w,0) AS MeanROI_w
    FROM agent_results
    WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_time)
    ORDER BY label, block_time;
    ```

### seer_gnosis_allTrades_fee

**Query ID:** 5072694 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
      const AS (
        SELECT X'af204776c7245bf4147c2612bf6e5972ee483701' AS sdai
      ),
    
      daily_price AS (
        SELECT
          CAST(timestamp AS date) AS day_dt,
          MAX(price)               AS sdai_price_usd
        FROM prices.day
        WHERE blockchain        = 'gnosis'
          AND contract_address  = (SELECT sdai FROM const)
        GROUP BY CAST(timestamp AS date)
      ),
    
      cow_fee AS (
        SELECT
          tx_hash,
          SUM(fee_usd) AS fee_usd
        FROM cow_protocol_gnosis.trades
        WHERE buy_token_address  = (SELECT sdai FROM const)
           OR sell_token_address = (SELECT sdai FROM const)
        GROUP BY tx_hash
      ),
    
      actions AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          outcome_token,
          pool,
          ts,
          tx_hash,
          protocol_from,
          protocol_to,
          user_from,
          user_to,
          action,
          delta_sdai,
          tvl_sdai,
          implied_prob
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_seer_all_trades
      ),
    
      with_fees AS (
        SELECT
          a.*,
          COALESCE(
            cf.fee_usd,
            CASE WHEN a.action IN ('Buy','Sell')
                 THEN ABS(a.delta_sdai) * 0.003 * COALESCE(dp.sdai_price_usd, 0)
                 ELSE 0
            END
          ) AS fee_usd
        FROM actions a
        LEFT JOIN cow_fee   cf ON cf.tx_hash = a.tx_hash
        LEFT JOIN daily_price dp ON dp.day_dt  = CAST(a.ts AS date)
      ),
    
      sdai_price AS (
        SELECT
          token_address,
          block_date,
          price AS sdai_price_usd
        FROM query_4338954
        WHERE symbol = 'sDAI'
      )
    
    SELECT
      wf.*,
      COALESCE(sp.sdai_price_usd, 0)                   AS sdai_price_usd,
      wf.delta_sdai * COALESCE(sp.sdai_price_usd, 0)  AS delta_usd,
      wf.tvl_sdai   * COALESCE(sp.sdai_price_usd, 0)  AS tvl_usd
    
    FROM with_fees wf
    LEFT JOIN sdai_price sp
      ON sp.token_address = (SELECT sdai FROM const)
     AND sp.block_date    = CAST(wf.ts AS date)
    
    ORDER BY wf.ts;
    ```

### seer_gnosis_erc1155Transfers_v

**Query ID:** 4984086 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH 
      -- Get single-transfer events.
      received_single AS (
        SELECT
          call_tx_hash,
          call_block_time,
          -- Assume _2 holds token_id and _3 holds value
          _2 AS token_id,
          _3 AS amount,
          call_tx_to,
          call_tx_from
        FROM seer_pm_gnosis.gnosisrouter_call_onerc1155received
        WHERE call_success = true
      ),
      
      -- Get batch-transfer events; unnest arrays of token IDs and amounts.
      received_batch AS (
        SELECT
          call_tx_hash,
          call_block_time,
          t.token_id,
          t.amount,
          call_tx_to,
          call_tx_from
        FROM seer_pm_gnosis.gnosisrouter_call_onerc1155batchreceived
        CROSS JOIN UNNEST(_2, _3) AS t(token_id, amount)
        WHERE call_success = true
      ),
      
      -- Union the two sets of events.
      all_received AS (
        SELECT * FROM received_single
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM received_batch
      ),
      
      -- Aggregate the amounts by token_id.
      token_supply AS (
        SELECT
          token_id,
          SUM(amount) AS total_amount
        FROM all_received
        GROUP BY token_id
      ),
      
      -- Compute the total supply across all outcomes.
      total_supply AS (
        SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS market_total
        FROM token_supply
      )
      
    -- Calculate implied odds for each outcome (token_id).
    SELECT
      token_id,
      total_amount,
      CAST(total_amount AS double) / (SELECT market_total FROM total_supply) AS implied_odds,
      format('%.2f', CAST(total_amount AS double) / (SELECT market_total FROM total_supply)) AS formatted_odds
    FROM token_supply;
    ```

### seer_gnosis_market_status

**Query ID:** 5132435 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      base_markets AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
          conditionId,
          questionId
        FROM query_4963697
      ),
    
      pool_map AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT conditionId, pool
        FROM query_5059435
      ),
      pool_init_raw AS (
        SELECT
          contract_address AS pool,
          evt_block_time   AS pool_init_time
        FROM swaprv3_gnosis.algebrapool_evt_initialize
      ),
      pool_init AS (
        SELECT
          pm.conditionId,
          MIN(pir.pool_init_time) AS pool_init_time
        FROM pool_map pm
        JOIN pool_init_raw pir
          ON pir.pool = pm.pool
        GROUP BY pm.conditionId
      ),
    
      market_events AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          evt_tx_hash
        FROM (
          SELECT
            conditionId,
            evt_tx_hash,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY conditionId
              ORDER BY evt_block_time DESC
            ) AS rn
          FROM query_5030312
        ) t
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      oracle_params AS (
        SELECT
          evt_tx_hash,
          opening_ts,
          timeout
        FROM (
          SELECT
            nq.evt_tx_hash,
            nq.opening_ts,
            nq.timeout,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY nq.evt_tx_hash
              ORDER BY nq.opening_ts
            ) AS rn
          FROM reality_eth_gnosis.realityeth_v3_0_evt_lognewquestion nq
          WHERE nq.evt_block_time >= TIMESTAMP '2020-12-01'
        ) x
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      resolution AS (
        SELECT
          conditionId,
          MIN(evt_block_time) AS resolution_time
        FROM omen_gnosis.conditionaltokens_evt_conditionresolution
        GROUP BY conditionId
      ),
    
      lifecycle_fields AS (
        SELECT
          bm.conditionId,
          bm.questionId,
    
          /* when pool actually went live (or NULL if never) */
          pi.pool_init_time,
    
          /* oracle windows (may be NULL) */
          FROM_UNIXTIME(op.opening_ts)              AS answer_open,
          FROM_UNIXTIME(op.opening_ts + op.timeout) AS planned_close,
    
          /* actual on-chain resolution (may be NULL) */
          rl.resolution_time
    
        FROM base_markets bm
        LEFT JOIN pool_init     pi ON pi.conditionId = bm.conditionId
        LEFT JOIN market_events me ON me.conditionId = bm.conditionId
        LEFT JOIN oracle_params op ON op.evt_tx_hash   = me.evt_tx_hash
        LEFT JOIN resolution    rl ON rl.conditionId    = bm.conditionId
      )
    
    SELECT
      lf.conditionId,
      lf.questionId,
      lf.pool_init_time,
      lf.answer_open,
      lf.planned_close,
      lf.resolution_time,
    
      /* Unified status */
      CASE
        WHEN lf.pool_init_time IS NULL                          THEN 'Pool Not Deployed Yet'
        WHEN NOW() < lf.answer_open                             THEN 'Trading Open / Answers Upcoming'
        WHEN NOW() < lf.planned_close                           THEN 'Trading Open / Answering Open'
        WHEN lf.resolution_time IS NULL                         THEN 'Trading Open / Answering Closed'
        ELSE                                                        'Resolved'
      END AS status,
    
      /* % time complete:  
           - 0% if now ≤ pool_init_time  
           - 99% if past planned_close but not resolved  
           - 100% if resolved  
           - otherwise linear fraction between pool_init_time → planned_close/resolution */
      CASE
        WHEN lf.pool_init_time IS NULL
          OR COALESCE(lf.resolution_time, lf.planned_close) IS NULL
          THEN NULL
    
        WHEN NOW() <= lf.pool_init_time THEN 0
    
        WHEN lf.resolution_time IS NULL
             AND NOW() >= lf.planned_close THEN 99
    
        WHEN NOW() >= COALESCE(lf.resolution_time, lf.planned_close) THEN 100
    
        ELSE
          ROUND(
            100
            * (
                to_unixtime(NOW())
                - to_unixtime(lf.pool_init_time)
              )
            / NULLIF(
                to_unixtime(
                  COALESCE(lf.resolution_time, lf.planned_close)
                )
                - to_unixtime(lf.pool_init_time),
                0
              )
            , 2
          )
      END AS percent_time_completed
    
    FROM lifecycle_fields lf
    ORDER BY lf.pool_init_time DESC;
    ```

### seer_gnosis_markets_category_v

**Query ID:** 4963697 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH call_market_types AS (
    
      SELECT call_tx_hash, 'categorical' AS market_type, params
      FROM seer_pm_gnosis.marketfactory_call_createcategoricalmarket
      UNION ALL
      SELECT call_tx_hash, 'multicategorical' AS market_type, params
      FROM seer_pm_gnosis.marketfactory_call_createmulticategoricalmarket
      UNION ALL
      SELECT call_tx_hash, 'multiscalar' AS market_type, params
      FROM seer_pm_gnosis.marketfactory_call_createmultiscalarmarket
      UNION ALL
      SELECT call_tx_hash, 'scalar' AS market_type, params
      FROM seer_pm_gnosis.marketfactory_call_createscalarmarket
    
      UNION ALL
      
      SELECT call_tx_hash, 'categorical' AS market_type, params
      FROM seer_gnosis.marketfactory_call_createcategoricalmarket
      UNION ALL
      SELECT call_tx_hash, 'multicategorical' AS market_type, params
      FROM seer_gnosis.marketfactory_call_createmulticategoricalmarket
      UNION ALL
      SELECT call_tx_hash, 'multiscalar' AS market_type, params
      FROM seer_gnosis.marketfactory_call_createmultiscalarmarket
      UNION ALL
      SELECT call_tx_hash, 'scalar' AS market_type, params
      FROM seer_gnosis.marketfactory_call_createscalarmarket
    )
    SELECT 
      bm.*, 
      cmt.market_type,
      cmt.params
    FROM 
      query_4963672 bm  
    LEFT JOIN 
      call_market_types cmt
    ON 
      bm.evt_tx_hash = cmt.call_tx_hash
    ORDER BY 
      bm.creation_time DESC;
    ```

### seer_gnosis_markets_liquidity_v

**Query ID:** 4963755 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH deposits AS (
      SELECT 
        market, 
        SUM(amount_in_tokens) AS total_tokens_deposited,
        SUM(usd_value) AS total_usd_deposited
      FROM (
        -- ERC20-based split deposits: (splitposition)
        SELECT market, amount_in_tokens, usd_value 
        FROM query_4963732
        WHERE call_block_time <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    
        UNION ALL
    
        -- Native-based split deposits (splitFromBase):
        SELECT market, amount_in_tokens, usd_value 
        FROM query_4987616
        WHERE call_block_time <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
      ) AS union_deposits
      GROUP BY market
    ),
    withdrawals AS (
      SELECT 
        market, 
        SUM(amount_in_tokens) AS total_tokens_withdrawn,
        SUM(usd_value) AS total_usd_withdrawn
      FROM (
        -- Native-based merges (mergeToBase):
        SELECT market, amount_in_tokens, usd_value 
        FROM query_4963735
        WHERE call_block_time <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    
        UNION ALL
    
        -- Native-based redemptions (redeemToBase):
        SELECT market, amount_in_tokens, usd_value 
        FROM query_4963749
        WHERE call_block_time <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    
        UNION ALL
    
        -- ERC20-based merges (mergePositions):
        SELECT market, amount_in_tokens, usd_value 
        FROM query_4963725
        WHERE call_block_time <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
      ) AS union_withdrawals
      GROUP BY market
    )
    
    SELECT 
      d.market,
      
      -- Tokens
      d.total_tokens_deposited,
      COALESCE(w.total_tokens_withdrawn, 0) AS total_tokens_withdrawn,
      d.total_tokens_deposited - COALESCE(w.total_tokens_withdrawn, 0) AS current_token_liquidity,
    
      -- USD values
      d.total_usd_deposited,
      COALESCE(w.total_usd_withdrawn, 0) AS total_usd_withdrawn,
      d.total_usd_deposited - COALESCE(w.total_usd_withdrawn, 0) AS current_usd_liquidity
    
    FROM deposits d
    LEFT JOIN withdrawals w 
      ON d.market = w.market;
    ```

    FROM base_markets_gnosis
