### gnosis_unifiedbridges_flows_range_v

**Query ID:** 5952721 | **Updated:** --

**Parameters:**

- `end_dt` (datetime): `2025-10-01 00:00:00`
- `start_dt` (datetime): `2025-10-01 00:00:00`

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH params AS (
      SELECT
        CAST('{{start_dt}}' AS TIMESTAMP) AS start_ts,
        CAST('{{end_dt}}'   AS TIMESTAMP) AS end_ts
    )
    SELECT
      DATE_TRUNC('day',timestamp) AS timestamp,
      bridge,
      source_chain,
      dest_chain,
      token,
      SUM(amount_token) AS amount_token,
      SUM(amount_usd) AS amount_usd,
      SUM(net_usd) AS net_usd
    FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_unifiedbridges_flows_v
    WHERE timestamp >= (SELECT start_ts FROM params)
      AND timestamp <=  (SELECT end_ts   FROM params)  
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
    ORDER BY timestamp
    ```

### gnosis_unifiedbridges_flows_v

**Query ID:** 5334446 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
      gnosis_bluechip AS (
        SELECT token_address, symbol, decimals, price, block_date
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v
        WHERE block_date >= DATE '2024-01-01'
      ),
      gnosis_bluechip_sym AS (
        SELECT LOWER(symbol) AS symbol_lc, block_date, price
        FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v
        WHERE block_date >= DATE '2024-01-01'
      ),
      gno_native AS (
        SELECT token_address AS addr
        FROM dune.blockchains
        WHERE name = 'gnosis'
      ),
    
      debridge_pre AS (
        SELECT
          f.block_time,
          f.sourceChain,
          f.targetChain,
          f.sourceToken,
          f.sourceTokenSymbol,
          f.targetToken,
          f.targetTokenSymbol,
          f.sourceAmount,
          f.targetAmount,
          CASE
            WHEN f.targetChain = 'gnosis' AND f.sourceChain <> 'gnosis' THEN f.targetToken
            WHEN f.sourceChain = 'gnosis' AND f.targetChain <> 'gnosis' THEN f.sourceToken
            ELSE NULL
          END AS gno_token_hex,
          CASE
            WHEN f.targetChain = 'gnosis' AND f.sourceChain <> 'gnosis' THEN f.targetTokenSymbol
            WHEN f.sourceChain = 'gnosis' AND f.targetChain <> 'gnosis' THEN f.sourceTokenSymbol
            ELSE NULL
          END AS gno_symbol_raw
        FROM query_5060110 f
        WHERE f.block_time >= TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01'
          AND (f.sourceChain = 'gnosis' OR f.targetChain = 'gnosis')
      ),
      debridge_addr AS (
        SELECT
          p.*,
          CASE
            WHEN gno_token_hex IS NULL THEN CAST(NULL AS VARBINARY)
            WHEN gno_token_hex = '0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee' THEN g.addr
            ELSE FROM_HEX(REPLACE(gno_token_hex,'0x',''))
          END AS gno_addr,
          LOWER(COALESCE(gno_symbol_raw, '')) AS gno_symbol_lc
        FROM debridge_pre p
        LEFT JOIN gno_native g ON TRUE
      ),
      debridge_joined AS (
        SELECT
          d.block_time AS timestamp,
          'deBridge'   AS bridge,
          d.sourceChain AS source_chain,
          d.targetChain AS dest_chain,
          COALESCE(bpa.symbol, te.symbol, d.gno_symbol_raw) AS token,
          CASE
            WHEN d.targetChain = 'gnosis' AND d.sourceChain <> 'gnosis'
              THEN CAST(d.targetAmount AS DOUBLE) / POW(10, COALESCE(bpa.decimals, te.decimals, 18))
            WHEN d.sourceChain = 'gnosis' AND d.targetChain <> 'gnosis'
              THEN CAST(d.sourceAmount AS DOUBLE) / POW(10, COALESCE(bpa.decimals, te.decimals, 18))
            ELSE NULL
          END AS amount_token,
          CASE
            WHEN d.targetChain = 'gnosis' AND d.sourceChain <> 'gnosis' THEN
              (CAST(d.targetAmount AS DOUBLE) / POW(10, COALESCE(bpa.decimals, te.decimals, 18)))
              * COALESCE(
                  bpa.price,
                  bps_wrapper.price,
                  bps_under.price,
                  pd.price,
                  CASE WHEN d.gno_symbol_lc = 'xdai' THEN 1.0 ELSE NULL END
                )
            WHEN d.sourceChain = 'gnosis' AND d.targetChain <> 'gnosis' THEN
              (CAST(d.sourceAmount AS DOUBLE) / POW(10, COALESCE(bpa.decimals, te.decimals, 18)))
              * COALESCE(
                  bpa.price,
                  bps_wrapper.price,
                  bps_under.price,
                  pd.price,
                  CASE WHEN d.gno_symbol_lc = 'xdai' THEN 1.0 ELSE NULL END
                )
            ELSE NULL
          END AS amount_usd
        FROM debridge_addr d
        LEFT JOIN gnosis_bluechip bpa
          ON bpa.block_date    = CAST(d.block_time AS DATE)
         AND bpa.token_address = d.gno_addr
        LEFT JOIN tokens.erc20 te
          ON te.blockchain       = 'gnosis'
         AND te.contract_address = d.gno_addr
        LEFT JOIN gnosis_bluechip_sym bps_wrapper
          ON bps_wrapper.block_date = CAST(d.block_time AS DATE)
         AND bps_wrapper.symbol_lc  = LOWER(COALESCE(bpa.symbol, te.symbol, d.gno_symbol_raw, ''))
        LEFT JOIN gnosis_bluechip_sym bps_under
          ON bps_under.block_date = CAST(d.block_time AS DATE)
         AND bps_under.symbol_lc  = LOWER(
               CASE
                 WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(bpa.symbol, te.symbol, d.gno_symbol_raw, '')) LIKE 'agno%' THEN SUBSTR(COALESCE(bpa.symbol, te.symbol, d.gno_symbol_raw), 5)
                 WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(bpa.symbol, te.symbol, d.gno_symbol_raw, '')) LIKE 's%'    THEN SUBSTR(COALESCE(bpa.symbol, te.symbol, d.gno_symbol_raw), 2)
                 ELSE NULL
               END
             )
        LEFT JOIN prices.usd_daily pd
          ON pd.blockchain = 'gnosis'
         AND pd.contract_address  = d.gno_addr
         AND pd.day               = CAST(d.block_time AS DATE)
      ),
      debridge_flows AS (
        SELECT timestamp, bridge, source_chain, dest_chain, token, amount_token, amount_usd
        FROM debridge_joined
      ),
    
      xdai_flows AS (
        SELECT timestamp, bridge, source_chain, dest_chain, token, amount_token, amount_usd
        FROM (
          SELECT
            e.evt_block_time AS timestamp, 'xDai Bridge' AS bridge,
            'ethereum' AS source_chain, 'gnosis' AS dest_chain,
            'xDAI' AS token,
            CAST(e.value AS DOUBLE)/1e18 AS amount_token,
            CAST(e.value AS DOUBLE)/1e18 AS amount_usd,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.evt_tx_hash ORDER BY e.evt_block_time) AS rn
          FROM xdai_bridge_gnosis.homebridgeerctonative_evt_affirmationcompleted e
          WHERE e.evt_block_time >= TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01'
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
        UNION ALL
        SELECT timestamp, bridge, source_chain, dest_chain, token, amount_token, amount_usd
        FROM (
          SELECT
            e.evt_block_time AS timestamp, 'xDai Bridge' AS bridge,
            'gnosis' AS source_chain, 'ethereum' AS dest_chain,
            'xDAI' AS token,
            CAST(e.value AS DOUBLE)/1e18 AS amount_token,
            CAST(e.value AS DOUBLE)/1e18 AS amount_usd,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.evt_tx_hash ORDER BY e.evt_block_time) AS rn
          FROM xdai_bridge_gnosis.homebridgeerctonative_evt_userrequestforsignature e
          WHERE e.evt_block_time >= TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01'
        )
        WHERE rn = 1
      ),
    
      omnibridge_in AS (
        SELECT
          e.evt_block_time AS timestamp, 'OmniBridge' AS bridge,
          'ethereum' AS source_chain, 'gnosis' AS dest_chain,
          COALESCE(bpa.symbol, te.symbol) AS token,
          CAST(e.value AS DOUBLE) / POW(10, COALESCE(bpa.decimals, te.decimals, 18)) AS amount_token,
          (CAST(e.value AS DOUBLE) / POW(10, COALESCE(bpa.decimals, te.decimals, 18)))
            * COALESCE(bpa.price, pd.price, bps.price) AS amount_usd
        FROM omnibridge_gnosis.homeomnibridge_evt_tokensbridged e
        JOIN query_4361013 bc
          ON bc.token_address = e.token
         AND e.evt_block_time >= bc.date_start
         AND (e.evt_block_time < bc.date_end OR bc.date_end IS NULL)
        LEFT JOIN gnosis_bluechip bpa
          ON bpa.block_date    = CAST(e.evt_block_time AS DATE)
         AND bpa.token_address = bc.token_address
        LEFT JOIN tokens.erc20 te
          ON te.blockchain       = 'gnosis'
         AND te.contract_address = bc.token_address
        LEFT JOIN gnosis_bluechip_sym bps
          ON bps.block_date = CAST(e.evt_block_time AS DATE)
         AND bps.symbol_lc  = LOWER(COALESCE(bpa.symbol, te.symbol, ''))
        LEFT JOIN prices.usd_daily pd
          ON pd.blockchain = 'gnosis'
         AND pd.contract_address  = bc.token_address
         AND pd.day               = CAST(e.evt_block_time AS DATE)
        WHERE e.evt_block_time >= TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01'
      ),
      omnibridge_out AS (
        SELECT
          e.evt_block_time AS timestamp, 'OmniBridge' AS bridge,
          'gnosis' AS source_chain, 'ethereum' AS dest_chain,
          COALESCE(bpa.symbol, te.symbol) AS token,
          CAST(e.value AS DOUBLE) / POW(10, COALESCE(bpa.decimals, te.decimals, 18)) AS amount_token,
          (CAST(e.value AS DOUBLE) / POW(10, COALESCE(bpa.decimals, te.decimals, 18)))
            * COALESCE(bpa.price, pd.price, bps.price) AS amount_usd
        FROM omnibridge_gnosis.homeomnibridge_evt_tokensbridginginitiated e
        JOIN query_4361013 bc
          ON bc.token_address = e.token
         AND e.evt_block_time >= bc.date_start
         AND (e.evt_block_time < bc.date_end OR bc.date_end IS NULL)
        LEFT JOIN gnosis_bluechip bpa
          ON bpa.block_date    = CAST(e.evt_block_time AS DATE)
         AND bpa.token_address = bc.token_address
        LEFT JOIN tokens.erc20 te
          ON te.blockchain       = 'gnosis'
         AND te.contract_address = bc.token_address
        LEFT JOIN gnosis_bluechip_sym bps
          ON bps.block_date = CAST(e.evt_block_time AS DATE)
         AND bps.symbol_lc  = LOWER(COALESCE(bpa.symbol, te.symbol, ''))
        LEFT JOIN prices.usd_daily pd
          ON pd.blockchain = 'gnosis'
         AND pd.contract_address  = bc.token_address
         AND pd.day               = CAST(e.evt_block_time AS DATE)
        WHERE e.evt_block_time >= TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01'
      ),
      omnibridge_flows AS (
        SELECT * FROM omnibridge_in
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM omnibridge_out
      ),
    
      symbiosis_flows AS (
        SELECT
          f.block_time AS timestamp, 'Symbiosis' AS bridge,
          f.source_chain AS source_chain, f.target_chain AS dest_chain,
          f.symbol AS token, f.amount AS amount_token, f.amount_usd AS amount_usd
        FROM query_5156433 f
        WHERE f.block_time >= TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01'
      ),
      stargate_flows AS (
        SELECT
          block_time AS timestamp, 'Stargate' AS bridge,
          source_chain, target_chain, symbol, amount AS amount_token, amount_usd
        FROM query_5210089
        WHERE block_time >= TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01'
      ),
      eywa_flows AS (
        SELECT
          f.evt_block_time AS timestamp, 'Eywa' AS bridge,
          f.sourceChain AS source_chain, f.targetChain AS dest_chain,
          f.underlying_symbol AS token,
          CAST(f.underlying_amount_raw AS DOUBLE)/POW(10, COALESCE(t.decimals,18)) AS amount_token,
          f.underlying_usd AS amount_usd
        FROM query_5233748 f
        LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT contract_address, decimals,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY contract_address ORDER BY decimals) AS rn
          FROM tokens.erc20
          WHERE blockchain = 'gnosis'
        ) t
          ON t.contract_address = f.underlying_token
         AND t.rn = 1
        WHERE f.evt_block_time >= TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01'
      ),
      swapsio_flows AS (
        SELECT
          f.event_time AS timestamp, 'Swapsio' AS bridge,
          src.blockchain AS source_chain, tgt.blockchain AS dest_chain,
          f.gnosis_symbol AS token,
          CAST(f.gnosis_amount_raw AS DOUBLE) / POW(10, f.gnosis_decimals) AS amount_token,
          f.gnosis_amount_usd AS amount_usd
        FROM query_5245580 f
        LEFT JOIN evms.info src ON src.chain_id = f.source_chain_id
        LEFT JOIN evms.info tgt ON tgt.chain_id = f.target_chain_id
        WHERE f.event_time >= TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01'
      ),
      hop_flows AS (
        SELECT
          f.block_time AS timestamp, 'Hop Protocol' AS bridge,
          f.sourceChain AS source_chain, f.targetChain AS dest_chain,
          f.symbol AS token,
          CASE WHEN f.sourceChain='gnosis' THEN CAST(f.sourceAmount AS DOUBLE)
               ELSE CAST(f.targetAmount AS DOUBLE) END AS amount_token,
          CAST(f.amount_usd AS DOUBLE) AS amount_usd
        FROM query_5194053 f
        WHERE f.block_time >= TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01'
      ),
    
      all_flows AS (
        SELECT * FROM debridge_flows
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM xdai_flows
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM omnibridge_flows
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM symbiosis_flows
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM hop_flows
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM stargate_flows
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM eywa_flows
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM swapsio_flows
      )
    
    SELECT DISTINCT
      timestamp, bridge, source_chain, dest_chain, token, amount_token, amount_usd,
      CASE
        WHEN source_chain='gnosis' THEN CASE WHEN amount_usd IS NOT NULL THEN -amount_usd ELSE NULL END
        WHEN dest_chain='gnosis' THEN amount_usd
        ELSE NULL
      END AS net_usd
    FROM all_flows
    WHERE amount_usd IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY timestamp DESC, bridge, token
    ```

## Uniswap

*1 queries*

### gnosis_uniswap_v3_circles_pools_v

**Query ID:** 5154512 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    crc20_tokens AS (
        SELECT 
            erc20Wrapper AS token_address
            ,IF(circlesType=0, 'CRC', 's-CRC') AS symbol
            ,18 AS decimals
        FROM circles_ubi_v2_gnosis.erc20lift_evt_erc20wrapperdeployed
    ),
    
    pool_creation AS (
        SELECT
             pool
            ,token0
            ,token1
            ,fee
            ,decimals0
            ,symbol0
            ,decimals1
            ,symbol1
            ,CONCAT(symbol0,'/',symbol1,' ',CAST(CAST(fee AS DOUBLE)/10000 AS VARCHAR),'%') AS pool_symbol
            ,IF(symbol0 = 'CRC' OR symbol0 = 's-CRC', token1, token0) AS backing_asset
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t1.pool
               ,t1.token0
               ,t1.token1
               ,t1.fee
               ,IF(t2.decimals IS NOT NULL, t2.decimals, 18) AS decimals0
               ,IF(t1a.token_address = t1.token0, t1a.symbol, t2.symbol) AS symbol0
               ,IF(t3.decimals IS NOT NULL, t3.decimals, 18) AS decimals1
               ,IF(t1a.token_address = t1.token0, t3.symbol, t1a.symbol) AS symbol1
            FROM
                uniswap_v3_gnosis.uniswapv3factory_evt_poolcreated t1
            INNER JOIN
                crc20_tokens t1a
                ON t1a.token_address = t1.token0
            LEFT JOIN
                tokens.erc20 t2
                ON t2.contract_address = t1.token0
                AND t2.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            LEFT JOIN
                tokens.erc20 t3
                ON t3.contract_address = t1.token1
                AND t3.blockchain = 'gnosis'
            WHERE 
                token0 IN (SELECT token_address FROM crc20_tokens)
                OR
                token1 IN (SELECT token_address FROM crc20_tokens)
        )
    ),
    
    pool_init AS (
        SELECT 
            t1.contract_address AS pool
            ,t1.evt_block_time 
            ,t1.evt_index
            ,0 AS amount0_delta
            ,0 AS amount1_delta
            ,t1.tick
        FROM 
            uniswap_v3_gnosis.uniswapv3pool_evt_initialize t1
        INNER JOIN
            pool_creation t2 
            ON t2.pool = t1.contract_address
    ),
    
    mint AS (
        SELECT
            t2.pool
            ,t1.evt_block_time
            ,t1.evt_index
            ,CAST(t1.amount0 AS INT256) AS amount0_delta
            ,CAST(t1.amount1 AS INT256) AS amount1_delta
            ,NULL AS tick
        FROM
            uniswap_v3_gnosis.uniswapv3pool_evt_mint t1
        INNER JOIN
            pool_creation t2
            ON t2.pool = t1.contract_address
    ),
    
    burn AS (
        SELECT
            t2.pool
            ,t1.evt_block_time
            ,t1.evt_index
            ,-CAST(t1.amount0 AS INT256) AS amount0_delta
            ,-CAST(t1.amount1 AS INT256) AS amount1_delta
            ,NULL AS tick
        FROM
            uniswap_v3_gnosis.uniswapv3pool_evt_burn t1
        INNER JOIN
            pool_creation t2
            ON t2.pool = t1.contract_address
    ),
    
    swap AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.pool
            ,t1.evt_block_time 
            ,t1.evt_index
            ,CAST(t1.amount0 - IF(t1.amount0>0,t1.amount0*t2.fee/power(10, 6),0) AS INT256) AS amount0_delta
            ,CAST(t1.amount1 - IF(t1.amount1>0,t1.amount1*t2.fee/power(10, 6),0) AS INT256) AS amount1_delta
            ,tick
        FROM 
            uniswap_v3_gnosis.uniswapv3pool_evt_swap t1
        INNER JOIN
            pool_creation t2
            ON t2.pool = t1.contract_address
    ),
    
    pool_reserves AS (
        SELECT
            t1.pool
            ,t2.symbol0
            ,t2.token0
            ,t2.symbol1
            ,t2.token1
            ,t2.pool_symbol
            ,t2.backing_asset
            ,t1.block_date
            ,SUM(t1.amount0_delta/POWER(10,t2.decimals0)) OVER (PARTITION BY  t1.pool ORDER BY t1.block_date) AS amount0
            ,SUM(t1.amount1_delta/POWER(10,t2.decimals1)) OVER (PARTITION BY  t1.pool ORDER BY t1.block_date) AS amount1
            ,LAST_VALUE(tick) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY  t1.pool ORDER BY t1.block_date) AS tick
        FROM (
            SELECT
                pool
                ,DATE_TRUNC('day', evt_block_time) AS block_date
                ,SUM(amount0_delta) AS amount0_delta
                ,SUM(amount1_delta) AS amount1_delta
                ,(ARRAY_AGG(tick ORDER BY evt_block_time DESC, evt_index DESC) FILTER (WHERE tick IS NOT NULL))[1] AS tick 
            FROM (
                SELECT * FROM pool_init
                UNION ALL
                SELECT * FROM mint 
                UNION ALL
                SELECT * FROM burn 
                UNION ALL
                SELECT * FROM swap 
            )
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        ) t1
        INNER JOIN
            pool_creation t2
            ON t2.pool = t1.pool
    )
    
    SELECT 
        t1.pool
        ,t1.symbol0
        ,t1.token0
        ,t1.symbol1
        ,t1.token1
        ,t1.backing_asset
        ,t1.pool_symbol
        ,t1.block_date
        ,t1.amount0
        ,t1.amount1
        ,t1.tick 
        ,POWER(1.0001,t1.tick) AS price
        ,IF(t1.token0 = t1.backing_asset, t1.amount0 * t2.price, t1.amount1 * t2.price) AS pool_liquidity_usd
    FROM pool_reserves t1
    LEFT JOIN
        query_4338954 t2 --gnosis_daily_token_prices_v 
        ON t2.token_address = t1.backing_asset
        AND t2.block_date = t1.block_date
    ```

## Users

*3 queries*

### gnosis_users_bluechips_token_balances_daily_v2

**Query ID:** 6517833 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    bluechips AS (
       SELECT
            token_address,
            decimals,
            symbol,
            date_start,
            date_end
        FROM (
            VALUES
                (0xcb444e90d8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12fc56e, 18, 'EURe', DATE '2022-11-01', DATE '2024-08-25'),
                (0x420CA0f9B9b604cE0fd9C18EF134C705e5Fa3430, 18, 'EURe', DATE '2024-08-25', NULL),
                (0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108, 18, 'GBPe', DATE '2022-11-01', DATE '2024-08-25'),
                (0x8E34bfEC4f6Eb781f9743D9b4af99CD23F9b7053, 18, 'GBPe', DATE '2024-08-25', NULL),
                (0x9c58bacc331c9aa871afd802db6379a98e80cedb, 18, 'GNO', DATE '2020-08-23', NULL),
                (0xaf204776c7245bF4147c2612BF6e5972Ee483701, 18, 'sDAI', DATE '2023-09-28', NULL),
                (0x2a22f9c3b484c3629090FeED35F17Ff8F88f76F0, 6, 'USDC.e', DATE '2024-03-21', NULL),
                (0xFECB3F7c54E2CAAE9dC6Ac9060A822D47E053760, 18, 'BRLA', DATE '2024-07-05', NULL),
                (0xD4dD9e2F021BB459D5A5f6c24C12fE09c5D45553, 18, 'ZCHF', DATE '2025-06-05', NULL),
                (0x6165946250DD04740aB1409217E95a4f38374fE9, 18, 'svZCHF', DATE '2025-09-11', NULL)
        ) AS v(token_address, decimals, symbol, date_start, date_end)
    ),
    
    
    tokens_balance_diff AS (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,wallet AS user
            ,token_address
            ,symbol
            ,amount_raw
        FROM 
           query_6514678 -- gnosis_users_bluechips_token_balances_diff_daily_v_v2
    ),
    
    calendar AS (
        SELECT 
            user
            ,token_address
            ,symbol
            ,block_date
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t1.user
                ,t1.token_address
                ,t1.symbol
                ,MIN(t1.block_date) AS block_date_min
                ,t2.date_end - INTERVAL '1' DAY AS date_end
            FROM tokens_balance_diff t1
            INNER JOIN
                bluechips t2
                ON t2.token_address = t1.token_address
            GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 5
        ),
        UNNEST(SEQUENCE(CAST(block_date_min AS DATE), DATE_TRUNC('day', COALESCE(date_end,CURRENT_DATE)), INTERVAL '1' DAY)) s(block_date)
    ),
    
    
    prices AS (
        SELECT t3.* FROM dune.gnosischain_team.result_gnosis_daily_bluechip_prices_v t3
        INNER JOIN bluechips t2
        ON t2.token_address = t3.token_address
    ),
    
    tokens_balances AS (
        SELECT 
            t2.user
            ,t2.block_date
            ,t2.symbol
            ,(SUM(COALESCE(t1.amount_raw,0))  OVER (PARTITION BY t2.user, t2.token_address ORDER BY t2.block_date))/POWER(10,t3.decimals) AS balance
            ,(SUM(COALESCE(t1.amount_raw,0))  OVER (PARTITION BY t2.user, t2.token_address ORDER BY t2.block_date))/POWER(10,t3.decimals) * t3.price AS balance_usd
        FROM 
            calendar t2
        LEFT JOIN
            tokens_balance_diff t1
            ON t2.block_date = t1.block_date
            AND t2.user = t1.user
            AND t2.token_address = t1.token_address
        LEFT JOIN
            prices t3
            ON 
            t3.block_date = t2.block_date
            AND
            t3.token_address = t2.token_address
    ),
    
    atokens_balances AS (
        SELECT
            address AS user,
            block_date,
            reserve_symbol AS symbol,
            balance,
            balance_usd
        FROM query_6511028
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT
            user,
            block_date,
            symbol,
            SUM(balance) AS balance,
            SUM(balance_usd) AS balance_usd
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM tokens_balances
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM atokens_balances
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM final
    WHERE balance!=0
    ```

### gnosis_users_bluechips_token_balances_diff_daily_v

**Query ID:** 4432380 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_wallets_creation AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4396197 t2 --gnosis_wallets_creation_v
    ),
    
    bluechips AS (
       SELECT * FROM query_4361013 --gnosis_bluechip_tokens_v
    ),
    
    transfers AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_number,
            t1.block_time,
            --COALESCE(t1.contract_address,0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee) AS token_address,
            t2.token_address,
            t2.symbol,
            t1."from",
            t1.to,
            t1.amount_raw
        FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            bluechips t2
            ON t2.token_address = t1.contract_address
            --OR (t1.contract_address IS NULL AND t2.token_address=0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee)
        WHERE
            t1.block_date < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL
    ),
    
    balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_number,
            t1.block_time,
            t1.token_address,
            t1.symbol,
            t1."from" AS wallet,
            -CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_wallets_creation t2
            ON
            t2.address = t1."from"
        WHERE
            t1.block_time >= t2.creation_time
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT
            t1.block_number,
            t1.block_time,
            t1.token_address,
            t1.symbol,
            t1."to" AS wallet,
            CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_wallets_creation t2
            ON
            t2.address = t1."to"
        WHERE
            t1.block_time >= t2.creation_time
    ),
    
    final AS (
        SELECT 
            DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.block_time) AS block_date,
            t1.token_address,
            t1.symbol,
            t1.wallet,
            SUM(t1.amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM 
            balance_diff t1            
        GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM final 
    WHERE amount_raw != 0
    ```

### gnosis_users_bluechips_token_volume_daily_v

**Query ID:** 5138197 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_wallets_creation AS (
        SELECT * FROM query_4396197 t2 --gnosis_wallets_creation_v
    ),
    
    bluechips AS (
       SELECT * FROM query_4361013 --gnosis_bluechip_tokens_v
    ),
    
    transfers AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.block_time) AS block_date,
            --COALESCE(t1.contract_address,0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee) AS token_address,
            t2.token_address,
            t2.symbol,
            t1."from" AS wallet,
            SUM(t1.amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            bluechips t2
            ON t2.token_address = t1.contract_address
          --  OR (t1.contract_address IS NULL AND t2.token_address=0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee)
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_wallets_creation t3
            ON t3.address = t1."from"
        WHERE
            t1.block_date < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL
        GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM transfers
    WHERE amount_raw != 0
    ```

## Volume

*2 queries*

### gnosis_volume_per_quarters_v1

**Query ID:** 3925952 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    wxdai_volume AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,token_address
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                evt_block_date AS block_date
                ,contract_address AS token_address
                ,SUM(wad) AS amount_raw
            FROM 
                wxdai_gnosis.WXDAI_evt_Deposit
            WHERE
                evt_block_date >= DATE '2023-01-01'
            GROUP BY 1, 2
            
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT 
                 evt_block_date AS block_date
                ,contract_address AS token_address
                ,SUM(wad) AS amount_raw
            FROM 
                wxdai_gnosis.WXDAI_evt_Withdrawal
            WHERE
                evt_block_date >= DATE '2023-01-01'
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        )
        GROUP BY
            1, 2
    ),
    
    xdai_volume AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee AS token_address
            ,SUM(value) AS amount_raw
        FROM gnosis.traces
        WHERE success
            AND (call_type NOT IN ('delegatecall', 'callcode', 'staticcall') OR call_type IS null)
            AND value > UINT256 '0'
            AND
            block_date >= DATE '2023-01-01'
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    
    tokens_volume AS (
        SELECT
            evt_block_date AS block_day
            ,contract_address AS token_address
            ,SUM(value) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            erc20_gnosis.evt_transfer
        WHERE
            evt_block_date >= DATE '2023-01-01'
            AND
            value > 0
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    ),
    
    volume_raw AS (
        SELECT * FROM tokens_volume
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM wxdai_volume
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM xdai_volume
    ),
    
    volume AS (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_day
                ,CASE
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee THEN 'xDAI'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 THEN 'GBPe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xc6B7AcA6DE8a6044E0e32d0c841a89244A10D284 THEN 'aGnoUSDC'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2 THEN 'aGnoEURe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x7a5c3860a77a8DC1b225BD46d0fb2ac1C6D191BC THEN 'aGnosDAI'
                    ELSE t2.symbol
                END AS symbol
                ,SUM(
                    CASE
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*1.25
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0xc6B7AcA6DE8a6044E0e32d0c841a89244A10D284
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,6)*1.0
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0x7a5c3860a77a8DC1b225BD46d0fb2ac1C6D191BC
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*1.0
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*t2.price
                        ELSE  t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals)*t2.price
                    END
                ) AS amount
            FROM volume_raw t1
            LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd_daily t2
                ON t2.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t2.day = t1.block_day
                AND
                (
                t2.contract_address = t1.token_address
                OR 
                (t2.contract_address = 0xe91D153E0b41518A2Ce8Dd3D7944Fa863463a97d 
                    AND 
                t1.token_address = 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee)
                OR 
                (t2.contract_address = 0xcB444e90D8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12FC56E 
                    AND 
                t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2)
                )
            GROUP BY 1,2
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,symbol
        ,amount
    FROM (
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,symbol
        ,amount
        ,amount/(SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY block_date) ) AS frac
    FROM (
    SELECT 
        CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(block_day) AS VARCHAR),' - Q', CAST(QUARTER(block_day) AS VARCHAR)) AS block_date
        --,IF(symbol IN ('xDAI','WXDAI','sDAI','USDC','USDT','EURe','GBPe','aGnoUSDC','aGnoEURe','CRVUSD', 'aGnosDAI','BUSD','USDC.e'), 'Stablecoins', symbol) AS symbol
        ,symbol
        ,COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS amount
    FROM volume
    GROUP BY 1,2
    )
    )
    WHERE frac >= 0.01
    ORDER BY 3 DESC
    ```

### gnosis_volume_per_quarters_v2

**Query ID:** 3926001 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    volume_raw AS (
        SELECT
            block_date AS block_day
            ,CASE 
                WHEN token_standard = 'native' THEN 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee
                ELSE contract_address
            END AS token_address
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM
            test_schema.git_dunesql_c67e8dd_tokens_gnosis_transfers
            --tokens_gnosis.transfers
        WHERE
            block_date >= DATE '2023-01-01'
            AND
            amount_raw > 0
        GROUP BY 1,2
    ),
    
    volume AS (
            SELECT 
                t1.block_day
                ,CASE
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee THEN 'xDAI'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 THEN 'GBPe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xc6B7AcA6DE8a6044E0e32d0c841a89244A10D284 THEN 'aGnoUSDC'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2 THEN 'aGnoEURe'
                    WHEN t1.token_address = 0x7a5c3860a77a8DC1b225BD46d0fb2ac1C6D191BC THEN 'aGnosDAI'
                    ELSE t2.symbol
                END AS symbol
                ,SUM(
                    CASE
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0x5Cb9073902F2035222B9749F8fB0c9BFe5527108 
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*1.25
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0xc6B7AcA6DE8a6044E0e32d0c841a89244A10D284
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,6)*1.0
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0x7a5c3860a77a8DC1b225BD46d0fb2ac1C6D191BC
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*1.0
                        WHEN t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2
                            THEN t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,18)*t2.price
                        ELSE  t1.amount_raw/POWER(10,t2.decimals)*t2.price
                    END
                ) AS amount
            FROM volume_raw t1
            LEFT JOIN
                prices.usd_daily t2
                ON t2.blockchain = 'gnosis'
                AND t2.day = t1.block_day
                AND
                (
                t2.contract_address = t1.token_address
                OR 
                (t2.contract_address = 0xe91D153E0b41518A2Ce8Dd3D7944Fa863463a97d 
                    AND 
                t1.token_address = 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee)
                OR 
                (t2.contract_address = 0xcB444e90D8198415266c6a2724b7900fb12FC56E 
                    AND 
                t1.token_address = 0xEdBC7449a9b594CA4E053D9737EC5Dc4CbCcBfb2)
                )
            GROUP BY 1,2
    )
    
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,symbol
        ,amount
    FROM (
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,symbol
        ,amount
        ,amount/(SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY block_date) ) AS frac
    FROM (
    SELECT 
        CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(block_day) AS VARCHAR),' - Q', CAST(QUARTER(block_day) AS VARCHAR)) AS block_date
        ,symbol
        ,COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) AS amount
    FROM volume
    GROUP BY 1,2
    )
    )
    WHERE frac >= 0.01
    ORDER BY 3 DESC
    ```

## Wallet

*1 queries*

### gnosis_wallet_address_daily_appearances_v

**Query ID:** 3821724 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_metri_crc_mints AS (
        SELECT 
            CAST(evt_block_time AS DATE) AS block_date
            ,wallet_address
            ,method
        FROM 
            query_3820993
    ),
    
    gnosis_metri_crc_transfers AS (
        SELECT 
             CAST(evt_block_time AS DATE) AS block_date
            ,wallet_address
            ,method
        FROM 
            query_3821308
    ),
    
    gnosis_metri_monerium_transfers AS (
        SELECT 
             CAST(block_time AS DATE) AS block_date
            ,wallet_address
            ,method
        FROM 
            query_3792681
    ),
    
    gnosis_wallet_address_appearances AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT * FROM (
            SELECT * FROM gnosis_metri_crc_mints
            UNION ALL 
            SELECT * FROM gnosis_metri_crc_transfers
            UNION ALL 
            SELECT * FROM gnosis_metri_monerium_transfers
        )
    )
    
    
    SELECT
        wallet_address
        ,method
        ,block_date
        ,COALESCE(block_date_lead, CURRENT_DATE) AS block_date_lead
        ,DATE_DIFF('day', block_date + INTERVAL '1' DAY, COALESCE(block_date_lead, CURRENT_DATE)) AS inactive_days
        ,CASE
            WHEN block_date_lead IS NULL THEN 'inactive'
            ELSE 'active'
        END AS status
    FROM (
        SELECT
            wallet_address
            ,method
            ,block_date 
            ,LEAD(block_date) OVER (PARTITION BY wallet_address ORDER BY block_date) AS block_date_lead
        FROM 
            gnosis_wallet_address_appearances
    )
    ```

## Wallets

*3 queries*

### gnosis_wallets_creation_v

**Query ID:** 4396197 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    safe_wallets AS (
        SELECT
            t1.address
            ,LEAST(t1.creation_time, t2.creation_time) AS creation_time
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t1.address
                --,t1.creation_time
                ,MIN(t2.block_time) AS creation_time
            FROM safe_gnosis.safes t1
            INNER JOIN
                tokens_gnosis.transfers t2
                ON t1.address = t2."to"
            GROUP BY 1
        ) t1
        INNER JOIN 
            safe_gnosis.safes t2
            ON t2.address = t1.address
    ),
    
    eoa_potentials AS ( --misses addresses that only recieved
        SELECT DISTINCT
            "from" AS address
        FROM gnosis.transactions
    ),        
    
    eoa_addresses AS (
        SELECT
            "to" AS address,
            ARRAY_AGG(block_time ORDER BY block_time)[1] AS creation_time
        FROM (
            SELECT
                block_time,
                "to"
            FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
            WHERE t1."to" IN (SELECT address FROM eoa_potentials )
        ) 
        GROUP BY 1
    )
    
    
    SELECT creation_time, address, 'safes' AS label FROM safe_wallets
    UNION ALL
    SELECT creation_time, address, 'eoa' AS label FROM eoa_addresses
    ```

### gnosis_wallets_current_balances_v

**Query ID:** 4702362 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    gnosis_wallets_creation AS (
        SELECT safe_address AS address FROM dune.gnosischain_team.dataset_safe_addresses--dune.gnosischain_team.dataset_addresses
    ),
    
    bluechips AS (
       SELECT * FROM query_4361013 --gnosis_bluechip_tokens_v
    ),
    
    transfers AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_number,
            t1.block_time,
            t2.token_address,
            t2.symbol,
            t2.decimals,
            t1."from",
            t1.to,
            t1.amount_raw
        FROM tokens_gnosis.transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            bluechips t2
            ON t2.token_address = COALESCE(t1.contract_address, 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee)
       -- WHERE
        --     t1.block_date < t2.date_end OR t2.date_end IS NULL
    ),
    
    balance_diff AS (
        SELECT
            t1.block_number,
            t1.block_time,
            t1.token_address,
            t1.symbol,
            t1.decimals,
            t1."from" AS wallet,
            -CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_wallets_creation t2
            ON
            t2.address = t1."from"
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT
            t1.block_number,
            t1.block_time,
            t1.token_address,
            t1.symbol,
            t1.decimals,
            t1."to" AS wallet,
            CAST(t1.amount_raw AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM transfers t1
        INNER JOIN
            gnosis_wallets_creation t2
            ON
            t2.address = t1."to"
    )
    
    SELECT
        token_address
        ,symbol
        ,wallet
        ,amount_raw/POWER(10,decimals) AS current_balance
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            t1.token_address,
            t1.symbol,
            t1.decimals,
            t1.wallet,
            SUM(t1.amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM 
            balance_diff t1            
        LEFT JOIN
            bluechips t3
            ON t3.token_address = t1.token_address
        WHERE
            t3.token_address IS NULL
            OR
            (t3.token_address = t1.token_address AND ( t3.date_end IS NULL))
        GROUP BY 1,2,3, 4
    )
    WHERE
        amount_raw > 0 -- remove 0 and very small negatives from aave tokens (rebasing?)
    ```

## Xdai

*4 queries*

### gnosis_xDAI_bridge_flows_v

**Query ID:** 4706815 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    --0x7301cfa0e1756b71869e93d4e4dca5c7d0eb0aa6
    
    xdai_bridge_outflow AS (
        SELECT 
            evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,recipient AS counterparty
            ,-CAST(value AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM 
            xdai_bridge_gnosis.homebridgeerctonative_evt_userrequestforsignature
    ),
    
    xdai_bridge_inflow AS (
        SELECT
            evt_block_time AS block_time
            ,recipient AS counterparty
            ,CAST(value AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM 
            xdai_bridge_gnosis.homebridgeerctonative_evt_affirmationcompleted
    ),
    
    xdai_bridge_flow AS (
        SELECT
            block_time
            ,counterparty
            ,SUM(IF(amount_raw<0,amount_raw,0)) AS outflow_raw
            ,SUM(IF(amount_raw>=0,amount_raw,0)) AS inflow_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM xdai_bridge_inflow
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM xdai_bridge_outflow
        )
        GROUP BY 1, 2
    )
    
    SELECT * FROM xdai_bridge_flow
    ```

### gnosis_xdai_accounts_sparse_daily_balance_v

**Query ID:** 4374784 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    xdai_sparse_balance AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,address
            ,(SUM(amount_raw) OVER (PARTITION BY address ORDER BY block_date)) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT
                block_date
                ,address
                ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
            FROM (
                SELECT 
                    block_date
                    ,IF("from" is NULL, 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000, "from") AS address
                    ,SUM(IF("from" is NULL, amount_raw, -amount_raw)) AS amount_raw
                FROM 
                    tokens_gnosis.transfers
                WHERE token_standard  =  'native'
                GROUP BY
                    1, 2
                    
                UNION ALL
                
                SELECT 
                    block_date
                    ,IF(to = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 OR to IS NULL,0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000, to ) AS address
                    ,CAST(SUM(IF(to = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 OR to IS NULL,-amount_raw, amount_raw )) AS INT256) AS amount_raw
                FROM 
                    tokens_gnosis.transfers
                WHERE 
                    token_standard  =  'native' 
                GROUP BY 1, 2
            )
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        )
    )
    
    SELECT 
        block_date
        ,address
        ,amount_raw/POWER(10,18) AS amount
    FROM xdai_sparse_balance
    ```

### gnosis_xdai_labels_sparse_daily_balance_v

**Query ID:** 4375502 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH
    
    contracts_labels AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            address
        FROM
            gnosis.contracts
    ),
    
    xdai_sparse_balance AS (
        SELECT
            block_date
            ,label
            ,(SUM(amount_raw) OVER (PARTITION BY label ORDER BY block_date)) AS amount_raw
        FROM (
            SELECT
                t1.block_date
                 ,CASE
                    WHEN t1.address = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 THEN 'supply'
                    WHEN t2.address = t1.address THEN 'safe'
                    WHEN t3.address = t1.address THEN 'contract'
                    ELSE 'EOA'
                END AS label
                ,SUM(t1.amount_raw) AS amount_raw
            FROM (
                SELECT 
                    block_date
                    ,IF("from" is NULL, 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000, "from") AS address
                    ,SUM(IF("from" is NULL, amount_raw, -amount_raw)) AS amount_raw
                FROM 
                    tokens_gnosis.transfers
                WHERE token_standard  =  'native'
                GROUP BY
                    1, 2
                    
                UNION ALL
                
                SELECT 
                    block_date
                    ,IF(to = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 OR to IS NULL,0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000, to ) AS address
                    ,CAST(SUM(IF(to = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 OR to IS NULL,-amount_raw, amount_raw )) AS INT256) AS amount_raw
                FROM 
                    tokens_gnosis.transfers
                WHERE 
                    token_standard  =  'native' 
                GROUP BY 1, 2
            ) t1
            LEFT JOIN
                safe_gnosis.safes t2
                ON t2.address = t1.address
            LEFT JOIN
                contracts_labels t3
                ON t3.address = t1.address
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        ) 
    )
    
    SELECT 
        block_date
        ,label
        ,amount_raw/POWER(10,18) AS amount
    FROM xdai_sparse_balance
    ```

### gnosis_xdai_supply_v

**Query ID:** 3822830 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    SELECT
        block_date
        ,(SUM(amount_raw) OVER (ORDER BY block_date))/POWER(10,18) AS value
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,SUM(amount_raw) AS amount_raw
        FROM 
            tokens_gnosis.transfers
        WHERE token_standard  =  'native' AND "from" is NULL
        GROUP BY
            1
            
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT 
            block_date
            ,-CAST(SUM(amount_raw) AS INT256) AS amount_raw
        FROM 
            tokens_gnosis.transfers
        WHERE 
            token_standard  =  'native' 
            AND (to = 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 OR to IS NULL)
        GROUP BY 1
    )
    ```

## Zeal

*2 queries*

### gnosis_zeal_gp_wallets_v

**Query ID:** 5616761 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH zeal_gt AS (
      SELECT DISTINCT safeaddress
      FROM dune.gnosischain_team.dataset_addresses_of_interest3
    ),
    gp_users AS (
      SELECT DISTINCT pay_wallet, creation_time, activation_time, owner
      FROM query_3707804   -- gnosis_gp_users_v
      WHERE activation_time IS NOT NULL
    ),
    gt_gp AS (
      SELECT g.safeaddress AS pay_wallet, u.creation_time, u.activation_time, u.owner
      FROM zeal_gt g
      INNER JOIN gp_users u
        ON u.pay_wallet = g.safeaddress
    ),
    wallet_creations AS (
      SELECT
          tr.address                    AS pay_wallet,
          tr.block_time                 AS pay_wallet_creation_time,
          tr.tx_hash,
          tr.tx_from                    AS relayer,
          tr."from"                     AS factory,
          CARDINALITY(tr.trace_address) AS depth
      FROM gnosis.traces tr
      JOIN gt_gp gg ON gg.pay_wallet = tr.address
      WHERE tr.type = 'create'
        AND tr.success = TRUE
    )
    
    SELECT
      gg.creation_time,
      gg.activation_time,
      wc.pay_wallet_creation_time,
      gg.pay_wallet,
      gg.owner,
      wc.relayer,
      wc.factory,
      wc.depth,
      wc.tx_hash,
      s.creation_time AS owner_creation_time  
    FROM gt_gp gg
    LEFT JOIN wallet_creations wc
      ON wc.pay_wallet = gg.pay_wallet
    LEFT JOIN safe_gnosis.safes s
      ON s.address = gg.owner
    ORDER BY gg.activation_time;
    ```

### gnosis_zeal_gp_wallets_v2

**Query ID:** 5683335 | **Updated:** --

??? note "SQL"
    ```sql
    WITH relayers AS (
      SELECT * FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[
        0x417b4adc279743fc49f047c323fc668db9e600d8,
        0xba9a3c0a22baebe8c4926227bde32d6edc0d5d28,
        0x620d7e459cffcdc56a874536dc19147de801a4a1,
        0xc4e7263dd870a29f1cfe438d1a7db48547b16888,
        0x59ed948390f079f2534c052acc3419d34975e026,
        0x3d529c760f3ec4c89bdd6549ddabe9097c1da6e9
      ]) AS t(addr)
    ),
    safe_factories AS (
      SELECT * FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[
        0xa6B71E26C5e0845f74c812102Ca7114b6a896AB2, -- Safe Proxy Factory v1.3
        0x4e1DCf7AD4e460CfD30791CCC4F9c8a4f820ec67  -- Safe Proxy Factory v1.4
      ]) AS t(addr)
    ),
    zeal_safe_creations AS (
      SELECT
          tr.address  AS pay_wallet,
          tr.block_time AS created_at,
          tr.tx_hash,
          tr.tx_from    AS relayer,
          tr."from"     AS factory,
          CARDINALITY(tr.trace_address) AS depth
      FROM gnosis.traces tr
      WHERE tr.type = 'create'
        AND tr.success = TRUE
        AND tr.tx_from IN (SELECT addr FROM relayers)
        AND tr."from"  IN (SELECT addr FROM safe_factories)
        -- NO depth filter on purpose
        AND tr.block_time >= DATE '2023-08-01'
    ),
    safe_verified AS (
      SELECT c.*
      FROM zeal_safe_creations c
      JOIN safe_gnosis.safes s
        ON s.address = c.pay_wallet   
    ),
    gp_activated AS (
      SELECT pay_wallet, creation_time, activation_time, owner
      FROM query_3707804
      WHERE activation_time IS NOT NULL
    )
    SELECT
      g.creation_time,
      g.activation_time,
      v.created_at       AS pay_wallet_creation_time,
      g.pay_wallet,
      g.owner,
      v.relayer, v.factory, v.depth, v.tx_hash
    FROM gp_activated g
    JOIN safe_verified v
      ON v.pay_wallet = g.pay_wallet
    ORDER BY g.activation_time;
    ```
